Examples of relevant information could include their name, their place of origin, their current residence, the name of their parent or significant other, their employer, or their organizational affiliation. The GM determines what constitutes relevant information for this purpose, based on the asset you've selected.

You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Deception, Diplomacy, Intimidation, and Perception checks against or in relation to your asset, and a +1 circumstance bonus to attempts to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about your asset.

You gain the benefits of the 2-action @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cmCtfURzpbzkxWsy]{Get 'Em!} when using 1-action Get 'Em! on an asset.

You can maintain a number of assets equal to your Charisma modifier. If you Size Up other assets after that, your new asset replaces a previous one.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.RBWwGxsrxPBKi3X7]{Effect: Size Up}

Adaptive Talent.name: 适应性天赋 Adaptive Talent
Adaptive Talent.description:
你思维敏捷且适应力强，只需很少的练习或训练就能掌握新的技能与才能。在你进行每日准备时，选择一个你满足其前提条件的技能专长。你获得该技能专长，直到你再次进行准备为止。由于你只是暂时拥有此专长，因此不能将其作为永久角色选项的前提条件。你可以将此能力用于那些会暂时让你获得其他能力的效果，例如选择 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.P9HCz0uR6xPHuw72]{Multilingual} 来暂时学会一门新语言。

随着你的特使等级提升，你适应新情况的能力也会增强。在9级和15级时，以此方式获得的技能专长数量各增加1个。你可以将通过适应才能暂时获得的专长，作为通过适应才能暂时获得其他专长的前提条件，但你仍然不能将它们作为永久角色选项的前提条件。

You're quick thinking and adaptable, capable of picking up new skills and talents with little practice or training. During your daily preparations, select one skill feat that you meet the prerequisites for. You gain this skill feat until you prepare again. Since you have this feat temporarily, you can't use it as a prerequisite for a permanent character option. You can use this for effects that temporarily give you access to other abilities, such as taking @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.P9HCz0uR6xPHuw72]{Multilingual} to temporarily learn a new language.

As your envoy level increases, so does your ability to adapt to new situations. At 9th level and 15th level, increase the number of skill feats you gain this way by 1. You can use feats that you temporarily gain through adaptive talent as a prerequisite for other feats that you temporarily gain through adaptive talent, but you still can't use them as prerequisites for permanent character options.

Wise to the Game.name: 洞悉游戏规则 Wise to the Game
Wise to the Game.description:
运用言语影响他人正是你的拿手好戏，而且你也很容易识破他人试图对你使用同样手段的企图。对于试图对你使用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.QNAVeNKtHA0EUw4X]{佯攻} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ewwCglB7XOPLUz72]{说谎} 的尝试，以及以 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{制造牵制} 来转移你注意力的尝试，你的察觉 DC 获得 +1 状态加值；而你的意志 DC 对抗情绪效果时获得 +1 状态加值。

Using your words to influence others is what you do, and you easily recognize when others attempt to use the same tactics against you. You gain a +1 status bonus to your Perception DC against attempts to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.QNAVeNKtHA0EUw4X]{Feint} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ewwCglB7XOPLUz72]{Lie} to you and attempts to divert your attention with @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{Create a Diversion}, and a +1 status bonus to your Will DC against emotion effects.

Laser Pistol.name: 激光手枪 Laser Pistol
Laser Pistol.description:
升级： 1

这款袖珍手枪凭借其可靠性、耐用性和价格实惠，成为协约世界最受欢迎的随身武器。大多数常见的激光手枪都有轻质聚碳机身，并延伸出一根细长的枪管。

Upgrades: 1

This compact pistol is the most popular sidearm in the Pact Worlds thanks to its reliability, durability, and affordability. Most common laser pistols have a lightweight polycarbon body ending in a long, slim barrel.

Get in There!.name: 冲进去！ Get in There!
Get in There!.description:
你敦促你的盟友赶紧投入战斗，或是让开道路。直到你的下个回合开始前，你和100英尺内所有能够感知到你的盟友获得+5英尺的速度状态加值。随着你的特使等级提升，在7级、12级和17级时，此加值额外增加5英尺。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.dAcHJiPDtqxxrR4Z]{效果：进去吧！}

以身作则 如果你使用了两个动作，则可以进行Step或Stride。你100英尺内每个能够感知到你的盟友都可以立刻以反应进行Step或Stride，移动距离至多为其一半速度（向下取整到最接近的5英尺）。

You urge your allies to hustle into the fight or to get out of the way. Until the beginning of your next turn, you and your allies within 100 feet who can sense you gain a +5-foot status bonus to Speed. As your envoy level increases, increase the bonus by an additional 5 feet at 7th level, 12th level, and 17th level.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.dAcHJiPDtqxxrR4Z]{Effect: Get in There!}

Lead by Example If you used two actions, Step or Stride. Each of your allies within 100 feet who can sense you can immediately Step or Stride up to half their Speed (rounded down to the nearest 5 feet) as a reaction.

Battle Medicine.name: 战地医疗 Battle Medicine
Battle Medicine.description:
需求 你正持用或穿戴着一套医疗包。

你可以包扎伤口，即使在战斗中也是如此。进行一次医药检定，DC 与 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤势} 相同，并恢复对应数量的 HP；这不会移除濒死状态。与治疗伤势相同，如果你具有最低熟练等级，你可以尝试对抗更高 DC 的检定。然后，目标会在 1 天内对你的战地医疗 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.2XEYQNZTCGpdkyR6]{免疫}。这不会使其对治疗伤势免疫，也不会以其他方式视为治疗伤势。

Requirements You're holding or wearing a medkit.

You can patch up wounds, even in combat. Attempt a Medicine check with the same DC as for @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} and restore the corresponding amount of HP; this doesn't remove the wounded condition. As with Treat Wounds, you can attempt checks against higher DCs if you have the minimum proficiency rank. The target is then @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.2XEYQNZTCGpdkyR6]{immune} to your Battle Medicine for 1 day. This does not make them immune to, or otherwise count as, Treat Wounds.

Fleet.name: 舰队 Fleet
Fleet.description: 你的脚步变得更快。你的速度提高5尺。

Lie to Me.name: 将计就计 Lie to Me
Lie to Me.description: 你可以用欺骗技能设下圈套，让试图欺骗你的人露出破绽。若你能和某个尝试对你@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ewwCglB7XOPLUz72]{说谎 Lie}的人交流，在判断对方是否说谎成功时，使用你的欺骗DC和察觉DC中较高者。若你没有与对方互动对话，比如某人在长篇演讲期间尝试说谎，本专长便无法生效。

Credstick.name: 信用芯片 Credstick
Credstick.description:
《星际探险者》中，大多数人都会把自己的财富存放在一种受保护的物品上，这种物品被称为信用棒。此类装置通常较为扁平，大小大致相当于一根人类手指。它们的尺寸和品质各不相同，但归根结底，它们不过是一种便于携带和花费金钱的工具。这些装置的使用方式由所有者决定，而信用棒只需在合适的银行设备附近轻轻一碰，就能完成接收或支付资金这样简单的操作。当需要更严格的安全防护时，它们可以要求语音或生物识别信息来激活。某些先进信用棒甚至带有魔法组件，可能需要精神密码，或念诵特定法术，才能取用其中储存的资金。

信用棒并不是通往个人全部财富的入口，更多的信用点通常会安全地存放在银行、私人金库或安全数据库中。相反，信用棒是一种能够在不被追踪的情况下安全且匿名地转移信用点的方式。无论是冒险者还是普通市民，往往都会随身携带一根信用棒，以处理他们可能需要进行的各种购买；同时，他们身上通常也只会保留刚好足够的信用点，这样即使遗失信用棒，也不至于破产。

协约世界中的个人经常携带信用棒，而其他与协约发生往来的文明，也常常会将本地资金兑换为信用点，并因此携带信用棒来花费这些兑换后的货币。有时，一个人可能会携带数根信用棒，将每一根专门用于不同用途；或者，如果他们想进行一笔预定金额的购买，也可以干脆把整根棒直接交出去。倘若一个人携带的信用棒数量变得过于累赘，也很容易在各根信用棒之间转移资金，并丢弃已经清空的信用棒以节省空间，不过信用棒始终具有可忽略体积。

Most people in Starfinder keep their wealth on a protected item known as a credstick. These devices are often flat and roughly the size of a human finger. They range in dimensions and quality, but at the end of the day, they're just a means of conveniently carrying and spending money. Usage of these devices is determined by the owner, and a credstick can accept or spend funds with as simple an action as tapping it near a suitable banking device. When more rigorous security is necessary, they can require audio or biometric imprints in order to activate. Some advanced credsticks even have a magical component that might require a mental password or the recitation of a specific spell to access stored funds.

Credsticks aren't gateways to the entirety of one's wealth, and larger stores of credits are often kept secured in banks, personal vaults, or secure databases. Instead, a credstick is a safe and anonymous means of moving credits around without being traced. Adventurers and common citizens alike often keep a credstick on their person to handle any purchases they might be called upon to make, while also only keeping just enough credits on them that losing the credstick wouldn't result in bankruptcy.

Individuals in the Pact Worlds often carry credsticks, and other civilizations that interact with the Pact often turn local funds into credits and thus carry them to spend their converted currency. Sometimes a person might carry several credsticks, dedicating each one to a different use, or simply trading the stick away if they want to make a purchase of a predefined amount. If ever the number of credsticks on a person becomes too cumbersome, it's easy enough to move the funds between individual sticks and discard emptied sticks to save on space, however a credstick always has a negligible bulk.

Human.name: 人类 Human
Human.description:
人类以其在最具挑战性的处境中适应并蓬勃发展的能力而闻名，其中也包括他们母星戈拉里昂的神秘失踪。人类雄心勃勃、富有创造力且有着无尽的好奇心，在银河系中始终保持着强大的存在感，常常担任领导职位或活跃在探索的最前沿。几乎在任何地方都能发现人类的身影，他们几乎从事着任何事情。

Humans are known for their ability to adapt and thrive in the most challenging situations, including the mysterious loss of their home world, Golarion. Ambitious, creative, and endlessly curious, humans maintain a robust presence in the galaxy, often taking on positions of leadership or acting at the forefront of exploration. Humans can be found almost anywhere, doing almost anything.

Skilled Human (Diplomacy).name: 熟练人类（外交） Skilled Human (Diplomacy)
Skilled Human (Diplomacy).description: 你的聪明才智让你有机会擅长多种技能。你选择的一项技能获得受训熟练度。5级时，你在该所选技能上的熟练度提升至专家。

Outlaw.name: 法外之徒 Outlaw
Outlaw.description:
你是个职业罪犯，名声恶劣。也许是不公的境遇逼你走上了犯罪生涯，又或者你享受成功实施抢劫或在枪战中活下来的刺激感。不管怎样，这就是你唯一熟悉的生活，而且由于你头上的赏金，除非你进了棺材，或赚到足够的信用点给自己买个新身份，否则你都会一直过这种日子。

选择两项属性增强。其中一项必须增强力量或魅力，另一项为自由属性增强。

你在威吓技能和黑社会知识技能上受过训练。你获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.zdycsO9Z0wHBZ17k]{威吓射击}技能专长。

You're a career criminal with a nasty reputation. Perhaps unfair circumstances forced you into a life of crime, or maybe you enjoy the thrill you get from pulling off a heist or living through a shoot-out. Either way, this life is the only one you know, and thanks to the bounty on your head, you're in it until the casket drops or you make enough creds to buy a new one.

Choose two attribute boosts. One must be to Strength or Charisma, and one is a free attribute boost.

You're trained in the Intimidation skill and the Underworld Lore skill. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.zdycsO9Z0wHBZ17k]{Intimidating Shot} skill feat.

Intimidating Shot.name: 威吓射击 Intimidating Shot
Intimidating Shot.description:
你尝试通过将你的远程武器朝空中开火来对一个敌人进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{威吓}，消耗等同于该武器 expend 的弹药量，并使用该武器的最大射程，而非通常的 30 英尺射程。如果目标与你不共享语言，此次检定不会承受 –4 的境况减值。

You attempt to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} a foe with your ranged weapon by firing it into the air, using ammo equal to the weapon's expend and the weapon's maximum range rather than the usual range of 30 feet. This check doesn't take a –4 circumstance penalty if the target doesn't share a language with you.

Envoy.name: 特使 Envoy
Envoy.description:
你是位操纵舆论的大师。你凭借迷人的微笑、敏捷的机智，以及敏锐的自保意识，在物质宇宙中闯出自己的一片天地。你是一名领导者，能够激励队友，推动他们突破极限，并帮助他们渡过难关。你擅长让别人去做你想让他们做的事，但当情况急转直下时，你也总是准备好迎难而上。你可能是个骗子、外交官、表演者，或军官——也可能会根据局势需要承担任何角色。

You're a master influencer. You make your way in the universe with a charming smile, quick wit, and keen sense of self-preservation. You're a leader who motivates your teammates, pushes them past their limits, and helps them through tough spots. You excel at getting others to do what you want, but you're always ready to face trouble head-on when things take a turn for the worse. You might be a con artist, diplomat, performer, or military officer—or you might take on whatever role the situation demands.

Envoy Directives.name: 特使训令 Envoy Directives
Envoy Directives.description:
特使用训令来鼓舞盟友。训令是一种命令，会使遵从它的盟友获益。特使训令包含一种让特使以身作则的方式，即花费更多动作来获得更强的效果。训令具有听觉或视觉特征，取决于你如何激励你的盟友。

你起始时拥有一个特使训令。你可以通过特使职业、特使职业专长以及你的领导风格来习得更多训令。你每轮可以发布一个训令。除非另有说明，特使的训令及其赋予的增益会持续到你下个回合开始时。

你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cmCtfURzpbzkxWsy]{狠狠干！} 特使训令。

Envoys encourage their allies with directives. A directive is an order that benefits allies who follow it. Envoy directives include a way for the envoy to lead by example by spending more actions for increased effects. Directives have the auditory or visual trait depending on how you inspire your allies.

You begin with one envoy directive. You can learn more directives through the envoy class, envoy class feats, and your leadership style. You can issue one directive a round. Unless otherwise stated, an envoy's directive and the benefits it grants last until the beginning of your next turn.

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cmCtfURzpbzkxWsy]{Get 'Em!} envoy directive.

Leadership Style.name: 领导风格 Leadership Style
Leadership Style.description:
无论这是你的天性使然，还是你为此受过训练，你都已形成了一套领导他人的个人风格。1级时，选择一种领导风格。你在所示的领导技能上变为受训，获得所示的领导特长，并知晓对应的领导训令。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.u2dy5FMDv30UH8HC]{身先士卒}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.KEoTccJlfKzMk19l]{幕后引领}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.jaGIV3t7G07F0qda]{枪火全开}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.RIUhD5eldHzBsFIe]{聚光灯下}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.GTmdHGLcuc11Bizi]{信息圈主管}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.6cFaxZ4aAhuUbnwi]{共渡艰危}

Whether it comes naturally, or you trained for it, you've developed a personal style of leading others. At 1st level, select a leadership style. You become trained in the indicated leadership skill, you gain the indicated leadership perk, and know the associated leadership directive.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.u2dy5FMDv30UH8HC]{From the Front}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.KEoTccJlfKzMk19l]{From the Shadows}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.jaGIV3t7G07F0qda]{Guns Blazing}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.RIUhD5eldHzBsFIe]{In the Spotlight}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.GTmdHGLcuc11Bizi]{Infosphere Director}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.6cFaxZ4aAhuUbnwi]{Through Desperate Times}

Get 'Em!.name: 狠狠干！ Get 'Em!
Get 'Em!.description:
你将一名敌人单独标出，让你和你的盟友集中攻击它。选择一个你看得见、位于60尺内的敌人。直到你的下个回合开始前，你和你的盟友对该目标的攻击获得+1状态加值。

以身作则 如果你用了两个动作，对目标进行一次打击。你的伤害掷骰获得等同于你魅力调整值的状态加值。无论此次打击是否命中，直到你的下个回合开始前，你和你的盟友随后对该敌人进行的打击伤害都获得+1状态加值。在5级、10级、15级和20级时，该伤害加值提高1。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.ey2zSEnprAGgvrij]{效果：Get 'Em!}

You single out an enemy for you and your allies to focus your attacks on. Select an enemy within 60 feet that you can see. You and your allies gain a +1 status bonus to attacks against that target until the beginning of your next turn.

Lead by Example If you used two actions, Strike the target. You gain a status bonus to the damage roll equal to your Charisma modifier. Regardless of whether the Strike hits, you and your allies gain a +1 status bonus to damage on subsequent Strikes made against the enemy until the start of your next turn. Increase the damage by 1 at 5th, 10th, 15th, and 20th levels.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.ey2zSEnprAGgvrij]{Effect: Get 'Em!}

Guns Blazing.name: 枪火齐发 Guns Blazing
Guns Blazing.description:
你以火力给人留下深刻印象，从而带领你的团队。你夸张张扬的个性有连绵不绝的枪火作为后盾，而你总是先开枪。

领导技能 特技

领导特长 你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.2kwXTUjYYhoAGySr]{惊人先攻} 作为一个奖励专长。

领导训令 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.RNilk6Evoi0xNbWX]{准备武器！}

You lead your team by making an impression with firepower. Your bombastic personality has a barrage of gunfire to back it up, and you always shoot first.

Leadership Skill Acrobatics

Leadership Perk You gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.2kwXTUjYYhoAGySr]{Incredible Initiative} as a bonus feat.

Leadership Directive @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.RNilk6Evoi0xNbWX]{Ready Arms!}

Ready Arms!.name: 持械就绪！ Ready Arms!
Ready Arms!.description:
通过快速下达指令，你让盟友们准备好他们的装备。你和所有30尺内的盟友都可以以自由动作进行交互来拔出、切换持握手，或交换武器。

以身作则 如果你使用了两个动作，你可以用你拔出或换上的一件武器进行打击、区域射击或自动射击（包括通过改变当前启用的持握手组来实现）。如果你的打击命中，或者某个目标在对抗你的区域射击或自动射击时豁免失败，则一名盟友可以以反应对同一目标进行一次打击。

With quick commands, you get your allies to ready their equipment. You and all allies within 30 feet can Interact to draw, Switch Hands, or swap weapons as a free action.

Lead by Example If you used two actions, you can Strike, Area Fire, or Auto-Fire with a weapon you drew or swapped to (including by changing active set of hands). If your Strike hits or if a target failed its save against your Area Fire or Auto-Fire, one ally can make a Strike against the same target as a reaction.

Incredible Initiative.name: 惊奇先攻 Incredible Initiative
Incredible Initiative.description: 你的反应比他人更迅速。你的先攻检定获得+2环境加值。

Absalom Lore.name: 阿布萨洛姆学识 Absalom Lore

Underworld Lore.name: 地下世界学识 Underworld Lore

Comm Unit.name: 通讯单元 Comm Unit
Comm Unit.description:
个人通讯终端是一种口袋大小的设备，结合了小型便携式计算机和蜂窝通信设备，可在行星范围内以音频和文本两种格式与其他通讯终端进行即时无线通信。个人通讯终端还包括计算器、手电筒（以你为中心5英尺半径内发出明亮光照，并在接下来的5英尺内发出微光）、可访问任何本地信息圈的浏览器，以及若干娱乐选项（包括游戏）。

集成到护甲中的个人通讯终端具有一些语音激活功能；你可以无需空闲手就以音频格式与其他通讯终端通信并接收回复，但输入信息、浏览信息圈或使用应用程序仍至少需要使用一只手。

能在更远距离运作的通讯终端则没那么便携；它们内置发电机以提供所需电力，并依赖活跃的漂流信标进行通信。在大多数主要聚居地，都可以购买这些终端的短期使用服务。

A personal comm unit is a pocket-sized device that combines a minor portable computer and a cellular communications device, allowing instantaneous wireless communication with other comm units in both audio- and text-based formats at planetary range. A personal comm unit also includes a calculator, a flashlight (emits bright light in a 5-foot radius around you and dim light in the next 5 feet), a browser that accesses any local infospheres, and several entertainment options (including games).

Personal comm units integrated into armor have some voice-activated capabilities; you can communicate with other comm units in audio-based formats and receive responses without needing a free hand, but typing a message, browsing the infosphere, or using an app requires the use of at least one hand.

Comm units that function at longer ranges aren't as portable; they include built-in generators that provide the necessary amount of power and rely on active Drift beacons to communicate. Short-term use of these units can be purchased in most major settlements.

Knife.name: 刀 Knife
Knife.description:
升级： 1

无论作为武器还是工具，小刀都极为宝贵，其形状、风格和材质多种多样，从星铁到陶瓷不一而足。

Upgrades: 1

Invaluable as both a weapon and a tool, knives come in a variety of shapes, styles, and materials ranging from starmetals to ceramics.

Medkit (Commercial).name: 医疗包（商用） Medkit (Commercial)
Medkit (Commercial).description:
这些物品包含进行医学检定以@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.MHLuKy4nQO2Z4Am1]{实施急救}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.TC7OcDa7JlWbqMaN]{治疗疾病}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.KjoCEEmPGTeFE4hh]{治疗毒素}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤口}所需的止痛药、绷带、无菌纱布和缝合工具。

These contain analgesics, bandages, sterile gauze, and suturing tools necessary for Medicine checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.MHLuKy4nQO2Z4Am1]{Administer First Aid}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.TC7OcDa7JlWbqMaN]{Treat Disease}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.KjoCEEmPGTeFE4hh]{Treat Poison}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds}.

Second Skin.name: 着甲如肤 Second Skin
Second Skin.description:
升级： 0

这种柔软却坚韧的织物能完美贴合穿戴者的身体，在不牺牲舒适性的前提下提供基础防护。第二层皮肤通常穿在便服里面。

Upgrades: 0

Soft but resilient fabric contours perfectly to the wearer's body, offering basic protection without sacrificing comfort. Second skin is commonly worn underneath casual clothing.

Semi-Auto Pistol.name: 半自动手枪 Semi-Auto Pistol
Semi-Auto Pistol.description:
升级： 1

这把手枪会在每次射击后自动弹出用过的弹壳并装填新的弹药。

Upgrades: 1

This pistol automatically ejects used cartridges and loads new ammunition after every shot fired.

Hacking Toolkit (Commercial).name: 黑客工具包（商用） Hacking Toolkit (Commercial)
Hacking Toolkit (Commercial).description:
进行“入侵”计算机的计算机检定需要黑客工具包。你可以使用黑客工具包在不借助用户界面的情况下访问计算机，但这需要与该计算机进行物理接触，或通过信息圈或类似的联网网络进行连接。

A hacking toolkit is required for Computers checks to Hack computers. You can use a hacking toolkit to access a computer without using a user interface, but this requires physical contact with the computer or contact via an infosphere or a similar linked network.

Infiltrator's Toolkit (Commercial).name: 渗透者工具包（商业） Infiltrator's Toolkit (Commercial)
Infiltrator's Toolkit (Commercial).description:
你需要一套潜入者工具包，才能使用偷窃技能进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{撬锁} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{解除装置}（某些类型）。

You need an infiltrator's toolkit to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick Locks} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Disable Devices} (of some types) using the Thievery skill.

Natural Ambition.name: 天生野望 Natural Ambition
Natural Ambition.description: 你从小就壮志勃勃，并且为了出人头地一直在努力奋斗，这让你在你所选择的职业领域上的进步卓越。你获得你自身职业的一个1级职业专长。你必须满足该专长的先决条件，你仅能在创建角色阶段延后选取该专长，以满足所选职业专长的先决条件。

Watch Out.name: 当心 Watch Out
Watch Out.description:
触发 一个生物以一次攻击将60尺内的一名盟友作为目标，且你能同时看见攻击者和你的盟友。

你向你的盟友发出警告信号，使其在对抗该次触发攻击的AC上获得+2环境加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.8eqdNadBEcXMvjng]{效果：小心}

Trigger A creature targets an ally within 60 feet with an attack, and you can see both the attacker and your ally.

You signal a warning to your ally, granting them a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.8eqdNadBEcXMvjng]{Effect: Watch Out}

Size Up.name: 评估体型 Size Up
Size Up.description:
频率 每小时一次

你花费1分钟观察某个特定个体、花费10分钟在信息圈中调查某个特定个体，或花费1小时建立人脉并收集情报。该对象即为你的目标对象。若你通过观察来评估你的目标对象，则无需知道其身份；但若你通过调查或建立人脉来评估你的目标对象，则必须知道其身份，这需要至少两条与其相关的信息。相关信息的例子包括其姓名、出身地、当前居住地、其父母或重要伴侣的姓名、其雇主，或其所属组织。GM会根据你所选定的目标对象，决定哪些信息在此用途下算作相关信息。

你对目标对象进行或与其相关的唬骗、交涉、威吓和察觉检定获得+1环境加值，对目标对象进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 的尝试也获得+1环境加值。

当你对目标对象使用单动作的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cmCtfURzpbzkxWsy]{集火！} 时，你获得双动作 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cmCtfURzpbzkxWsy]{集火！} 的收益。

你可以维持数量等同于你魅力调整值的目标对象。若之后你对其他对象使用“评估目标”，你的新目标对象会替换先前的一个。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.RBWwGxsrxPBKi3X7]{效果：评估目标}

Frequency once per hour

You spend 1 minute observing a specific individual, 10 minutes researching a specific individual on the infosphere, or 1 hour networking and gathering information. This subject is your asset. If you assess your asset via observation, you don't need to know their identity, but if you assess your asset via research or networking, you must know their identity, which requires at least two relevant pieces of information about them. Examples of relevant information could include their name, their place of origin, their current residence, the name of their parent or significant other, their employer, or their organizational affiliation. The GM determines what constitutes relevant information for this purpose, based on the asset you've selected.

You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Deception, Diplomacy, Intimidation, and Perception checks against or in relation to your asset, and a +1 circumstance bonus to attempts to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about your asset.

You gain the benefits of the 2-action @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cmCtfURzpbzkxWsy]{Get 'Em!} when using 1-action Get 'Em! on an asset.

You can maintain a number of assets equal to your Charisma modifier. If you Size Up other assets after that, your new asset replaces a previous one.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.RBWwGxsrxPBKi3X7]{Effect: Size Up}

Adaptive Talent.name: 适应性天赋 Adaptive Talent
Adaptive Talent.description:
你思维敏捷且适应力强，只需很少的练习或训练就能掌握新的技能与天赋。在你的每日准备期间，选择一个你满足前置条件的技能专长。你获得该技能专长，直到你再次进行准备为止。由于你只是暂时拥有此专长，你不能将其用作永久角色选项的前置条件。你可以将此能力用于那些会暂时让你获得其他能力的效果，例如选取 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.P9HCz0uR6xPHuw72]{Multilingual} 来暂时学会一门新语言。

随着你的特使等级提升，你适应新情况的能力也会随之增强。在9级和15级时，以这种方式获得的技能专长数量各增加1个。你可以将通过适应天赋暂时获得的专长用作通过适应天赋暂时获得的其他专长的前置条件，但你仍然不能将它们用作永久角色选项的前置条件。

You're quick thinking and adaptable, capable of picking up new skills and talents with little practice or training. During your daily preparations, select one skill feat that you meet the prerequisites for. You gain this skill feat until you prepare again. Since you have this feat temporarily, you can't use it as a prerequisite for a permanent character option. You can use this for effects that temporarily give you access to other abilities, such as taking @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.P9HCz0uR6xPHuw72]{Multilingual} to temporarily learn a new language.

As your envoy level increases, so does your ability to adapt to new situations. At 9th level and 15th level, increase the number of skill feats you gain this way by 1. You can use feats that you temporarily gain through adaptive talent as a prerequisite for other feats that you temporarily gain through adaptive talent, but you still can't use them as prerequisites for permanent character options.

Wise to the Game.name: 对游戏门儿清 Wise to the Game
Wise to the Game.description:
运用言语影响他人正是你的拿手好戏，而你也很容易识破他人试图对你使用同样手段的企图。你对你进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.QNAVeNKtHA0EUw4X]{虚晃} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ewwCglB7XOPLUz72]{说谎} 的尝试，以及以 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{制造牵制} 来转移你注意力的尝试，其察觉DC获得+1状态加值；你对情绪效果的意志DC获得+1状态加值。

Using your words to influence others is what you do, and you easily recognize when others attempt to use the same tactics against you. You gain a +1 status bonus to your Perception DC against attempts to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.QNAVeNKtHA0EUw4X]{Feint} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ewwCglB7XOPLUz72]{Lie} to you and attempts to divert your attention with @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{Create a Diversion}, and a +1 status bonus to your Will DC against emotion effects.

Laser Pistol.name: 激光手枪 Laser Pistol
Laser Pistol.description:
升级： 1

这把袖珍手枪凭借其可靠性、耐用性和价格亲民，成为协约世界最受欢迎的随身武器。大多数常见的激光手枪都有轻质聚碳机身，末端接着一根细长的枪管。

Upgrades: 1

This compact pistol is the most popular sidearm in the Pact Worlds thanks to its reliability, durability, and affordability. Most common laser pistols have a lightweight polycarbon body ending in a long, slim barrel.

Get in There!.name: 冲进去！ Get in There!
Get in There!.description:
你敦促盟友赶紧投入战斗，或是赶快让开。直到你下个回合开始前，你和100尺内所有能察觉到你的盟友获得+5尺的速度状态加值。随着你的特使等级提升，该加值会在第7级、第12级和第17级时各额外增加5尺。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.dAcHJiPDtqxxrR4Z]{效果：冲进去！}

以身作则 如果你用了两个动作，则进行Step或Stride。你100尺内每个能察觉到你的盟友都可以立即以反应进行Step或Stride，最多移动其一半速度（向下取整至最接近的5尺）。

You urge your allies to hustle into the fight or to get out of the way. Until the beginning of your next turn, you and your allies within 100 feet who can sense you gain a +5-foot status bonus to Speed. As your envoy level increases, increase the bonus by an additional 5 feet at 7th level, 12th level, and 17th level.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.dAcHJiPDtqxxrR4Z]{Effect: Get in There!}

Lead by Example If you used two actions, Step or Stride. Each of your allies within 100 feet who can sense you can immediately Step or Stride up to half their Speed (rounded down to the nearest 5 feet) as a reaction.

Battle Medicine.name: 战斗医疗 Battle Medicine
Battle Medicine.description:
要求 你正持有或穿戴一套医疗包。

你可以包扎伤口，即使是在战斗中也是如此。进行一次医疗检定，DC与 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤势} 相同，并恢复相应数量的HP；这不会移除濒死状态。与治疗伤势一样，如果你具有最低熟练等级，你可以尝试对抗更高的DC。随后，目标会对你的战地医疗 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.2XEYQNZTCGpdkyR6]{免疫} 1天。这不会使其对治疗伤势免疫，也不会以其他方式被计作治疗伤势。

Requirements You're holding or wearing a medkit.

You can patch up wounds, even in combat. Attempt a Medicine check with the same DC as for @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} and restore the corresponding amount of HP; this doesn't remove the wounded condition. As with Treat Wounds, you can attempt checks against higher DCs if you have the minimum proficiency rank. The target is then @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.2XEYQNZTCGpdkyR6]{immune} to your Battle Medicine for 1 day. This does not make them immune to, or otherwise count as, Treat Wounds.

Fleet.name: 舰队 Fleet
Fleet.description: 你的脚步变得更快。你的速度提高5尺。

Lie to Me.name: 将计就计 Lie to Me
Lie to Me.description: 你可以用欺骗技能设下圈套，让试图欺骗你的人露出破绽。若你能和某个尝试对你@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ewwCglB7XOPLUz72]{说谎 Lie}的人交流，在判断对方是否说谎成功时，使用你的欺骗DC和察觉DC中较高者。若你没有与对方互动对话，比如某人在长篇演讲期间尝试说谎，本专长便无法生效。

Improvised Mastery.name: 即兴精通 Improvised Mastery
Improvised Mastery.description:
频率 每天一次

触发条件 你即将使用一项你尚未达到大师熟练的技能进行一次技能检定，且你还没有掷骰。

你相信自己的直觉会助你渡过难关。你在此次技能检定中获得触发该效果的技能的大师熟练。

Frequency once per day

Trigger You're about to attempt a skill check using a skill that you don't have master proficiency in, and you haven't rolled yet.

You trust your instincts to see you through. You gain master proficiency with the triggering skill for the skill check.

Perception Expertise.name: 察觉专家 Perception Expertise
Perception Expertise.description:
特使 你对细节有敏锐的观察力，并且总能对周围的威胁保持警觉。你的察觉熟练等级提升为专家。

秘学者，士兵 你始终对周围的威胁保持警觉。你的察觉熟练等级提升为专家。

巫战扭曲者 你对威胁保持警觉。你的察觉熟练等级提升为专家。

Envoy You have a keen eye for details and always manage to remain alert to threats around you. Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to expert.

Mystic, Soldier You remain alert to threats around you. Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to expert.

Witchwarper You remain alert to threats. Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to expert.

Weapon Expertise.name: 武器专家 Weapon Expertise
Weapon Expertise.description:
特使 你已经学会了几个运用武器的小技巧。你对简易武器、军用武器和徒手攻击的熟练等级提升为专家。每当你攻击你的 Get 'Em! 的目标时，你都可以获得所有你拥有专家熟练的武器的重击专精效果。

秘学者 你用基础武器赢得战斗。你对简易武器和徒手攻击的熟练等级提升为专家。

巫战扭曲者 你对常规武器有了更广泛的理解，以强化你不同寻常的施法。你对简易武器和徒手攻击的熟练等级提升为专家。

Envoy You've learned a few tricks with your weapons. Your proficiency ranks for simple weapons, martial weapons, and unarmed attacks increase to expert. Whenever you attack the target of your Get 'Em!, you gain access to the critical specialization effects of all weapons for which you have expert proficiency.

Mystic You win battles with basic weapons. Your proficiency rank for simple weapons and unarmed attacks increases to expert.

Witchwarper You've gained a broader understanding of conventional weaponry to augment your unconventional spellcasting. Your proficiency rank for simple weapons and unarmed attacks increases to expert.

Medpatch (Tactical).name: 医疗贴（战术型） Medpatch (Tactical)
Medpatch (Tactical).description:
激活 1 (manipulate)

医疗贴片会加速身体的自然愈合。你恢复 @Damage[(3d6+6)[healing]] 生命值，并在 10 分钟内对抗疾病和毒素的豁免检定获得 +1 物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{效果：医疗贴片}

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Medpatches accelerate the body's natural healing. You regain @Damage[(3d6+6)[healing]] Hit Points and gain a +1 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{Effect: Medpatch}

Credstick.name: 信用棒 Credstick
Credstick.description:
《星际探险家》中的大多数人都会把自己的财富存放在一种受保护的物品上，这种物品被称为信用棒。这类设备通常较为扁平，大小大致相当于一根人类手指。它们的尺寸和品质各不相同，但归根结底，它们只是为了方便携带和花费金钱的一种工具。这些设备的使用方式由持有者决定，而信用棒只需在合适的银行设备附近轻触一下，就能接收或支出资金这样简单的操作。在需要更严格安保时，它们可以要求语音或生物识别印记才能激活。有些先进信用棒甚至还带有魔法组件，可能需要精神密码，或吟诵特定法术，才能取用其中储存的资金。

信用棒并不是通向个人全部财富的入口，数额较大的信用点通常会安全地存放在银行、私人金库或安全数据库中。相反，信用棒是一种安全且匿名的信用点流通方式，不易被追踪。无论是冒险者还是普通公民，都会经常随身携带一根信用棒，以便处理他们可能需要进行的各种购买，同时身上只保留刚好够用的信用点，这样即使遗失信用棒，也不至于因此破产。

协约世界中的个人通常都会携带信用棒，而其他与协约世界往来的文明，也常常会将当地资金兑换为信用点，因此也会携带信用棒来花费他们兑换后的货币。有时，一个人可能会携带好几根信用棒，将每一根用于不同用途；或者，如果他们想进行一笔预设金额的购买，也可以直接把整根棒转交出去。若一个人携带的信用棒数量变得太过累赘，也很容易在各根信用棒之间转移资金，并丢弃已经清空的信用棒以节省空间，不过信用棒的体积始终可以忽略不计。

Most people in Starfinder keep their wealth on a protected item known as a credstick. These devices are often flat and roughly the size of a human finger. They range in dimensions and quality, but at the end of the day, they're just a means of conveniently carrying and spending money. Usage of these devices is determined by the owner, and a credstick can accept or spend funds with as simple an action as tapping it near a suitable banking device. When more rigorous security is necessary, they can require audio or biometric imprints in order to activate. Some advanced credsticks even have a magical component that might require a mental password or the recitation of a specific spell to access stored funds.

Credsticks aren't gateways to the entirety of one's wealth, and larger stores of credits are often kept secured in banks, personal vaults, or secure databases. Instead, a credstick is a safe and anonymous means of moving credits around without being traced. Adventurers and common citizens alike often keep a credstick on their person to handle any purchases they might be called upon to make, while also only keeping just enough credits on them that losing the credstick wouldn't result in bankruptcy.

Individuals in the Pact Worlds often carry credsticks, and other civilizations that interact with the Pact often turn local funds into credits and thus carry them to spend their converted currency. Sometimes a person might carry several credsticks, dedicating each one to a different use, or simply trading the stick away if they want to make a purchase of a predefined amount. If ever the number of credsticks on a person becomes too cumbersome, it's easy enough to move the funds between individual sticks and discard emptied sticks to save on space, however a credstick always has a negligible bulk.

Human.name: 人类 Human
Human.description:
人类以其在最具挑战性的处境中适应并蓬勃发展的能力而闻名，其中也包括他们故乡世界戈拉里昂的神秘消失。人类雄心勃勃、富有创造力且拥有无尽的好奇心，在银河系中始终保持着强大的存在感，常常担任领导职位，或活跃在探索的最前沿。几乎任何地方都能发现人类的身影，他们几乎什么事都做。

Humans are known for their ability to adapt and thrive in the most challenging situations, including the mysterious loss of their home world, Golarion. Ambitious, creative, and endlessly curious, humans maintain a robust presence in the galaxy, often taking on positions of leadership or acting at the forefront of exploration. Humans can be found almost anywhere, doing almost anything.

Versatile Human.name: 多才人类 Versatile Human
Versatile Human.description:
在戈拉里昂消失之前，人类曾是那颗世界上最常见的族裔；此后，凭借自身的多才多能，他们已遍布群星。选择一个你满足前提条件的通用专长（和你的族裔专长一样，你可以在角色创建过程中的任何时点选择这个通用专长）。

Humans were the most common ancestry on Golarion before that world disappeared, and they've since spread to the stars thanks to their versatility. Select a general feat of your choice for which you meet the prerequisites (as with your ancestry feat, you can select this general feat at any point during character creation).

Feather Step.name: 轻羽步 Feather Step
Feather Step.description: 你的步伐谨慎而迅捷。你可以用快步进入困难地形。

Grifter.name: 骗子 Grifter
Grifter.description:
你是个骗子和诡计大师，专门欺骗毫无防备的傻瓜并敲诈易受骗的蠢人，但这没什么私人恩怨——你只是为了信用点。你可能会私下经营一门勾当，或者在职业生涯中辗转于一个个定居点之间，直到当场被抓。

选择两项属性增强。其中一项必须加到智力或魅力，另一项为自由属性增强。

你在欺瞒技能以及一项与你伪装擅长的职业或主题相关的知识技能上受过训练。你获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.B6HbYsLBWb1RR6Fx]{迷人骗子}技能专长。

You're a con artist and trickster who swindles unsuspecting dupes and blackmails rubes, but it's nothing personal—you're just in it for the credits. You might run an operation on the side, or you might spend your career moving from settlement to settlement until you get caught in the act.

Choose two attribute boosts. One must be to Intelligence or Charisma, and one is a free attribute boost.

You're trained in the Deception skill and a Lore skill related to a profession or subject you fake expertise in. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.B6HbYsLBWb1RR6Fx]{Charming Liar} skill feat.

Charming Liar.name: 蛊惑人心 Charming Liar
Charming Liar.description: 凭借魅力，你能够将欺骗对象笼络为你的支持者。当你用@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ewwCglB7XOPLUz72]{说谎 Lie}行动取得大成功时，目标对你的态度改善一级，如同你用交涉技能@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{建立印象 Make an Impression}成功。每次交流，这个效果只会生效一次，如果你用相同结果对多个目标取得大成功，则选择一个生物的态度得到改善。你的谎言必须要透露看似重要的信息、鼓吹自己的地位、或巴结奉承对方，无关紧要的谎言无法起到作用。

Witchwarper.name: 巫战扭曲者 Witchwarper
Witchwarper.description:
一场奇异而悖谬的事件永远改变了你的存在，如今你能够操纵现实。你探索多元宇宙的无限可能，也许会将变体时间线或平行世界可视化。你创造出颠覆空间与时间的力场，使你能够施展强大的魔法。你已经学会专注于一段锚定的记忆、概念或物体，以帮助你辨识现实。

A strange paradoxical event forever altered your existence, and now you can manipulate reality. You explore the infinite possibilities of the multiverse, possibly visualizing variant timelines or parallel worlds. You create fields that subvert space and time, allowing you to cast powerful magic. You've learned to focus on an anchoring memory, concept, or object to help you identify reality.

Paradox.name: 悖论 Paradox
Paradox.description:
你的存在与物质宇宙的现状背道而驰，因而引发了赋予你施法天赋力量的量子涟漪，并开启通往其他世界的门扉。也许你来自一个平行现实或不同的时间线；又或者你经历过一种改变了你人生轨迹的非自然现象，发现了一台发生时间故障的外星装置，或撰写过一篇关于量子魔法理论的论文。无论你的故事如何，你都已成为一个活生生的悖论。

在1级时，选择你的悖论。你所选择的悖论会决定你法术的传承、额外受训的技能、你额外学会的法术，以及你量子场的效果。你还会获得专注点数，以及基于你的悖论而获得的特殊专注法术，称为扭曲法术。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.42tQJXhySw9QKcn6]{分析者}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.hFIB6wlYGK93zl4g]{异常体}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.1E12XmyqzIK1jXrY]{间隙影响}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.cxBVbSITniNRwfMi]{预知者}

Your existence is contrary to the status quo of the universe, causing quantum ripples that empower your spellcasting talent and open doorways to other worlds. Perhaps you're from an alternate reality or a different timeline, or perhaps you experienced an unnatural phenomenon that altered your path, discovered a time-glitching alien device, or wrote a treatise on quantum magical theory. Whatever your story, you've become a living paradox.

At 1st level, choose your paradox. Your chosen paradox determines the tradition of your spells, additional trained skills, additional spells you learn, and the effects of your quantum field. You also gain Focus Points and special focus spells called warp spells based on your paradox.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.42tQJXhySw9QKcn6]{Analyst}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.hFIB6wlYGK93zl4g]{Anomaly}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.1E12XmyqzIK1jXrY]{Gap Influenced}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.cxBVbSITniNRwfMi]{Precog}

Quantum Field.name: 量子场 Quantum Field
Quantum Field.description:
你可以汲取悖论力量来创造一个扭曲现实的量子场。它可能表现为空气中的一片朦胧雾霭，显现出其他现实的闪烁幻影；也可能呈现为由发光的魔法方程式构成的墙壁，或是你所选择的任何其他景象。你的量子场的效果由你的悖论决定。你还可以通过选择巫战扭曲者专长以及施放扭曲法术，进一步强化并操纵你的量子场。你可以通过使用扭曲现实的魔法来激活你的量子场，或延长其持续时间。

你拥有@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ZoMpqQgDdlT13Jp0]{扭曲现实}动作，它让你能够激活你的量子场。此动作会根据你所选悖论的传承获得奥术或异能特征。你还拥有@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.30Nw5q4vWKCQIBIZ]{量子脉冲}，它让你能在战斗开始时迅速建立你的量子场。

You can draw on paradoxical forces to create a reality-warping quantum field. It might manifest as a haze in the air that shows shimmers of alternate realities, appear as walls of glowing magical equations, or any other display you choose. The effects of your quantum field are determined by your paradox. You can further enhance and manipulate your quantum field through your witchwarper feat selections and by casting warp spells. You can activate or extend the duration of your quantum field by using reality-warping magic.

You have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ZoMpqQgDdlT13Jp0]{Warp Reality} action, which lets you activate your quantum field. This action gains the arcane or occult trait based on the tradition of your selected paradox. You also have @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.30Nw5q4vWKCQIBIZ]{Quantum Pulse}, which lets you establish your quantum field quickly at the start of combat.

Anchor.name: 深扎 Anchor
Anchor.description:
无论是哪一种悖论改变了你存在的轨迹，总有某种事物帮助你牢牢锚定于现实之中。这可能是你随身携带的一件实物、关于家园的记忆，或是你所爱的人。1级时，选择一个锚点。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.ENxkQJEIkz35yuMT]{核心记忆}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.idjill6Zh7b3SLqE]{焦点}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.Z1sThY5XgXiXQBIy]{有形物件}

Whatever paradox altered the course of your existence, something helps keep you anchored to reality. This might be a physical object you carry, memories of your home, or loved ones. At 1st level, select an anchor.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.ENxkQJEIkz35yuMT]{Core Memories}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.idjill6Zh7b3SLqE]{Focal Point}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.Z1sThY5XgXiXQBIy]{Tangible Object}

Anomaly.name: 异常 Anomaly
Anomaly.description:
你的存在本身就是一种反常，违背了你当前现实的正常参数。你可能遭遇了某种扰乱你核心存在的事物，或是穿过了来自另一重现实或扭曲时间线的帷幕。

传统 奥术

悖论技能 欺瞒

悖论法术 戏法：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.jgN33YSYXB8iIHTw]{Stumble}；1环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.7P4eBdqWcgQJAFCa]{Shifting Surge}；2环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic}；3环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.qkehzRdn7JeGrR6E]{Void Whispers}；4环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.jyrxfWeeCsrkhNit]{Eldritch Wrath}；5环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.kOa055FIrO9Smnya]{Wall of Stone}；6环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.a02hsymtiVRQvh3i]{Slice Reality}；7环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.zdzeVZlKHkMAt2Rf]{Death Sentence}；8环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.sTpdXXaaKhoGOIxh]{Void Vessel}；9环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.J3zMwmhIVgI2yzxm]{Call Cosmos}

扭曲法术 初始：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.TN2pHF9l3k4ZJ7di]{Warp Terrain}；先进：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9w90nlUdV5HBRWFm]{Warp World}；强效：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XoYUZP9OYdDMz4I0]{Parallel Forms}

量子场 动作变得模糊不清，敌人周围闪烁着其其他迭代形态的影像。当你量子场中的敌人尝试进行具有专注特征的动作时，除非其成功通过一次 @Check[flat|dc:5|showDC:all]，否则该动作会被扰乱。生物第一次在此检定中失败时，会在24小时内暂时免疫。

Your existence is an anomaly that defies the normal parameters of your current reality. You might have encountered something that disrupted your core existence, or you crossed the veil from an alternate reality or twisted timeline.

Tradition arcane

Paradox Skill Deception

Paradox Spells cantrip: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.jgN33YSYXB8iIHTw]{Stumble}; 1st: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.7P4eBdqWcgQJAFCa]{Shifting Surge}; 2nd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic}; 3rd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.qkehzRdn7JeGrR6E]{Void Whispers}; 4th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.jyrxfWeeCsrkhNit]{Eldritch Wrath}; 5th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.kOa055FIrO9Smnya]{Wall of Stone}; 6th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.a02hsymtiVRQvh3i]{Slice Reality}; 7th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.zdzeVZlKHkMAt2Rf]{Death Sentence}; 8th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.sTpdXXaaKhoGOIxh]{Void Vessel}; 9th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.J3zMwmhIVgI2yzxm]{Call Cosmos}

Warp Spells initial: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.TN2pHF9l3k4ZJ7di]{Warp Terrain}; advanced: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9w90nlUdV5HBRWFm]{Warp World}; greater: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XoYUZP9OYdDMz4I0]{Parallel Forms}

Quantum Field Movements blur as images of alternate iterations of your enemies flicker around them. When an enemy in your quantum field attempts an action with the concentrate trait, the action is disrupted unless they succeed at a @Check[flat|dc:5|showDC:all]. The first time a creature fails this check, it becomes temporarily immune for 24 hours.

Warp Reality.name: 扭曲现实 Warp Reality
Warp Reality.description:
需求 你的量子场未激活。

你的量子场被激活，并会持续存在，直到你维持它（最长10分钟）或直到你下个回合结束。你的量子场是一个以你在100英尺内选择的一点为中心的@Template[type:burst|distance:20]。当你的量子场处于激活状态时，你可以使用具有锚定特征的动作。你的量子场的其他具体效果由你的悖论决定。每当你扭曲现实时、每次你维持它时，以及当一个生物进入你的量子场时，选择区域内哪些特定生物会受到你的量子场影响。每次你用维持动作来维持量子场时（而非用锚定动作），你都可以将它移动到100英尺内的一个新位置。

如果你陷入失去意识状态、如果你将其解消，或者如果你移动到距离它超过100英尺之外，你的量子场都会自动解除激活。

Requirements Your quantum field isn't active.

Your quantum field activates and lasts as long as you Sustain it (up to 10 minutes) or until the end of your next turn. Your quantum field is a @Template[type:burst|distance:20] centered on a point you choose within 100 feet. While your quantum field is active, you can use actions that have the anchoring trait. Your quantum field's other specific effects are determined by your paradox. Choose whether any given creature in the area is affected by your quantum field when you Warp Reality, each time you Sustain it, and when a creature enters your quantum field. Each time you Sustain a quantum field with the Sustain action (instead of an anchoring action), you can move it to a new position within 100 feet.

Your quantum field automatically deactivates if you're knocked out, if you Dismiss it, or if you move more than 100 feet away from it.

Quantum Pulse.name: 量子脉冲 Quantum Pulse
Quantum Pulse.description:
触发条件 你进行先攻检定。

你总是准备好释放自己悖论般的能力，而当身陷险境时，你会本能地释放出一阵量子能量脉冲。当战斗开始时，你 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ZoMpqQgDdlT13Jp0]{扭曲现实}。

Trigger You roll initiative.

You're always ready to let loose with your paradoxical abilities, and when imperiled, you instinctively release a pulse of quantum energy. As combat begins, you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ZoMpqQgDdlT13Jp0]{Warp Reality}.

Tangible Object.name: 有形物体 Tangible Object
Tangible Object.description:
一个小物件，通常是你佩戴在身上或能用一条附肢拿着的东西，会给你带来安慰。它可能是有纪念意义的小饰物或衣物，是一个可以拿来摆弄的小装置，或者也许只是因为它有你觉得令人愉悦的质感。

锚定益处 你所选物件的存在或重量有助于让你扎根于这个现实之中。你在对抗幻象和全息影像的察觉检定与意志豁免上均获得+1环境加值。

锚定效果 将你的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened} 状况值降低1。若你未处于恐慌状态，则改为在对抗恐惧效果的意志豁免上获得+1环境加值，并且在对抗他人试图对你进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} 的意志DC上获得+2环境加值，持续至你的下个回合开始。你每轮只能从此中受益一次。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.nvB1852vEPVqjxhR]{效果：可触物件（锚定效果）}

A small object, usually something you wear or can hold with one appendage, gives you comfort. It might be a trinket or article of clothing with sentimental value, a gadget to fidget with, or perhaps it just has a texture you find pleasing.

Anchor Benefit The presence or weight of your chosen object helps ground you in this reality. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to both Perception checks and Will saves against illusions and holograms.

Anchoring Effect Reduce your @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened} condition by 1. If you aren't frightened, you instead gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Will saves against fear effects and a +2 circumstance bonus to your Will DC against attempts to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} you until the start of your next turn. You can only benefit from this once per round.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.nvB1852vEPVqjxhR]{Effect: Tangible Object (Anchoring Effect)}

Spell Repertoire.name: 法术库 Spell Repertoire
Spell Repertoire.description:
秘学者你能够施放的法术集合称为你的法术库。在1级时，你学习两个自选的1环法术和四个自选的戏法，此外还会从你所选的连接中获得一个额外法术和一个额外戏法。你从与你所选连接对应传统的普通法术中，或从该传统中你能够获取的其他法术中进行选择。你可以通过消耗一个适当法术环阶的法术位来施放你法术库中的任何法术。

随着等级提升，你会向这个法术库中加入更多法术。每当你获得一个法术位时，你就将一个同环阶的法术加入你的法术库。当你获得新环阶的法术使用权限时，你获得的第一个新法术总是由你所选连接授予的法术，但其他法术可以由你自行选择。在2级时，你再选择一个1环法术；在3级时，你从所选连接获得一个新法术和另外两个2环法术，依此类推。当你加入法术时，你也可以选择一个你已知法术的更高环阶版本，这样你就能施放该法术的升阶版本。

虽然你获得它们的速度相同，但你的法术位与法术库中的法术是彼此独立的。如果一个专长或其他能力将一个法术加入你的法术库，它不会因此再给予你一个额外法术位，反之亦然。

替换你法术库中的法术

当你在法术库中获得新法术时，你可能会想替换掉一些先前学会的法术。每当你提升1级并学会新法术时，你都可以将一个旧法术替换为另一个同环阶的法术。这个法术可以是戏法，但你不能替换顿悟法术或连接法术。你也可以在停工期中通过再训练来替换法术。

巫战扭曲者你能够施放的法术集合称为你的法术库。在1级时，你学习两个自选的1环法术和四个自选的戏法，此外还会从你的悖论中获得一个额外法术和一个额外戏法。你从与你的悖论对应传统的普通法术中进行选择。你可以通过消耗一个适当法术环阶的法术位来施放你法术库中的任何法术。

随着等级提升，你会向这个法术库中加入更多法术。每当你获得一个法术位时，你就将一个同环阶的法术加入你的法术库。在2级时，选择另一个1环法术；在3级时，你从悖论中获得一个新法术和另外两个2环法术，依此类推。当你加入法术时，你也可以加入一个你已拥有法术的更高环阶版本，这样你就能施放该法术的升阶版本。

虽然你获得它们的速度相同，但你的法术位与法术库中的法术是彼此独立的。如果一个专长或其他能力将一个法术加入你的法术库，它不会因此再给予你一个额外法术位，反之亦然。

替换你法术库中的法术

当你在法术库中获得新法术时，你可能会想替换掉一些先前学会的法术。每当你提升1级并学会新法术时，你都可以将一个旧法术替换为另一个同环阶的法术。这个法术可以是戏法，但你不能替换从悖论中获得的法术。你也可以在停工期中通过再训练来替换法术。

Mystic The collection of spells you can cast is called your spell repertoire. At 1st level, you learn two 1st-rank spells of your choice and four cantrips of your choice as well as an additional spell and cantrip from your chosen connection. You choose these from the common spells from the tradition corresponding to your chosen connection or from other spells from that tradition to which you have access. You can cast any spell in your spell repertoire by using a spell slot of an appropriate spell rank.

You add to this spell repertoire as you increase in level. Each time you get a spell slot, you add a spell of the same rank to your spell repertoire. When you gain access to a new rank of spells, your first new spell is always the spell granted by your chosen connection, but you can choose the other spells. At 2nd level, you select another 1st-rank spell; at 3rd level, you gain a new spell from your chosen connection and two other 2nd-rank spells, and so on. When you add spells, you might select a higher-rank version of a spell you already know so that you can cast a heightened version of that spell.

Though you gain them at the same rate, your spell slots and the spells in your spell repertoire are separate. If a feat or other ability adds a spell to your spell repertoire, it wouldn't give you another spell slot, and vice versa.

Swapping Spells in Your Repertoire

As you gain new spells in your spell repertoire, you might want to replace some of the spells you previously learned. Each time you gain a level and learn new spells, you can swap out one of your old spells for a different spell of the same rank. This spell can be a cantrip, but you can't swap out epiphany spells or connection spells. You can also swap out spells by retraining during downtime.

Witchwarper The collection of spells you can cast is called your spell repertoire. At 1st level, you learn two 1st-rank spells of your choice and four cantrips of your choice as well as an additional spell and cantrip from your paradox. You choose these from the common spells from the tradition corresponding to your paradox. You can cast any spell in your spell repertoire by using a spell slot of an appropriate spell rank.

You add to this spell repertoire as you increase in level. Each time you get a spell slot, you add a spell to your spell repertoire of the same rank. At 2nd level, select another 1st-rank spell; at 3rd level, you gain a new spell from your paradox and two other 2nd-rank spells, and so on. When you add spells, you might add a higher-rank version of a spell you already have, so you can cast a heightened version of that spell.

Though you gain them at the same rate, your spell slots and the spells in your spell repertoire are separate. If a feat or other ability adds a spell to your spell repertoire, it wouldn't give you another spell slot, and vice versa.

Swapping Spells in Your Repertoire

As you gain new spells in your repertoire, you might want to replace some of the spells you previously learned. Each time you gain a level and learn new spells, you can swap out one of your old spells for a different spell of the same rank. This spell can be a cantrip, but you can't swap out spells gained from your paradox. You can also swap out spells by retraining during downtime.

Witchwarper Spellcasting.name: 巫战扭曲者施法 Witchwarper Spellcasting
Witchwarper Spellcasting.description:
你的悖论赋予你魔法力量。你可以使用“施放法术”活动来施放法术。作为巫战扭曲者，当你施放法术时，你可能会高声描述自己对其他现实的启示，并辅以优雅的手势，同时奥术方程或神秘符号在你周围炽然闪耀。

每天，你最多可以施放三个1环法术。你必须知晓法术才能施放它们，而你通过“法术库”职业特性来习得这些法术。你每天能够施放的法术数量称为你的法术位。

随着你作为巫战扭曲者的等级提升，你每天可施放的法术数量会增加，你能够施放的最高环阶法术也会随之提高。

你的某些法术需要你进行一次法术攻击，以判断其效果如何；或者让你的敌人针对你的法术DC进行掷骰（通常是尝试进行一次豁免检定）。你的法术攻击调整值和法术DC使用你的魅力或智力调整值，取决于你为关键属性所作的选择。

法术升阶

当你获得2环及以上的法术位时，你可以用较低环阶法术的更强版本来填充这些法术位。这会提高该法术的环阶，使其升阶至与法术位相匹配。你必须在你的法术库中拥有你想以该环阶施放的法术，才能将其升阶到该环阶。许多法术在升阶到特定环阶时会获得明确的增强效果。

戏法

你的部分法术是戏法。戏法是一种特殊类型的法术，不使用法术位。你可以随意施放戏法，每天任意次数。戏法总是自动升阶至你等级的一半并向上取整——这通常等同于你所拥有的最高巫战扭曲者法术位环阶。例如，作为1级巫战扭曲者，你的戏法是1环法术；而作为5级巫战扭曲者，你的戏法是3环法术。

扭曲法术

你可以创造被称为扭曲法术的强大魔法现象。扭曲法术是一种专注法术。施放一个扭曲法术需要花费1点专注点，而你起始拥有一个包含1点专注点的专注池。你会在每日准备期间补满专注池，并且你可以通过花费10分钟使用“重新专注”活动，沉思无尽世界或进行量子魔法研究，来恢复1点专注点。

专注法术会像戏法一样，自动升阶至你等级的一半并向上取整。专注法术不需要法术位，而且你不能使用法术位来施放它们。选择专长可以让你获得更多专注法术，并增加你专注池的容量，不过你的专注池所能容纳的专注点永远不会超过3点。

与其他专注法术不同，扭曲法术具有锚定特征。这个特征意味着，只有在你的量子场处于激活状态时，你才能使用扭曲法术，并且当你施放扭曲法术时，你会自动维持你的量子场。

你基于自己的悖论习得扭曲法术。

Your paradox grants you magical power. You can cast spells using the Cast a Spell activity. As a witchwarper, when you cast spells, you might describe your revelations about other realities aloud, accompanied by elegant gestures while arcane equations or occult symbols blaze around you.

Each day, you can cast up to three 1st-rank spells. You must know spells to cast them, and you learn them via the spell repertoire class feature. The number of spells you can cast each day is called your spell slots.

As you increase in level as a witchwarper, your number of spells per day increases, as does the highest rank of spells you can cast.

Some of your spells require you to attempt a spell attack to see how effective they are or have your enemies roll against your spell DC (typically by attempting a saving throw). Your spell attack modifiers and spell DCs use your Charisma or Intelligence modifier, depending on which you chose for your key attribute.

Heightening Spells

When you get spell slots of 2nd rank and higher, you can fill those slots with stronger versions of lower-rank spells. This increases the spell's rank, heightening it to match the spell slot. You must have a spell in your spell repertoire at the rank you want to cast in order to heighten it to that rank. Many spells have specific improvements when they're heightened to certain ranks.

Cantrips

Some of your spells are cantrips. A cantrip is a special type of spell that doesn't use spell slots. You can cast a cantrip at will, any number of times per day. A cantrip is always automatically heightened to half your level rounded up—this is usually equal to the highest rank of witchwarper spell slot you have. For example, as a 1st-level witchwarper, your cantrips are 1st-rank spells, and as a 5th-level witchwarper, your cantrips are 3rd-rank spells.

Warp Spells

You can create powerful magical phenomena known as warp spells. Warp spells are a type of focus spell. It costs 1 Focus Point to cast a warp spell, and you start with a focus pool of 1 Focus Point. You refill your focus pool during your daily preparations, and you can regain 1 Focus Point by spending 10 minutes using the Refocus activity to contemplate infinite worlds or conduct quantum magical research.

Focus spells are automatically heightened to half your level rounded up, much like cantrips. Focus spells don't require spell slots, and you can't cast them using spell slots. Taking feats can give you more focus spells and increase the size of your focus pool, though your focus pool can never hold more than 3 Focus Points.

Warp spells have the anchoring trait, unlike other focus spells. This trait means you can only use warp spells while your quantum field is active, and you automatically Sustain your quantum field when you cast warp spells.

You learn warp spells based on your paradox.

Battleglove.name: 战斗手套 Battleglove
Battleglove.description:
升级： 1

这些耐用的手套套在持用者的双手（或其他附肢）上，指关节上方带有加重护板或尖刺。

Upgrades: 1

These durable gloves fit over a wielder's hands (or other appendages) and feature weighted plates or spikes over the knuckles.

Comm Unit.name: 通讯单元 Comm Unit
Comm Unit.description:
个人通讯器是一种口袋大小的设备，结合了简易便携式计算机与蜂窝通信设备，可在行星范围内以音频和文本两种格式，与其他通讯器进行即时无线通信。个人通讯器还包括计算器、手电筒（以你为中心5英尺半径内发出明亮光照，并在接下来的5英尺内发出昏暗光照）、可访问任何本地信息圈的浏览器，以及若干娱乐功能（包括游戏）。

整合进护甲中的个人通讯器具备一定的语音激活能力；你可以无需空闲手就以音频格式与其他通讯器通信并接收回复，但输入消息、浏览信息圈或使用应用程序仍至少需要使用一只手。

可在更远距离运作的通讯器则没那么便携；它们内置发电机以提供所需电力，并依赖处于激活状态的漂流信标进行通信。这类通讯器的短期使用权可在大多数大型聚居地购买。

A personal comm unit is a pocket-sized device that combines a minor portable computer and a cellular communications device, allowing instantaneous wireless communication with other comm units in both audio- and text-based formats at planetary range. A personal comm unit also includes a calculator, a flashlight (emits bright light in a 5-foot radius around you and dim light in the next 5 feet), a browser that accesses any local infospheres, and several entertainment options (including games).

Personal comm units integrated into armor have some voice-activated capabilities; you can communicate with other comm units in audio-based formats and receive responses without needing a free hand, but typing a message, browsing the infosphere, or using an app requires the use of at least one hand.

Comm units that function at longer ranges aren't as portable; they include built-in generators that provide the necessary amount of power and rely on active Drift beacons to communicate. Short-term use of these units can be purchased in most major settlements.

Container (Ordinary).name: 容器（普通） Container (Ordinary)
Container (Ordinary).description:
容器包括背包、公文包、旅行袋和手提包。容器最多可容纳 4 Bulk，其中前 2 Bulk 的物品不计入你的 Bulk 上限。如果你是携带或收纳该容器，而不是将其穿戴在身上，则其 Bulk 为轻型而非可忽略。

Containers include backpacks, briefcases, duffel bags, and handbags. A container holds up to 4 Bulk and the first 2 Bulk of those items don't count against your Bulk limits. If you're carrying or stowing the container rather than wearing it on your person, its Bulk is light instead of negligible.

Semi-Auto Pistol.name: 半自动手枪 Semi-Auto Pistol
Semi-Auto Pistol.description:
升级： 1

这把手枪会在每次射击后自动弹出用过的弹壳并装填新的弹药。

Upgrades: 1

This pistol automatically ejects used cartridges and loads new ammunition after every shot fired.

Projectile Ammo.name: 投射武器弹药 Projectile Ammo

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一股标记魔法存在的脉冲。你不会获得魔法存在或不存在以外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你或者你盟友的魔法物品以及持续法术。仅当幻术魔法的环级低于你的侦测魔法环级时，你才能侦测幻术魔法。但是，具有幻术灵光但是没有在外表上做伪装的物品（例如一瓶隐形药水），通常能够正常侦测。

升阶（3环级） 你能知晓法术侦测出的最强魔法效果的环级或等级，具体由GM决定。

升阶（4环级） 如3环级，你也能指出最高环级魔法的来源。如同一种模糊感官，你不会了解具体的位置，但是可以将来源锁定到5尺立方（或者最近的那个五尺立方，如果来源体积比这个区域更大）。

Figment.name: 虚构幻术 Figment
Figment.description:
你创造出简单的声音或图像的幻术。声音会为法术添加听觉特征，且不能包含能被理解的单词或复杂的音乐。图像会为法术添加视觉特征，但是它不能大于5尺边长的立方体，且在15尺的距离内观察会发现它的构造明显很粗糙且缺乏细节。当你施放或维持该法术时，你能尝试用幻术让人@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{分神 Create a Diversion}，这会为你的欺骗检定提供+2环境加值。若对某个生物进行的此尝试失败了，该生物就不会相信虚构幻术。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.2Hg3a06gZCSnUgSA]{法术效果：虚构幻术}

Injury Echo.name: 伤痛回响 Injury Echo
Injury Echo.description:
你将来自未来或过去的伤势显现于现在，以伤害一个生物。选择钝击、穿刺或挥砍伤害。目标受到所选伤害类型的 1d8 伤害，并进行一次基础意志豁免。若目标豁免失败，且随后在你的下个回合结束前受到同类型的伤害，它还会额外受到 @Damage[ceil((@item.level)/2)d4[persistent,bleed]] 伤害。

升阶（+2） 初始伤害增加 1d8，且失败时的持续伤害增加 1d4。

You manifest an injury from the future or past to harm a creature in the present. Choose bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage. The target takes 1d8 of the selected damage type with a basic Will save. If the target fails its save and then takes the same type of damage before the end of your next turn, it takes an additional @Damage[ceil((@item.level)/2)d4[persistent,bleed]] damage.

Heightened (+2) The initial damage increases by 1d8, and the persistent damage on a failure increases by 1d4.

Light.name: 光 Light
Light.description:
你创造一个光球，它发出由你选择的颜色的光芒，在20尺半径内产生明亮光照（以及接下来的20尺产生昏暗光照）。如果你在一个自愿的生物身上施法，你可以将光球连结到该生物，这使得光球会跟随该生物一起移动。你可以维持法术以移动光球至多60尺，作为这个移动的一部分，你可以将光球连结到一个生物或是从一个生物上解除连结。

你可以解消该法术。如果你在你已经有4个光亮术激活时施放该法术的话，你必须结束一个已存在的法术。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.cVVZXNbV0nElVOPZ]{法术效果：光亮术}

升阶（4环级） 光球在60尺半径内产生明亮光照（并在接下来的60尺产生昏暗光照）。

Stumble.name: 踉跄 Stumble
Stumble.description:
一阵微重力爆发在目标周围引发震颤，将其拉向地面。目标必须进行一次反射豁免。

失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，持续1轮。如果目标当时正在飞行、游泳或漂浮，它会向下坠落10尺。

重度失败 目标 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{倒地}。如果目标当时正在飞行、游泳或漂浮，它会向下坠落20尺。

升阶（+1） 如果目标坠落，则失败时额外坠落5尺，重度失败时额外坠落10尺。

A burst of microgravity causes a tremor around the target, pulling it toward the ground. The target must attempt a Reflex save.

Failure The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} for 1 round. If the target was flying, swimming, or floating, it falls 10 feet downward.

Critical Failure The target falls @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. If the target was flying, swimming, or floating, it falls 20 feet downward.

Heightened (+1) If the target falls, it falls an additional 5 feet on a failure and 10 feet on a critical failure.

Arcane Spontaneous Spells.name: 奥术自发法术 Arcane Spontaneous Spells

Force Barrage.name: 力场飞弹 Force Barrage
Force Barrage.description:
你发射出一道固态的魔力碎片，射向一个你能看见的生物。它自动命中，并造成1d4+1力场伤害。你施放该法术时每额外使用一个动作，你射出的碎片增加一个，最大为3个动作发射三个碎片。你为每个碎片分别选择目标。如果你对同一个目标射击超过1个碎片，将伤害合计后再计算伤害加值，减值，抗力，弱点等。

升阶（+2） 你花费的每个动作额外射出一枚碎片。

Shifting Surge.name: 转变奔涌 Shifting Surge
Shifting Surge.description:
你释放出一股魔法能量的奔流，暂时改变武器造成的伤害类型。该武器下一次进行的打击会造成你选择的酸蚀、寒冷、电击、火焰或音波伤害，并额外造成 1d6 与该武器通常伤害类型相同的额外伤害。

强化（+2） 额外伤害提高 1d6。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.pWm0NCsxjxTUCJ7y]{法术效果：Shifting Surge}

You release a surge of magical energy that temporarily changes the type of damage dealt by a weapon. The next Strike the weapon makes deals your choice of acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic damage and deals an additional 1d6 extra damage of the same type as the weapon's normal damage.

Heightened (+2) The extra damage increases by 1d6.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.pWm0NCsxjxTUCJ7y]{Spell Effect: Shifting Surge}

Thunderstrike.name: 雷击术 Thunderstrike
Thunderstrike.description:
你呼唤一道伴随着雷鸣之声的闪电，对目标造成1d12点电击伤害和1d4点音波伤害，基础反射豁免。穿戴金属护甲或者由金属构成的生物在豁免中承受-1环境减值，若它们受到该法术的伤害，会陷入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 Clumsy 1}，持续1轮。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d12点电击以及1d4点音波。

Arcane Focus Spells.name: 奥术专注法术 Arcane Focus Spells

Warp Terrain.name: 扭曲地形 Warp Terrain
Warp Terrain.description:
你在自己的量子场内将来自另一重现实的地形特征实体化。选择以下效果之一；该效果会持续到你的量子场不再处于激活状态、你再次施放扭曲地形，或你解除此法术为止。

  • 你使量子场区域变为困难地形。你决定扭曲地形的外观。你和你的盟友可以在扭曲地形中正常移动，并且可以利用其地形特征 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{采取掩护}。
  • 你压制你场域内的地形，将量子场中任何现有的困难地形或更严重的困难地形转变为普通地形。这不适用于使生物将方格视为困难地形的效果（例如星辉武者的引力子调谐攻击）。如果你试图压制由法术或其他魔法效果创造的地形，你必须成功反制该效果。

强化（3环） 你可以选择让量子场充满雾、烟，或其他遮蔽视线的现象。其效果如同 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9XHmC2JgTUIQ1CCm]{迷雾}。你也可以改为压制量子场内其中一种此类效果。

强化（6环） 你可以选择让量子场变为更严重的困难地形，或压制更严重的困难地形。

You materialize terrain features from another reality within your quantum field. Choose one of the following effects, which lasts as long as your quantum field remains active, until you cast warp terrain again, or until you dismiss this spell.

  • You cause the area of your quantum field to become difficult terrain. You determine the appearance of the warped terrain. You and your allies can move through the warped terrain normally and can @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Take Cover} using its features.
  • You suppress terrain in your field, turning any existing difficult or greater difficult terrain in your quantum field to normal terrain. This does not apply to effects that cause a creature to count squares as difficult terrain (such as a solarian's graviton-attunement attacks). If you're attempting to suppress terrain created by a spell or other magical effect, you must successfully counteract the effect.

Heightened (3rd) You can choose to have the quantum field fill with fog, smoke, or another phenomenon that obscures vision. This functions as @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9XHmC2JgTUIQ1CCm]{Mist}. You can instead suppress one of these effects within your quantum field.

Heightened (6th) You can choose to have the quantum field become greater difficult terrain, or suppress greater difficult terrain.

Natural Ambition.name: 天生野望 Natural Ambition
Natural Ambition.description: 你从小就壮志勃勃，并且为了出人头地一直在努力奋斗，这让你在你所选择的职业领域上的进步卓越。你获得你自身职业的一个1级职业专长。你必须满足该专长的先决条件，你仅能在创建角色阶段延后选取该专长，以满足所选职业专长的先决条件。

Anchoring Strike.name: 锚定打击 Anchoring Strike
Anchoring Strike.description:
需求 你的量子场处于激活状态。

战斗可能令人迷乱，但对你而言，打击目标时所投入的强烈精神努力会为你带来额外的清明与专注。进行一次打击。该打击获得以下成功与重成功效果。

重成功 该打击获得锚定特征。你可以重掷此次打击所掷出的伤害骰，但你必须使用第二次结果，即使结果更差也是如此。

成功 该打击获得锚定特征。

Requirements Your quantum field is active.

Battle can be disorienting, but for you, the intense mental effort of striking your targets lends you additional clarity and focus. Make a Strike. The Strike gains the following success and critical success effects.

Critical Success The Strike gains the anchoring trait. You can reroll the damage dice rolled for this strike, but you must use the second result, even if it's worse.

Success The Strike gains the anchoring trait.

Isolated Spell Matrix.name: 孤立法术矩阵 Isolated Spell Matrix
Isolated Spell Matrix.description:
如果你接下来使用的动作是施放一个具有射程的法术，则将该法术的射程增加至100英尺。该法术只会影响你量子场内的目标，且法术的区域不会延伸到你的量子场之外。

If the next action you use is to Cast a Spell that has a range, increase the spell's range to 100 feet. That spell only affects targets inside your quantum field, and the area of the spell doesn't extend beyond your quantum field.

Signature Spells.name: 标志性法术 Signature Spells
Signature Spells.description:
你已经学会更灵活地施放你的一些法术，使你能够对自己的施法拥有额外的掌控。对于你能够使用的每一个法术环阶，选择该环阶的一个法术作为招牌法术。你不需要分别学习招牌法术的升阶版本；相反，你可以自由地将这些法术升阶施放。如果你学会某个招牌法术时的等级高于其最低等级，你也可以施放它所有较低环阶的版本，而无需分别学习这些版本。如果你替换一个招牌法术，你可以在你学会先前法术时所处的相同法术环阶中，选择一个替代的招牌法术。你也可以专门通过重训，将某个招牌法术改为该环阶的另一个法术，而无需替换任何法术；这所需的时间与通常重训一个法术相同。

You've learned to cast some of your spells more flexibly, granting you extra control over your spellcasting. For each spell rank you have access to, choose one spell of that rank to be a signature spell. You don't need to learn heightened versions of signature spells separately; instead, you can heighten these spells freely. If you've learned a signature spell at a higher level than its minimum, you can also cast all its lower-rank versions without learning those separately. If you swap out a signature spell, you can choose a replacement signature spell of the same spell rank at which you learned the previous spell. You can also retrain specifically to change a signature spell to a different spell of that rank without swapping any spells; this takes as much time as retraining a spell normally does.

Warp Wounds.name: 扭曲伤口 Warp Wounds
Warp Wounds.description:
触发 敌人对你造成伤害。

需求 你的量子场内有一个敌人或自愿的盟友。

你的现实发生偏移，部分与另一个现实重叠；在那个现实中，受伤代替你的是别人。你获得对触发此次攻击的所有伤害的抗性，数值等于你等级的一半；你量子场内的一个敌人或自愿的盟友受到同类型的伤害，数值等于以这种方式被防止的伤害量，并进行一次对抗你职业DC的 @Check[fortitude|against:witchwarper|basic] 豁免。

Trigger An enemy damages you.

Requirements An enemy or willing ally is in your quantum field.

Your reality shifts to partly overlap with another in which someone else was injured in your stead. You gain resistance to all damage against the triggering attack equal to half your level, and one enemy or willing ally in your quantum field takes damage of the same type equal to the amount of damage prevented this way, with a @Check[fortitude|against:witchwarper|basic] save against your class DC.

Assurance (Arcana).name: 把握（奥秘） Assurance (Arcana)
Assurance (Arcana).description:
即使在最恶劣的条件下，你也能完成基本的任务。选择一项你受训的技能，你可以放弃为该技能的技能检定掷骰，改为获得等于10+你的熟练度加值的结果（不应用任何其它加值、减值或调整值）。

特殊 你可以多次选取本专长。每次选择不同的技能获得专长效果。

Fleet.name: 舰队 Fleet
Fleet.description: 你的脚步变得更快。你的速度提高5尺。

Tempweave.name: 温织 Tempweave
Tempweave.description:
升级： 1

临温织套装是带兜帽的加固服装，以隔热织物和导流线编织而成，常用于前往潮湿气候地区的旅行，例如卡斯卓韦或普洛尼斯的丛林。

Upgrades: 1

Tempweave suits are reinforced hooded garments woven with thermal fabric and venting wires, popularly worn for trips to humid climates like the jungles of Castrovel or Pulonis.

Credstick.name: 信用片 Credstick
Credstick.description:
《星际探险家》中的大多数人都会把自己的财富存放在一种受保护的物品上，这种物品被称为信用棒。此类装置通常较为扁平，大小大致相当于一根人类手指。它们在尺寸和品质上各不相同，但归根结底，它们只是用来方便携带和花钱的一种工具。这类装置的使用方式由所有者决定，而信用棒只需在合适的银行设备附近轻轻一碰，就能完成收款或支付这样简单的操作。在需要更严格安保时，它们也可以要求语音或生物特征印记才能激活。有些先进信用棒甚至带有魔法组件，可能需要精神密码，或念出特定法术，才能访问其中存储的资金。

信用棒并不是通往个人全部财富的入口，更多的信用点通常会安全地存放在银行、私人金库或安全数据库中。相反，信用棒是一种安全且匿名的信用点转移方式，不易被追踪。无论是冒险者还是普通公民，往往都会随身携带一根信用棒，以处理他们可能需要进行的各种购买，同时身上也只保留恰好足够的信用点，这样即使遗失信用棒，也不至于破产。

协约世界中的个人经常携带信用棒，而其他与协约互动的文明，也常常会将本地资金兑换成信用点，因此也会携带信用棒来花费这些兑换后的货币。有时，一个人可能会携带好几根信用棒，将每一根专门用于不同用途；或者，如果他们想进行一笔预先定好金额的购买，也可以直接把整根棒交易出去。要是一个人身上的信用棒数量多到累赘，把资金在不同信用棒之间转移、再丢弃已经清空的信用棒就很容易，从而节省空间，不过信用棒始终具有可忽略的体积。

Most people in Starfinder keep their wealth on a protected item known as a credstick. These devices are often flat and roughly the size of a human finger. They range in dimensions and quality, but at the end of the day, they're just a means of conveniently carrying and spending money. Usage of these devices is determined by the owner, and a credstick can accept or spend funds with as simple an action as tapping it near a suitable banking device. When more rigorous security is necessary, they can require audio or biometric imprints in order to activate. Some advanced credsticks even have a magical component that might require a mental password or the recitation of a specific spell to access stored funds.

Credsticks aren't gateways to the entirety of one's wealth, and larger stores of credits are often kept secured in banks, personal vaults, or secure databases. Instead, a credstick is a safe and anonymous means of moving credits around without being traced. Adventurers and common citizens alike often keep a credstick on their person to handle any purchases they might be called upon to make, while also only keeping just enough credits on them that losing the credstick wouldn't result in bankruptcy.

Individuals in the Pact Worlds often carry credsticks, and other civilizations that interact with the Pact often turn local funds into credits and thus carry them to spend their converted currency. Sometimes a person might carry several credsticks, dedicating each one to a different use, or simply trading the stick away if they want to make a purchase of a predefined amount. If ever the number of credsticks on a person becomes too cumbersome, it's easy enough to move the funds between individual sticks and discard emptied sticks to save on space, however a credstick always has a negligible bulk.

Reflex Expertise.name: 反射专家 Reflex Expertise
Reflex Expertise.description:
秘学者 你的连接赐予你有助于躲避危险的洞察力。你的反射豁免熟练等级提升为专家。

士兵 你已培养出躲避危险的本领。你的反射豁免熟练等级提升为专家。

巫战扭曲者 你通过惊人的分析能力或对更广阔多元宇宙的理解，察觉潜在危险的能力提升了你的反应。你的反射豁免熟练等级提升为专家。

Mystic Your connection blesses you with insight that helps you dodge danger. Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to expert.

Soldier You've developed a knack for dodging danger. Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to expert.

Witchwarper Your awareness of possible dangers, through incredible analysis or an understanding of the wider multiverse, increases your reflexes. Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to expert.

Hypopen (Tactical).name: 低压笔（战术型） Hypopen (Tactical)
Hypopen (Tactical).description:
这个小型圆筒内含有专门的纳米机器人，它们可以：

  • 移除@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹}状态
  • 使@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心}状态的值降低 1。

This tiny cylinder contains specialized nanites that either

  • Remove the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} condition
  • Decrease the value of the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened} condition by 1.

Medpatch (Tactical).name: 医疗贴片（战术型） Medpatch (Tactical)
Medpatch (Tactical).description:
激活 1 (manipulate)

医疗贴片会加速身体的自然愈合。你恢复 @Damage[(3d6+6)[healing]] 生命值，并在10分钟内对抗疾病和毒素的豁免检定获得+1物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{效果：医疗贴片}

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Medpatches accelerate the body's natural healing. You regain @Damage[(3d6+6)[healing]] Hit Points and gain a +1 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{Effect: Medpatch}

Spell Gem of Invisibility (Rank 2).name: 隐形术法术宝石（2环） Spell Gem of Invisibility (Rank 2)
Spell Gem of Invisibility (Rank 2).description:
@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{隐形术}

这些晶格状宝石悬置于硅制外壳中，并编码了施放某个单一特定法术所需的魔法符文。要从法术宝石中施放法术，你必须单手持握该宝石，并使用“施放法术”活动以该法术通常所需的动作数来激活它。该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。由于由你来施放该法术，因此使用你的法术攻击调整值和法术DC。该法术必须属于你的施法传统。法术宝石中的法术只能被施放一次，而法术宝石会在施法过程中被摧毁。法术宝石不能容纳戏法或仪式。此物品的特征会根据其所含法术而变化。

激活 施放法术

效果 你以所示环阶施放该法术。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility}

These latticed gemstones are suspended in a silicon casing and encoded with the magical script necessary to cast a single, specific spell. Casting a spell from a spell gem requires holding the gem in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell. The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell must be of your spellcasting tradition. The spell in a spell gem can be cast only once, and the spell gem is destroyed as part of the casting. Spell gems can't contain cantrips or rituals. The traits for this item vary based on the spell it contains.

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Spell Gem of Personal Gravity (Rank 3).name: 个人重力法术宝石（3阶） Spell Gem of Personal Gravity (Rank 3)
Spell Gem of Personal Gravity (Rank 3).description:
@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.0mNmVi9CLXor3McX]{Personal Gravity}

这些晶格状宝石悬浮于硅制外壳中，并编码有施放某个单一、特定法术所需的魔法符文。从法术宝石中施放法术需要一只手持握该宝石，并以“施放法术”动作使用该法术通常所需的动作数来激活它。该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。由于你是施放该法术的人，因此使用你的法术攻击调整值和法术DC。该法术必须属于你的施法传统。法术宝石中的法术只能被施放一次，且法术宝石会作为施法的一部分被摧毁。法术宝石不能容纳戏法或仪式。此物品的特征会根据其所含法术而变化。

激活 施放法术

效果 你以所示环阶施放该法术。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.0mNmVi9CLXor3McX]{Personal Gravity}

These latticed gemstones are suspended in a silicon casing and encoded with the magical script necessary to cast a single, specific spell. Casting a spell from a spell gem requires holding the gem in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell. The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell must be of your spellcasting tradition. The spell in a spell gem can be cast only once, and the spell gem is destroyed as part of the casting. Spell gems can't contain cantrips or rituals. The traits for this item vary based on the spell it contains.

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Spell Gem of Translate (Rank 3).name: @UUID[Compendium.starfinder-field-test-for-pf2e.spells.Item.72mlgPq1QkeE8npz]{翻译宝石（3环）} Spell Gem of Translate (Rank 3)
Spell Gem of Translate (Rank 3).description:
@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.vTQvfYu2llKQedmY]{译文}

这些晶格状宝石悬浮于硅制外壳之中，并编码有施放某个特定法术所需的魔法符文。要从法术宝石中施放法术，你必须一手持握该宝石，并以“施放法术”动作激活它，所需动作数与该法术通常所需的动作数相同。该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。由于由你来施放该法术，因此使用你的法术攻击调整值和法术 DC。该法术必须属于你的施法传统。法术宝石中的法术只能施放一次，并且法术宝石会作为施法的一部分被摧毁。法术宝石不能容纳戏法或仪式。此物品的特征会根据其所含法术而变化。

激活 施放法术

效果 你以标示的环阶施放该法术。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.vTQvfYu2llKQedmY]{Translate}

These latticed gemstones are suspended in a silicon casing and encoded with the magical script necessary to cast a single, specific spell. Casting a spell from a spell gem requires holding the gem in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell. The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell must be of your spellcasting tradition. The spell in a spell gem can be cast only once, and the spell gem is destroyed as part of the casting. Spell gems can't contain cantrips or rituals. The traits for this item vary based on the spell it contains.

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Jump.name: 跳跃术 Jump
Jump.description:
你的腿充满力量，以跳得更高更远。你向任何方向跳跃30尺且不会接触地面。你必须在30尺内的有坚实地面的空间上落地，否则你会在使用你下个动作后坠落。

升阶（3环级） 该射程变为接触，目标变为一个接触到的生物，持续时间变为1分钟，目标能够在使用跳跃动作时总如上文所述地@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{跳跃 Leap}。

Caustic Conversion.name: 腐蚀转化 Caustic Conversion
Caustic Conversion.description:
你释放出一股魔法纳米机器人洪流，开始溶解你的目标。对目标进行一次远程法术攻击。若命中，你造成3d8点强酸伤害外加1d6点持续性强酸伤害。若重击，初始伤害翻倍，但持续性伤害不翻倍。

升阶（+2） 初始伤害增加2d8，且持续性强酸伤害增加1d6。

You launch a torrent of magical nanites that begin dissolving your target. Make a ranged spell attack against the target. On a hit, you deal 3d8 acid damage plus 1d6 persistent acid damage. On a critical hit, double the initial damage, but not the persistent damage.

Heightened (+2) The initial damage increases by 2d8, and the persistent acid damage increases by 1d6.

Dispel Magic.name: 解除魔法 Dispel Magic
Dispel Magic.description: 你干扰法术或者效果中的魔法力量。尝试一次反制检定，对抗目标。如果你成功对抗一个法术效果，你将其反制。如果你成功对抗一个魔法物品，该物品成为该类型的普通物品，持续10分钟。这不会改变物体的非魔法性质。如果目标是一件神器或者类似的物品，你自动失败。

Resist Energy.name: 抵抗能量伤害 Resist Energy
Resist Energy.description:
元素护盾保护一个生物免受某一种类型能量的伤害。选择酸蚀，寒冷，电击，火焰或者音波伤害。目标和其装备获得对你所选择伤害类型的抗力5。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.con2Hzt47JjpuUej]{法术效果：抵抗能量伤害}

升阶（4环级） 该抗力增加到10，并且你能以至多两个生物为目标。

升阶（7环级） 该抗力增加到15，并且你能以至多五个生物为目标。

Cozy Crashpad.name: 舒适坠落垫 Cozy Crashpad
Cozy Crashpad.description:
你塑造出一间边长20英尺、高10英尺的小屋。该小屋具有构造物（特征），并且遵循与能创造构造物的魔法物品相同的限制。小屋的墙壁简单且为金属制，带有几个装有金属百叶窗的小窗户，并有一扇金属门。它本身不包含锁，但有一个可供加装锁具的扣件。

内部有三张小床、一个厕所，以及一个由魔法驱动的小炉子。室内由一盏微弱的魔法光源照明，你可以用一个维持动作随意将其点亮或熄灭。小屋内的气候舒适，使其中的生物能够抵御大多数恶劣天气条件，但极端高温或严寒、强烈风暴，以及达到或超过飓风级的狂风都会摧毁这间小屋。其他生物可以自由进出小屋而不会对其造成损坏，但如果你离开小屋，法术就会结束。你可以解消该法术。

You shape a shack 20 feet on each side and 10 feet high. This shack has the structure trait and the same restrictions as magic items that create structures. The walls of the cottage are simple and metal, with small, metal shuttered windows, and it has one metal door. It doesn't include its own lock, but it has a fastener to which a lock can be applied.

The interior contains three cots, one toilet, and a small stove powered by magic. The interior is lit with a small magical light that you can light or extinguish at will using a Sustain action. The climate inside the shack is comfortable and allows creatures inside it to withstand most hostile weather conditions, but incredible heat or cold, powerful storms, and winds of hurricane force or greater destroy the cottage. Other creatures can freely enter and exit the shack without damaging it, but if you exit the shack, the spell ends. You can Dismiss the spell.

Haste.name: 加速术 Haste
Haste.description:
魔法强化了目标，令其行动迅速。它获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened}状态，并且每轮可以使用该额外动作以打击或者行走。

升阶（7环级） 你能以至多6个生物为目标。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.ElkXovNrHB0Doi6O]{法术效果：加速术}

Lightning Bolt.name: 闪电束 Lightning Bolt
Lightning Bolt.description:
一束闪电从你手中绽放而出，造成4d12电击伤害。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d12。

Clever Improviser.name: 机智应变 Clever Improviser
Clever Improviser.description: 你学会了该如何处理那些超出你能力范围的情况。你获得了@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.9jGaBxLUtevZYcZO]{即兴发挥 Untrained Improvisation}通用专长。此外，哪怕你在技能上的熟练度为未受训，你也可以尝试那些通常需要你具备受训熟练度才能进行的技能动作。

Untrained Improvisation.name: 即兴发挥 Untrained Improvisation
Untrained Improvisation.description: 你学会了如何处理超出自己能力范围的状况。你在未受训技能检定上的熟练度加值等于你的等级-2。达到5级后，熟练度加值变为你的等级-1，达到7级后，等于你的完整等级。本专长不会让你能够使用技能的受训行动。

Quantum Recycle.name: 量子回收 Quantum Recycle
Quantum Recycle.description:
频率 每天一次

触发条件 你施放一个2环或更高环阶的法术，且该法术以你的量子场内的一个生物或区域为目标。

你娴熟地操控量子场的效果，确保你的法术中的部分能量得以保留，并能够再次加以利用。你恢复一个已消耗的法术位，其环阶比触发该能力的法术低1环。

Frequency once per day

Trigger You cast a 2nd-rank or higher spell, and the spell targets a creature or area within your quantum field.

You expertly manipulate the effects of your quantum field to ensure that some of the energy from your spell is preserved and can be harnessed again. You regain an expended spell slot one spell rank lower than the triggering spell.

Favored Disguise.name: 偏好的伪装 Favored Disguise
Favored Disguise.description:
你创造一个偏爱的伪装，能够在一念之间调用。每当你进行估装时，你可以决定让该伪装成为你的偏爱伪装。若你拥有全息皮肤，或能够变形，那么你在估装时总是可以采用你的偏爱伪装。你仍然要为估装检定掷欺瞒，但将任何大失败结果改为失败。你可以拥有一个偏爱伪装，并且当你的欺瞒熟练度达到专家、大师和传奇时，各获得一个可使用的额外偏爱伪装。

You create a favored disguise that you can call upon at a moment's notice. When you Impersonate, you can decide that the disguise becomes your favored disguise. If you have a holoskin or can Change Shape, you can always adopt your favored disguise when Impersonating. You still roll Deception for the Impersonate check but count any critical failure results as failures instead. You can have one favored disguise and gain an additional favored disguise you can employ at expert, master, and legendary proficiency in Deception.

Expert Spellcaster.name: 专家施法者 Expert Spellcaster
Expert Spellcaster.description:
秘学者 你与你的连接建立了更强大的纽带。你的法术攻击调整值和法术DC的熟练等级提升为专家。

巫战扭曲者 长期的魔法练习提升了你的能力。你的职业DC、法术攻击调整值和法术DC的熟练等级提升为专家。

Mystic You've formed a more powerful bond with your connection. Your proficiency ranks for spell attack modifiers and spell DCs increase to expert.

Witchwarper Extended practice of magic has improved your capabilities. Your proficiency ranks for class DC, spell attack modifier, and spell DC increase to expert.

Enlarge Quantum Field.name: 放大量子场 Enlarge Quantum Field
Enlarge Quantum Field.description:
你的量子场缓慢地侵蚀现实。将你的量子场半径增加 10 英尺。在你的量子场停用之前，每回合一次，当你维持该量子场时，其半径额外增加 5 英尺（最多额外增加 50 英尺）。

Your quantum field slowly encroaches on reality. Increase your quantum field's radius by 10 feet. Until your quantum field deactivates, once per turn when you Sustain the quantum field, increase its radius by an additional 5 feet (to a maximum of 50 additional feet).

Additional Lore.name: 额外学识 Additional Lore
Additional Lore.description:
