你的知识扩展到了新的领域。选择一个学识技能的子类别，你对其受训。在3级、7级、15级时，你获得额外的技能提升，仅能用于提升所选的学识。

特殊 你可以多次选取本专长。每次都必须选择不同的学识子类别，在列出的等级，你同样会获得针对该学识的额外技能提升。

Physical Science Lore.name: 物理科学知识 Physical Science Lore

First Ones Lore.name: 先驱者知识 First Ones Lore

Void Whispers.name: 虚空低语 Void Whispers
Void Whispers.description:
目标听到来自群星之外、蕴含不可言说奥秘的不祥声响，使其心智陷入迷乱。目标进行一次意志豁免检定。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 目标听见这些诡异的低语，陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}，持续1轮。

失败 目标开始漫无目的地游荡，将每个动作都用于向随机方向Step。移动时，目标会选择最安全的路线，且不会进入危险地形。该法术持续1分钟，或直到有生物对目标使用敌对动作。

大失败 如同失败，但目标会语无伦次地胡言乱语。任何在其回合开始时位于目标20尺内的生物都必须尝试一次意志豁免检定。若失败，它必须在其下个回合中将第一个动作用于向随机方向Step，并在24小时内对此法术免疫。这是一个无力化效果。

The target hears ominous sounds containing unspeakable mysteries from beyond the stars that disorient its mind. The target attempts a Will save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The target hears the strange whispers, becoming @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round.

Failure The target begins to wander aimlessly, using each action to Step in a random direction. When it moves, the target takes the safest route and doesn't enter hazardous terrain. The spell has a duration of 1 minute or until a creature uses a hostile action against the target.

Critical Failure As failure, except the target babbles incoherently. Any creature that begins its turn within 20 feet of the target must attempt a Will saving throw. On a failure, it must use its first action on its next turn to Step in a random direction and becomes immune to this spell for 24 hours. This is an incapacitation effect.

Fly.name: 飞行 Fly
Fly.description:
目标能够在空气中穿梭，获得等于其速度或者20尺的飞行速度，取较高者。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.MuRBCiZn5IKeaoxi]{法术效果：飞行术}

升阶（7环级） 该持续时间增加到1小时。

Translocate.name: 次元移位 Translocate
Translocate.description:
你立即将自身以及自己正在穿戴和持有的物品从当前空间转移走，移动至法术射程内你能看到的未被占据的空间。如果这将会带着其他生物与你一同移动——即便你把该生物放置在异次元容器中——你就会失去该法术。

升阶（5环级） 法术射程增加至1英里。你不需要看到目的地，只要你曾经去过目的地，并且知晓该地点与你相对的位置以及距离即可。之后你会在1小时内临时免疫该法术。

Unfettered Movement.name: 行动无碍 Unfettered Movement
Unfettered Movement.description:
你驱散可能影响一个生物的阻碍。当处于该法术效果中时，法术目标忽视会赋予其速度环境减值的效果。当法术目标尝试@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape}一个令其@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}或者@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}的效果时，它自动成功，除非该效果是魔法性的，并且其环级比行动无碍更高。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.CdAyAiMGESvgNQtz]{Spell Effect: Unfettered Movement}

Warp Probability.name: 扭曲概率 Warp Probability
Warp Probability.description:
触发条件 你未通过一次攻击检定或豁免检定。

你敞开心智，读取多元宇宙潜藏的概率。重掷这次失败的检定，并取较好的结果。

Trigger You fail an attack roll or saving throw.

You open your mind to read the underlying probability of the multiverse. Reroll the failed check and take the better result.

Trick Magic Item.name: 巧取魔法物品 Trick Magic Item
Trick Magic Item.description:
你检视一件你通常无法使用的魔法物品，试图欺骗它并暂时将其激活。例如，这可能让一名士兵能从法术宝石或法术芯片中施放法术，或让一名秘学者能使用法术宝石施放一个不在其连接传统列表上的法术。你必须知道激活该物品会产生什么效果，否则你不能尝试欺骗它。

进行一次检定，使用与该物品魔法传统相匹配的技能；如果你是试图从该物品中施放一个法术，则使用与其列表中包含该法术的某个传统相匹配的技能。相关技能为：奥秘学对应奥术，自然学对应原始，神秘学对应秘术，宗教学对应神圣；若物品具有魔法特征而没有传统特征，则以上四者任意其一均可。GM根据物品等级决定DC（可能会依物品或情境进行调整）。

如果你激活了一件需要法术攻击调整值或法术DC的魔法物品，而你对相关属性值没有熟练度，则以你的等级作为熟练加值，并使用你的智力、感知或魅力调整值中最高者。如果你在该物品传统对应的适当技能上达到大师熟练度，则改为使用受训熟练加值；如果你达到传奇熟练度，则改为使用专家熟练加值。

成功 在当前回合的剩余时间内，你可以花费动作来激活该物品，视同你原本可以正常使用它。

失败 你不能使用该物品，也不能在本回合再次尝试欺骗它，但你可以在后续回合再次尝试。

大失败 你不能使用该物品，且直到你的下一次每日准备前都不能再次尝试欺骗它。

You examine a magic item you normally couldn't use in an effort to fool it and activate it temporarily. For example, this might allow a soldier to cast a spell from a spell gem or spellchip or allow a mystic to cast a spell that's not on their connection's tradition list using a spell gem. You must know what activating the item does, or you can't attempt to trick it.

Attempt a check using the skill matching the item's magic tradition, or matching a tradition that has the spell on its list, if you're trying to cast a spell from the item. The relevant skills are Arcana for arcane, Nature for primal, Occultism for occult, Religion for divine, or any of the four for an item that has the magical trait and not a tradition trait. The GM determines the DC based on the item's level (possibly adjusted depending on the item or situation).

If you activate a magic item that requires a spell attack modifier or spell DC and you don't have proficiency in the relevant statistic, use your level as your proficiency bonus and the highest of your Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma modifiers. If you're a master in the appropriate skill for the item's tradition, you instead use the trained proficiency bonus; if you're legendary, you instead use the expert proficiency bonus.

Success For the rest of the current turn, you can spend actions to activate the item as if you could normally use it.

Failure You can't use the item or try to trick it again this turn, but you can try again on subsequent turns.

Critical Failure You can't use the item, and you can't try to trick it again until your next daily preparations.

Chk Chk (Level 1).name: 克克（1级） Chk Chk (Level 1)
Chk Chk (Level 1).tokenName: 齐克 齐克 Chk Chk

Shirren.name: 希尔伦人 Shirren
Shirren.description:
昆虫般的须壬人从具有毁灭性的虫群中分离出来，抛弃了冷酷无情的蜂巢思维，以追求个人自由并终结星际暴力的循环。须壬人是一种心灵感应的物种，致力于自身的个体主义，建立自己选择的社群，并与其他族群和谐共处。

The insectile shirrens split from the destructive Swarm, forsaking the ruthless hive mind to pursue personal freedom and end the cycl e of interstellar violence. Shirrens are a species of telepaths devoted to their own individualism, building chosen communities, and living in harmony with other peoples.

Limited Telepathy.name: 有限心灵感应 Limited Telepathy
Limited Telepathy.description:
你可以与30英尺内的生物进行心灵交流。你只能与和你共享语言的生物交流。这不会让你读取他们的思想，而且传达的信息也不会比正常言语更多。

You can communicate mentally with creatures within 30 feet. You can communicate only with creatures that share a language with you. This doesn't give you any access to their thoughts, and it communicates no more information than normal speech would.

Defiant Shirren.name: 不屈希伦尼斯人 Defiant Shirren
Defiant Shirren.description:
尽管时光流逝，你在反抗虫群及一切形式的精神控制时依然意志坚定。若你针对一个由具有虫族特征的生物，或你知晓其与虫群结盟的生物所创造的效果进行意志豁免检定并获得成功，则你改为获得重度成功。对于任何受控制其的法术或效果影响的生物，你也获得这些益处。此外，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.nAJeT29ZJvqeg98h]{Rebellious Defiance} 动作。

Despite the passage of time, you remain resolute in your defiance of the Swarm and all forms of mental control. If you roll a success on a Will saving throw against an effect that was created by a creature with the kucharn trait or a creature that you know is allied with the Swarm, you get a critical success instead. You gain these benefits against any creature affected by a spell or effect that controls it. Additionally, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.nAJeT29ZJvqeg98h]{Rebellious Defiance} action.

Rebellious Defiance.name: 反叛反抗 Rebellious Defiance
Rebellious Defiance.description:
频率 每天一次

效果 你将100英尺内一个你能看见的敌人斥为暴君或恶徒，并做好准备反抗他们，甚至至死不渝。你对该敌人的攻击检定获得+1环境加值，并且对抗该敌人的攻击、法术和效果时的豁免检定获得+1环境加值。这些增益持续1分钟。

Frequency once per day

Effect You decry one foe within 100 feet that you can see as a tyrant or villain and prepare yourself to defy them, even until death. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus on your attack rolls against this foe, and you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against the attacks, spells, and effects of this foe. These benefits last for 1 minute.

Disciple.name: 门徒 Disciple
Disciple.description:
你是某位特定神祇的忠实信徒。你可能是在宗教文化中长大，或者也许是在后来的人生中感受到了某位神明的召唤，但你磨练了自己的技艺，并将一生奉献于作为这位神祇的追随者而生活。

选择两项属性增强。其中一项必须是你的神祇的神圣属性条目中指定的属性，另一项为自由属性增强。

你在该神祇所列出的神圣技能以及一项与你的神祇相关的学识技能（例如阿巴达尔学识）上受训。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.NY2R5hNgdkSRPkTV]{宗教护符} 技能专长，即使你不满足该专长的前提条件也是如此。

You're a loyal disciple of a particular deity. You might have been raised in a religious culture or perhaps felt a kindred calling toward a god later in life, but you've honed your skills and devoted your life to living as a follower of that deity.

Choose two attribute boosts. One must be an attribute specified in your deity's Divine Attribute entry, and one is a free attribute boost.

You're trained in the deity's listed divine skill and a Lore skill related to your deity (Abadar Lore, for example). You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.NY2R5hNgdkSRPkTV]{Religious Talisman} skill feat even if you do not meet the feat's prerequisites.

Religious Talisman.name: 宗教护符 Religious Talisman
Religious Talisman.description:
你可以花 10 分钟制作并祝圣一枚属于你神祇的宗教象征。虽然这类护符传统上是在纸片上绘有宗教符号，但它们也可以有许多形式，包括身体艺术、贴纸，甚至是虚拟表情符号。你只能为自己以及你所崇拜的神祇制作护符。只要你继续从事符合你神祇典范的活动，你的先攻检定便获得 +1 状态加值。若你违背了你神祇的禁忌，这枚护符就会被摧毁，并且你会在完成一次 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.7Fd4lxozd11MQ55N]{赎罪} 仪式前，对先攻检定和察觉检定承受 –1 状态减值。

You can construct and bless a religious symbol of your deity in 10 minutes. While such talismans are traditionally scraps of paper with a religious symbol drawn on them, they can take many forms, including body art, a sticker, or even a virtual emoji. You can create a talisman only for yourself and for the deity you worship. As long as you continue to engage in activities that match your deity's edicts you gain a +1 status bonus to initiative rolls. If you violate your deity's anathema, the talisman is destroyed, and you take a –1 status penalty to initiative rolls and Perception checks until you complete an @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.7Fd4lxozd11MQ55N]{Atone} ritual.

Mystic.name: 秘学者 Mystic
Mystic.description:
你是一条管道，传导着连接并束缚宇宙万物的根本力量。你可以汲取这股超自然的源泉，与盟友建立深厚的精神纽带，在战斗中强化他们，并在他们受伤时恢复他们的生命值。你的力量会根据你所选择的连接呈现出独特的形态，并随着你更深层次地探索你的连接，赋予你全新且更强大的法术。

You're a conduit, channeling the fundamental forces that connect and bind everything in the cosmos. You can draw upon this supernatural wellspring to form deep spiritual bonds with your allies, empower them in combat, and restore their health should they become injured. Your powers take unique shape based on the connection you choose, granting new and more powerful spells as you explore your connection on a deeper level.

Vitality Network.name: 活力网络 Vitality Network
Vitality Network.description:
你的灵魂支撑着一张能量网络，将你纽带中的成员连接起来并加以疗愈。你的活力网络的最大容量等于 6 + 每级 4 生命值。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.UeMHbnnaXDa3sGfG]{转移动力} 动作，你可以用它将生命值从你的网络中取出，并以治疗的形式转移给自己或盟友。

生死关头有助于加强你与盟友之间的纽带。在每个战斗中的回合开始时，当你恢复行动时，你的活力网络恢复 4 点生命值；如果你的法术 DC 熟练度达到大师，则改为恢复 6 点生命值；如果你达到传奇，则恢复 8 点生命值。当你进行重新专注时，你的活力网络恢复其全部生命值。

Your soul supports a network of energy that connects and heals those in your bond. Your vitality network has a maximum capacity equal to 6 + 4 Hit Points per level. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.UeMHbnnaXDa3sGfG]{Transfer Vitality} action that you can use to take Hit Points out of your network and into yourself or your allies as healing.

Life-and-death situations help strengthen your bonds with your allies. At the start of each turn in combat, when you regain actions, your vitality network regains 4 Hit Points; if you're master in spell DC, it regains 6 Hit Points instead; if you're legendary, it regains 8 Hit Points. When you Refocus, your vitality network regains all its Hit Points.

Connection.name: 连接 Connection
Connection.description:
所有秘学者都与某种太空力量有着超自然的连接，这种力量赋予他们魔法能力。你的连接的确切本质可能千差万别——你可能崇拜某位神祇或某个神系，体现某种形而上学概念，成为自然之怒的导体，或是其他什么。即使是共享同一种连接的秘学者，也可能会以不同方式诠释其力量来源。在1级时，选择你的连接。你所选择的连接决定了你施放的法术类型、你从中选择法术的法术传统、你额外获得受训的技能、你学会的顿悟，以及一种和谐；这种和谐通常会在你用活力网络治疗生物时赋予其特殊增益。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.fM1vlupLq9Zlyt7C]{阿卡西}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.AurhNoZmNNhHktx6]{元素}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.XV8C2ASALC65G5MH]{治疗}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.jV9LIUswOPkVRC49]{节律}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.kvmpnKMVw4wwGk8c]{阴影}

All mystics have a supernatural connection with a cosmic force that grants magical powers. The exact nature of your connection can vary widely—you might worship a god or pantheon, embody a metaphysical concept, become a conduit for nature's wrath, or something else. Even mystics who share the same connection might interpret the source of their powers differently. At 1st level, choose your connection. Your chosen connection determines the type of spells you cast and the spell tradition you choose spells from, your additional trained skill, the epiphanies you learn, and a harmony that usually grants creatures a special benefit when you heal them with your vitality network.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.fM1vlupLq9Zlyt7C]{Akashic}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.AurhNoZmNNhHktx6]{Elemental}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.XV8C2ASALC65G5MH]{Healing}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.jV9LIUswOPkVRC49]{Rhythm}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.kvmpnKMVw4wwGk8c]{Shadow}

Transfer Vitality.name: 转移生命力 Transfer Vitality
Transfer Vitality.description:
你可以将你的生命力网络中的至多 10 点生命值（最少 1 点）转移给自己，或一个你能感知到且位于 60 尺内的已建立纽带生物。对于具有虚能治疗的生物，此效果如同该动作具有虚能特征一样生效。你可转移的数值在 5 级、10 级、15 级和 20 级时各增加 10 点。

You can transfer up to 10 Hit Points (minimum 1) from your vitality network into yourself or a bonded creature you can sense within 60 feet. This works on creatures with void healing as though this action had the void trait. The amount you can transfer increases by 10 at 5th, 10th, 15th and 20th level.

Shadow.name: 暗影 Shadow
Shadow.description:
你知晓每一片阴影都是通往冥界的入口，而你就像塑造黏土的艺术家一样，能随心所欲地将那个领域的阴影物质塑造成可怖而奇妙的形态。

传统 神圣

连接技能 潜行

连接法术 戏法：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.0zU8CPejjQFnhZFI]{Figment}；1环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.k34hDOfIIMAxNL4a]{Grim Tendrils}；2环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility}；3环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.WsUwpfmhKrKwoIe3]{Slow}；4环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.zR67Rt3UMHKC5evy]{Flicker}；5环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.IqJ9URobmJ9L9UBG]{Shadow Blast}；6环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.WPXzPl7YbMEIGWfi]{Mislead}；7环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.0jadeyQIItIuRgeH]{Eclipse Burst}；8环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.wfleiawxsfhpRRwf]{Disappearance}；9环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.MJx7DmjsWYzDZ3a4]{Phantasmagoria}

顿悟法术 初始：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.uh9Br4yrKvJA6zq0]{Shadow Snap}；进阶：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.rluzzX2ml4yFWnYw]{Cloying Shadows}；高阶：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.pgjlPNfXCpEYyLVu]{Shadow Prison}

协鸣 当你转移生命力时，目标的影子会变得更加黑暗并膨胀，将目标周围 @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] 内的明亮光照降低为微光。这是一种魔法黑暗，可以压制非魔法光源，或尝试反制魔法光源。目标在这片微光中变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}，并且可以利用隐蔽状态来 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{躲藏}。此效果持续至你下个回合结束。

完美协鸣 你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.u9NU2bULHg3S5FaP]{Umbral Stride} 动作。当你转移生命力时，目标可以在其下个回合结束前使用此动作一次。

You know every shadow is a portal to the Netherworld, and like an artist molding clay, you sculpt that realm's shadowy substance into dreadful and wondrous shapes at your whim.

Tradition divine

Connection Skill Stealth

Connection Spells cantrip: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.0zU8CPejjQFnhZFI]{Figment}; 1st: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.k34hDOfIIMAxNL4a]{Grim Tendrils}; 2nd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility}; 3rd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.WsUwpfmhKrKwoIe3]{Slow}; 4th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.zR67Rt3UMHKC5evy]{Flicker}; 5th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.IqJ9URobmJ9L9UBG]{Shadow Blast}; 6th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.WPXzPl7YbMEIGWfi]{Mislead}; 7th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.0jadeyQIItIuRgeH]{Eclipse Burst}; 8th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.wfleiawxsfhpRRwf]{Disappearance}; 9th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.MJx7DmjsWYzDZ3a4]{Phantasmagoria}

Epiphany Spells initial: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.uh9Br4yrKvJA6zq0]{Shadow Snap}; advanced: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.rluzzX2ml4yFWnYw]{Cloying Shadows}; greater: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.pgjlPNfXCpEYyLVu]{Shadow Prison}

Harmony When you Transfer Vitality, the target's shadow darkens and swells, reducing bright light within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] of the target to dim light. This is a form of magical darkness and can overcome non-magical light sources or attempt to counteract magical light. The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} while in this dim light and can use the concealed condition to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hide}. This lasts until the end of your next turn.

Perfect Harmony You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.u9NU2bULHg3S5FaP]{Umbral Stride} action. When you Transfer Vitality, the target can use this action once before the end of their next turn.

Initial Epiphany.name: 初始顿悟 Initial Epiphany
Initial Epiphany.description:
你发现了你连接的基本真理。你习得你所选连接的初始顿悟法术。顿悟法术是一种专注法术。施放专注法术需要消耗1点专注点，而你起始拥有一个包含1点专注点的专注池。你会在每日准备期间补满你的专注池，并且你可以通过花费10分钟使用“再专注”活动，与和你缔结纽带的盟友共度时光，或以其他方式沉思你连接的本质，来恢复1点专注点。

专注法术会自动强化至你等级的一半（向上取整），与戏法类似。专注法术不需要法术位，而且你也不能使用法术位来施放它们。选取专长可以让你获得更多专注法术并提高你专注池的容量，不过你的专注池最多只能容纳3点专注点。

You discover the basic truth of your connection. You learn your chosen connection's initial epiphany spell. Epiphany spells are a type of focus spell. It costs 1 Focus Point to cast a focus spell, and you start with a focus pool of 1 Focus Point. You refill your focus pool during your daily preparations, and you can regain 1 Focus Point by spending 10 minutes using the Refocus activity to spend time with your bonded allies or otherwise ponder the nature of your connection.

Focus spells are automatically heightened to half your level rounded up, much like cantrips. Focus spells don't require spell slots, and you can't cast them using spell slots. Taking feats can give you more focus spells and increase the size of your focus pool, though your focus pool can never hold more than 3 Focus Points.

Mystic Spellcasting.name: 秘学者施法 Mystic Spellcasting
Mystic Spellcasting.description:
你是一名施法者，可以使用“施放法术”活动来施放法术。作为秘学者，当你施放法术时，你可能会吟诵祷词，或哼唱受你的顿悟启发而成的歌曲；你也可能会做出手势或起舞，遵循你的连接网络中的流动模式；你还可能在施法时伴随着你与结盟盟友之间流动的缕缕能量。

每天，你至多可以施放三个1环法术。你必须知晓法术才能施放它们，而你通过“法术保留”职业特性来习得这些法术。你每天能够施放的法术数量称为你的法术位。

随着你作为秘学者等级的提升，你每天可施放的法术数量会增加，你能够施放的法术最高环阶也会提高，如“秘学者每日法术”表所示。

你的某些法术需要你进行一次法术攻击，以确定它们的效果如何；或者让你的敌人对抗你的法术DC进行掷骰（通常是进行一次豁免检定）。由于你的关键属性是感知，你的法术攻击调整值和法术DC使用你的感知调整值。

法术升阶

当你获得2环及更高环阶的法术位时，你可以用较低环阶法术的更强版本来填充这些法术位。这会将该法术的环阶提高到与法术位相匹配。你必须在你的法术保留中拥有该法术对应你想要施放环阶的版本，才能将其升阶至该环阶。许多法术在升阶至特定环阶时会获得特定强化。“招牌法术”职业特性让你能够自由升阶某些法术。

戏法

你的某些法术是戏法。戏法是一种特殊类型的法术，不使用法术位。你可以随意施放戏法，每天施放任意次数。戏法会自动升阶至你等级的一半并向上取整——这通常等于你所拥有的最高秘学者法术位环阶。例如，作为1级秘学者，你的戏法是1环法术；而作为5级秘学者，你的戏法是3环法术。

You are a spellcaster and can cast spells using the Cast a Spell activity. As a mystic, when you cast spells, you might intone a prayer or hum a song inspired by your epiphanies, you might gesture or dance in patterns that follow the flow of your connection's network, and you might accompany your spellcasting with wisps of energy flowing between you and your bonded allies.

Each day, you can cast up to three 1st-rank spells. You must know spells to cast them, and you learn them via the spell repertoire class feature. The number of spells you can cast each day is called your spell slots.

As you increase in level as a mystic, your number of spells per day increases, as does the highest rank of spells you can cast, as shown on the Mystic Spells per Day table.

Some of your spells require you to attempt a spell attack to see how effective they are or have your enemies roll against your spell DC (typically by attempting a saving throw). Since your key attribute is Wisdom, your spell attack modifiers and spell DCs use your Wisdom modifier.

Heightening Spells

When you get spell slots of 2nd rank and higher, you can fill those slots with stronger versions of lower-rank spells. This increases the spell's rank to match the spell slot. You must have a spell in your spell repertoire at the rank you want to cast in order to heighten it to that rank. Many spells have specific improvements when they're heightened to certain ranks. The signature spells class feature lets you heighten certain spells freely.

Cantrips

Some of your spells are cantrips. A cantrip is a special type of spell that doesn't use spell slots. You can cast a cantrip at will, any number of times per day. A cantrip is automatically heightened to half your level rounded up—this is usually equal to the highest rank of mystic spell slot you have. For example, as a 1st-level mystic, your cantrips are 1st-rank spells, and as a 5th-level mystic, your cantrips are 3rd-rank spells.

Mystic Bond.name: 秘学者纽带 Mystic Bond
Mystic Bond.description:
你在自己与他人之间建立纽带，最常见的是与你最亲密的同伴。对每位秘学者而言，建立纽带的方式各不相同，但总是需要进行一项与秘学者连接相关的 10 分钟活动，并且要求你与想要建立纽带的生物相邻。你最多可以与另外 10 个自愿的生物维持纽带，且该纽带会一直持续，直到你或已建立纽带的生物不再愿意成为纽带的一部分。你始终被视为自己纽带的一部分，且不计入 10 个生物的上限。

你始终知晓其他已建立纽带生物的大致距离与方向、它们的生命值总量，以及它们是否清醒、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{濒死}或死亡。此能力无法跨位面生效（包括在漂流域中 transit 时），且某些特殊的魔法或科技效果可能会干扰你侦测盟友的能力。

You form a bond between yourself and others, most typically your closest companions. Forming bonds is different for every mystic but always involves using a 10-minute activity related to the mystic's connection that requires you to be adjacent to the creature with whom you wish to bond. You can maintain a bond with up to 10 other willing creatures, and the bond lasts until you or the bonded creature are no longer willing to be part of the bond. You are always considered part of your own bond and don't count toward the 10-creature limit.

You always know the general distance and direction toward other bonded creatures, their Hit Point totals, and if they're conscious, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying}, or dead. This ability doesn't work across planes (including when in transit in the Drift), and some special magical or technological effects might interfere with your ability to detect your allies.

Spell Repertoire.name: 法术库 Spell Repertoire
Spell Repertoire.description:
秘学者 你能够施放的法术集合称为你的法术汇编。在1级时，你学习两个自选的1环法术和四个自选的戏法，以及一个来自你所选连接的额外法术和戏法。你从与你所选连接对应传统的普通法术中，或从该传统中你能够获取的其他法术中进行选择。你可以消耗一个适当法术环阶的法术位来施放你法术汇编中的任何法术。

随着等级提升，你会向这个法术汇编中添加法术。每当你获得一个法术位时，你就向法术汇编中添加一个相同环阶的法术。当你获得新环阶法术的使用权时，你获得的第一个新法术始终是由你所选连接赋予的法术，但其他法术可以由你选择。在2级时，你再选择一个1环法术；在3级时，你从所选连接获得一个新法术以及另外两个2环法术，依此类推。当你添加法术时，你也可以选择一个你已知法术的更高环阶版本，以便施放该法术的高阶版本。

虽然你获得它们的速度相同，但你的法术位和法术汇编中的法术是彼此分开的。如果某个专长或其他能力向你的法术汇编中添加了一个法术，它不会给予你额外的法术位，反之亦然。

替换你法术汇编中的法术

当你在法术汇编中获得新法术时，你可能想替换掉一些先前学会的法术。每次你提升一级并学会新法术时，都可以将一个旧法术替换为另一个相同环阶的法术。这个法术也可以是戏法，但你不能替换顿悟法术或连接法术。你也可以在停工期内通过再训练来替换法术。

巫战扭曲者 你能够施放的法术集合称为你的法术汇编。在1级时，你学习两个自选的1环法术和四个自选的戏法，以及一个来自你悖论的额外法术和戏法。你从与你的悖论对应传统的普通法术中进行选择。你可以消耗一个适当法术环阶的法术位来施放你法术汇编中的任何法术。

随着等级提升，你会向这个法术汇编中添加法术。每当你获得一个法术位时，你就向法术汇编中添加一个相同环阶的法术。在2级时，再选择一个1环法术；在3级时，你从悖论获得一个新法术以及另外两个2环法术，依此类推。当你添加法术时，你也可以添加一个你已拥有法术的更高环阶版本，这样你就能施放该法术的高阶版本。

虽然你获得它们的速度相同，但你的法术位和法术汇编中的法术是彼此分开的。如果某个专长或其他能力向你的法术汇编中添加了一个法术，它不会给予你额外的法术位，反之亦然。

替换你法术汇编中的法术

当你在法术汇编中获得新法术时，你可能想替换掉一些先前学会的法术。每次你提升一级并学会新法术时，都可以将一个旧法术替换为另一个相同环阶的法术。这个法术也可以是戏法，但你不能替换从悖论获得的法术。你也可以在停工期内通过再训练来替换法术。

Mystic The collection of spells you can cast is called your spell repertoire. At 1st level, you learn two 1st-rank spells of your choice and four cantrips of your choice as well as an additional spell and cantrip from your chosen connection. You choose these from the common spells from the tradition corresponding to your chosen connection or from other spells from that tradition to which you have access. You can cast any spell in your spell repertoire by using a spell slot of an appropriate spell rank.

You add to this spell repertoire as you increase in level. Each time you get a spell slot, you add a spell of the same rank to your spell repertoire. When you gain access to a new rank of spells, your first new spell is always the spell granted by your chosen connection, but you can choose the other spells. At 2nd level, you select another 1st-rank spell; at 3rd level, you gain a new spell from your chosen connection and two other 2nd-rank spells, and so on. When you add spells, you might select a higher-rank version of a spell you already know so that you can cast a heightened version of that spell.

Though you gain them at the same rate, your spell slots and the spells in your spell repertoire are separate. If a feat or other ability adds a spell to your spell repertoire, it wouldn't give you another spell slot, and vice versa.

Swapping Spells in Your Repertoire

As you gain new spells in your spell repertoire, you might want to replace some of the spells you previously learned. Each time you gain a level and learn new spells, you can swap out one of your old spells for a different spell of the same rank. This spell can be a cantrip, but you can't swap out epiphany spells or connection spells. You can also swap out spells by retraining during downtime.

Witchwarper The collection of spells you can cast is called your spell repertoire. At 1st level, you learn two 1st-rank spells of your choice and four cantrips of your choice as well as an additional spell and cantrip from your paradox. You choose these from the common spells from the tradition corresponding to your paradox. You can cast any spell in your spell repertoire by using a spell slot of an appropriate spell rank.

You add to this spell repertoire as you increase in level. Each time you get a spell slot, you add a spell to your spell repertoire of the same rank. At 2nd level, select another 1st-rank spell; at 3rd level, you gain a new spell from your paradox and two other 2nd-rank spells, and so on. When you add spells, you might add a higher-rank version of a spell you already have, so you can cast a heightened version of that spell.

Though you gain them at the same rate, your spell slots and the spells in your spell repertoire are separate. If a feat or other ability adds a spell to your spell repertoire, it wouldn't give you another spell slot, and vice versa.

Swapping Spells in Your Repertoire

As you gain new spells in your repertoire, you might want to replace some of the spells you previously learned. Each time you gain a level and learn new spells, you can swap out one of your old spells for a different spell of the same rank. This spell can be a cantrip, but you can't swap out spells gained from your paradox. You can also swap out spells by retraining during downtime.

Zon-Shelyn.name: 宗-莎琳 Zon-Shelyn
Zon-Shelyn.description:
拥抱

宗-莎琳是永恒玫瑰莎琳与她疏远的兄长、午夜之主宗-库松的神圣重聚。两位手足共同代表着这些概念：通过艺术克服苦难、在奇异与不寻常之处发现美，以及与失去的挚爱重逢。

神职 艺术、另类时尚、创造力、音乐、痛苦、奇异之美

典范 将你的痛苦倾注于艺术，在一切地方寻求美，依照你自己的审美创造性地表达自我

Anathema 默默承受苦难，毁坏或抄袭他人的创作，迎合社群的审美标准

The Embrace

Zon-Shelyn is the divine reunion of Shelyn the Eternal Rose and her estranged brother, the Midnight Lord Zon-Kuthon. Together, the siblings represent the concepts of overcoming suffering through art, finding beauty in strange and unusual places, and reunion with lost loved ones.

Areas of Concern art, alternative fashion, creativity, music, pain, strange beauty

Edicts channel your pain into art, seek beauty in all places, express yourself creatively according to your own aesthetics

Anathema suffer in silence, destroy or copy another's creative works, conform to society's beauty standards

Arc Pistol.name: 电弧手枪 Arc Pistol
Arc Pistol.description:
升级： 1

这把笨重的手枪不使用传统弹药，而是内置一个能产生电弧的电容器。它的枪托由聚碳酸酯或其他合成绝缘材料制成，通常被染成亮黄色，并刻有代表高压的通用闪电符号。

Upgrades: 1

Instead of traditional ammunition, this bulky pistol contains a capacitor that generates arcs of electricity. Its stock is crafted from polycarbon or other synthetic insulators, often tinted bright yellow and inscribed with the universal bolt symbol for high voltage.

Microcord Armor.name: 微索护甲 Microcord Armor
Microcord Armor.description:
升级： 1

这件轻型护甲由超轻纤维织成，能够随着穿戴者的动作灵活弯曲，但在受到冲击时会变得如钢铁般坚硬。

Upgrades: 1

This light armor is woven from ultralight fibers that flex with a wearer's movements but turn hard as steel on impact.

Painglaive.name: 痛苦偃月刀 Painglaive
Painglaive.description:
升级： 1

这把凶猛却又带着欺骗性优雅的长柄武器以电机驱动的獠刃撕裂敌人。可调式脉冲扳机让持用者能够通过这件武器传导额外的痛楚。

Upgrades: 1

This fierce but deceptively elegant polearm rips apart enemies with a motor-powered fangblade. An adjustable pulse trigger allows the wielder to channel extra pain through the weapon.

Comm Unit.name: 通讯单元 Comm Unit
Comm Unit.description:
个人通讯器是一种口袋大小的设备，结合了小型便携式计算机和蜂窝通信设备，使其能够以音频和文本两种格式，与其他通讯器在行星范围内进行即时无线通信。个人通讯器还包括计算器、手电筒（以你为中心5英尺半径内发出明亮光照，并在接下来的5英尺内发出微光）、可访问任何本地信息圈的浏览器，以及若干娱乐选项（包括游戏）。

集成在护甲中的个人通讯器具备一些语音激活功能；你可以无需空闲手就以音频格式与其他通讯器通信并接收回复，但输入信息、浏览信息圈或使用应用程序仍需要至少一只手。

能够在更长距离上运作的通讯器则没有那么便携；它们包含内置发电机，以提供所需的电力，并依赖启用中的漂流信标进行通信。这类通讯器的短期使用服务可在大多数主要聚居地购买。

A personal comm unit is a pocket-sized device that combines a minor portable computer and a cellular communications device, allowing instantaneous wireless communication with other comm units in both audio- and text-based formats at planetary range. A personal comm unit also includes a calculator, a flashlight (emits bright light in a 5-foot radius around you and dim light in the next 5 feet), a browser that accesses any local infospheres, and several entertainment options (including games).

Personal comm units integrated into armor have some voice-activated capabilities; you can communicate with other comm units in audio-based formats and receive responses without needing a free hand, but typing a message, browsing the infosphere, or using an app requires the use of at least one hand.

Comm units that function at longer ranges aren't as portable; they include built-in generators that provide the necessary amount of power and rely on active Drift beacons to communicate. Short-term use of these units can be purchased in most major settlements.

Repair Toolkit (Commercial).name: 维修工具包（商业） Repair Toolkit (Commercial)
Repair Toolkit (Commercial).description:
修理工具包内含各种精巧工具和补给，让你能在旅途中进行简单修理。你可以使用修理工具包通过制作技能来修理物品。你可以在使用它的动作中一并取出并收回一套已穿着的修理工具包。

A repair toolkit contains a variety of delicate tools and supplies that allows you to perform simple repairs while traveling. You can use a repair toolkit to Repair items using the Crafting skill. You can draw and replace a worn repair toolkit as part of the action that uses it.

Credstick.name: 记名芯片 Credstick
Credstick.description:
《星际探险家》中的大多数人都会把自己的财富存放在一种称为信用棒的受保护物品上。这些装置通常是扁平的，大小大致相当于一根人类手指。它们的尺寸和品质各不相同，但归根结底，它们只是方便携带和花费金钱的一种手段。这些装置的使用方式由所有者决定，而信用棒只需在合适的银行设备附近轻轻一碰，就能完成收款或支付这样简单的操作。在需要更严格的安全措施时，它们可以要求语音或生物识别印记才能激活。有些先进信用棒甚至还具有魔法组件，可能需要精神密码或吟诵特定法术才能取用其中存储的资金。

信用棒并不是通向个人全部财富的入口，数额更大的信用点通常会安全地存放在银行、私人金库或安全数据库中。相反，信用棒是一种安全且匿名的信用点流通方式，不易被追踪。无论是冒险者还是普通市民，常常都会随身携带一根信用棒，以处理他们可能需要进行的各种购买，同时身上也只会保留刚好足够的信用点，这样即使丢失了信用棒，也不至于破产。

协约世界中的个人通常都会携带信用棒，而其他与协约互动的文明，也常会把本地资金兑换成信用点，因此也会携带信用棒来花费这些兑换后的货币。有时，一个人可能会携带数根信用棒，将每一根专门用于不同用途；或者如果他们想进行一笔预定金额的购买，也可以直接把整根棒交易出去。如果一个人携带的信用棒数量变得过于累赘，也很容易在各根信用棒之间转移资金，并丢弃已经清空的信用棒以节省空间，不过信用棒始终具有可忽略的体积。

Most people in Starfinder keep their wealth on a protected item known as a credstick. These devices are often flat and roughly the size of a human finger. They range in dimensions and quality, but at the end of the day, they're just a means of conveniently carrying and spending money. Usage of these devices is determined by the owner, and a credstick can accept or spend funds with as simple an action as tapping it near a suitable banking device. When more rigorous security is necessary, they can require audio or biometric imprints in order to activate. Some advanced credsticks even have a magical component that might require a mental password or the recitation of a specific spell to access stored funds.

Credsticks aren't gateways to the entirety of one's wealth, and larger stores of credits are often kept secured in banks, personal vaults, or secure databases. Instead, a credstick is a safe and anonymous means of moving credits around without being traced. Adventurers and common citizens alike often keep a credstick on their person to handle any purchases they might be called upon to make, while also only keeping just enough credits on them that losing the credstick wouldn't result in bankruptcy.

Individuals in the Pact Worlds often carry credsticks, and other civilizations that interact with the Pact often turn local funds into credits and thus carry them to spend their converted currency. Sometimes a person might carry several credsticks, dedicating each one to a different use, or simply trading the stick away if they want to make a purchase of a predefined amount. If ever the number of credsticks on a person becomes too cumbersome, it's easy enough to move the funds between individual sticks and discard emptied sticks to save on space, however a credstick always has a negligible bulk.

Divine Spontaneous Spells.name: 神圣自发法术 Divine Spontaneous Spells

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一股标记魔法存在的脉冲。你不会获得魔法存在或不存在以外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你或者你盟友的魔法物品以及持续法术。仅当幻术魔法的环级低于你的侦测魔法环级时，你才能侦测幻术魔法。但是，具有幻术灵光但是没有在外表上做伪装的物品（例如一瓶隐形药水），通常能够正常侦测。

升阶（3环级） 你能知晓法术侦测出的最强魔法效果的环级或等级，具体由GM决定。

升阶（4环级） 如3环级，你也能指出最高环级魔法的来源。如同一种模糊感官，你不会了解具体的位置，但是可以将来源锁定到5尺立方（或者最近的那个五尺立方，如果来源体积比这个区域更大）。

Eldritch Lance.name: 奥术长矛 Eldritch Lance
Eldritch Lance.description:
你将来自群星之间黑暗空间的、侵袭心智的诡异能量凝聚成一道光束，并将其射向目标。对目标的 AC 进行一次远程法术攻击检定。若你命中，则造成 2d6 点精神伤害。若大成功，则造成双倍伤害。

升阶（+1） 伤害提高 1d6。

You condense a beam of mind-assaulting eldritch energy from the dark spaces between the stars and fire it at a target. Make a ranged spell attack roll against the target's AC. If you hit, you deal 2d6 mental damage. On a critical success, you deal double damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Guidance.name: 神导术 Guidance
Guidance.description:
你请求超自然存在的引导，赋予目标在持续时间结束前的一次攻击骰，察觉检定，豁免骰，或者技能检定上获得+1状态加值。目标在掷骰前选择是否使用该加值。如果目标使用该加值，该法术结束。无论怎样结束，该目标接下来会暂时免疫1小时。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.3qHKBDF7lrHw8jFK]{法术效果：神导术}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.3LyOkV25p7wA181H]{效果：神导术免疫}

Void Warp.name: 虚能噬 Void Warp
Void Warp.description:
你唤来虚能伤害生命力量。该目标承受2d4虚能伤害，这有一次基础强韧豁免. 如果该生物在豁免中大失败，他也会@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 1}直到你得下个回合开始。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d4。

Figment.name: 虚构幻术 Figment
Figment.description:
你创造出简单的声音或图像的幻术。声音会为法术添加听觉特征，且不能包含能被理解的单词或复杂的音乐。图像会为法术添加视觉特征，但是它不能大于5尺边长的立方体，且在15尺的距离内观察会发现它的构造明显很粗糙且缺乏细节。当你施放或维持该法术时，你能尝试用幻术让人@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{分神 Create a Diversion}，这会为你的欺骗检定提供+2环境加值。若对某个生物进行的此尝试失败了，该生物就不会相信虚构幻术。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.2Hg3a06gZCSnUgSA]{法术效果：虚构幻术}

Grim Tendrils.name: 邪影触须 Grim Tendrils
Grim Tendrils.description:
由黑暗组成的触须从你的指尖喷涌而出。你对在射线上的活物造成2d4虚能伤害和@Damage[(@item.level)[bleed]]伤害。每个射线上的活物必须尝试一次强韧豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物承受一半虚能伤害，并且不受持续流血伤害。

失败 该生物承受完整伤害。

大失败 该生物承受双倍虚能伤害和双倍持续流血伤害。

升阶（+1） 该虚能伤害增加2d4，持续流血伤害增加1。

Heal.name: 治疗术 Heal
Heal.description:
你引导命能，以治疗活物或者伤害不死生物。如果目标是自愿活物 ，你回复这个数量的生命值。如果目标是不死生物，你对其造成1d8命能伤害，并且它可以进行基础强韧豁免。你在施放该法术时花费的动作数量决定其目标，范围，区域和其他参数。

1 该法术的射程为接触。

2 （专注） 该法术的射程为30尺。如果你在治疗一个活物，回复的生命值增加8。

3 （专注） 你在@Template[emanation|distance:30]内释放命能。这会以区域中所有活物和不死生物为目标。

升阶（+1） 治疗或者伤害的量增加1d8，两个动作版本的额外治疗增加8。

Motivating Ringtone.name: 激励铃声 Motivating Ringtone
Motivating Ringtone.description:
你使目标通讯装置播放一首由宇宙谱写、专属于其拥有者的个人主题铃声。当你施放该法术时，目标通讯装置的拥有者恢复 1d8+4 生命值，并在持续时间内获得对所有速度的 +5 尺状态加值，以及对抗恐惧效果的豁免检定获得 +1 状态加值，只要该通讯装置继续播放该铃声。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.NmhqKZyMgQSHbyHj]{法术效果：振奋铃声}

强化（+1） 治疗量增加 1d8+4。

You cause the target comm unit to play a cosmically composed personal theme song specific to its owner. The creature who owns the target comm unit regains 1d8+4 Hit Points when you Cast the Spell, a +5-foot status bonus to all Speeds, and a +1 status bonus to saves against fear effects for the duration as long as the comm unit continues to play the ringtone.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.NmhqKZyMgQSHbyHj]{Spell Effect: Motivating Ringtone}

Heightened (+1) The amount of healing increases by 1d8+4.

Divine Focus Spells.name: 神圣专注法术 Divine Focus Spells

Shadow Snap.name: 暗影猛击 Shadow Snap
Shadow Snap.description:
你打了个响指，召唤目标的影子听命于你。当你施放这个法术，以及在后续轮次中每回合第一次维持它时，你可以选择让其影子攻击目标，或跟踪目标。如果你选择攻击，则对目标的 AC 进行一次法术攻击检定；命中时造成 1d10 点寒冷伤害（若重击则伤害加倍）。这次攻击会使用并计入你的多重攻击减值。

如果你选择跟踪，则在目标于你的下个回合结束前第一次使用操作动作或移动动作、进行远程攻击，或在其正在使用的移动动作中离开一个方格时，对目标的 AC 进行一次法术攻击检定；命中时造成 1d10 点寒冷伤害。若此次攻击为重击，则该影子会扰乱该动作。

每次你维持该法术时，你都可以选择攻击目标，或命令影子跟踪目标，直到你的下个回合结束。

升环（+1） 寒冷伤害增加 1d10 点。

With a snap of your fingers, you beckon the target's shadow to obey you. When you Cast this Spell and the first time you Sustain it each turn on subsequent rounds, you can choose to either attack or stalk the target with its shadow. If you choose to attack, attempt a spell attack roll against the target's AC, dealing 1d10 cold damage on a hit (or double damage on a critical hit). This attack uses and contributes to your multiple attack penalty.

If you stalk, attempt a spell attack roll against the target's AC the first time the target uses a manipulate action or a move action, makes a ranged attack, or leaves a square during a move action it's using until the end of your next turn; dealing 1d10 cold damage on a hit. If the attack is a critical hit, the shadow disrupts that action.

Each time you Sustain the spell, you can choose to either attack the target or command the shadow to stalk the target until the end of your next turn.

Heightened (+1) The cold damage increases by 1d10.

Unconventional Weaponry (Painglaive).name: 非常规武器专精（痛苦长戟） Unconventional Weaponry (Painglaive)
Unconventional Weaponry (Painglaive).description:
你已熟悉一种来自其他族裔或文化的武器。选择一种具有与某个族裔对应特征（例如维斯克蜥人或鼠基人），或在另一种文化中常见的非常见简易或军用武器。你获得该武器的使用权限，并且在判定你的熟练度时，将其视为简易武器。

如果你已受训于所有军用武器，则你可以改为选择一种具有某个族裔特征或在另一种文化中常见的非常见先进武器。你获得该武器的使用权限，并熟悉该武器。就熟练度而言，你将其视为军用武器。

You've familiarized yourself with a weapon from another ancestry or culture. Choose an uncommon simple or martial weapon with a trait corresponding to an ancestry (such as vesk or ysoki) or that's common in another culture. You gain access to that weapon, and for the purpose of determining your proficiency, you treat it as a simple weapon.

If you're trained in all martial weapons, you can instead choose an uncommon advanced weapon that has an ancestry's trait or is common in another culture. You gain access to that weapon and have familiarity with that weapon. For the purpose of proficiency, you treat it as a martial weapon.

Shirren.name: 希伦尼斯人 Shirren
Shirren.description:
昆虫般的希伦人脱离了破坏性的虫群，抛弃了冷酷无情的蜂巢思维，以追求个人自由并终结星际暴力的循环。希伦人是一种心灵感应的物种，致力于自身的个人主义，建立自己选择的社群，并与其他民族和谐共处。

The insectile shirrens split from the destructive Swarm, forsaking the ruthless hive mind to pursue personal freedom and end the cycl e of interstellar violence. Shirrens are a species of telepaths devoted to their own individualism, building chosen communities, and living in harmony with other peoples.

Limited Telepathy.name: 有限心灵感应 Limited Telepathy
Limited Telepathy.description:
你可以与30尺内的生物进行心灵交流。你只能与和你共享语言的生物交流。这不会让你读取对方的思想，且传达的信息不会比正常言语更多。

You can communicate mentally with creatures within 30 feet. You can communicate only with creatures that share a language with you. This doesn't give you any access to their thoughts, and it communicates no more information than normal speech would.

Defiant Shirren.name: 不屈希灵尼斯人 Defiant Shirren
Defiant Shirren.description:
尽管时光流逝，你依然坚定不移地反抗虫群以及一切形式的精神控制。若你对由具有虫族特征的生物，或你已知与虫群结盟的生物所制造的效果进行意志豁免检定并获得成功，则你改为获得大成功。对任何受控制其行动的法术或效果影响的生物，你也获得这些益处。此外，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.nAJeT29ZJvqeg98h]{Rebellious Defiance} 动作。

Despite the passage of time, you remain resolute in your defiance of the Swarm and all forms of mental control. If you roll a success on a Will saving throw against an effect that was created by a creature with the kucharn trait or a creature that you know is allied with the Swarm, you get a critical success instead. You gain these benefits against any creature affected by a spell or effect that controls it. Additionally, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.nAJeT29ZJvqeg98h]{Rebellious Defiance} action.

Rebellious Defiance.name: 叛逆反抗 Rebellious Defiance
Rebellious Defiance.description:
频率 每天一次

效果 你将100英尺内一个你能看见的敌人斥为暴君或恶徒，并让自己做好准备反抗他们，哪怕至死方休。你对该敌人的攻击检定获得+1处境加值，并且对抗该敌人的攻击、法术和效果时的豁免检定获得+1处境加值。这些收益持续1分钟。

Frequency once per day

Effect You decry one foe within 100 feet that you can see as a tyrant or villain and prepare yourself to defy them, even until death. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus on your attack rolls against this foe, and you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against the attacks, spells, and effects of this foe. These benefits last for 1 minute.

Disciple.name: 门徒 Disciple
Disciple.description:
你是某位特定神祇的忠诚信徒。你可能成长于一种宗教文化之中，或者也许是在后来的人生中感受到了与某位神明心意相通的召唤，但你已磨练了自己的技能，并将一生奉献于作为这位神祇追随者的生活。

选择两项属性增强。其中一项必须是你神祇“神圣属性”条目中指定的属性，另一项为自由属性增强。

你在该神祇列出的神圣技能以及一项与你神祇相关的学识技能（例如阿巴达尔学识）上受训。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.NY2R5hNgdkSRPkTV]{宗教护符} 技能专长，即使你不满足该专长的前置条件。

You're a loyal disciple of a particular deity. You might have been raised in a religious culture or perhaps felt a kindred calling toward a god later in life, but you've honed your skills and devoted your life to living as a follower of that deity.

Choose two attribute boosts. One must be an attribute specified in your deity's Divine Attribute entry, and one is a free attribute boost.

You're trained in the deity's listed divine skill and a Lore skill related to your deity (Abadar Lore, for example). You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.NY2R5hNgdkSRPkTV]{Religious Talisman} skill feat even if you do not meet the feat's prerequisites.

Religious Talisman.name: 宗教护符 Religious Talisman
Religious Talisman.description:
你可以在 10 分钟内制作并祝圣一件你所信奉神祇的宗教象征。尽管这类护符传统上是画有宗教符号的纸片，但它们也可以有许多形式，包括身体艺术、贴纸，甚至虚拟表情符号。你只能为自己以及你所崇拜的神祇制作护符。只要你继续从事符合你神祇典范的活动，你在先攻掷骰上就会获得 +1 状态加值。若你违背了你神祇的禁忌，这件护符就会被摧毁，并且你在先攻掷骰和察觉检定上承受 –1 状态减值，直到你完成一次 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.7Fd4lxozd11MQ55N]{Atone} 仪式。

You can construct and bless a religious symbol of your deity in 10 minutes. While such talismans are traditionally scraps of paper with a religious symbol drawn on them, they can take many forms, including body art, a sticker, or even a virtual emoji. You can create a talisman only for yourself and for the deity you worship. As long as you continue to engage in activities that match your deity's edicts you gain a +1 status bonus to initiative rolls. If you violate your deity's anathema, the talisman is destroyed, and you take a –1 status penalty to initiative rolls and Perception checks until you complete an @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.7Fd4lxozd11MQ55N]{Atone} ritual.

Mystic.name: 秘学者 Mystic
Mystic.description:
你是一条通路，传导着连接并维系宇宙万物的根本力量。你能够汲取这股超自然的源泉，与盟友建立深刻的精神纽带，在战斗中强化他们，并在他们受伤时恢复其健康。你的力量会根据你所选择的连接而呈现出独特的形态，并随着你更深层次地探索你的连接，赋予你新的、更强大的法术。

You're a conduit, channeling the fundamental forces that connect and bind everything in the cosmos. You can draw upon this supernatural wellspring to form deep spiritual bonds with your allies, empower them in combat, and restore their health should they become injured. Your powers take unique shape based on the connection you choose, granting new and more powerful spells as you explore your connection on a deeper level.

Vitality Network.name: 活力网络 Vitality Network
Vitality Network.description:
你的灵魂支撑着一张能量网络，将与你结下羁绊的人连接起来并为其疗愈。你的活力网络的最大容量等于 6 + 每级 4 点生命值。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.UeMHbnnaXDa3sGfG]{转移活力} 动作，你可以用它将生命值从你的网络中取出，并以治疗的形式转移给自己或盟友。

生死关头的处境会帮助你与盟友之间的羁绊变得更强。在战斗中每个回合开始时，当你恢复动作时，你的活力网络恢复 4 点生命值；如果你的法术 DC 熟练度为大师，则改为恢复 6 点生命值；如果你为传奇，则恢复 8 点生命值。当你进行重新专注时，你的活力网络恢复其全部生命值。

Your soul supports a network of energy that connects and heals those in your bond. Your vitality network has a maximum capacity equal to 6 + 4 Hit Points per level. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.UeMHbnnaXDa3sGfG]{Transfer Vitality} action that you can use to take Hit Points out of your network and into yourself or your allies as healing.

Life-and-death situations help strengthen your bonds with your allies. At the start of each turn in combat, when you regain actions, your vitality network regains 4 Hit Points; if you're master in spell DC, it regains 6 Hit Points instead; if you're legendary, it regains 8 Hit Points. When you Refocus, your vitality network regains all its Hit Points.

Connection.name: 连接 Connection
Connection.description:
所有秘学者都与某种太空力量有着超自然的连接，这种连接赋予他们魔法力量。你所拥有的连接其确切性质可能千差万别——你可能崇拜某位神祇或某个神系，体现某种形而上概念，成为自然之怒的传导者，或是其他某种存在。即使是共享同一种连接的秘学者，也可能会以不同方式诠释其力量的来源。在1级时，选择你的连接。你所选择的连接决定了你施放的法术类型，以及你从中选择法术的法术传承、你额外获得受训的技能、你习得的顿悟，以及一种和谐；这种和谐通常会在你用生命网络治疗生物时赋予其一项特殊增益。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.fM1vlupLq9Zlyt7C]{阿卡西}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.AurhNoZmNNhHktx6]{元素}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.XV8C2ASALC65G5MH]{治疗}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.jV9LIUswOPkVRC49]{节律}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.kvmpnKMVw4wwGk8c]{阴影}

All mystics have a supernatural connection with a cosmic force that grants magical powers. The exact nature of your connection can vary widely—you might worship a god or pantheon, embody a metaphysical concept, become a conduit for nature's wrath, or something else. Even mystics who share the same connection might interpret the source of their powers differently. At 1st level, choose your connection. Your chosen connection determines the type of spells you cast and the spell tradition you choose spells from, your additional trained skill, the epiphanies you learn, and a harmony that usually grants creatures a special benefit when you heal them with your vitality network.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.fM1vlupLq9Zlyt7C]{Akashic}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.AurhNoZmNNhHktx6]{Elemental}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.XV8C2ASALC65G5MH]{Healing}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.jV9LIUswOPkVRC49]{Rhythm}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.kvmpnKMVw4wwGk8c]{Shadow}

Transfer Vitality.name: 转移生命力 Transfer Vitality
Transfer Vitality.description:
你可以将你的生命力网络中的至多 10 点生命值（最少 1 点）转移给你自己，或一个你能感知到且位于 60 英尺内的已建立联结的生物。此效果也可作用于具有虚空治疗的生物，如同此动作具有虚能特征一般。你可转移的数值在 5 级、10 级、15 级和 20 级时各增加 10 点。

You can transfer up to 10 Hit Points (minimum 1) from your vitality network into yourself or a bonded creature you can sense within 60 feet. This works on creatures with void healing as though this action had the void trait. The amount you can transfer increases by 10 at 5th, 10th, 15th and 20th level.

Shadow.name: 暗影 Shadow
Shadow.description:
你知晓每一道阴影都是通往冥界的传送门，而你如同塑造黏土的艺术家一般，随心所欲地将那个领域的阴影物质塑造成可怖而奇妙的形态。

传统 神圣

连接技能 潜行

连接法术 戏法：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.0zU8CPejjQFnhZFI]{Figment}；1环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.k34hDOfIIMAxNL4a]{Grim Tendrils}；2环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility}；3环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.WsUwpfmhKrKwoIe3]{Slow}；4环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.zR67Rt3UMHKC5evy]{Flicker}；5环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.IqJ9URobmJ9L9UBG]{Shadow Blast}；6环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.WPXzPl7YbMEIGWfi]{Mislead}；7环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.0jadeyQIItIuRgeH]{Eclipse Burst}；8环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.wfleiawxsfhpRRwf]{Disappearance}；9环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.MJx7DmjsWYzDZ3a4]{Phantasmagoria}

顿悟法术 初始：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.uh9Br4yrKvJA6zq0]{Shadow Snap}；先进：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.rluzzX2ml4yFWnYw]{Cloying Shadows}；高等：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.pgjlPNfXCpEYyLVu]{Shadow Prison}

和谐 当你转移活力时，目标的影子会变得更加黑暗并膨胀，将目标周围 @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] 内的明亮光照降为微光。此效果属于一种魔法黑暗，能够压过非魔法光源，或尝试反制魔法光源。目标在这片微光中时变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}，并且可以利用隐蔽状态来@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{躲藏}。此效果持续至你下个回合结束。

完美和谐 你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.u9NU2bULHg3S5FaP]{Umbral Stride} 动作。当你转移活力时，目标可以在其下个回合结束前使用一次该动作。

You know every shadow is a portal to the Netherworld, and like an artist molding clay, you sculpt that realm's shadowy substance into dreadful and wondrous shapes at your whim.

Tradition divine

Connection Skill Stealth

Connection Spells cantrip: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.0zU8CPejjQFnhZFI]{Figment}; 1st: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.k34hDOfIIMAxNL4a]{Grim Tendrils}; 2nd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility}; 3rd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.WsUwpfmhKrKwoIe3]{Slow}; 4th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.zR67Rt3UMHKC5evy]{Flicker}; 5th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.IqJ9URobmJ9L9UBG]{Shadow Blast}; 6th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.WPXzPl7YbMEIGWfi]{Mislead}; 7th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.0jadeyQIItIuRgeH]{Eclipse Burst}; 8th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.wfleiawxsfhpRRwf]{Disappearance}; 9th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.MJx7DmjsWYzDZ3a4]{Phantasmagoria}

Epiphany Spells initial: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.uh9Br4yrKvJA6zq0]{Shadow Snap}; advanced: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.rluzzX2ml4yFWnYw]{Cloying Shadows}; greater: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.pgjlPNfXCpEYyLVu]{Shadow Prison}

Harmony When you Transfer Vitality, the target's shadow darkens and swells, reducing bright light within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] of the target to dim light. This is a form of magical darkness and can overcome non-magical light sources or attempt to counteract magical light. The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} while in this dim light and can use the concealed condition to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hide}. This lasts until the end of your next turn.

Perfect Harmony You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.u9NU2bULHg3S5FaP]{Umbral Stride} action. When you Transfer Vitality, the target can use this action once before the end of their next turn.

Initial Epiphany.name: 最初的顿悟 Initial Epiphany
Initial Epiphany.description:
你发现了关于自身连接的基本真理。你学会所选连接的初始顿悟法术。顿悟法术是一种专注法术。施放一个专注法术需要消耗1点专注点，而你起始拥有一个包含1点专注点的专注池。你会在每日准备期间补满你的专注池，并且你可以通过花费10分钟使用【重新专注】活动，与和你建立羁绊的盟友共度时光，或以其他方式思索你连接的本质，来恢复1点专注点。

专注法术会像戏法一样自动升阶至你等级的一半（向上取整）。专注法术不需要法术位，而且你也不能用法术位来施放它们。选择专长可以让你获得更多专注法术并增加你的专注池容量，不过你的专注池最多永远只能容纳3点专注点。

You discover the basic truth of your connection. You learn your chosen connection's initial epiphany spell. Epiphany spells are a type of focus spell. It costs 1 Focus Point to cast a focus spell, and you start with a focus pool of 1 Focus Point. You refill your focus pool during your daily preparations, and you can regain 1 Focus Point by spending 10 minutes using the Refocus activity to spend time with your bonded allies or otherwise ponder the nature of your connection.

Focus spells are automatically heightened to half your level rounded up, much like cantrips. Focus spells don't require spell slots, and you can't cast them using spell slots. Taking feats can give you more focus spells and increase the size of your focus pool, though your focus pool can never hold more than 3 Focus Points.

Mystic Spellcasting.name: 秘学者施法 Mystic Spellcasting
Mystic Spellcasting.description:
你是一名施法者，可以使用“施放法术”活动来施放法术。作为秘学者，当你施放法术时，你可能会吟诵祷词，或哼唱受你顿悟启发的歌曲；你也可能会以遵循你的连接网络流动的模式做出手势或起舞；你还可能会让施法伴随着在你与结盟盟友之间流动的缕缕能量。

每天，你至多可以施放三个1环法术。你必须知晓法术才能施放它们，而你通过“法术汇编”职业特性来习得这些法术。你每天能够施放的法术数量称为你的法术位。

随着你作为秘学者的等级提升，你每天可施放的法术数量会增加，你所能施放的法术最高环阶也会提高，如“秘学者每日法术”表所示。

你的某些法术需要你进行一次法术攻击，以判断其效果如何；或者要求你的敌人对抗你的法术DC进行掷骰（通常是尝试一次豁免检定）。由于你的关键属性是感知，你的法术攻击调整值和法术DC使用你的感知调整值。

法术升阶

当你获得2环及更高环阶的法术位时，你可以用较低环阶法术的更强版本来填充这些法术位。这会将该法术的环阶提高到与法术位相同。你必须在你的法术汇编中拥有目标环阶的该法术，才能将其升阶到那个环阶。许多法术在升阶到特定环阶时会获得特定强化。“招牌法术”职业特性让你可以自由升阶某些法术。

戏法

你的部分法术是戏法。戏法是一种特殊类型的法术，不使用法术位。你可以随意施放戏法，每天施放任意次数。戏法会自动升阶至你等级的一半并向上取整——这通常等于你所拥有的最高环阶秘学者法术位。例如，作为1级秘学者，你的戏法是1环法术；而作为5级秘学者，你的戏法是3环法术。

You are a spellcaster and can cast spells using the Cast a Spell activity. As a mystic, when you cast spells, you might intone a prayer or hum a song inspired by your epiphanies, you might gesture or dance in patterns that follow the flow of your connection's network, and you might accompany your spellcasting with wisps of energy flowing between you and your bonded allies.

Each day, you can cast up to three 1st-rank spells. You must know spells to cast them, and you learn them via the spell repertoire class feature. The number of spells you can cast each day is called your spell slots.

As you increase in level as a mystic, your number of spells per day increases, as does the highest rank of spells you can cast, as shown on the Mystic Spells per Day table.

Some of your spells require you to attempt a spell attack to see how effective they are or have your enemies roll against your spell DC (typically by attempting a saving throw). Since your key attribute is Wisdom, your spell attack modifiers and spell DCs use your Wisdom modifier.

Heightening Spells

When you get spell slots of 2nd rank and higher, you can fill those slots with stronger versions of lower-rank spells. This increases the spell's rank to match the spell slot. You must have a spell in your spell repertoire at the rank you want to cast in order to heighten it to that rank. Many spells have specific improvements when they're heightened to certain ranks. The signature spells class feature lets you heighten certain spells freely.

Cantrips

Some of your spells are cantrips. A cantrip is a special type of spell that doesn't use spell slots. You can cast a cantrip at will, any number of times per day. A cantrip is automatically heightened to half your level rounded up—this is usually equal to the highest rank of mystic spell slot you have. For example, as a 1st-level mystic, your cantrips are 1st-rank spells, and as a 5th-level mystic, your cantrips are 3rd-rank spells.

Mystic Bond.name: 秘学者羁绊 Mystic Bond
Mystic Bond.description:
你会在自己与他人之间建立一种纽带，通常是与你最亲近的同伴。建立纽带的方式因每位秘学者而异，但总是需要进行一项与秘学者连接相关的 10 分钟活动，并且要求你与想要建立纽带的生物相邻。你至多可以与另外 10 个自愿生物维持纽带，且该纽带会持续，直到你或已建立纽带的生物不再愿意成为纽带的一部分。你始终被视为自己纽带的一部分，且不计入 10 个生物的上限。

你始终知晓其他已建立纽带生物的大致距离与方向、它们的生命值总数，以及它们是否处于清醒状态、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{濒死}，或死亡。该能力无法跨位面生效（包括在漂流域中转运时），并且某些特殊的魔法或科技效果可能会干扰你侦测盟友的能力。

You form a bond between yourself and others, most typically your closest companions. Forming bonds is different for every mystic but always involves using a 10-minute activity related to the mystic's connection that requires you to be adjacent to the creature with whom you wish to bond. You can maintain a bond with up to 10 other willing creatures, and the bond lasts until you or the bonded creature are no longer willing to be part of the bond. You are always considered part of your own bond and don't count toward the 10-creature limit.

You always know the general distance and direction toward other bonded creatures, their Hit Point totals, and if they're conscious, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying}, or dead. This ability doesn't work across planes (including when in transit in the Drift), and some special magical or technological effects might interfere with your ability to detect your allies.

Spell Repertoire.name: 法术库 Spell Repertoire
Spell Repertoire.description:
秘学者 你能够施放的法术集合称为你的法术库。1级时，你学习两个你自选的1环法术和四个你自选的戏法，以及一个来自你所选连接的额外法术和戏法。你从与你所选连接对应传统的常见法术中选择这些法术，或者从该传统中你能够接触到的其他法术中选择。你可以通过消耗一个适当法术环阶的法术位来施放你法术库中的任意法术。

随着等级提升，你会向这个法术库中添加法术。每当你获得一个法术位时，你就向法术库中加入一个同环阶的法术。当你获得新环阶法术的使用权限时，你获得的第一个新法术总是由你所选连接授予的法术，但其他法术可以由你选择。2级时，你再选择一个1环法术；3级时，你从所选连接获得一个新法术，并获得另外两个2环法术，依此类推。当你添加法术时，你可以选择一个你已知法术的更高环阶版本，以便施放该法术的高阶化版本。

虽然你获得它们的速度相同，但你的法术位和法术库中的法术是彼此独立的。如果一个专长或其他能力向你的法术库中添加一个法术，它不会因此再给予你一个法术位，反之亦然。

更换你法术库中的法术

当你在法术库中获得新法术时，你可能想替换掉一些先前学会的法术。每当你提升一级并学会新法术时，你都可以将一个旧法术替换为另一个同环阶的不同法术。这个法术可以是戏法，但你不能替换顿悟法术或连接法术。你也可以在停工期内通过再训练来替换法术。

巫战扭曲者 你能够施放的法术集合称为你的法术库。1级时，你学习两个你自选的1环法术和四个你自选的戏法，以及一个来自你悖论的额外法术和戏法。你从与你悖论对应传统的常见法术中选择这些法术。你可以通过消耗一个适当法术环阶的法术位来施放你法术库中的任意法术。

随着等级提升，你会向这个法术库中添加法术。每当你获得一个法术位时，你就向法术库中加入一个同环阶的法术。2级时，选择另一个1环法术；3级时，你从悖论获得一个新法术，并获得另外两个2环法术，依此类推。当你添加法术时，你可以加入一个你已经拥有的法术的更高环阶版本，以便施放该法术的高阶化版本。

虽然你获得它们的速度相同，但你的法术位和法术库中的法术是彼此独立的。如果一个专长或其他能力向你的法术库中添加一个法术，它不会因此再给予你一个法术位，反之亦然。

更换你法术库中的法术

当你在法术库中获得新法术时，你可能想替换掉一些先前学会的法术。每当你提升一级并学会新法术时，你都可以将一个旧法术替换为另一个同环阶的不同法术。这个法术可以是戏法，但你不能替换从你的悖论获得的法术。你也可以在停工期内通过再训练来替换法术。

Mystic The collection of spells you can cast is called your spell repertoire. At 1st level, you learn two 1st-rank spells of your choice and four cantrips of your choice as well as an additional spell and cantrip from your chosen connection. You choose these from the common spells from the tradition corresponding to your chosen connection or from other spells from that tradition to which you have access. You can cast any spell in your spell repertoire by using a spell slot of an appropriate spell rank.

You add to this spell repertoire as you increase in level. Each time you get a spell slot, you add a spell of the same rank to your spell repertoire. When you gain access to a new rank of spells, your first new spell is always the spell granted by your chosen connection, but you can choose the other spells. At 2nd level, you select another 1st-rank spell; at 3rd level, you gain a new spell from your chosen connection and two other 2nd-rank spells, and so on. When you add spells, you might select a higher-rank version of a spell you already know so that you can cast a heightened version of that spell.

Though you gain them at the same rate, your spell slots and the spells in your spell repertoire are separate. If a feat or other ability adds a spell to your spell repertoire, it wouldn't give you another spell slot, and vice versa.

Swapping Spells in Your Repertoire

As you gain new spells in your spell repertoire, you might want to replace some of the spells you previously learned. Each time you gain a level and learn new spells, you can swap out one of your old spells for a different spell of the same rank. This spell can be a cantrip, but you can't swap out epiphany spells or connection spells. You can also swap out spells by retraining during downtime.

Witchwarper The collection of spells you can cast is called your spell repertoire. At 1st level, you learn two 1st-rank spells of your choice and four cantrips of your choice as well as an additional spell and cantrip from your paradox. You choose these from the common spells from the tradition corresponding to your paradox. You can cast any spell in your spell repertoire by using a spell slot of an appropriate spell rank.

You add to this spell repertoire as you increase in level. Each time you get a spell slot, you add a spell to your spell repertoire of the same rank. At 2nd level, select another 1st-rank spell; at 3rd level, you gain a new spell from your paradox and two other 2nd-rank spells, and so on. When you add spells, you might add a higher-rank version of a spell you already have, so you can cast a heightened version of that spell.

Though you gain them at the same rate, your spell slots and the spells in your spell repertoire are separate. If a feat or other ability adds a spell to your spell repertoire, it wouldn't give you another spell slot, and vice versa.

Swapping Spells in Your Repertoire

As you gain new spells in your repertoire, you might want to replace some of the spells you previously learned. Each time you gain a level and learn new spells, you can swap out one of your old spells for a different spell of the same rank. This spell can be a cantrip, but you can't swap out spells gained from your paradox. You can also swap out spells by retraining during downtime.

Zon-Shelyn.name: 宗-莎琳 Zon-Shelyn
Zon-Shelyn.description:
拥抱

宗-莎琳是永恒玫瑰莎琳与她疏远的兄长、午夜之主宗-库松重归于好的神圣合一。姐弟二者共同代表着通过艺术克服苦难、在奇异与不寻常之处发现美，以及与失散挚爱重逢的理念。

神职 艺术、另类时尚、创造力、音乐、痛苦、奇异之美

典范 将你的痛苦倾注于艺术之中，在一切地方寻觅美，根据你自己的审美创造性地表达自我

禁忌 默默承受痛苦，毁坏或抄袭他人的创作作品，迎合社群的审美标准

The Embrace

Zon-Shelyn is the divine reunion of Shelyn the Eternal Rose and her estranged brother, the Midnight Lord Zon-Kuthon. Together, the siblings represent the concepts of overcoming suffering through art, finding beauty in strange and unusual places, and reunion with lost loved ones.

Areas of Concern art, alternative fashion, creativity, music, pain, strange beauty

Edicts channel your pain into art, seek beauty in all places, express yourself creatively according to your own aesthetics

Anathema suffer in silence, destroy or copy another's creative works, conform to society's beauty standards

Arc Pistol.name: 电弧手枪 Arc Pistol
Arc Pistol.description:
升级： 1

这把笨重的手枪不使用传统弹药，而是内置一个电容器，能够产生电弧。它的枪托由聚碳酸酯或其他合成绝缘材料制成，通常被染成亮黄色，并刻有代表高压的通用闪电符号。

Upgrades: 1

Instead of traditional ammunition, this bulky pistol contains a capacitor that generates arcs of electricity. Its stock is crafted from polycarbon or other synthetic insulators, often tinted bright yellow and inscribed with the universal bolt symbol for high voltage.

Microcord Armor.name: 微索护甲 Microcord Armor
Microcord Armor.description:
升级： 1

这件轻甲由超轻纤维织成，能够随穿戴者的动作弯曲，但在受到冲击时会变得如钢铁般坚硬。

Upgrades: 1

This light armor is woven from ultralight fibers that flex with a wearer's movements but turn hard as steel on impact.

Painglaive.name: 痛苦长柄刀 Painglaive
Painglaive.description:
升级： 1

这种凶猛却又带着迷惑性优雅的长柄武器，凭借电机驱动的獠刃将敌人撕裂。可调式脉冲扳机使持用者能够通过这件武器传导额外的痛苦。

Upgrades: 1

This fierce but deceptively elegant polearm rips apart enemies with a motor-powered fangblade. An adjustable pulse trigger allows the wielder to channel extra pain through the weapon.

Comm Unit.name: 通信单元 Comm Unit
Comm Unit.description:
个人通讯器是一种口袋大小的设备，结合了小型便携式计算机和蜂窝通信设备，使其能够在行星范围内以音频和文本形式与其他通讯器进行即时无线通信。个人通讯器还包括计算器、手电筒（以你为中心5英尺半径内发出明亮光照，并在再外侧5英尺范围内发出昏暗光照）、可访问任何本地信息圈的浏览器，以及若干娱乐选项（包括游戏）。

整合进护甲的个人通讯器具备一些语音激活功能；你可以在不需要空闲手的情况下，以音频形式与其他通讯器通信并接收回复，但输入消息、浏览信息圈或使用应用程序仍至少需要使用一只手。

可在更远距离运作的通讯器就没那么便携了；它们内置发电机以提供所需电力，并依赖活跃的漂流信标进行通信。在大多数主要聚居地，都可以购买这些通讯器的短期使用服务。

A personal comm unit is a pocket-sized device that combines a minor portable computer and a cellular communications device, allowing instantaneous wireless communication with other comm units in both audio- and text-based formats at planetary range. A personal comm unit also includes a calculator, a flashlight (emits bright light in a 5-foot radius around you and dim light in the next 5 feet), a browser that accesses any local infospheres, and several entertainment options (including games).

Personal comm units integrated into armor have some voice-activated capabilities; you can communicate with other comm units in audio-based formats and receive responses without needing a free hand, but typing a message, browsing the infosphere, or using an app requires the use of at least one hand.

Comm units that function at longer ranges aren't as portable; they include built-in generators that provide the necessary amount of power and rely on active Drift beacons to communicate. Short-term use of these units can be purchased in most major settlements.

Repair Toolkit (Commercial).name: 修理工具包（商业） Repair Toolkit (Commercial)
Repair Toolkit (Commercial).description:
维修工具包内含各种精巧的工具与补给，让你能够在旅途中进行简单修理。你可以使用维修工具包，以制作技能来修理物品。你可以在使用它的动作中一并取出并收起一套穿着中的维修工具包。

A repair toolkit contains a variety of delicate tools and supplies that allows you to perform simple repairs while traveling. You can use a repair toolkit to Repair items using the Crafting skill. You can draw and replace a worn repair toolkit as part of the action that uses it.

Credstick.name: 信用棒 Credstick
Credstick.description:
《星际探索者》中的大多数人都会把自己的财富存放在一种称为信用棒的受保护物品上。这些装置通常是扁平的，大小大致相当于一根人类手指。它们的尺寸和品质各不相同，但归根结底，它们只是便于携带和花费金钱的一种手段。这些装置的使用方式由所有者决定，而信用棒只需在合适的银行设备附近轻触一下，就能完成资金存入或支出这样简单的操作。当需要更严格的安全保障时，它们也可以要求语音或生物识别印记才能激活。一些先进信用棒甚至还带有魔法组件，可能需要精神密码或念诵特定法术才能访问储存的资金。

信用棒并不是通往个人全部财富的入口，更多的信用点通常会安全地存放在银行、个人金库或安全数据库中。相反，信用棒是一种安全且匿名的方式，用于在不被追踪的情况下转移信用点。无论是冒险者还是普通市民，往往都会随身携带一根信用棒，以处理他们可能需要进行的各种购买，同时身上只保留恰好足够的信用点，这样即使遗失信用棒，也不至于因此破产。

协约世界中的个人经常携带信用棒，而其他与协约互动的文明也常常会将本地资金兑换成信用点，然后携带信用棒来花用这些转换后的货币。有时，一个人可能会携带数根信用棒，将每一根用于不同用途，或者如果他们想进行一笔预定金额的购买，也可以直接把整根棒转交出去。要是一个人身上的信用棒数量变得过于累赘，也很容易在各根棒之间转移资金，并丢弃已经清空的信用棒以节省空间，不过信用棒始终具有可忽略不计的体积。

Most people in Starfinder keep their wealth on a protected item known as a credstick. These devices are often flat and roughly the size of a human finger. They range in dimensions and quality, but at the end of the day, they're just a means of conveniently carrying and spending money. Usage of these devices is determined by the owner, and a credstick can accept or spend funds with as simple an action as tapping it near a suitable banking device. When more rigorous security is necessary, they can require audio or biometric imprints in order to activate. Some advanced credsticks even have a magical component that might require a mental password or the recitation of a specific spell to access stored funds.

Credsticks aren't gateways to the entirety of one's wealth, and larger stores of credits are often kept secured in banks, personal vaults, or secure databases. Instead, a credstick is a safe and anonymous means of moving credits around without being traced. Adventurers and common citizens alike often keep a credstick on their person to handle any purchases they might be called upon to make, while also only keeping just enough credits on them that losing the credstick wouldn't result in bankruptcy.

Individuals in the Pact Worlds often carry credsticks, and other civilizations that interact with the Pact often turn local funds into credits and thus carry them to spend their converted currency. Sometimes a person might carry several credsticks, dedicating each one to a different use, or simply trading the stick away if they want to make a purchase of a predefined amount. If ever the number of credsticks on a person becomes too cumbersome, it's easy enough to move the funds between individual sticks and discard emptied sticks to save on space, however a credstick always has a negligible bulk.

Divine Spontaneous Spells.name: 神圣自发法术 Divine Spontaneous Spells

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一股标记魔法存在的脉冲。你不会获得魔法存在或不存在以外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你或者你盟友的魔法物品以及持续法术。仅当幻术魔法的环级低于你的侦测魔法环级时，你才能侦测幻术魔法。但是，具有幻术灵光但是没有在外表上做伪装的物品（例如一瓶隐形药水），通常能够正常侦测。

升阶（3环级） 你能知晓法术侦测出的最强魔法效果的环级或等级，具体由GM决定。

升阶（4环级） 如3环级，你也能指出最高环级魔法的来源。如同一种模糊感官，你不会了解具体的位置，但是可以将来源锁定到5尺立方（或者最近的那个五尺立方，如果来源体积比这个区域更大）。

Eldritch Lance.name: 秘法长枪 Eldritch Lance
Eldritch Lance.description:
你将来自群星之间黑暗空间、侵袭心智的诡异能量凝聚成一道光束，并将其射向目标。对目标的 AC 进行一次远程法术攻击检定。若你命中，则造成 2d6 点精神伤害。若你获得重击成功，则造成双倍伤害。

强化（+1） 伤害增加 1d6。

You condense a beam of mind-assaulting eldritch energy from the dark spaces between the stars and fire it at a target. Make a ranged spell attack roll against the target's AC. If you hit, you deal 2d6 mental damage. On a critical success, you deal double damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Guidance.name: 神导术 Guidance
Guidance.description:
你请求超自然存在的引导，赋予目标在持续时间结束前的一次攻击骰，察觉检定，豁免骰，或者技能检定上获得+1状态加值。目标在掷骰前选择是否使用该加值。如果目标使用该加值，该法术结束。无论怎样结束，该目标接下来会暂时免疫1小时。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.3qHKBDF7lrHw8jFK]{法术效果：神导术}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.3LyOkV25p7wA181H]{效果：神导术免疫}

Void Warp.name: 虚能噬 Void Warp
Void Warp.description:
你唤来虚能伤害生命力量。该目标承受2d4虚能伤害，这有一次基础强韧豁免. 如果该生物在豁免中大失败，他也会@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 1}直到你得下个回合开始。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d4。

Figment.name: 虚构幻术 Figment
Figment.description:
你创造出简单的声音或图像的幻术。声音会为法术添加听觉特征，且不能包含能被理解的单词或复杂的音乐。图像会为法术添加视觉特征，但是它不能大于5尺边长的立方体，且在15尺的距离内观察会发现它的构造明显很粗糙且缺乏细节。当你施放或维持该法术时，你能尝试用幻术让人@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{分神 Create a Diversion}，这会为你的欺骗检定提供+2环境加值。若对某个生物进行的此尝试失败了，该生物就不会相信虚构幻术。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.2Hg3a06gZCSnUgSA]{法术效果：虚构幻术}

Grim Tendrils.name: 邪影触须 Grim Tendrils
Grim Tendrils.description:
由黑暗组成的触须从你的指尖喷涌而出。你对在射线上的活物造成2d4虚能伤害和@Damage[(@item.level)[bleed]]伤害。每个射线上的活物必须尝试一次强韧豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物承受一半虚能伤害，并且不受持续流血伤害。

失败 该生物承受完整伤害。

大失败 该生物承受双倍虚能伤害和双倍持续流血伤害。

升阶（+1） 该虚能伤害增加2d4，持续流血伤害增加1。

Heal.name: 治疗术 Heal
Heal.description:
你引导命能，以治疗活物或者伤害不死生物。如果目标是自愿活物 ，你回复这个数量的生命值。如果目标是不死生物，你对其造成1d8命能伤害，并且它可以进行基础强韧豁免。你在施放该法术时花费的动作数量决定其目标，范围，区域和其他参数。

1 该法术的射程为接触。

2 （专注） 该法术的射程为30尺。如果你在治疗一个活物，回复的生命值增加8。

3 （专注） 你在@Template[emanation|distance:30]内释放命能。这会以区域中所有活物和不死生物为目标。

升阶（+1） 治疗或者伤害的量增加1d8，两个动作版本的额外治疗增加8。

Motivating Ringtone.name: 激励铃声 Motivating Ringtone
Motivating Ringtone.description:
你使目标通讯装置播放一首由宇宙谱写、专属于其拥有者的个人主题铃声。当你施放此法术时，目标通讯装置的拥有者恢复1d8+4生命值，并在持续时间内获得对所有速度的 +5-foot 状态加值，以及对抗恐惧效果的豁免检定获得 +1 状态加值，只要该通讯装置持续播放该铃声即可。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.NmhqKZyMgQSHbyHj]{法术效果：激励铃声}

强化（+1） 治疗量增加1d8+4。

You cause the target comm unit to play a cosmically composed personal theme song specific to its owner. The creature who owns the target comm unit regains 1d8+4 Hit Points when you Cast the Spell, a +5-foot status bonus to all Speeds, and a +1 status bonus to saves against fear effects for the duration as long as the comm unit continues to play the ringtone.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.NmhqKZyMgQSHbyHj]{Spell Effect: Motivating Ringtone}

Heightened (+1) The amount of healing increases by 1d8+4.

Divine Focus Spells.name: 神圣专注法术 Divine Focus Spells

Shadow Snap.name: 影之迅掣 Shadow Snap
Shadow Snap.description:
你打个响指，召唤目标的影子服从你的命令。当你施放此法术时，以及之后每轮中你首次维持此法术时，你可以选择让其影子攻击目标，或是跟踪目标。若你选择攻击，则对目标的AC进行一次法术攻击检定；命中时造成1d10点寒冷伤害（若为重击，则造成双倍伤害）。此次攻击会使用并计入你的多重攻击减值。

若你选择跟踪，则直到你下个回合结束前，当目标首次使用操纵动作或移动动作、进行一次远程攻击，或在其正在使用的移动动作中离开一个方格时，对目标的AC进行一次法术攻击检定；命中时造成1d10点寒冷伤害。若此次攻击为重击，则该影子会扰乱该动作。

每次你维持该法术时，你都可以选择攻击目标，或命令影子跟踪目标直到你下个回合结束。

升阶（+1） 寒冷伤害增加1d10。

With a snap of your fingers, you beckon the target's shadow to obey you. When you Cast this Spell and the first time you Sustain it each turn on subsequent rounds, you can choose to either attack or stalk the target with its shadow. If you choose to attack, attempt a spell attack roll against the target's AC, dealing 1d10 cold damage on a hit (or double damage on a critical hit). This attack uses and contributes to your multiple attack penalty.

If you stalk, attempt a spell attack roll against the target's AC the first time the target uses a manipulate action or a move action, makes a ranged attack, or leaves a square during a move action it's using until the end of your next turn; dealing 1d10 cold damage on a hit. If the attack is a critical hit, the shadow disrupts that action.

Each time you Sustain the spell, you can choose to either attack the target or command the shadow to stalk the target until the end of your next turn.

Heightened (+1) The cold damage increases by 1d10.

Unconventional Weaponry (Painglaive).name: 非常规武器训练（痛刃戟） Unconventional Weaponry (Painglaive)
Unconventional Weaponry (Painglaive).description:
你已经熟悉了一种来自其他族裔或文化的武器。选择一种具有某个族裔对应特性（例如维斯克蜥人或伊索基）或在其他文化中常见的非普通简易或军用武器。你获得该武器的使用权，并且在判定你的熟练度时，将其视为一种简易武器。

如果你受训于所有军用武器，则你可以改为选择一种具有某个族裔特性或在其他文化中常见的非普通先进武器。你获得该武器的使用权，并且熟悉该武器。就熟练度而言，你将其视为一种军用武器。

You've familiarized yourself with a weapon from another ancestry or culture. Choose an uncommon simple or martial weapon with a trait corresponding to an ancestry (such as vesk or ysoki) or that's common in another culture. You gain access to that weapon, and for the purpose of determining your proficiency, you treat it as a simple weapon.

If you're trained in all martial weapons, you can instead choose an uncommon advanced weapon that has an ancestry's trait or is common in another culture. You gain access to that weapon and have familiarity with that weapon. For the purpose of proficiency, you treat it as a martial weapon.

Group Chat.name: 群聊 Group Chat
Group Chat.description:
处于你联结中的生物，在彼此相距 120 英尺以内时，可以通过心灵感应交流。只要两个已联结的生物处于同一存在位面且都还活着，它们就会始终知晓彼此当前的状态、彼此的大致方向与距离，以及对方是否处于清醒、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{濒死}或死亡状态。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.XSMTalRsPwQ0beIE]{网络法术} 动作。

Creatures in your bond can communicate telepathically while within 120 feet of one another. As long as two bonded creatures are on the same plane of existence and both are alive, they remain aware of one another's present state, general direction and distance from one another, and if they're conscious, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying}, or dead. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.XSMTalRsPwQ0beIE]{Network Spell} action.

Network Spell.name: 网络法术 Network Spell
Network Spell.description:
你引导你的法术，使其从你的一名盟友而非你自己处显现。如果你接下来使用的动作是施放一个具有区域、射程或目标的法术，则该法术从你的一名缔盟盟友处而非你自己处显现。使用该盟友所处的空间来判定法术的源头、射程和效果区域，但在施放该法术时，你和你的盟友都必须满足视线与效果线。尽管这可能会欺骗只看见你盟友的人，除非你处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐匿}状态，或该法术具有晦匿（特征），否则任何能够同时看见你和你盟友的生物都能轻易判断你才是法术的源头。如果该法术具有晦匿（特征），你和你的盟友可以以一种让盟友看起来像是施放了该法术且不具有该特征的方式来施放该法术。

You channel your spell to manifest from one of your allies instead of yourself. If the next action you use is to Cast a Spell with an area, range, or target, the spell manifests from one of your bonded allies instead of yourself. Use the ally's space to determine the spell's source, range, and area of effect, but line of sight and line of effect must be met from both you and your ally when the spell is cast. While this might fool someone who only sees your ally, unless you're @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} or the spell has the subtle trait, any creature able to see both you and your ally can easily determine you're the source of the spell. If the spell has the subtle trait, you and your ally can Cast the Spell in a way that makes the ally appear to have cast it without that trait.

Signature Spells.name: 标志性法术 Signature Spells
Signature Spells.description:
你已经学会以更灵活的方式施放自己的一些法术，从而让你对施法拥有额外的掌控力。对于你能够使用的每个法术环阶，选择该环阶的一个法术作为招牌法术。你不需要分别学习招牌法术的高阶强化版本；相反，你可以自由地将这些法术高阶强化。若你学习某个招牌法术时的等级高于其最低等级，你也可以施放其所有较低环阶的版本，而无需分别学习那些版本。若你替换一个招牌法术，你可以在你学习先前法术时的同一法术环阶中，选择一个替代的招牌法术。你也可以专门通过重训，将一个招牌法术改为该环阶中的另一个法术，而无需替换任何法术；这所需的时间与正常重训一个法术相同。

You've learned to cast some of your spells more flexibly, granting you extra control over your spellcasting. For each spell rank you have access to, choose one spell of that rank to be a signature spell. You don't need to learn heightened versions of signature spells separately; instead, you can heighten these spells freely. If you've learned a signature spell at a higher level than its minimum, you can also cast all its lower-rank versions without learning those separately. If you swap out a signature spell, you can choose a replacement signature spell of the same spell rank at which you learned the previous spell. You can also retrain specifically to change a signature spell to a different spell of that rank without swapping any spells; this takes as much time as retraining a spell normally does.

Reflex Expertise.name: 反射专家 Reflex Expertise
Reflex Expertise.description:
秘学者 你的连接赐予你帮助你躲避危险的洞察力。你的反射豁免熟练等级提升为专家。

士兵 你培养出了躲避危险的本领。你的反射豁免熟练等级提升为专家。

巫战扭曲者 你对潜在危险的觉察，无论是通过惊人的分析能力还是对更广阔多元宇宙的理解，都增强了你的反应能力。你的反射豁免熟练等级提升为专家。

Mystic Your connection blesses you with insight that helps you dodge danger. Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to expert.

Soldier You've developed a knack for dodging danger. Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to expert.

Witchwarper Your awareness of possible dangers, through incredible analysis or an understanding of the wider multiverse, increases your reflexes. Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to expert.

Fear.name: 恐惧术 Fear
Fear.description:
你将恐惧植入目标；它必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 1}.

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 2}.

大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 3} 并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃跑 Fleeing} 1轮.

升阶（3环级） 你能以至多五个生物为目标。

Invisibility.name: 隐形术 Invisibility
Invisibility.description:
扭曲光线的幻觉包复目标，令其变得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形 Invisible}。这令该生物对所有生物 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{无踪} ，但生物可以尝试寻找目标，令其改为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}。如果目标使用敌对动作，法术在敌对动作完成后结束。

升阶（4环级） 该法术持续1分钟，但目标使用敌对动作时该法术不会结束。

Soul Surge.name: 灵魂涌流 Soul Surge
Soul Surge.description:
你将自己的生命力导入一支能量长矛中。你失去 6 点生命值；或者，如果你与一个至少有 12 点生命值的活力网络处于联结中，你可以改为使该活力联结的生命值减少 12 点。对目标的 AC 进行一次远程法术攻击检定。若命中，你造成 6d6 点灵魂伤害。若重击，目标承受双倍伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drain 1}。

强化（+1） 造成的伤害增加 2d6，失去的生命值增加 2 点（如果你消耗的是活力网络的生命值，则增加 4 点）。

You channel your life force into a spear of energy. You lose 6 Hit Points or, if you're in a bond with a vitality network that has at least 12 Hit Points, you can reduce the vitality bond's Hit Points by 12 instead. Make a ranged spell attack against the target's AC. On a hit, you deal 6d6 spirit damage. On a critical hit, the target takes double damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}.

Heightened (+1) Increase the damage dealt by 2d6 and the Hit Points lost by 2 (or by 4 if you spend Hit Points from a vitality network).

Spot Healing.name: 斑点修复 Spot Healing
Spot Healing.description:
触发条件 一个邻近的已建立联结的盟友受到伤害。

你迅速将活力网络中的能量输送给一名已建立联结的盟友。对触发此反应的盟友使用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.UeMHbnnaXDa3sGfG]{转移活力}。

Trigger An adjacent bonded ally takes damage.

You quickly expend energy from your vitality network toward a bonded ally. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.UeMHbnnaXDa3sGfG]{Transfer Vitality} to the triggering ally.

Toughness.name: 健壮 Toughness
Toughness.description: 在支撑到极限前，你的身体可以经受比大多数人更沉重的损伤。你的最大生命值提高等于你的等级的数值。你的恢复检定DC降低1点。

Battle Medicine.name: 战场医疗 Battle Medicine
Battle Medicine.description:
需求 你正持有或穿戴一个医疗包。

你可以包扎伤口，即使在战斗中也是如此。进行一次医疗检定，DC 与 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤势} 相同，并恢复对应数量的 HP；这不会移除濒死状态。与治疗伤势一样，如果你拥有最低熟练等级，你可以尝试对抗更高的 DC 进行检定。然后，目标会对你的战斗医疗 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.2XEYQNZTCGpdkyR6]{免疫} 1 天。这不会使其对治疗伤势免疫，也不会以其他方式视为治疗伤势。

Requirements You're holding or wearing a medkit.

You can patch up wounds, even in combat. Attempt a Medicine check with the same DC as for @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} and restore the corresponding amount of HP; this doesn't remove the wounded condition. As with Treat Wounds, you can attempt checks against higher DCs if you have the minimum proficiency rank. The target is then @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.2XEYQNZTCGpdkyR6]{immune} to your Battle Medicine for 1 day. This does not make them immune to, or otherwise count as, Treat Wounds.

Fortitude Expertise.name: 强韧专家 Fortitude Expertise
Fortitude Expertise.description:
特使 你的体魄极其强健。你在强韧豁免上的熟练等级提升为专家。

秘学者 你的体魄在冒险中变得更加坚韧。你在强韧豁免上的熟练等级提升为专家。

Envoy Your physique is incredibly hardy. Your proficiency rank for Fortitude saves increases to expert.

Mystic Your physique has grown hardier from your adventures. Your proficiency rank for Fortitude saves increases to expert.

Communalism.name: 公社主义 Communalism
Communalism.description:
频率 每天一次

触发条件 10尺内的一名盟友在一次需要3个动作或更少的技能检定中失败。

你向盟友的心灵传递有帮助的鼓励或相关信息。你的盟友重掷触发该能力的技能检定，并采用较好的结果。

Frequency once per day

Trigger An ally within 10 feet fails a skill check requiring 3 actions or fewer.

You broadcast helpful encouragement or pertinent information to your ally's mind. Your ally rerolls the triggering skill check and takes the better result.

Waste Not.name: 物尽其用 Waste Not
Waste Not.description:
通过谨慎专注，你确保目标失去的生命能量会被你的活力网络截获。若你接下来的动作是施放一个对活体生物造成虚空伤害的法术，你的活力网络获得等同于该法术环阶两倍的生命值。

特殊 你可以在不具有塑法特征的情况下使用“绝不浪费”。若你如此做，且你接下来的动作是用造成虚空伤害的武器进行一次打击，你的活力网络每个武器伤害骰获得2点生命值。

With careful focus, you guarantee vital energy lost from a target is caught by your vitality network. If the next action you use is to Cast a Spell that deals void damage to a living creature, your vitality network gains Hit Points equal to twice the spell's rank.

Special You can Waste Not without the spellshape trait. If you do and your next action is to Strike with a weapon that deals void damage, your vitality network gains 2 Hit Points per weapon damage die.

Feign Death.name: 诈死 Feign Death
Feign Death.description:
触发条件 你受到伤害。

你倒下至 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧} 并伪装成一具尸体。只要你不执行任何需要动用心智以外事物的动作，你看起来就是死的。要识破你的诡计，生物必须通过“寻找”或“回忆知识”对你的欺瞒 DC 成功进行一次检定。如果你的欺瞒达到大师熟练，你可以在不结束此效果的情况下准备一个动作。
