@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.ENxkQJEIkz35yuMT]{Core Memories}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.idjill6Zh7b3SLqE]{Focal Point}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.Z1sThY5XgXiXQBIy]{Tangible Object}

Anomaly.name: 异象 Anomaly
Anomaly.description:
你的存在是一种异常，违背了你当前现实的正常参数。你可能遭遇了某种扰乱你核心存在的事物，或者你穿过了来自某个另类现实或扭曲时间线的帷幕。

传统 奥术

悖论技能 欺瞒

悖论法术 戏法：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.jgN33YSYXB8iIHTw]{Stumble}；1环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.7P4eBdqWcgQJAFCa]{Shifting Surge}；2环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic}；3环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.qkehzRdn7JeGrR6E]{Void Whispers}；4环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.jyrxfWeeCsrkhNit]{Eldritch Wrath}；5环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.kOa055FIrO9Smnya]{Wall of Stone}；6环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.a02hsymtiVRQvh3i]{Slice Reality}；7环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.zdzeVZlKHkMAt2Rf]{Death Sentence}；8环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.sTpdXXaaKhoGOIxh]{Void Vessel}；9环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.J3zMwmhIVgI2yzxm]{Call Cosmos}

扭曲法术 初始：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.TN2pHF9l3k4ZJ7di]{Warp Terrain}；先进：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9w90nlUdV5HBRWFm]{Warp World}；更高：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XoYUZP9OYdDMz4I0]{Parallel Forms}

量子场 你敌人的交替迭代影像会在其周围闪烁，使动作变得模糊不清。当你的量子场内的一名敌人尝试执行一个具有专注特征的动作时，除非其成功通过一次 @Check[flat|dc:5|showDC:all]，否则该动作会被扰乱。生物首次在此次检定中失败时，它会获得24小时的暂时免疫。

Your existence is an anomaly that defies the normal parameters of your current reality. You might have encountered something that disrupted your core existence, or you crossed the veil from an alternate reality or twisted timeline.

Tradition arcane

Paradox Skill Deception

Paradox Spells cantrip: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.jgN33YSYXB8iIHTw]{Stumble}; 1st: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.7P4eBdqWcgQJAFCa]{Shifting Surge}; 2nd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic}; 3rd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.qkehzRdn7JeGrR6E]{Void Whispers}; 4th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.jyrxfWeeCsrkhNit]{Eldritch Wrath}; 5th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.kOa055FIrO9Smnya]{Wall of Stone}; 6th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.a02hsymtiVRQvh3i]{Slice Reality}; 7th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.zdzeVZlKHkMAt2Rf]{Death Sentence}; 8th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.sTpdXXaaKhoGOIxh]{Void Vessel}; 9th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.J3zMwmhIVgI2yzxm]{Call Cosmos}

Warp Spells initial: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.TN2pHF9l3k4ZJ7di]{Warp Terrain}; advanced: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9w90nlUdV5HBRWFm]{Warp World}; greater: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XoYUZP9OYdDMz4I0]{Parallel Forms}

Quantum Field Movements blur as images of alternate iterations of your enemies flicker around them. When an enemy in your quantum field attempts an action with the concentrate trait, the action is disrupted unless they succeed at a @Check[flat|dc:5|showDC:all]. The first time a creature fails this check, it becomes temporarily immune for 24 hours.

Warp Reality.name: 扭曲现实 Warp Reality
Warp Reality.description:
需求 你的量子场未激活。

你的量子场激活，并在你维持它期间持续存在（最长10分钟），或直到你下个回合结束。你的量子场是一个以你在100英尺内选择的一点为中心的@Template[type:burst|distance:20]。当你的量子场处于激活状态时，你可以使用具有锚定（特征）的动作。你的量子场的其他具体效果由你的悖论决定。每当你扭曲现实时、每次你维持它时，以及当一个生物进入你的量子场时，选择区域内哪些特定生物会受到你的量子场影响。每次你以维持动作来维持量子场时（而非锚定动作），你都可以将其移动到100英尺内的一个新位置。

如果你陷入昏迷、如果你解除它，或如果你移动到距离它超过100英尺之外，你的量子场会自动解除激活。

Requirements Your quantum field isn't active.

Your quantum field activates and lasts as long as you Sustain it (up to 10 minutes) or until the end of your next turn. Your quantum field is a @Template[type:burst|distance:20] centered on a point you choose within 100 feet. While your quantum field is active, you can use actions that have the anchoring trait. Your quantum field's other specific effects are determined by your paradox. Choose whether any given creature in the area is affected by your quantum field when you Warp Reality, each time you Sustain it, and when a creature enters your quantum field. Each time you Sustain a quantum field with the Sustain action (instead of an anchoring action), you can move it to a new position within 100 feet.

Your quantum field automatically deactivates if you're knocked out, if you Dismiss it, or if you move more than 100 feet away from it.

Quantum Pulse.name: 量子脉冲 Quantum Pulse
Quantum Pulse.description:
触发 你掷先攻。

你总是准备好释放自己的悖论能力，而当身陷险境时，你会本能地释放出一阵量子能量脉冲。当战斗开始时，你@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ZoMpqQgDdlT13Jp0]{扭曲现实}。

Trigger You roll initiative.

You're always ready to let loose with your paradoxical abilities, and when imperiled, you instinctively release a pulse of quantum energy. As combat begins, you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ZoMpqQgDdlT13Jp0]{Warp Reality}.

Tangible Object.name: 有形物体 Tangible Object
Tangible Object.description:
一个小物件，通常是你佩戴在身上或能用一只肢体握持的东西，会给你带来安慰。它可能是一件有纪念意义的小饰物或衣物、一件可供把玩的装置，或者只是拥有你觉得令人愉悦的触感。

锚定增益 你所选物件的存在或重量帮助你稳固于这个现实之中。你在对抗幻象和全息影像时，察觉检定和意志豁免均获得 +1 处境加值。

锚定效果 你的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened} 状况值减少 1。若你未处于 frightened，你改为在对抗恐惧效果的意志豁免上获得 +1 处境加值，并且在对抗试图对你使用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} 的意志 DC 上获得 +2 处境加值，持续至你的下一回合开始。你每轮只能从此效果中受益一次。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.nvB1852vEPVqjxhR]{效果：Tangible Object（锚定效果）}

A small object, usually something you wear or can hold with one appendage, gives you comfort. It might be a trinket or article of clothing with sentimental value, a gadget to fidget with, or perhaps it just has a texture you find pleasing.

Anchor Benefit The presence or weight of your chosen object helps ground you in this reality. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to both Perception checks and Will saves against illusions and holograms.

Anchoring Effect Reduce your @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened} condition by 1. If you aren't frightened, you instead gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Will saves against fear effects and a +2 circumstance bonus to your Will DC against attempts to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} you until the start of your next turn. You can only benefit from this once per round.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.nvB1852vEPVqjxhR]{Effect: Tangible Object (Anchoring Effect)}

Spell Repertoire.name: 法术库 Spell Repertoire
Spell Repertoire.description:
秘学者你能够施放的法术集合称为你的法术库。在1级时，你学习两个自选的1环法术和四个自选的戏法，此外还会从你所选的连接中获得一个额外法术和一个额外戏法。你从与你所选连接对应传承的普通法术中选择这些法术，或从该传承中你能够获得的其他法术中选择。你可以消耗一个适当法术环级的法术位来施放你法术库中的任意法术。

随着等级提升，你会向这个法术库中加入更多法术。每当你获得一个法术位时，你就将一个同环级的法术加入你的法术库。当你获得新的法术环级时，你获得的第一个新法术始终是由你所选连接授予的法术，但其他法术可以自行选择。在2级时，你再选择一个1环法术；在3级时，你从所选连接获得一个新法术以及另外两个2环法术，依此类推。当你加入法术时，你可以选择一个你已知法术的更高环级版本，以便施放该法术的升阶版本。

虽然你以相同速度获得它们，但你的法术位与你法术库中的法术是彼此分开的。若某个专长或其他能力将一个法术加入你的法术库，它不会额外给予你一个法术位，反之亦然。

替换法术库中的法术

随着你在法术库中获得新法术，你可能会想替换掉一些先前学会的法术。每当你提升一级并学会新法术时，你都可以将一个旧法术替换为一个同环级的不同法术。这个法术可以是戏法，但你不能替换顿悟法术或连接法术。你也可以在停工期中通过再训练来替换法术。

巫战扭曲者你能够施放的法术集合称为你的法术库。在1级时，你学习两个自选的1环法术和四个自选的戏法，此外还会从你的悖论中获得一个额外法术和一个额外戏法。你从与你的悖论对应传承的普通法术中选择这些法术。你可以消耗一个适当法术环级的法术位来施放你法术库中的任意法术。

随着等级提升，你会向这个法术库中加入更多法术。每当你获得一个法术位时，你就将一个同环级的法术加入你的法术库。在2级时，再选择一个1环法术；在3级时，你从悖论获得一个新法术以及另外两个2环法术，依此类推。当你加入法术时，你可以加入一个你已拥有法术的更高环级版本，以便施放该法术的升阶版本。

虽然你以相同速度获得它们，但你的法术位与你法术库中的法术是彼此分开的。若某个专长或其他能力将一个法术加入你的法术库，它不会额外给予你一个法术位，反之亦然。

替换法术库中的法术

随着你在法术库中获得新法术，你可能会想替换掉一些先前学会的法术。每当你提升一级并学会新法术时，你都可以将一个旧法术替换为一个同环级的不同法术。这个法术可以是戏法，但你不能替换从你的悖论中获得的法术。你也可以在停工期中通过再训练来替换法术。

Mystic The collection of spells you can cast is called your spell repertoire. At 1st level, you learn two 1st-rank spells of your choice and four cantrips of your choice as well as an additional spell and cantrip from your chosen connection. You choose these from the common spells from the tradition corresponding to your chosen connection or from other spells from that tradition to which you have access. You can cast any spell in your spell repertoire by using a spell slot of an appropriate spell rank.

You add to this spell repertoire as you increase in level. Each time you get a spell slot, you add a spell of the same rank to your spell repertoire. When you gain access to a new rank of spells, your first new spell is always the spell granted by your chosen connection, but you can choose the other spells. At 2nd level, you select another 1st-rank spell; at 3rd level, you gain a new spell from your chosen connection and two other 2nd-rank spells, and so on. When you add spells, you might select a higher-rank version of a spell you already know so that you can cast a heightened version of that spell.

Though you gain them at the same rate, your spell slots and the spells in your spell repertoire are separate. If a feat or other ability adds a spell to your spell repertoire, it wouldn't give you another spell slot, and vice versa.

Swapping Spells in Your Repertoire

As you gain new spells in your spell repertoire, you might want to replace some of the spells you previously learned. Each time you gain a level and learn new spells, you can swap out one of your old spells for a different spell of the same rank. This spell can be a cantrip, but you can't swap out epiphany spells or connection spells. You can also swap out spells by retraining during downtime.

Witchwarper The collection of spells you can cast is called your spell repertoire. At 1st level, you learn two 1st-rank spells of your choice and four cantrips of your choice as well as an additional spell and cantrip from your paradox. You choose these from the common spells from the tradition corresponding to your paradox. You can cast any spell in your spell repertoire by using a spell slot of an appropriate spell rank.

You add to this spell repertoire as you increase in level. Each time you get a spell slot, you add a spell to your spell repertoire of the same rank. At 2nd level, select another 1st-rank spell; at 3rd level, you gain a new spell from your paradox and two other 2nd-rank spells, and so on. When you add spells, you might add a higher-rank version of a spell you already have, so you can cast a heightened version of that spell.

Though you gain them at the same rate, your spell slots and the spells in your spell repertoire are separate. If a feat or other ability adds a spell to your spell repertoire, it wouldn't give you another spell slot, and vice versa.

Swapping Spells in Your Repertoire

As you gain new spells in your repertoire, you might want to replace some of the spells you previously learned. Each time you gain a level and learn new spells, you can swap out one of your old spells for a different spell of the same rank. This spell can be a cantrip, but you can't swap out spells gained from your paradox. You can also swap out spells by retraining during downtime.

Witchwarper Spellcasting.name: 巫战扭曲者施法 Witchwarper Spellcasting
Witchwarper Spellcasting.description:
你的悖论赋予你魔法力量。你可以使用“施放法术”活动来施放法术。作为巫战扭曲者，当你施放法术时，你可能会大声描述自己对其他现实的揭示，同时辅以优雅的手势，周围闪耀着奥术方程式或神秘符号。

每天，你至多可以施放三个1环法术。你必须知晓法术才能施放它们，而你通过“法术 repertory”职业特性来习得这些法术。你每天能够施放的法术数量被称为你的法术位。

随着你作为巫战扭曲者等级的提升，你每日可施放的法术数量会增加，你能够施放的法术最高环阶也会提高。

你的某些法术需要你进行一次法术攻击，以查看它们有多有效；或者让你的敌人对抗你的法术DC进行掷骰（通常是尝试一次豁免检定）。你的法术攻击调整值和法术DC使用你的魅力或智力调整值，取决于你为关键属性选择了哪一个。

法术高环化

当你获得2环及更高环阶的法术位时，你可以用较低环法术的更强版本来填充这些法术位。这会提高该法术的环阶，使其高环化以匹配该法术位。你必须在你的法术 repertory 中拥有你想以该环阶施放的法术，才能将其高环化至那个环阶。许多法术在被高环化至特定环阶时会获得明确的增强效果。

戏法

你的部分法术是戏法。戏法是一种特殊类型的法术，不使用法术位。你可以随意施放戏法，每天施放任意次数。戏法总是会自动高环化至你等级的一半并向上取整——这通常等于你所拥有的最高巫战扭曲者法术位环阶。例如，作为1级巫战扭曲者，你的戏法是1环法术；而作为5级巫战扭曲者，你的戏法是3环法术。

扭曲法术

你可以创造被称为扭曲法术的强大魔法现象。扭曲法术是一种专注法术。施放一个扭曲法术需要花费1点专注点，而你起始拥有一个包含1点专注点的专注池。你会在每日准备期间补满你的专注池，并且你可以通过花费10分钟使用“重新专注”活动，沉思无限世界或进行量子魔法研究，来恢复1点专注点。

专注法术会像戏法一样，自动高环化至你等级的一半并向上取整。专注法术不需要法术位，而且你不能使用法术位来施放它们。选择专长可以让你获得更多专注法术并增加专注池的大小，不过你的专注池永远不能容纳超过3点专注点。

与其他专注法术不同，扭曲法术具有锚定特征。这个特征意味着你只有在量子场处于激活状态时才能使用扭曲法术，并且当你施放扭曲法术时，你会自动维持你的量子场。

你根据自己的悖论习得扭曲法术。

Your paradox grants you magical power. You can cast spells using the Cast a Spell activity. As a witchwarper, when you cast spells, you might describe your revelations about other realities aloud, accompanied by elegant gestures while arcane equations or occult symbols blaze around you.

Each day, you can cast up to three 1st-rank spells. You must know spells to cast them, and you learn them via the spell repertoire class feature. The number of spells you can cast each day is called your spell slots.

As you increase in level as a witchwarper, your number of spells per day increases, as does the highest rank of spells you can cast.

Some of your spells require you to attempt a spell attack to see how effective they are or have your enemies roll against your spell DC (typically by attempting a saving throw). Your spell attack modifiers and spell DCs use your Charisma or Intelligence modifier, depending on which you chose for your key attribute.

Heightening Spells

When you get spell slots of 2nd rank and higher, you can fill those slots with stronger versions of lower-rank spells. This increases the spell's rank, heightening it to match the spell slot. You must have a spell in your spell repertoire at the rank you want to cast in order to heighten it to that rank. Many spells have specific improvements when they're heightened to certain ranks.

Cantrips

Some of your spells are cantrips. A cantrip is a special type of spell that doesn't use spell slots. You can cast a cantrip at will, any number of times per day. A cantrip is always automatically heightened to half your level rounded up—this is usually equal to the highest rank of witchwarper spell slot you have. For example, as a 1st-level witchwarper, your cantrips are 1st-rank spells, and as a 5th-level witchwarper, your cantrips are 3rd-rank spells.

Warp Spells

You can create powerful magical phenomena known as warp spells. Warp spells are a type of focus spell. It costs 1 Focus Point to cast a warp spell, and you start with a focus pool of 1 Focus Point. You refill your focus pool during your daily preparations, and you can regain 1 Focus Point by spending 10 minutes using the Refocus activity to contemplate infinite worlds or conduct quantum magical research.

Focus spells are automatically heightened to half your level rounded up, much like cantrips. Focus spells don't require spell slots, and you can't cast them using spell slots. Taking feats can give you more focus spells and increase the size of your focus pool, though your focus pool can never hold more than 3 Focus Points.

Warp spells have the anchoring trait, unlike other focus spells. This trait means you can only use warp spells while your quantum field is active, and you automatically Sustain your quantum field when you cast warp spells.

You learn warp spells based on your paradox.

Battleglove.name: 战斗手套 Battleglove
Battleglove.description:
升级： 1

这些耐用的手套套在使用者的双手（或其他附肢）上，指关节处装有加重板片或尖刺。

Upgrades: 1

These durable gloves fit over a wielder's hands (or other appendages) and feature weighted plates or spikes over the knuckles.

Comm Unit.name: 通讯单元 Comm Unit
Comm Unit.description:
个人通讯器是一种口袋大小的设备，结合了小型便携式计算机和蜂窝通信设备，能够以音频和文本两种形式，在行星范围内与其他通讯器进行即时无线通信。个人通讯器还包括计算器、手电筒（以你为中心5英尺半径内发出明亮光照，并在接下来的5英尺内发出微光）、可访问任何本地信息圈的浏览器，以及若干娱乐选项（包括游戏）。

集成在护甲中的个人通讯器具有一定的语音激活功能；你可以无需空闲手，就以音频形式与其他通讯器通信并接收回复，但输入消息、浏览信息圈或使用应用程序仍需要至少一只手。

能在更远距离运作的通讯器则没有那么便携；它们内置发电机以提供所需的电力，并依赖活跃的漂流信标进行通信。在大多数主要聚居地，都可以购买这些通讯器的短期使用服务。

A personal comm unit is a pocket-sized device that combines a minor portable computer and a cellular communications device, allowing instantaneous wireless communication with other comm units in both audio- and text-based formats at planetary range. A personal comm unit also includes a calculator, a flashlight (emits bright light in a 5-foot radius around you and dim light in the next 5 feet), a browser that accesses any local infospheres, and several entertainment options (including games).

Personal comm units integrated into armor have some voice-activated capabilities; you can communicate with other comm units in audio-based formats and receive responses without needing a free hand, but typing a message, browsing the infosphere, or using an app requires the use of at least one hand.

Comm units that function at longer ranges aren't as portable; they include built-in generators that provide the necessary amount of power and rely on active Drift beacons to communicate. Short-term use of these units can be purchased in most major settlements.

Hypopen (Commercial).name: 低压笔（商业） Hypopen (Commercial)
Hypopen (Commercial).description:
这个微型圆筒内含有专门化的纳米机器人，它们可以：

  • 移除 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏} 状况
  • 将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心} 状况的值降低 1。

This tiny cylinder contains specialized nanites that either

  • Remove the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} condition
  • Decrease the value of the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened} condition by 1.

Medpatch (Commercial).name: 医疗贴片（商用） Medpatch (Commercial)
Medpatch (Commercial).description:
激活 1 (manipulate)

医疗贴片会加速身体的自然愈合。你恢复 @Damage[(1d6)[healing]] 点生命值，并在 10 分钟内对抗疾病和毒素的豁免检定获得 +1 物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{效果：医疗贴片}

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Medpatches accelerate the body's natural healing. You regain @Damage[(1d6)[healing]] Hit Points and gain a +1 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{Effect: Medpatch}

Container (Ordinary).name: 容器（普通） Container (Ordinary)
Container (Ordinary).description:
容器包括背包、公文包、行李袋和手提包。容器最多可容纳 4 Bulk，其中前 2 Bulk 的物品不计入你的 Bulk 上限。如果你是携带或收纳该容器，而不是将其佩戴在身上，则其 Bulk 为轻型而非可忽略。

Containers include backpacks, briefcases, duffel bags, and handbags. A container holds up to 4 Bulk and the first 2 Bulk of those items don't count against your Bulk limits. If you're carrying or stowing the container rather than wearing it on your person, its Bulk is light instead of negligible.

Second Skin.name: 着甲如肤 Second Skin
Second Skin.description:
升级： 0

这种柔软却坚韧的织物能完美贴合穿戴者的身体，在不牺牲舒适性的前提下提供基础防护。第二层皮肤通常穿在休闲服装里面。

Upgrades: 0

Soft but resilient fabric contours perfectly to the wearer's body, offering basic protection without sacrificing comfort. Second skin is commonly worn underneath casual clothing.

Semi-Auto Pistol.name: 半自动手枪 Semi-Auto Pistol
Semi-Auto Pistol.description:
升级： 1

这把手枪会在每次射击后自动退出用过的弹壳并装填新的弹药。

Upgrades: 1

This pistol automatically ejects used cartridges and loads new ammunition after every shot fired.

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一股标记魔法存在的脉冲。你不会获得魔法存在或不存在以外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你或者你盟友的魔法物品以及持续法术。仅当幻术魔法的环级低于你的侦测魔法环级时，你才能侦测幻术魔法。但是，具有幻术灵光但是没有在外表上做伪装的物品（例如一瓶隐形药水），通常能够正常侦测。

升阶（3环级） 你能知晓法术侦测出的最强魔法效果的环级或等级，具体由GM决定。

升阶（4环级） 如3环级，你也能指出最高环级魔法的来源。如同一种模糊感官，你不会了解具体的位置，但是可以将来源锁定到5尺立方（或者最近的那个五尺立方，如果来源体积比这个区域更大）。

Figment.name: 虚构幻术 Figment
Figment.description:
你创造出简单的声音或图像的幻术。声音会为法术添加听觉特征，且不能包含能被理解的单词或复杂的音乐。图像会为法术添加视觉特征，但是它不能大于5尺边长的立方体，且在15尺的距离内观察会发现它的构造明显很粗糙且缺乏细节。当你施放或维持该法术时，你能尝试用幻术让人@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{分神 Create a Diversion}，这会为你的欺骗检定提供+2环境加值。若对某个生物进行的此尝试失败了，该生物就不会相信虚构幻术。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.2Hg3a06gZCSnUgSA]{法术效果：虚构幻术}

Injury Echo.name: 伤害回响 Injury Echo
Injury Echo.description:
你将来自未来或过去的一处伤口显现出来，以在当下伤害一个生物。选择钝击、穿刺或挥砍伤害。目标受到 1d8 所选类型的伤害，并进行一次基础意志豁免。如果目标豁免失败，且在你的下个回合结束前再次受到相同类型的伤害，则它会额外受到 @Damage[ceil((@item.level)/2)d4[persistent,bleed]] 伤害。

升阶（+2） 初始伤害增加 1d8，且失败时的持续伤害增加 1d4。

You manifest an injury from the future or past to harm a creature in the present. Choose bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage. The target takes 1d8 of the selected damage type with a basic Will save. If the target fails its save and then takes the same type of damage before the end of your next turn, it takes an additional @Damage[ceil((@item.level)/2)d4[persistent,bleed]] damage.

Heightened (+2) The initial damage increases by 1d8, and the persistent damage on a failure increases by 1d4.

Light.name: 光 Light
Light.description:
你创造一个光球，它发出由你选择的颜色的光芒，在20尺半径内产生明亮光照（以及接下来的20尺产生昏暗光照）。如果你在一个自愿的生物身上施法，你可以将光球连结到该生物，这使得光球会跟随该生物一起移动。你可以维持法术以移动光球至多60尺，作为这个移动的一部分，你可以将光球连结到一个生物或是从一个生物上解除连结。

你可以解消该法术。如果你在你已经有4个光亮术激活时施放该法术的话，你必须结束一个已存在的法术。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.cVVZXNbV0nElVOPZ]{法术效果：光亮术}

升阶（4环级） 光球在60尺半径内产生明亮光照（并在接下来的60尺产生昏暗光照）。

Stumble.name: 踉跄 Stumble
Stumble.description:
一阵微重力爆发在目标周围引发震颤，将其拉向地面。目标必须进行一次反射豁免。

失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，持续1轮。如果目标当时正在飞行、游泳或漂浮，它会向下坠落10尺。

大失败 目标 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{倒地}。如果目标当时正在飞行、游泳或漂浮，它会向下坠落20尺。

强化（+1） 如果目标坠落，则失败时额外坠落5尺，大失败时额外坠落10尺。

A burst of microgravity causes a tremor around the target, pulling it toward the ground. The target must attempt a Reflex save.

Failure The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} for 1 round. If the target was flying, swimming, or floating, it falls 10 feet downward.

Critical Failure The target falls @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. If the target was flying, swimming, or floating, it falls 20 feet downward.

Heightened (+1) If the target falls, it falls an additional 5 feet on a failure and 10 feet on a critical failure.

Arcane Spontaneous Spells.name: 奥术自发法术 Arcane Spontaneous Spells

Force Barrage.name: 力场飞弹 Force Barrage
Force Barrage.description:
你发射出一道固态的魔力碎片，射向一个你能看见的生物。它自动命中，并造成1d4+1力场伤害。你施放该法术时每额外使用一个动作，你射出的碎片增加一个，最大为3个动作发射三个碎片。你为每个碎片分别选择目标。如果你对同一个目标射击超过1个碎片，将伤害合计后再计算伤害加值，减值，抗力，弱点等。

升阶（+2） 你花费的每个动作额外射出一枚碎片。

Shifting Surge.name: 变迁激涌 Shifting Surge
Shifting Surge.description:
你释放出一股魔法能量洪流，暂时改变武器造成的伤害类型。该武器下一次进行的打击所造成的伤害变为你选择的酸蚀、寒冷、电击、火焰或音波伤害，并额外造成1d6点与该武器通常伤害类型相同的伤害。

升阶（+2） 额外伤害提高1d6。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.pWm0NCsxjxTUCJ7y]{法术效果：Shifting Surge}

You release a surge of magical energy that temporarily changes the type of damage dealt by a weapon. The next Strike the weapon makes deals your choice of acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic damage and deals an additional 1d6 extra damage of the same type as the weapon's normal damage.

Heightened (+2) The extra damage increases by 1d6.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.pWm0NCsxjxTUCJ7y]{Spell Effect: Shifting Surge}

Thunderstrike.name: 雷击术 Thunderstrike
Thunderstrike.description:
你呼唤一道伴随着雷鸣之声的闪电，对目标造成1d12点电击伤害和1d4点音波伤害，基础反射豁免。穿戴金属护甲或者由金属构成的生物在豁免中承受-1环境减值，若它们受到该法术的伤害，会陷入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 Clumsy 1}，持续1轮。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d12点电击以及1d4点音波。

Arcane Focus Spells.name: 奥术专注法术 Arcane Focus Spells

Warp Terrain.name: 扭曲地形 Warp Terrain
Warp Terrain.description:
你在自己的量子场内将来自另一重现实的地形特征具现化。选择以下一种效果；该效果会持续，直到你的量子场不再激活、你再次施放扭曲地形，或你解除此法术为止。

  • 你使量子场区域变为困难地形。你决定扭曲地形的外观。你和你的盟友可以如常穿过该扭曲地形，并且可以利用其地形特征 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{进行掩护}。
  • 你压制你场域中的地形，将你量子场内任何现有的困难地形或更高等的困难地形变为普通地形。这不适用于使生物将方格视为困难地形的效果（例如星辉武者的引力子调谐攻击）。如果你正试图压制由法术或其他魔法效果创造的地形，你必须成功反制该效果。

升阶（3环） 你可以选择让量子场充满雾、烟，或其他遮蔽视野的现象。其功能如同 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9XHmC2JgTUIQ1CCm]{迷雾}。你也可以改为压制量子场内其中一种此类效果。

升阶（6环） 你可以选择让量子场变为更高等的困难地形，或压制更高等的困难地形。

You materialize terrain features from another reality within your quantum field. Choose one of the following effects, which lasts as long as your quantum field remains active, until you cast warp terrain again, or until you dismiss this spell.

  • You cause the area of your quantum field to become difficult terrain. You determine the appearance of the warped terrain. You and your allies can move through the warped terrain normally and can @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Take Cover} using its features.
  • You suppress terrain in your field, turning any existing difficult or greater difficult terrain in your quantum field to normal terrain. This does not apply to effects that cause a creature to count squares as difficult terrain (such as a solarian's graviton-attunement attacks). If you're attempting to suppress terrain created by a spell or other magical effect, you must successfully counteract the effect.

Heightened (3rd) You can choose to have the quantum field fill with fog, smoke, or another phenomenon that obscures vision. This functions as @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9XHmC2JgTUIQ1CCm]{Mist}. You can instead suppress one of these effects within your quantum field.

Heightened (6th) You can choose to have the quantum field become greater difficult terrain, or suppress greater difficult terrain.

Natural Ambition.name: 天生野望 Natural Ambition
Natural Ambition.description: 你从小就壮志勃勃，并且为了出人头地一直在努力奋斗，这让你在你所选择的职业领域上的进步卓越。你获得你自身职业的一个1级职业专长。你必须满足该专长的先决条件，你仅能在创建角色阶段延后选取该专长，以满足所选职业专长的先决条件。

Anchoring Strike.name: 锚定打击 Anchoring Strike
Anchoring Strike.description:
需求 你的量子场处于激活状态。

战斗可能令人迷失方向，但对你而言，打击目标时所需的强烈精神专注会为你带来额外的清晰与专注。进行一次打击。此次打击获得以下成功与重击成功效果。

重击成功 此次打击获得锚定特征。你可以重掷此次打击所投掷的伤害骰，但你必须使用第二次结果，即使更差也一样。

成功 此次打击获得锚定特征。

Requirements Your quantum field is active.

Battle can be disorienting, but for you, the intense mental effort of striking your targets lends you additional clarity and focus. Make a Strike. The Strike gains the following success and critical success effects.

Critical Success The Strike gains the anchoring trait. You can reroll the damage dice rolled for this strike, but you must use the second result, even if it's worse.

Success The Strike gains the anchoring trait.

Physical Science Lore.name: 物理科学知识 Physical Science Lore

Credstick.name: 信用棒 Credstick
Credstick.description:
《Starfinder》中的大多数人都会把自己的财富存放在一种受保护的物品中，称为信用棒。 这些装置通常是扁平的，大小大致相当于一根人类手指。它们的尺寸和品质各不相同，但归根结底，它们只是用于便捷携带和花费金钱的一种方式。这些装置的使用方式由持有者决定，而信用棒只需在合适的银行设备附近轻轻一碰，就能完成收款或支付这样简单的操作。当需要更严格的安全措施时，它们可以要求语音或生物识别印记才能激活。有些先进（型）信用棒甚至带有魔法组件，可能需要输入精神密码，或念诵特定法术，才能存取其中储存的资金。

信用棒并不是通往个人全部财富的入口，数额更大的信用点通常会安全地存放在银行、私人金库或安全数据库中。相反，信用棒是一种安全且匿名的信用点流通方式，不易被追踪。无论是冒险者还是普通市民，常常都会随身携带一根信用棒，以处理他们可能需要进行的各种购买，同时身上也只保留刚好足够的信用点，这样即使丢失了信用棒，也不至于因此破产。

协约世界中的个人通常都会携带信用棒，而其他与协约世界往来的文明也常会将本地资金兑换为信用点，因此也会携带信用棒来花费这些兑换后的货币。有时，一个人可能会携带好几根信用棒，将每一根专门用于不同用途，或者如果他们想进行一笔预定金额的购买，也可以直接把整根信用棒转交出去。若一个人携带的信用棒数量变得过于累赘，也很容易在各根信用棒之间转移资金，并丢弃已经清空的信用棒以节省空间，不过信用棒始终具有可忽略体积。

Most people in Starfinder keep their wealth on a protected item known as a credstick. These devices are often flat and roughly the size of a human finger. They range in dimensions and quality, but at the end of the day, they're just a means of conveniently carrying and spending money. Usage of these devices is determined by the owner, and a credstick can accept or spend funds with as simple an action as tapping it near a suitable banking device. When more rigorous security is necessary, they can require audio or biometric imprints in order to activate. Some advanced credsticks even have a magical component that might require a mental password or the recitation of a specific spell to access stored funds.

Credsticks aren't gateways to the entirety of one's wealth, and larger stores of credits are often kept secured in banks, personal vaults, or secure databases. Instead, a credstick is a safe and anonymous means of moving credits around without being traced. Adventurers and common citizens alike often keep a credstick on their person to handle any purchases they might be called upon to make, while also only keeping just enough credits on them that losing the credstick wouldn't result in bankruptcy.

Individuals in the Pact Worlds often carry credsticks, and other civilizations that interact with the Pact often turn local funds into credits and thus carry them to spend their converted currency. Sometimes a person might carry several credsticks, dedicating each one to a different use, or simply trading the stick away if they want to make a purchase of a predefined amount. If ever the number of credsticks on a person becomes too cumbersome, it's easy enough to move the funds between individual sticks and discard emptied sticks to save on space, however a credstick always has a negligible bulk.

Android.name: 仿生人 Android
Android.description:
安卓体最初作为合成人造生命体出现，由银河中许多技术先进的文明所制造。第一批安卓体是由类人生物按照自身形象创造的，但在赋予这些活体构装体生命的技术传播开来后，安卓体开始展现出惊人的形态多样性。协约世界中的安卓体最初被设计为仆役，但如今，安卓体和其他机器人生命体在《协约》之下，已与有机裔族平起平坐。一些安卓体形成了自己的独立社群，而大多数则无缝整合进协约世界的社会之中。与许多其他科技构装体不同，安卓体不仅仅是精密的人造器官和复杂程序的结合体，每个安卓体都拥有自己的灵魂。

Androids first emerged as synthetic beings crafted by many technologically advanced civilizations throughout the galaxy. The first androids were created by humanoid peoples in their own images, but after the technology that animated the living constructs spread, androids began displaying a fantastic diversity of forms. Androids in the Pact Worlds were originally designed as servants, but today androids and other robotic beings stand as equals to organic ancestries under the Pact. Some androids have formed their own independent communities, while most integrate seamlessly into Pact Worlds societies. Unlike many other technological constructs, androids are more than intricate synthetic organs and complex programming, and each possesses their own soul.

Constructed.name: 被创造者 Constructed
Constructed.description: 你的人造身体比单纯的生物机体更能抵抗疾病。你对疾病、毒素和辐射的豁免检定获得+1环境加值。

Mod Fanatic Android.name: 安卓体改装狂热者 Mod Fanatic Android
Mod Fanatic Android.description:
你或你之前的迭代体已经改造了自己的身体，使其能够兼容护甲升级，让你可以亲自定制自己的身体及其能力。你的身体拥有1个护甲升级槽位，你可以用它来内嵌护甲升级，且该槽位不计入你的护甲可拥有的升级总数。你可以使用“安装升级”活动，将护甲升级安装到或拆卸出你的个人升级槽位。选择1个物品等级为1或更低的普通护甲升级。你开始游戏时，该护甲升级已经内嵌在你的升级槽位中（你无需花费信用点购买这项初始升级）。

You or your previous iterations have modified your body to be compatible with armor upgrades, enabling you to personally customize your body and its capabilities. Your body has one armor upgrade slot that you can use to install armor upgrades and that doesn't count toward your armor's total number of upgrades. You can install and uninstall armor upgrades into your personal upgrade slot using the Install Upgrade activity. Choose one common armor upgrade with an item level of 1 or less. You begin with this armor upgrade already installed in your upgrade slot (you don't need to pay the credits to purchase this starting upgrade).

Hacker.name: 黑客 Hacker
Hacker.description:
你一直对计算机和虚拟空间很有天赋，并以自己学习技术秘密的能力为傲。被称为信息圈的开放网络是你的家园，也是你能够发挥最佳水平的地方。说到破解代码或访问安全数据，你的能力非常出众。

选择两项属性增强。其中一项必须加给敏捷或智力，另一项是自由属性增强。

你在计算机技能和信息圈知识技能上受过训练。你获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.ifQiKhl0Gt2CM7i9]{Phreaker}技能专长。

You've always had a knack for computers and virtual spaces and pride yourself on your ability to learn technical secrets. The open networks known as infospheres are your home and the place you can do your best work. You're highly competent when it comes to cracking code or accessing secure data.

Choose two attribute boosts. One must be to Dexterity or Intelligence, and one is a free attribute boost.

You're trained in the Computers skill and the Infosphere Lore skill. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.ifQiKhl0Gt2CM7i9]{Phreaker} skill feat.

Phreaker.name: 奇客 Phreaker
Phreaker.description:
你已经学会了如何用替代方法进行黑客入侵。你可以使用任何计算机、通讯单元或终端来用计算机执行“停用装置”或入侵系统，而不必使用黑客工具包。如果你在计算机上达到专家熟练度，且你所使用的装备至少为 3 级，则你在“停用装置”或入侵上获得 +1 物品加值。

特殊 如果你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.abcKcLvAGE5AKig4]{战斗黑客} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.0ZNErs9RICfOw1Nf]{数字佯攻} 技能专长，你可以用此专长在不使用黑客工具包的情况下进行“战斗黑客”或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{进行佯攻}。

You've learned how to hack using alternative methods. You can use Computers to Disable a Device or Hack a system using any computer, comm unit, or terminal instead of a hacking toolkit. If you're an expert in Computers and the equipment you use is at least 3rd level, you gain a +1 item bonus to Disable a Device or Hack.

Special If you have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.abcKcLvAGE5AKig4]{Combat Hack} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.0ZNErs9RICfOw1Nf]{Digital Diversion} skill feat, you can use this feat to Combat Hack or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{Create a Diversion} without a hacking toolkit.

Operative.name: 特工 Operative
Operative.description:
你是一名专注、机敏的职业人士，能在高风险战斗中如鱼得水。你致命的瞄准能力和战术训练让你比竞争对手更胜一筹——对你来说，即便是最强大的敌人，也不过是又一个要解决的目标。你在自己所选的专精领域中展现出令人印象深刻的造诣。

You're a focused, quick-witted professional who thrives in high-stakes combat. Your deadly aim and tactical training give you an edge over the competition—for you, even the most powerful enemy is just another mark to take out. You have impressive prowess in your chosen field of specialization.

Sharpshooter.name: 神枪手 Sharpshooter
Sharpshooter.description:
你能看出目标的弱点，使你在使用大多数类型的远程武器时造成额外的精准伤害。你获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{瞄准}动作。

You can spot a target's weak points, letting you deal additional precision damage with most types of ranged weapons. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim} action.

Operative's Specialization.name: 特工的专精 Operative's Specialization
Operative's Specialization.description:
作为一名特工，你会根据自己的战术风格掌握一套特定的技能。这些不同的专精有助于定义你的角色，以及你在大多数情况下采取的应对方式。选择一个特工专精。该专精会使你在一项技能上获得受训、获得该技能的一个技能专长，以及一个漏洞利用。9级时，你获得由该专精赋予你的强化漏洞利用。本书中提供的专精如下。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.1bgDbGzALewzo7cy]{幽灵}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.u4hB3FGFJwGtjrZB]{渗透者}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.HSKJ1VkPdlMkcqzc]{散兵}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.OCWsQQ95P7ecp7Rn]{狙击手}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.EpxKCi6G0KnWQhHP]{打击者}

As an operative, you have a particular set of skills based on your tactical style. These different specializations help define your character and the approach you take to most situations. Choose an operative's specialization. This specialization grants you training in one skill, a skill feat for that skill, and an exploit. At 9th level, you gain the enhanced exploit granted by your specialization. The specializations presented in this book are as follows.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.1bgDbGzALewzo7cy]{Ghost}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.u4hB3FGFJwGtjrZB]{Infiltrator}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.HSKJ1VkPdlMkcqzc]{Skirmisher}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.OCWsQQ95P7ecp7Rn]{Sniper}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.EpxKCi6G0KnWQhHP]{Striker}

Aim.name: 瞄准 Aim
Aim.description:
需求 你正持用一把不具有区域（特征）的远程武器。

你谨慎地瞄准一个你已察觉到的单一生物，将其指定为你的标记，直到你的下个回合开始。你使用所需远程武器对你的标记进行的远程打击会额外造成 1d4 精准伤害，并使你的标记因掩护获得的 AC 环境加值降低 1。只有当你的标记位于你武器的第一距离增量内时，这些好处才会生效。你一次只能有一个标记。

随着你的特工等级提高，你瞄准的能力也会增强。在第 5、11 和 17 级时，精准伤害的骰子数量各增加一个。到 11 级时，你使你的标记因掩护获得的 AC 环境加值降低 2，而非 1。到 17 级时，你使你的标记因掩护获得的 AC 环境加值降低 4，而非 2。

Requirements You're wielding a ranged weapon that doesn't have the area trait.

You take careful aim at a single creature that you're aware of, designating it as your mark until your next turn. Your ranged Strikes against your mark using the required ranged weapon deal an additional 1d4 precision damage and reduce the circumstance bonus to AC your mark gains from cover by 1. These benefits only apply if your mark is within your weapon's first range increment. You can only have one mark at a time.

As your operative level increases, so does your ability to Aim. Increase the number of dice for the precision damage by one at 5th, 11th, and 17th levels. At 11th level, you reduce the circumstance bonus to AC your mark gains from cover by 2 rather than 1. At 17th level, you reduce the circumstance bonus to AC your mark gains from cover by 4 rather than 2.

Skirmisher.name: 散兵 Skirmisher
Skirmisher.description:
你擅长需要在拥挤或狭窄空间中行动的近距离任务，例如在建筑物或载具内部、狭窄小巷中，或繁忙的市中心街道上。无论你是劫匪、保镖、刺客，还是城市雇佣兵，你都偏好手枪，并且能在狭小空间中高效使用它们。你受训于特技。你获得一个特技的技能专长。

漏洞利用：你受过训练，能够使用手枪进行近身战斗。你使用单手远程武器进行的远程打击不会触发由远程攻击触发的反应。

强化漏洞利用：你的贴身射击格外致命。当你使用单手远程武器对相邻敌人进行一次成功的打击时，你结算伤害时，视为此次攻击中掷出结果最低的武器伤害骰获得了最大结果。17级时，掷出结果最低的两个伤害骰都改为最大结果。

You specialize in close-quarters missions that require you to operate in crowded or tight spaces, such as inside buildings or vehicles, down narrow alleys, or in busy downtown streets. Whether you're a mugger, bodyguard, assassin, or urban mercenary, you favor pistols and can use them efficiently in tight spaces. You're trained in Acrobatics. You gain a skill feat for Acrobatics.

Exploit: You're trained to fight in close combat using pistols. Your ranged Strikes with one-handed ranged weapons don't trigger reactions that are triggered by a ranged attack.

Enhanced Exploit: Your point-blank shots are particularly deadly. When you make a successful Strike against an adjacent enemy with a one-handed ranged weapon, you calculate the damage as if the lowest-rolled weapon damage die for the attack had the maximum result instead. At 17th level, the two lowest-rolled damage dice increase to the maximum result.

Steady Balance.name: 四平八稳 Steady Balance
Steady Balance.description: 即使在恶劣的条件下，你也能轻易保持平衡。每当你成功使用@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.M76ycLAqHoAgbcej]{Balance}行动时，改为大成功。你在狭窄平面和不稳地面尝试保持平衡时不会陷入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}。

Quickened Processor.name: 加速处理器 Quickened Processor
Quickened Processor.description:
你能够迅速辨认周围环境，并且可以在身处危险之中或在危险情况下驾驶载具时利用这些信息为自己取得优势。你在先攻掷骰的察觉检定上获得 +1 环境加值，在先攻掷骰的驾驶检定上获得 +2 环境加值。

You can quickly identify your surroundings, and you can use that information to your advantage while in the midst of danger or while in the process of piloting vehicles in hazardous situations. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Perception checks for initiative rolls and a +2 circumstance bonus to Piloting checks for initiative rolls.

Mobile Aim.name: 移动瞄准 Mobile Aim
Mobile Aim.description:
你几乎从不停下，而且你已经学会了即使在移动时也能稳定地命中目标。你先疾行，然后用你正持握的枪械进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{瞄准}。

You're rarely still, and you've learned to reliably hit your targets even while moving. You Stride and then @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim} with a gun you're wielding.

Comm Unit.name: 通讯单元 Comm Unit
Comm Unit.description:
个人通讯器是一种可放入口袋的设备，结合了小型便携式计算机与蜂窝通信装置，能够以音频和文本两种形式，在行星范围内与其他通讯器进行即时无线通信。个人通讯器还包括计算器、手电筒（以你为中心5英尺半径内发出明亮光照，接下来5英尺内发出微光）、可访问任何本地信息圈的浏览器，以及若干娱乐选项（包括游戏）。

集成在护甲中的个人通讯器具有一定的语音激活功能；你可以无需空闲手就以音频形式与其他通讯器通信并接收回应，但输入消息、浏览信息圈或使用应用程序仍至少需要使用一只手。

能够在更远距离运作的通讯器则没那么便携；它们内置发电机以提供所需的电力，并依赖处于激活状态的漂流信标进行通信。这类通讯器的短期使用服务可在大多数大型定居点购买。

A personal comm unit is a pocket-sized device that combines a minor portable computer and a cellular communications device, allowing instantaneous wireless communication with other comm units in both audio- and text-based formats at planetary range. A personal comm unit also includes a calculator, a flashlight (emits bright light in a 5-foot radius around you and dim light in the next 5 feet), a browser that accesses any local infospheres, and several entertainment options (including games).

Personal comm units integrated into armor have some voice-activated capabilities; you can communicate with other comm units in audio-based formats and receive responses without needing a free hand, but typing a message, browsing the infosphere, or using an app requires the use of at least one hand.

Comm units that function at longer ranges aren't as portable; they include built-in generators that provide the necessary amount of power and rely on active Drift beacons to communicate. Short-term use of these units can be purchased in most major settlements.

Force Field (Commercial).name: 力场（商用） Force Field (Commercial)
Force Field (Commercial).description:
力场会吸收伤害。力场的生命值取决于其版本。当你的力场处于激活状态时，你将要受到的任何物理或能量伤害都会先施加到力场的生命值上，然后才施加到你的生命值上（包括临时生命值）。如果你已举起护盾，你的力场和护盾都会受到伤害。如果某次攻击或效果造成的伤害使力场降至 0 生命值，你会承受任何超出的伤害，力场会解除激活，且 10 分钟内不能再次激活。力场在激活期间，每轮于你回合开始时恢复标注数量的生命值。

如果你的力场是战术型或更高版本，它还会保护你免受致命重击。每当你在力场激活时被重击命中，对照列出的 DC 进行一次平检。若成功，则改为普通命中。

该力场有 6 生命值，并在你的回合恢复 2 生命值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.7CtHz1DQcMXLafOS]{效果：力场 6}

激活—升起力场 1 (manipulate)

频率 每天三次

效果 你的力场变为激活状态。它会持续 1 分钟，或直到其生命值降至 0。

Force fields absorb damage. A force field's Hit Points are based on its version. While your force field is active, any physical or energy damage you would take is applied to the force field's Hit Points first before being applied to your Hit Points (including temporary Hit Points). If you have a shield raised, your force field and shield both take damage. If damage from an attack or effect reduces the force field to 0 Hit Points, you take any excess damage, the force field deactivates, and it can't be activated again for 10 minutes. Force fields replenish the indicated number of Hit Points each round at the beginning of your turn while they're active.

If your force field is tactical or better, it also protects you from deadly blows. Each time you're critically hit while your force field is active, attempt a flat check against the listed DC. On a success, it becomes a normal hit.

The force field has 6 Hit Points and replenishes 2 Hit Points on your turn.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.7CtHz1DQcMXLafOS]{Effect: Force Field 6}

Activate—Raise Force Field 1 (manipulate)

Frequency three times per day

Effect Your force field becomes active. It remains active for 1 minute or until it's reduced to 0 Hit Points.

Incendiary Grenade (Commercial).name: 燃烧手雷（商业级） Incendiary Grenade (Commercial)
Incendiary Grenade (Commercial).description:
激活 1 区域 火焰

重击 5英尺

这些手雷使用被点燃的化学物质爆炸，产生一阵强烈高热，并造成 1d8 点火焰伤害，需进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] 豁免检定（@Template[burst|distance:5]）。如果你拥有手雷的重击专精效果，则对燃烧手雷的豁免检定大失败的生物会被从手雷处击退。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical 5 feet

These grenades use an ignited chemical to explode in a blast of intense heat and deal 1d8 fire damage with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save (@Template[burst|distance:5]). If you have access to the critical specialization effect of grenades, creatures who critically fail their saving throw against incendiary grenades are knocked away from the grenade.

Medpatch (Commercial).name: 医疗贴片（商业） Medpatch (Commercial)
Medpatch (Commercial).description:
激活 1 (操控)

医疗贴片会加速身体的自然愈合。你恢复 @Damage[(1d6)[healing]] 点生命值，并在10分钟内对抗疾病和毒素的豁免检定获得+1物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{效果：医疗贴片}

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Medpatches accelerate the body's natural healing. You regain @Damage[(1d6)[healing]] Hit Points and gain a +1 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{Effect: Medpatch}

Second Skin.name: 着甲如肤 Second Skin
Second Skin.description:
升级： 0

这种柔软却坚韧的织物能完美贴合穿戴者的身体，在不牺牲舒适性的前提下提供基础防护。第二层皮肤通常穿在便服下面。

Upgrades: 0

Soft but resilient fabric contours perfectly to the wearer's body, offering basic protection without sacrificing comfort. Second skin is commonly worn underneath casual clothing.

Semi-Auto Pistol.name: 半自动手枪 Semi-Auto Pistol
Semi-Auto Pistol.description:
升级： 1

这把手枪会在每次射击后自动弹出用过的弹壳并装填新的弹药。

Upgrades: 1

This pistol automatically ejects used cartridges and loads new ammunition after every shot fired.

Zero Knife.name: 零匕首 Zero Knife
Zero Knife.description:
升级： 1

如同弹簧刀般展开，这把武器内部的超冷腔室会瞬间形成一片冰刃。

Upgrades: 1

Unfolding like a switchblade, a supercooled chamber within this weapon instantly forms a blade of ice.

Infiltrator's Toolkit (Commercial).name: 渗透者工具包（商业） Infiltrator's Toolkit (Commercial)
Infiltrator's Toolkit (Commercial).description:
你需要一套渗透者工具包，才能使用偷窃技能来 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{撬锁} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{解除装置}（某些类型）。

You need an infiltrator's toolkit to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick Locks} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Disable Devices} (of some types) using the Thievery skill.

Credstick.name: 信用棒 Credstick
Credstick.description:
《星际探险家》中的大多数人都会将自己的财富存放在一种称为信用棒的受保护物品中。这些装置通常较为扁平，大小大致相当于一根人类手指。它们的尺寸和品质各不相同，但归根结底，它们只是方便携带和花费金钱的一种手段。这些装置的使用方式由所有者决定，信用棒只需在合适的银行设备附近轻触一下，就能完成资金的接收或支付这样简单的操作。当需要更严格的安全措施时，它们可以要求语音或生物识别印记才能激活。一些先进信用棒甚至带有魔法组件，可能需要精神密码或诵读特定法术才能取用存储的资金。

信用棒并不是通往个人全部财富的入口，数额更大的信用点通常会安全地存放在银行、私人金库或安全数据库中。相反，信用棒是一种安全且匿名的信用点流转方式，不易被追踪。无论是冒险者还是普通公民，通常都会随身携带一根信用棒，以处理自己可能需要进行的各种购买，同时身上也只保留刚好足够的信用点，这样即便遗失信用棒，也不至于因此破产。

协约世界中的个人经常携带信用棒，而其他与协约世界往来的文明，也常会将当地资金兑换成信用点，因此也会携带信用棒来花费这些兑换后的货币。有时，一个人可能会携带数根信用棒，将每一根专门用于不同用途，或者如果他们想进行一笔预设金额的购买，也可以直接把整根棒交易出去。如果一个人身上的信用棒数量多到难以携带，也很容易在各根信用棒之间转移资金，并丢弃已经清空的信用棒以节省空间，不过信用棒始终具有可忽略的体积。

Most people in Starfinder keep their wealth on a protected item known as a credstick. These devices are often flat and roughly the size of a human finger. They range in dimensions and quality, but at the end of the day, they're just a means of conveniently carrying and spending money. Usage of these devices is determined by the owner, and a credstick can accept or spend funds with as simple an action as tapping it near a suitable banking device. When more rigorous security is necessary, they can require audio or biometric imprints in order to activate. Some advanced credsticks even have a magical component that might require a mental password or the recitation of a specific spell to access stored funds.

Credsticks aren't gateways to the entirety of one's wealth, and larger stores of credits are often kept secured in banks, personal vaults, or secure databases. Instead, a credstick is a safe and anonymous means of moving credits around without being traced. Adventurers and common citizens alike often keep a credstick on their person to handle any purchases they might be called upon to make, while also only keeping just enough credits on them that losing the credstick wouldn't result in bankruptcy.

Individuals in the Pact Worlds often carry credsticks, and other civilizations that interact with the Pact often turn local funds into credits and thus carry them to spend their converted currency. Sometimes a person might carry several credsticks, dedicating each one to a different use, or simply trading the stick away if they want to make a purchase of a predefined amount. If ever the number of credsticks on a person becomes too cumbersome, it's easy enough to move the funds between individual sticks and discard emptied sticks to save on space, however a credstick always has a negligible bulk.

Focused.name: 专注 Focused
Focused.description:
你高度专注于你的目标，并能够辨明其行动。当你在对抗你的标记的反射或意志豁免中掷出成功时，你改为获得大成功。

You're highly focused on your target and able to discern their moves. When you roll a success on a Reflex or Will save against your mark, you get a critical success instead.

Specialized Skill Set.name: 专精技能组合 Specialized Skill Set
Specialized Skill Set.description:
在3级、第7级和第15级时，你获得一个技能专长。该专长必须属于你特工专精所对应的那个受训技能。

At 3rd level, 7th level, and 15th level, you gain a skill feat. This feat must be for the trained skill from your operative's specialization.

Kill Steal.name: 抢人头 Kill Steal
Kill Steal.description:
触发条件 一名盟友在其回合结束时，曾对一个生物造成两次或更多次命中，或对一个生物造成重击。

需求 你正持握一把枪械。

你向盟友集中攻击的敌人快速射出一枪。你对触发此反应的盟友命中的生物进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{瞄准}，然后对该生物进行一次远程打击。

Trigger An ally ends their turn after hitting a creature two or more times or critically hitting a creature.

Requirements You're wielding a gun.

You fire a quick shot at a foe your ally is focusing their attacks on. You @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim} at the creature your triggering ally hit and then make a ranged Strike against that creature.

Ancestral Paragon.name: 族裔典范 Ancestral Paragon
Ancestral Paragon.description: 凭借天性、研究或魔法的帮助，你与自己族裔的关联比常人更深。你获得一个1级族裔专长。

Nightvision Adaptation.name: 夜光适应 Nightvision Adaptation
Nightvision Adaptation.description: 你的眼部处理器中的纳米机械已经适应了黑暗，增强了你在黑暗中的视力。你获得黑暗视觉。

Cat Fall.name: 猫落地 Cat Fall
Cat Fall.description: 模仿自猫的高空特技动作让你能够缓冲坠落的损伤。将坠落距离视为缩短10尺。若你在特技技能上的熟练度达到专家，将坠落距离视为缩短25尺，达到大师后，缩短50尺。若你在特技技能上的熟练度达到传奇，无论坠落距离多高，你始终能够以脚着地，不会受到任何伤害。

Hologram Skeptic.name: 全息影像怀疑论者 Hologram Skeptic
Hologram Skeptic.description:
你很容易发现全息影像中的细微故障与瑕疵。即使你没有在进行Search，你也总会尝试进行一次检定，以识破那些通常需要你对其进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search}或与之互动的、具有幻觉和科技特征的全息影像及效果。

You easily spot the tiny glitches and imperfections in holograms. Even if you aren't Searching, you always attempt a check to disbelieve holograms and effects with the illusion and tech traits that normally require you to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search} or Interact with them.

Master Gunner.name: 炮术长 Master Gunner
Master Gunner.description:
你是一名技艺高超的神枪手，无论去哪里都不会离开你的枪。你使用简易枪械和军用枪械的熟练等级提升为大师，使用先进枪械的熟练等级提升为专家。你获得所有你具有专家熟练的武器的重击专精效果。

You are a highly skilled sharpshooter and never go anywhere without your gun. Your proficiency rank increases to master with simple and martial guns, and increases to expert with advanced guns. You gain access to the critical specialization effect for all weapons for which you have expert proficiency.

Urban Operator.name: 都市行动专家 Urban Operator
Urban Operator.description:
你已习惯城市环境，能够在拥挤的城市景观中迅速移动。在城市环境中，你无视困难地形，而城市环境造成的高等困难地形对你而言仅视为困难地形。

You are accustomed to urban environments and can move swiftly through a crowded cityscape. You ignore difficult terrain in urban environments, and greater difficult terrain from urban environments is only difficult terrain for you.

Advanced Targeting System.name: 先进定位系统 Advanced Targeting System
Advanced Targeting System.description: 你的眼部处理器配备了先进的瞄准系统，可以让你更容易地定位你的敌人并读取他们的动作。你可以施展@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Gb7SeieEvd0pL2Eh]{料敌机先 Sure Strike}作为你的奥术内在法术，每日一次。

Switch Target.name: 切换目标 Switch Target
Switch Target.description:
触发条件 你当前已通过 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{瞄准} 锁定的生物获得了 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{濒死} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{昏迷} 状态。

需求 你正持握一把枪。

当你的目标倒下时，你会立刻锁定下一个目标。你对另一个生物进行瞄准。

Trigger The creature you've currently @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aimed} at gains the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} condition.

Requirements You're wielding a gun.

As your target falls, you immediately home in on the next. You Aim at a different creature.

Phishing Expertise.name: 网络钓鱼专精 Phishing Expertise
Phishing Expertise.description:
你擅长实施数字诈骗。你可以使用 [[/act create-forgery skill=computers]]{计算机} 而非社群 来伪造文件。数字伪造会与你的计算机 DC 进行比较。利用成功伪造获得的信息通常还需要额外的检定，包括欺瞒和社群，而撒网过广则有可能让潜在受害者识破你的诡计，并把你举报给当局。

You're skilled at running digital fraud schemes. You can Create a Forgery using [[/act create-forgery skill=computers]]{Computers} instead of Society. Digital forgeries are compared against your Computers DC. Using information gained from a successful forgery usually requires additional checks, including Deception and Society, and casting too wide a net runs the risk of a potential victim figuring out your ruse and turning you in to the authorities.

Android.name: 仿生人 Android
Android.description:
安卓体最早作为合成生命体出现，由银河中许多技术先进的文明所创造。第一批安卓体是由类人生物依照自身形象制造出来的，但在赋予这些活体构装体生命的技术传播开来后，安卓体开始展现出惊人的形态多样性。协约世界中的安卓体最初被设计为仆役，但如今，安卓体和其他机器人生命在《协约》之下，已与有机裔族平起平坐。一些安卓体建立了属于自己的独立社群，而大多数则无缝融入协约世界的社会之中。与许多其他科技构装体不同，安卓体并不只是精密的合成器官和复杂的程序；每个安卓体都拥有属于自己的灵魂。

Androids first emerged as synthetic beings crafted by many technologically advanced civilizations throughout the galaxy. The first androids were created by humanoid peoples in their own images, but after the technology that animated the living constructs spread, androids began displaying a fantastic diversity of forms. Androids in the Pact Worlds were originally designed as servants, but today androids and other robotic beings stand as equals to organic ancestries under the Pact. Some androids have formed their own independent communities, while most integrate seamlessly into Pact Worlds societies. Unlike many other technological constructs, androids are more than intricate synthetic organs and complex programming, and each possesses their own soul.

Constructed.name: 被创造者 Constructed
Constructed.description: 你的人造身体比单纯的生物机体更能抵抗疾病。你对疾病、毒素和辐射的豁免检定获得+1环境加值。

Mod Fanatic Android.name: 改装狂热安卓体 Mod Fanatic Android
Mod Fanatic Android.description:
你或你先前的迭代体已经改造了你的身体，使其能够兼容护甲升级，从而让你可以亲自定制自己的身体及其能力。你的身体拥有1个护甲升级槽位，你可以用它来内嵌护甲升级，并且它不计入你的护甲可安装升级总数。你可以使用“安装升级”活动，将护甲升级安装到你的个人升级槽位中或从中拆卸。选择一个物品等级为1级或以下的普通护甲升级。你开始游戏时，该护甲升级已经内嵌在你的升级槽位中（你无需支付信用点来购买这项初始升级）。

You or your previous iterations have modified your body to be compatible with armor upgrades, enabling you to personally customize your body and its capabilities. Your body has one armor upgrade slot that you can use to install armor upgrades and that doesn't count toward your armor's total number of upgrades. You can install and uninstall armor upgrades into your personal upgrade slot using the Install Upgrade activity. Choose one common armor upgrade with an item level of 1 or less. You begin with this armor upgrade already installed in your upgrade slot (you don't need to pay the credits to purchase this starting upgrade).

Hacker.name: 黑客 Hacker
Hacker.description:
你一直对计算机和虚拟空间很有天赋，并为自己学习技术秘密的能力感到自豪。被称为信息圈的开放网络是你的家，也是你能发挥出最佳水平的地方。说到破解代码或访问安全数据，你非常在行。

选择两项属性增强。其中一项必须增强敏捷或智力，另一项为自由属性增强。

你受训于计算机技能和信息圈学识技能。你获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.ifQiKhl0Gt2CM7i9]{Phreaker}技能专长。

You've always had a knack for computers and virtual spaces and pride yourself on your ability to learn technical secrets. The open networks known as infospheres are your home and the place you can do your best work. You're highly competent when it comes to cracking code or accessing secure data.

Choose two attribute boosts. One must be to Dexterity or Intelligence, and one is a free attribute boost.

You're trained in the Computers skill and the Infosphere Lore skill. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.ifQiKhl0Gt2CM7i9]{Phreaker} skill feat.

Phreaker.name: 飞客 Phreaker
Phreaker.description:
你学会了如何使用替代方法进行黑客入侵。你可以使用任何计算机、通讯装置或终端，而不是黑客工具包，来用计算机停用装置或入侵系统。如果你的计算机熟练度达到专家，且你所使用的装备至少为3级，你在停用装置或入侵时获得+1物品加值。

特殊 如果你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.abcKcLvAGE5AKig4]{战斗入侵} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.0ZNErs9RICfOw1Nf]{数字佯攻} 技能专长，你可以使用此专长在没有黑客工具包的情况下进行战斗入侵或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{进行佯攻}。

You've learned how to hack using alternative methods. You can use Computers to Disable a Device or Hack a system using any computer, comm unit, or terminal instead of a hacking toolkit. If you're an expert in Computers and the equipment you use is at least 3rd level, you gain a +1 item bonus to Disable a Device or Hack.

Special If you have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.abcKcLvAGE5AKig4]{Combat Hack} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.0ZNErs9RICfOw1Nf]{Digital Diversion} skill feat, you can use this feat to Combat Hack or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{Create a Diversion} without a hacking toolkit.

Operative.name: 特工 Operative
Operative.description:
你是一名专注、机敏的专业人士，能在高风险战斗中如鱼得水。你致命的瞄准能力和战术训练让你比竞争对手更胜一筹——对你而言，即使是最强大的敌人也不过是另一个要除掉的目标。你在自己所选择的专精领域中展现出令人印象深刻的精湛本领。

You're a focused, quick-witted professional who thrives in high-stakes combat. Your deadly aim and tactical training give you an edge over the competition—for you, even the most powerful enemy is just another mark to take out. You have impressive prowess in your chosen field of specialization.

Sharpshooter.name: 神射手 Sharpshooter
Sharpshooter.description:
你可以看出目标的弱点，使你能用大多数类型的远程武器造成额外的精确伤害。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{瞄准} 动作。

You can spot a target's weak points, letting you deal additional precision damage with most types of ranged weapons. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim} action.

Operative's Specialization.name: 特工的专精 Operative's Specialization
Operative's Specialization.description:
作为一名特工，你会根据自己的战术风格掌握一套特定的技能。这些不同的专精有助于塑造你的角色，并定义你在大多数情况下所采取的应对方式。选择一个特工专精。该专精会让你在一项技能上获得受训，获得该技能的一个技能专长，以及一个漏洞利用。到9级时，你会获得由该专精授予的强化漏洞利用。本书中提供的专精如下。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.1bgDbGzALewzo7cy]{幽灵}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.u4hB3FGFJwGtjrZB]{渗透者}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.HSKJ1VkPdlMkcqzc]{散兵}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.OCWsQQ95P7ecp7Rn]{狙击手}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.EpxKCi6G0KnWQhHP]{打击者}

As an operative, you have a particular set of skills based on your tactical style. These different specializations help define your character and the approach you take to most situations. Choose an operative's specialization. This specialization grants you training in one skill, a skill feat for that skill, and an exploit. At 9th level, you gain the enhanced exploit granted by your specialization. The specializations presented in this book are as follows.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.1bgDbGzALewzo7cy]{Ghost}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.u4hB3FGFJwGtjrZB]{Infiltrator}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.HSKJ1VkPdlMkcqzc]{Skirmisher}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.OCWsQQ95P7ecp7Rn]{Sniper}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.EpxKCi6G0KnWQhHP]{Striker}

Aim.name: 瞄准 Aim
Aim.description:
需求 你正持用一把不具有区域（特征）的远程武器。

你谨慎瞄准一个你已察觉到的单一生物，将其指定为你的标记，直到你的下个回合开始。你使用所需远程武器对你的标记进行的远程打击造成额外 1d4 精准伤害，并使你的标记因掩护获得的 AC 环境加值减少 1。这些收益仅在你的标记位于你武器的第一距离增量内时适用。你同一时间只能拥有一个标记。

随着你的特工等级提升，你瞄准的能力也会增强。在第 5、11 和 17 级时，精准伤害的骰子数量各增加 1 个。到 11 级时，你使你的标记因掩护获得的 AC 环境加值减少 2，而非 1。到 17 级时，你使你的标记因掩护获得的 AC 环境加值减少 4，而非 2。

Requirements You're wielding a ranged weapon that doesn't have the area trait.

You take careful aim at a single creature that you're aware of, designating it as your mark until your next turn. Your ranged Strikes against your mark using the required ranged weapon deal an additional 1d4 precision damage and reduce the circumstance bonus to AC your mark gains from cover by 1. These benefits only apply if your mark is within your weapon's first range increment. You can only have one mark at a time.

As your operative level increases, so does your ability to Aim. Increase the number of dice for the precision damage by one at 5th, 11th, and 17th levels. At 11th level, you reduce the circumstance bonus to AC your mark gains from cover by 2 rather than 1. At 17th level, you reduce the circumstance bonus to AC your mark gains from cover by 4 rather than 2.

Skirmisher.name: 游击兵 Skirmisher
Skirmisher.description:
你擅长需要在拥挤或狭窄空间中行动的近距离任务，例如在建筑物或载具内部、狭窄的小巷中，或繁忙的市中心街道上。无论你是劫匪、保镖、刺客还是城市雇佣兵，你都偏好手枪，并且能在狭小空间中高效使用它们。你受训于特技。你获得一个特技的技能专长。

漏洞利用：你受过训练，能够使用手枪进行近身战斗。你使用单手远程武器进行的远程打击不会触发由远程攻击触发的反应。

强化漏洞利用：你的近距离射击尤其致命。当你使用单手远程武器对相邻敌人进行一次成功的打击时，你计算伤害时，视为此次攻击所掷出的武器伤害骰中结果最低的那个伤害骰掷出了最大结果。达到17级时，结果最低的两个伤害骰都改为最大结果。

You specialize in close-quarters missions that require you to operate in crowded or tight spaces, such as inside buildings or vehicles, down narrow alleys, or in busy downtown streets. Whether you're a mugger, bodyguard, assassin, or urban mercenary, you favor pistols and can use them efficiently in tight spaces. You're trained in Acrobatics. You gain a skill feat for Acrobatics.

Exploit: You're trained to fight in close combat using pistols. Your ranged Strikes with one-handed ranged weapons don't trigger reactions that are triggered by a ranged attack.

Enhanced Exploit: Your point-blank shots are particularly deadly. When you make a successful Strike against an adjacent enemy with a one-handed ranged weapon, you calculate the damage as if the lowest-rolled weapon damage die for the attack had the maximum result instead. At 17th level, the two lowest-rolled damage dice increase to the maximum result.

Steady Balance.name: 四平八稳 Steady Balance
Steady Balance.description: 即使在恶劣的条件下，你也能轻易保持平衡。每当你成功使用@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.M76ycLAqHoAgbcej]{Balance}行动时，改为大成功。你在狭窄平面和不稳地面尝试保持平衡时不会陷入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}。

Quickened Processor.name: 加速处理器 Quickened Processor
Quickened Processor.description:
你能迅速辨认周围环境，并且在身处危险之中或在危险情境下驾驶载具时，利用这些信息为自己取得优势。你在先攻掷骰的察觉检定上获得+1处境加值，并在先攻掷骰的驾驶检定上获得+2处境加值。

You can quickly identify your surroundings, and you can use that information to your advantage while in the midst of danger or while in the process of piloting vehicles in hazardous situations. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Perception checks for initiative rolls and a +2 circumstance bonus to Piloting checks for initiative rolls.

Mobile Aim.name: 移动瞄准 Mobile Aim
Mobile Aim.description:
你几乎从不停下，而且你已经学会了即使在移动时也能稳定命中目标。你先疾行，然后用你正持握的一把枪进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{瞄准}。

You're rarely still, and you've learned to reliably hit your targets even while moving. You Stride and then @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim} with a gun you're wielding.

Comm Unit.name: 通讯装置 Comm Unit
Comm Unit.description:
个人通信器是一种口袋大小的设备，结合了小型便携计算机和蜂窝通信装置，使其能够在行星范围内以音频和文本两种形式与其他通信器进行即时无线通信。个人通信器还包含计算器、手电筒（以你为中心5英尺半径内发出明亮光照，并在接下来的5英尺内发出微光）、可访问任何本地信息圈的浏览器，以及若干娱乐选项（包括游戏）。

整合进护甲中的个人通信器具有一定的语音激活功能；你可以在不需要空闲手的情况下，以音频形式与其他通信器通信并接收回应，但输入消息、浏览信息圈或使用应用程序仍需要至少一只手。

可在更远距离运作的通信器便携性没那么强；它们包含内置发电机，以提供所需的电力，并依靠活跃的漂流信标进行通信。在大多数主要聚居地，都可以购买这些通信器的短期使用服务。

A personal comm unit is a pocket-sized device that combines a minor portable computer and a cellular communications device, allowing instantaneous wireless communication with other comm units in both audio- and text-based formats at planetary range. A personal comm unit also includes a calculator, a flashlight (emits bright light in a 5-foot radius around you and dim light in the next 5 feet), a browser that accesses any local infospheres, and several entertainment options (including games).

Personal comm units integrated into armor have some voice-activated capabilities; you can communicate with other comm units in audio-based formats and receive responses without needing a free hand, but typing a message, browsing the infosphere, or using an app requires the use of at least one hand.

Comm units that function at longer ranges aren't as portable; they include built-in generators that provide the necessary amount of power and rely on active Drift beacons to communicate. Short-term use of these units can be purchased in most major settlements.

Force Field (Commercial).name: 力场（商业） Force Field (Commercial)
Force Field (Commercial).description:
力场会吸收伤害。力场的生命值取决于其型号。当你的力场处于激活状态时，你将要受到的任何物理或能量伤害都会先应用于力场的生命值，然后才应用于你的生命值（包括临时生命值）。如果你已举起护盾，则你的力场和护盾都会受到伤害。如果一次攻击或效果造成的伤害将力场降至 0 生命值，你会承受任何超出的伤害，力场会解除激活，且在 10 分钟内不能再次激活。力场在处于激活状态时，每轮于你回合开始时恢复标示数量的生命值。

如果你的力场为战术型或更高等级，它还会保护你免受致命重击。每次你在力场处于激活状态时受到重击，都要针对所列 DC 进行一次平检。若成功，则改为普通命中。

该力场有 6 点生命值，并在你的回合恢复 2 点生命值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.7CtHz1DQcMXLafOS]{效果：力场 6}

激活—升起力场 1 (manipulate)

频率 每天三次

效果 你的力场变为激活状态。它会保持激活 1 分钟，或直到其生命值降至 0。

Force fields absorb damage. A force field's Hit Points are based on its version. While your force field is active, any physical or energy damage you would take is applied to the force field's Hit Points first before being applied to your Hit Points (including temporary Hit Points). If you have a shield raised, your force field and shield both take damage. If damage from an attack or effect reduces the force field to 0 Hit Points, you take any excess damage, the force field deactivates, and it can't be activated again for 10 minutes. Force fields replenish the indicated number of Hit Points each round at the beginning of your turn while they're active.

If your force field is tactical or better, it also protects you from deadly blows. Each time you're critically hit while your force field is active, attempt a flat check against the listed DC. On a success, it becomes a normal hit.

The force field has 6 Hit Points and replenishes 2 Hit Points on your turn.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.7CtHz1DQcMXLafOS]{Effect: Force Field 6}

Activate—Raise Force Field 1 (manipulate)

Frequency three times per day

Effect Your force field becomes active. It remains active for 1 minute or until it's reduced to 0 Hit Points.

Incendiary Grenade (Commercial).name: 燃烧手雷（商用） Incendiary Grenade (Commercial)
Incendiary Grenade (Commercial).description:
激活 1 区域射击

严重 5 尺

这些手雷利用被点燃的化学物质爆炸，产生一阵强烈高热，并造成 1d8 点火焰伤害，可进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] 豁免检定（@Template[burst|distance:5]）。如果你能使用手雷的重击专精效果，则对燃烧手雷的豁免检定大失败的生物会被从手雷处击飞。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical 5 feet

These grenades use an ignited chemical to explode in a blast of intense heat and deal 1d8 fire damage with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save (@Template[burst|distance:5]). If you have access to the critical specialization effect of grenades, creatures who critically fail their saving throw against incendiary grenades are knocked away from the grenade.

Medpatch (Commercial).name: 医疗贴片（商用） Medpatch (Commercial)
Medpatch (Commercial).description:
激活 1 (manipulate)

医疗贴片会加速身体的自然愈合。你恢复 @Damage[(1d6)[healing]] 点生命值，并在 10 分钟内对抗疾病和毒素的豁免检定获得 +1 物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{效果：医疗贴片}

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Medpatches accelerate the body's natural healing. You regain @Damage[(1d6)[healing]] Hit Points and gain a +1 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{Effect: Medpatch}

Second Skin.name: 着甲如肤 Second Skin
Second Skin.description:
升级： 0

这种柔软却坚韧的织物能完美贴合穿戴者的身体，在不牺牲舒适性的前提下提供基础防护。次级贴身护甲通常穿在便服下面。

Upgrades: 0

Soft but resilient fabric contours perfectly to the wearer's body, offering basic protection without sacrificing comfort. Second skin is commonly worn underneath casual clothing.

Semi-Auto Pistol.name: 半自动手枪 Semi-Auto Pistol
Semi-Auto Pistol.description:
升级： 1

这把手枪会在每次射击后自动弹出用过的弹壳，并装填新的弹药。

Upgrades: 1

This pistol automatically ejects used cartridges and loads new ammunition after every shot fired.

Zero Knife.name: 零刃 Zero Knife
Zero Knife.description:
升级： 1

如同一把弹簧刀般展开，这把武器内部的超冷腔室会瞬间形成一把冰刃。

Upgrades: 1

Unfolding like a switchblade, a supercooled chamber within this weapon instantly forms a blade of ice.

Infiltrator's Toolkit (Commercial).name: 渗透者工具包（商用） Infiltrator's Toolkit (Commercial)
Infiltrator's Toolkit (Commercial).description:
你需要一套渗透者工具包，才能使用“偷窃”技能进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{撬锁} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{解除装置}（某些类型）。

You need an infiltrator's toolkit to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick Locks} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Disable Devices} (of some types) using the Thievery skill.

Credstick.name: 信用棒 Credstick
Credstick.description:
《星际探索者》中的大多数人都会将自己的财富存放在一种受保护的物品上，这种物品被称为信用棒。此类装置通常较为扁平，大小大致相当于一根人类手指。它们的尺寸和品质各不相同，但归根结底，它们只是一种方便携带和花费金钱的工具。这些装置的使用方式由持有者决定，而信用棒只需在合适的银行设备附近轻触一下，就能完成资金存入或支付这样简单的操作。在需要更严格安保的情况下，它们可以要求语音或生物特征印记才能激活。有些先进信用棒甚至还带有魔法部件，可能需要输入精神密码或念诵特定法术，才能取用其中存储的资金。

信用棒并不是通向个人全部财富的入口，数额更大的信用点通常会安全存放在银行、私人金库或安全数据库中。相反，信用棒是一种能够在不被追踪的情况下转移信用点的安全且匿名的手段。无论是冒险者还是普通公民，往往都会随身携带一根信用棒，以处理自己可能需要进行的各种购买，同时身上也只保留恰好足够的信用点，这样即使遗失了信用棒，也不至于因此破产。

协约世界中的个人常常携带信用棒，而其他与协约世界有往来的文明，也常会将本地资金兑换为信用点，因此同样会携带信用棒来花用这些兑换后的货币。有时，一个人可能会携带数根信用棒，将每一根专门用于不同用途；或者如果他们想进行一笔预设金额的购买，也可以干脆直接把整根信用棒转交出去。若一个人身上的信用棒数量多到累赘，便可以轻松地在各根信用棒之间转移资金，并丢弃已经清空的信用棒以节省空间，不过信用棒始终具有可忽略的体积。

Most people in Starfinder keep their wealth on a protected item known as a credstick. These devices are often flat and roughly the size of a human finger. They range in dimensions and quality, but at the end of the day, they're just a means of conveniently carrying and spending money. Usage of these devices is determined by the owner, and a credstick can accept or spend funds with as simple an action as tapping it near a suitable banking device. When more rigorous security is necessary, they can require audio or biometric imprints in order to activate. Some advanced credsticks even have a magical component that might require a mental password or the recitation of a specific spell to access stored funds.

Credsticks aren't gateways to the entirety of one's wealth, and larger stores of credits are often kept secured in banks, personal vaults, or secure databases. Instead, a credstick is a safe and anonymous means of moving credits around without being traced. Adventurers and common citizens alike often keep a credstick on their person to handle any purchases they might be called upon to make, while also only keeping just enough credits on them that losing the credstick wouldn't result in bankruptcy.

Individuals in the Pact Worlds often carry credsticks, and other civilizations that interact with the Pact often turn local funds into credits and thus carry them to spend their converted currency. Sometimes a person might carry several credsticks, dedicating each one to a different use, or simply trading the stick away if they want to make a purchase of a predefined amount. If ever the number of credsticks on a person becomes too cumbersome, it's easy enough to move the funds between individual sticks and discard emptied sticks to save on space, however a credstick always has a negligible bulk.

Focused.name: 专注 Focused
Focused.description:
你高度专注于你的目标，并能够辨明其行动。当你对你的猎物进行反射或意志豁免检定且结果为成功时，你改为获得大成功。

You're highly focused on your target and able to discern their moves. When you roll a success on a Reflex or Will save against your mark, you get a critical success instead.

Specialized Skill Set.name: 专门化技能组合 Specialized Skill Set
Specialized Skill Set.description:
在3级、7级和15级时，你获得一个技能专长。该专长必须属于你特工专精所对应的受训技能。

At 3rd level, 7th level, and 15th level, you gain a skill feat. This feat must be for the trained skill from your operative's specialization.

Kill Steal.name: 抢人头 Kill Steal
Kill Steal.description:
触发条件 一名盟友在其回合结束时，已命中一个生物两次或更多次，或对一个生物造成了重击。

需求 你正持用一把枪械。

你对盟友正集中攻击的敌人快速开火。你对触发此反应的盟友所命中的生物执行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{瞄准}，然后对该生物进行一次远程打击。

Trigger An ally ends their turn after hitting a creature two or more times or critically hitting a creature.

Requirements You're wielding a gun.

You fire a quick shot at a foe your ally is focusing their attacks on. You @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim} at the creature your triggering ally hit and then make a ranged Strike against that creature.

Ancestral Paragon.name: 族裔典范 Ancestral Paragon
Ancestral Paragon.description: 凭借天性、研究或魔法的帮助，你与自己族裔的关联比常人更深。你获得一个1级族裔专长。

Nightvision Adaptation.name: 夜光适应 Nightvision Adaptation
Nightvision Adaptation.description: 你的眼部处理器中的纳米机械已经适应了黑暗，增强了你在黑暗中的视力。你获得黑暗视觉。

Cat Fall.name: 猫落 Cat Fall
Cat Fall.description: 模仿自猫的高空特技动作让你能够缓冲坠落的损伤。将坠落距离视为缩短10尺。若你在特技技能上的熟练度达到专家，将坠落距离视为缩短25尺，达到大师后，缩短50尺。若你在特技技能上的熟练度达到传奇，无论坠落距离多高，你始终能够以脚着地，不会受到任何伤害。

Hologram Skeptic.name: 全息影像怀疑论者 Hologram Skeptic
Hologram Skeptic.description:
你很容易察觉全息影像中的细微故障与瑕疵。即使你没有进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{搜索}，你也总是会尝试进行检定，以识破全息影像，以及通常需要你对其进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{搜索}或与之互动的、具有幻觉和科技特征的效果。

You easily spot the tiny glitches and imperfections in holograms. Even if you aren't Searching, you always attempt a check to disbelieve holograms and effects with the illusion and tech traits that normally require you to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search} or Interact with them.

Vesk.name: 维斯克蜥人 Vesk
Vesk.description:
维斯克蜥人是一个好战的类爬行种族；他们在发展出太空航行技术后不久，便征服了其恒星系中的八颗行星，建立了维斯卡里姆帝国。维斯克蜥人往往崇尚冲突，并尊重力量与军事武力。

Vesk are a warmongering, reptilian people who conquered the eight worlds in their solar system shortly after they developed spaceflight, forming the Veskarium empire. Vesk tend to embrace conflict and respect strength and military might.

Briskwander Vesk.name: 疾行漂泊者维斯克蜥人 Briskwander Vesk
Briskwander Vesk.description:
你出身于一个不断迁徙的维斯克蜥人家族。你的速度增加 5 尺。

You come from a line of vesk who were constantly on the move. Your Speed increases by 5 feet.

Trooper.name: 士兵 Trooper
Trooper.description:
你曾应征加入军队，或被准军事组织招募，成为一名职业士兵。只要你有足够的枪械，并有合适的小队为你提供支援，你几乎能应对任何情况。

选择两项属性增强。其中一项必须加给力量或体质，另一项为自由属性增强。

你受训于运动技能和战争学识技能。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.9S5mBcJujWOYCE6j]{Barricade} 专长。

You enlisted in a military or were recruited by a paramilitary group as a career trooper. As long as you've got enough guns and the right squad to back you up, you can handle just about anything.

Choose two attribute boosts. One must be to Strength or Constitution, and one is a free attribute boost.

You're trained in the Athletics skill and the Warfare Lore skill. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.9S5mBcJujWOYCE6j]{Barricade} feat.

Barricade.name: 路障 Barricade
Barricade.description:
你匆忙利用附近的物品、废料或碎片搭起一道路障。该路障为你和另一名盟友提供次级掩护，不过你可以 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Take Cover} 来将这一增益提高为标准掩护。该路障很脆弱，并会在你下个回合结束时散架。

You hastily create a barricade using nearby items, junk, or debris. The barricade provides lesser cover for you and one other ally, though you can @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Take Cover} to increase this benefit to standard cover. The barricade is flimsy and falls apart at the end of your next turn.

Soldier.name: 士兵 Soldier
Soldier.description:
你是范围武器、重甲以及承受伤害方面的大师。你在激战最前线作战，对敌人倾泻毁灭性的齐射，同时承受对方猛烈的火力回击。通过用强力武器倾泻一阵压制火力，你为盟友创造条件，使他们能够履行各自的职责，同时促使敌人将注意力集中到你身上。

You're a master of area weapons, heavy armor, and soaking damage. You fight in the thick of the battle and unleash devastating salvos against your foes as you take withering fire in return. By laying down a barrage of suppressing fire with powerful weapons, you set your allies up to fulfill their respective roles while encouraging enemies to focus on you.

Soldier Fighting Style.name: 士兵战斗风格 Soldier Fighting Style
Soldier Fighting Style.description:
作为一名士兵，你会训练使用特定的战斗风格。你的风格决定了你如何进行战斗，并且常常会改变你如何利用自己压制目标的能力。选择一种士兵战斗风格。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.ajzZpzc8uMtgU6N8]{动作英雄}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.T78VQC8oaD1Odz1k]{装甲风暴}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.VDEYb7aAwAjBp8Av]{轰炸}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.5mOTKBsn8OsEvFaA]{近距离作战}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.FSAqTE67445EvyX8]{博学战士}

As a soldier, you train using a specific style of fighting. Your style determines how you approach combat and often changes how you take advantage of your ability to suppress targets. Choose a soldier fighting style.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.ajzZpzc8uMtgU6N8]{Action Hero}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.T78VQC8oaD1Odz1k]{Armor Storm}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.VDEYb7aAwAjBp8Av]{Bombard}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.5mOTKBsn8OsEvFaA]{Close Quarters}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.FSAqTE67445EvyX8]{Erudite Warrior}

Bombard.name: 轰炸 Bombard
Bombard.description:
没有什么比一把大枪（或者好几把）更能帮你熬过艰难时刻了。你已经接受了这样一个事实：你那些齐射中的流弹有时可能会击中盟友，但你会尽量减少这类“友军误伤”的情况。你受过训练，能够在进行齐射时避免伤害盟友，并学会了熟练地调整你的攻击位置以避开他们。

当你使用区域武器进行攻击时，你可以选择区域内数量等于你体质调整值一半的盟友。被选中的盟友不受该次攻击影响。此外，对你造成的区域攻击进行豁免时成功（但非大成功）的敌人，直到你下个回合开始前仍处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{受压制}状态。

There's nothing like a big gun (or maybe several) to get you through tough times. You've come to terms with the fact that a stray bullet from one of your barrages might sometimes hit an ally, but you try to minimize such instances of "friendly fire." You've trained to avoid harming allies with your barrages and learned to expertly position your attacks around them.

When you attack with an area weapon, you can select a number of allies within the area equal to half your Constitution modifier. The selected allies are unaffected by the attack. In addition, enemies who succeed (but not critically succeed) on their save against an area attack you make are still @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} until the start of your next turn.

Walking Armory.name: 步行军械库 Walking Armory
Walking Armory.description:
你的耐力训练使你能够携带大量重型装备。在判定你穿戴护甲时所使用的力量时，你可以改为选择使用你的体质调整值。如果你已经满足所穿护甲的力量要求，则将该护甲的体积值减少 1（最低为 1）。

此外，你在变为负重前可携带的体积值提高你的体质调整值的一半（向上取整）。你的最大可携带体积值提高等同于你的体质调整值。

Your endurance training empowers you to carry a load of heavy equipment. When determining your Strength for using armor, you can instead choose to use your Constitution modifier. If you already meet the Strength requirement for the armor you're wearing, reduce that armor's Bulk by 1 (to a minimum of 1).

In addition, increase the amount of Bulk you can carry before becoming encumbered by half your Constitution modifier rounded up. Increase your maximum carried Bulk by your Constitution modifier.

Suppressing Fire.name: 压制射击 Suppressing Fire
Suppressing Fire.description:
你擅长运用强力武器骚扰敌人并妨碍他们的移动，阻止他们发挥出最佳状态。当你进行一次具有区域（特征）的攻击时（例如 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oc0ZKnk5zD0GXqZi]{Area Fire} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6ctkxUnVwqooSvgg]{Auto-Fire}），你会以一种压制目标的方式来使用它。受影响区域内未能通过对抗你此次攻击豁免的敌人，会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{受压制}，直到你下个回合开始。受压制的目标在攻击检定上承受 –1 处境减值，且其速度承受 –10 尺状态减值。某些士兵能力和职业专长还会与受压制状态进一步互动。

You have a knack for using powerful weapons to harry your foes and hinder their movement, preventing them from operating at their peak. When you make an attack with the area trait (such as @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oc0ZKnk5zD0GXqZi]{Area Fire} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6ctkxUnVwqooSvgg]{Auto-Fire}), you use it in a manner that suppresses your targets. Enemies in the affected area who fail their save against your attack become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} until the start of your next turn. A suppressed target takes a –1 circumstance penalty on attack rolls and takes a –10-foot status penalty to its Speeds. Some soldier abilities and class feats interact further with the suppressed condition.

Primary Target.name: 主要目标 Primary Target
Primary Target.description:
当你释放强力区域武器的全部毁灭性威力时，你可以将火力集中于单一目标。在你使用武器进行一次区域攻击之前（例如通过Area Fire或Auto-Fire动作），你可以用同一把武器对该区域内的一个生物进行一次远程打击，作为一个自由动作，该生物被选为你的主要目标。若你的攻击是爆发，你必须选择距离攻击中心最近的生物。若你的攻击是锥形或线形，你必须选择距离你最近的生物。若有两个或更多生物距离相同，你可以选择其中哪一个作为你的主要目标。若命中，当你的主要目标针对你的Area Fire或Auto-Fire动作掷出成功时，其结果改为失败。此次打击不计入你的多重攻击减值。

You can focus fire on a single target when unleashing the full devastation of your powerful area weaponry. Before you make an area attack with a weapon (such as from the Area Fire or Auto-Fire actions), you can make a ranged Strike as a free action with the same weapon against a single creature in the area, who's selected as your primary target. If your attack is a burst, you must select the creature closest to the center of the attack. If your attack is a cone or line, you must select the creature closest to you. If two or more creatures are equidistant, you can choose which one is your primary target. On a hit, if your primary target rolls a success against your Area Fire or Auto-Fire action, they get a failure instead. This Strike doesn't count toward your multiple attack penalty.

Fearless.name: 无畏 Fearless
Fearless.description:
无论这是出于责任感还是出于想要成功的渴望，当面对可怕的敌人时，你都很少会退缩。如果你在对抗恐惧效果的豁免检定中掷出成功，则你改为获得暴击成功。

Whether it comes from a sense of duty or a desire to succeed, you rarely flinch when confronted by fearsome foes. If you roll a success on a saving throw against a fear effect, you get a critical success instead.

Quick Swap.name: 快速切换 Quick Swap
Quick Swap.description:
触发条件 你正持握一把双手武器，且一个敌方生物移动至与你相邻的位置。

你可以在紧张局势中切换武器，以便迅速做好准备惩罚逼近的敌人。你收起当前武器并抽出另一把双手武器。若你有多组手臂，则你也可以改为切换持握手。

Trigger You're wielding a two-handed weapon, and an enemy creature moves adjacent to you.

You can switch weapons in stressful situations so that you quickly set yourself up to punish incoming foes. You stow your current weapon and draw another two-handed weapon. If you have multiple sets of arms, you can instead Switch Hands.

Comm Unit.name: 通信装置 Comm Unit
Comm Unit.description:
个人通讯器是一种口袋大小的设备，结合了小型便携式计算机与蜂窝通信设备，可让你以音频和文本两种格式，在行星范围内与其他通讯器进行即时无线通信。个人通讯器还包含计算器、手电筒（以你为中心 5 英尺半径内发出明亮光照，并在接下来的 5 英尺内发出微光）、可访问任意本地信息圈的浏览器，以及多种娱乐功能（包括游戏）。

集成在护甲中的个人通讯器具有一定的语音激活功能；你可以在无需空闲手的情况下，以音频格式与其他通讯器通信并接收回复，但输入消息、浏览信息圈或使用应用程序仍至少需要使用一只手。

可在更远距离运作的通讯器则没有那么便携；它们内置发电机以提供所需电力，并依赖处于激活状态的漂流信标进行通信。在大多数主要聚居地，都可以付费短期使用这类通讯器。

A personal comm unit is a pocket-sized device that combines a minor portable computer and a cellular communications device, allowing instantaneous wireless communication with other comm units in both audio- and text-based formats at planetary range. A personal comm unit also includes a calculator, a flashlight (emits bright light in a 5-foot radius around you and dim light in the next 5 feet), a browser that accesses any local infospheres, and several entertainment options (including games).
