Personal comm units integrated into armor have some voice-activated capabilities; you can communicate with other comm units in audio-based formats and receive responses without needing a free hand, but typing a message, browsing the infosphere, or using an app requires the use of at least one hand.

Comm units that function at longer ranges aren't as portable; they include built-in generators that provide the necessary amount of power and rely on active Drift beacons to communicate. Short-term use of these units can be purchased in most major settlements.

Doshko.name: 多什科 Doshko
Doshko.description:
升级： 1

这是维斯卡里姆的传统武器，这种动力长柄战斧带有一到三片三角形斧刃，锻造出来既可用于大开大合的过顶挥砍，也可用于战术性招架。

Upgrades: 1

The traditional weapon of the Veskarium, this powered poleaxe features one to three triangular blades forged for both wide overhead swings and tactical parrying.

Machine Gun.name: 机枪 Machine Gun
Machine Gun.description:
升级： 1

这些久经考验且可靠的自动武器能够进行短点射，或将弹匣彻底打空以清扫战场。

Upgrades: 1

These proven and reliable automatic weapons are capable of firing in short bursts or completely emptying their magazines to clear a battlefield.

Shotalashu Armor.name: 肖塔拉修护甲 Shotalashu Armor
Shotalashu Armor.description:
升级： 1

这种传统护甲由层层叠加、灵活却坚固的甲片构成，是卡斯卓韦上拉申塔人骑兵所穿戴的护甲。在过去，shotalashu骑兵会用自己坐骑蜕下的皮，或更少见地，用阵亡坐骑的皮来打造护甲，以在未来的战斗中纪念它们。在卡斯卓韦的某些地区，合成仿制品也很时尚。

Upgrades: 1

Flexible but sturdy plates layered together form this traditional armor worn by lashunta cavalry on Castrovel. In times past, a shotalashu cavalry member forged their armor from their mount's shed skin, or more rarely, the skin of a fallen mount, to honor them in future battles. Synthetic imitations are fashionable on some parts of Castrovel.

Credstick.name: 信用棒 Credstick
Credstick.description:
《Starfinder》中的大多数人都会把自己的财富存放在一种受保护的物品上，这种物品被称为信用棒。此类装置通常较为扁平，大小大致相当于一根人类手指。它们的尺寸和品质各不相同，但归根结底，它们只是用来方便携带和花钱的一种手段。这些装置的使用方式由持有者决定，而信用棒只需在合适的银行设备附近轻轻一碰，就能完成收款或付款这样简单的操作。在需要更严格安全措施时，它们可以要求语音或生物识别印记才能激活。有些先进（型）信用棒甚至带有魔法组件，可能需要精神密码或念诵特定法术才能取用其中储存的资金。

信用棒并不是通向一个人全部财富的入口，而数额更大的信用点通常会安全地存放在银行、私人金库或安全数据库中。相反，信用棒是一种安全且匿名的信用点流转方式，不易被追踪。冒险者和普通市民 alike 往往都会随身携带一根信用棒，以应付他们可能需要进行的各种购买，同时身上也只保留恰好足够的信用点，以免一旦丢失信用棒就导致破产。

协约世界中的个人通常都会携带信用棒，而其他与协约世界往来的文明也常常会将本地资金兑换为信用点，因此也会携带信用棒来消费这些兑换后的货币。有时，一个人可能会携带数根信用棒，为每一根指定不同用途；或者，如果他们想进行一笔预设金额的购买，也可以直接把整根信用棒转交出去。要是一个人身上的信用棒数量变得过于累赘，也很容易在各根信用棒之间转移资金，并丢弃已经清空的信用棒以节省空间，不过信用棒的体积恒为可忽略。

Most people in Starfinder keep their wealth on a protected item known as a credstick. These devices are often flat and roughly the size of a human finger. They range in dimensions and quality, but at the end of the day, they're just a means of conveniently carrying and spending money. Usage of these devices is determined by the owner, and a credstick can accept or spend funds with as simple an action as tapping it near a suitable banking device. When more rigorous security is necessary, they can require audio or biometric imprints in order to activate. Some advanced credsticks even have a magical component that might require a mental password or the recitation of a specific spell to access stored funds.

Credsticks aren't gateways to the entirety of one's wealth, and larger stores of credits are often kept secured in banks, personal vaults, or secure databases. Instead, a credstick is a safe and anonymous means of moving credits around without being traced. Adventurers and common citizens alike often keep a credstick on their person to handle any purchases they might be called upon to make, while also only keeping just enough credits on them that losing the credstick wouldn't result in bankruptcy.

Individuals in the Pact Worlds often carry credsticks, and other civilizations that interact with the Pact often turn local funds into credits and thus carry them to spend their converted currency. Sometimes a person might carry several credsticks, dedicating each one to a different use, or simply trading the stick away if they want to make a purchase of a predefined amount. If ever the number of credsticks on a person becomes too cumbersome, it's easy enough to move the funds between individual sticks and discard emptied sticks to save on space, however a credstick always has a negligible bulk.

Pahtra.name: 帕赫特拉 Pahtra
Pahtra.description:
帕赫特拉是来自邻近恒星系的一种类人生猫科物种。他们极具竞争心，并以在魔法、音乐和战争方面的成就而闻名。他们的母星最近从维斯卡里姆的占领下获得解放，而他们也已加入协约世界。

Pahtras are a humanoid feline species from a nearby star system. They're highly competitive and known for their achievements in magic, music, and war. Their home world was recently freed from the Veskarium's occupation, and they've joined the Pact Worlds.

Meyel's Chosen Pahtra.name: 梅耶尔所选的帕赫特拉人 Meyel's Chosen Pahtra
Meyel's Chosen Pahtra.description:
你拥有一种无可否认的好运，而你相信这是你祖先神祇梅耶尔的赐福。你可能出身于一个绵延已久的秘学者家系。也许你出生在普洛尼斯的一处圣洁地点，或者你曾在危急时刻以炽烈的祈祷向外求援。梅耶尔的大多数天选之人，至少都能指出过去某个事件：当时她们的女神可能曾介入，将她们从死亡或其他可怕命运中拯救出来。无论是比喻意义上还是字面意义上，你似乎总能逢凶化吉。每天第一次在豁免检定中获得重度失败时，你会立刻以一个自由动作重掷该次豁免检定；这是一种幸运效果。

You have an undeniable streak of luck that you believe is a blessing from your ancestral god Meyel. You might come from a long line of mystics. Perhaps you were born at a holy site on Pulonis, or you reached out in fervent prayer at a time of crisis. Most of Meyel's chosen can point to at least one past event when their goddess might have intervened to save them from death or some other awful fate. Whether metaphorically or literally, you always seem to land on your feet. The first time each day that you critically fail a saving throw, you immediately reroll the saving throw as a free action; this is a fortune effect.

Icon.name: 图标 Icon
Icon.description:
每个人都想拥有自己那15分钟的成名时刻，但对你来说，这不知怎的已经成了一种生活方式。无论是靠运气还是靠投入，你都是一位耀眼的表演者、名人，或是受欢迎的网红。你的面孔、声音和风格在已知太空中都是有价值的商品，但每有一个崇拜你的粉丝，就会有一个黑子散布流言，或有狗仔队想要捕捉你的缺点。

选择两项属性增强。其中一项必须为 体质 或 魅力，另一项为自由属性增强。

你在表演技能和媒体学识技能上受过训练。你获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.xqAdXRd2gSQcqp5E]{令人印象深刻的表演}技能专长。

Everybody wants their 15 minutes of fame, but for you, it's somehow become a lifestyle. Whether by luck or dedication, you're a star performer, celebrity, or popular influencer. Your face, voice, and style are commodities across known space, but for every adoring fan, there's a hater spreading gossip or paparazzi looking to capture your flaws.

Choose two attribute boosts. One must be to Constitution or Charisma, and one is a free attribute boost.

You're trained in the Performance skill and the Media Lore skill. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.xqAdXRd2gSQcqp5E]{Impressive Performance} skill feat.

Impressive Performance.name: 惊艳表演 Impressive Performance
Impressive Performance.description: 你的表演广受追捧，为你赢得拥趸。你可以用表演技能替代交涉技能@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{建立印象 Make an Impression}。若你在观众面前表演至少10分钟，就能够以至多10个观看了整段表演的观众为建立印象的目标，无需承受通常情况的减值。若表演1小时，目标数量提高到20个；若表演2小时，提高到50个。

Solarian.name: 星辉武者 Solarian
Solarian.description:
你是宇宙恒星之力的引导者——一名太阳骑士。重力与光代表了这些力量的两极，而你能够在它们之间调整自己的调谐。作为这一循环的代理者，你会显化出一系列太阳装备，并运用你自身与恒星之力的连接来强化它们。无论你偏好恒星光谱中的哪一极端，你都可以在它们之间改变自己的调谐，以利用通过冥想与练习获得的太阳力量。

You're a conduit for the stellar forces of the cosmos—a solar knight. The powers of gravity and light represent the extremes of these forces, and you can attune yourself between them. As an agent of this cycle, you manifest an array of solar equipment and use your own connection to stellar forces to empower them. Regardless of which extreme of the stellar spectrum you prefer, you can change your attunement between them to take advantage of solar powers earned through meditation and practice.

Solar Manifestations.name: 太阳显化 Solar Manifestations
Solar Manifestations.description:
你对物质宇宙中恒星之力的深刻理解，会以多种有形的方式显现。你可以创造并维持三种不同的显化：日冕耀焰、太阳星环，以及太阳武器。若你变为失谐，这些显化会暂时消失。

日冕耀焰

一小团太阳能量悬浮在你附近，或嵌附于你身体的某个部位上，例如你的手掌或脸上。这团光点可以在短距离内释放一道定向的能量爆发。你的日冕耀焰是一种属于徒手搏击武器组、具有 attuned 和 恒星武士 特征的军用远程武器。它不占手，也无需持握即可使用。除非你变为失谐，否则你的日冕耀焰不能成为其他生物的目标，也无法从你身上被移除。你的谐调状态决定你日冕耀焰的伤害类型和射程增量。你使用日冕耀焰进行伤害掷骰时，将你的力量调整值加到伤害上。你可以用恒星武士水晶提升日冕耀焰的伤害。

引力子谐调 1d8 钝击，射程增量 15 尺。若你重击成功，你可以尝试以一个自由动作对目标进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{绊摔}，无视射程和多重攻击减值，即使你没有空闲手也可以。

光子谐调 1d6 火焰，射程增量 30 尺。若你重击成功，目标还会额外受到 1d6 持续性火焰伤害。

太阳星环

一层恒星能量环绕着你，覆盖在你的身体或所穿护甲之上。根据你当前的谐调状态，它会显现为一层发光的光辉，或凝实的黑暗。星环的整体外观与形状由你决定；它可以表现为环绕你周身的能量网格，或覆盖于你现有装备之上的尖刺能量护甲。这种设计不会影响其功能，也不会提供任何额外加值。

你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.q7UDeO9Ko1EbPRWm]{星环激涌} 反应。

太阳武器

你凭借纯粹的意志，唤出一把由群星精华锻成的有形武器。这把武器是你自身的延伸，而你可以通过冥想改变它的形态。当你显化这把武器时，它会出现在你所选择的一只空闲手中。若它具有不占手特征，则可以显化在任意一只手中。你的太阳武器是一种军用近战武器。它造成 1d8 点由你选择的钝击、穿刺或挥砍伤害，并具有 attuned 和 恒星武士 特征。

在1级时，为你的武器从以下特征中选择至多两个。或者，你可以为武器选择 伸距 或 双手 1d10 特征，以此代替从以下特征中选择两个。

  • 缴械
  • 不占手
  • 擒抱
  • 非致命
  • 招架
  • 推撞
  • 横扫
  • 绊摔
  • 多用（仅限 B/P/S）
  • 伸距（计作两个特征）
  • 双手 1d10（计作两个特征）

你可以为你的武器选择以下一种武器组作为其所属武器组。

  • 斧
  • 徒手搏击
  • 棍棒
  • 连枷
  • 锤
  • 刀
  • 镐
  • 长柄武器
  • 矛
  • 剑

你的太阳武器会根据你当前的谐调状态获得额外增益。

引力子谐调 当你使用太阳武器成功打击一个生物时，该生物所在空间以及所有与其相邻的方格，对该生物而言都成为困难地形，直到其下个回合结束。

光子谐调 当你使用太阳武器成功打击一个生物时，你会额外造成等同于你等级一半（向上取整）的火焰伤害。你的太阳武器会在 5 尺半径内投射明亮光照（接下来 5 尺为微光照）。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.UlFxEP3YrbseKA62]{效果：太阳武器}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.uvtdqSfKD6oXNA29]{重铸太阳武器}

Your deep understanding of the stellar forces of the universe manifests in a variety of tangible ways. You can create and maintain three different manifestations: a solar flare, solar nimbus, and solar weapon. Your manifestations temporarily vanish if you become unattuned.

Solar Flare

A small mote of solar power hovers nearby or appears embedded on some part of your body, such as the palm of your hand or on your face. This mote can unleash a directed blast of energy at short range. Your solar flare is a martial ranged weapon in the brawling weapon group with the attuned and solarian traits. It doesn't take up a hand and doesn't need to be held to be wielded. Your solar flare can't be targeted by other creatures or removed from your person, except for when you become unattuned. Your attunement determines the damage type and range increment of your solar flare. You add your Strength modifier to damage rolls with your solar flare. You can improve the damage of your solar flare with solarian crystals.

Graviton-Attuned 1d8 bludgeoning, range increment 15 feet. On a critical success, you can attempt to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip} the target as a free action, ignoring range and multiple attack penalty, even if you don't have a free hand.

Photon-Attuned 1d6 fire, range increment 30 feet. On a critical success, the target additionally takes 1d6 persistent fire damage.

Solar Nimbus

A layer of stellar energy surrounds you, overlaying your body or worn armor. It appears as a layer of glowing light or solid darkness, depending on your current state of attunement. The general appearance and shape of the nimbus is your choice and could appear as a lattice of energy surrounding you or imposing spiked energy armor layered atop your existing equipment. This design has no impact on its function and doesn't provide any additional bonuses.

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.q7UDeO9Ko1EbPRWm]{Nimbus Surge} reaction.

Solar Weapon

Through sheer will, you call forth a tangible weapon forged from the essence of stars. This weapon is an extension of yourself, and you can change its form with meditation. When manifesting your weapon, it appears in a free hand of your choice. If it has the free-hand trait, it can manifest in any hand. Your solar weapon is a martial melee weapon. It deals 1d8 of your choice of bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage with the attuned and solarian traits.

At first level, choose up to two of the following traits for your weapon. Alternatively, you can select the reach or two-hand 1d10 trait for your weapon instead of selecting two of the following traits.

  • Disarm
  • Free-Hand
  • Grapple
  • Nonlethal
  • Parry
  • Shove
  • Sweep
  • Trip
  • Versatile (B/P/S only)
  • Reach (counts as two traits)
  • Two-Hand 1d10 (counts as two traits)

You can select one of the following weapon groups for your weapon to be a part of.

  • Axe
  • Brawling
  • Club
  • Flail
  • Hammer
  • Knife
  • Pick
  • Polearm
  • Spear
  • Sword

Your solar weapon gains additional benefits based on your current attunement.

Graviton-Attuned When you successfully Strike a creature using your solar weapon, that creature's space and all squares adjacent to it are difficult terrain for that creature until the end of its next turn.

Photon-Attuned When you successfully Strike a creature with your solar weapon, you deal an additional amount of fire damage equal to half your level (rounded up). Your solar weapon casts bright light in a 5-foot radius (and dim light for the next 5 feet).

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.UlFxEP3YrbseKA62]{Effect: Solar Weapon}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.uvtdqSfKD6oXNA29]{Re-Forge Solar Weapon}

Stellar Attunement.name: 星辰调谐 Stellar Attunement
Stellar Attunement.description:
作为一名星辉武者，你的存在会在恒星的各种相位之间循环。你起初拥有两种相位：光子（恒星释放热、光与等离子体的力量）和引力子（恒星通过重力吸引并禁锢物体的力量）。在任何时候，你都被视为处于引力子调谐、光子调谐，或未调谐状态。你的许多能力都会根据你当前的调谐获得额外效果，而有些能力会将你当前的调谐状态切换为另一种状态。

你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.3xDhpvORBmK6AtcI]{调谐} 动作。

As a solarian, your existence cycles between the aspects of stars. You begin with two aspects: photon (the power of stars to emit heat, light, and plasma) and graviton (the power of stars to attract and imprison objects through gravity). At any time, you're considered graviton-attuned, photon-attuned, or unattuned. Many of your abilities have additional effects based on your current attunement, and some abilities swap your current state of attunement to another state.

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.3xDhpvORBmK6AtcI]{Attune} action.

Nimbus Surge.name: 灵云奔涌 Nimbus Surge
Nimbus Surge.description:
触发条件 你触及范围内的一个生物使用一个操作动作或一个移动动作、进行一次远程攻击，或在其正在使用的移动动作期间离开一个方格。

你的灵光迸发出能量，迫使敌人的防御出现破绽。对触发生物进行一次近战打击。此次打击不计入你的多重攻击减值，且你的多重攻击减值也不适用于此次打击。

引力调谐 若此次打击获得重击成功，则目标必须进行一次对抗你职业DC的 @Check[fortitude|against:solarian] 豁免检定；若失败，则目标变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 1}，直到其回合结束。

光子调谐 若此次打击获得重击成功，则目标必须进行一次对抗你职业DC的 @Check[fortitude|against:solarian] 豁免检定；若失败，则目标变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}，直到其回合开始。

Trigger A creature within your reach uses a manipulate action or a move action, makes a ranged attack, or leaves a square during a move action it's using.

Your nimbus surges with energy, forcing an opening in your foe's defenses. Make a melee Strike against the triggering creature. This Strike doesn't count toward your multiple attack penalty, and your multiple attack penalty doesn't apply to this Strike.

Graviton-Attuned If the Strike is a critical success, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|against:solarian] save against your class DC or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} until the end of its turn.

Photon-Attuned If the Strike is a critical success, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|against:solarian] save against your class DC or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} until the start of its turn.

Re-Forge Solar Weapon.name: 重铸太阳武器 Re-Forge Solar Weapon
Re-Forge Solar Weapon.description:
你花费 10 分钟专注于你太阳武器的构成。你可以改变你太阳武器的伤害类型（通常可在钝击、穿刺或挥砍之间选择）、已选特性和武器组。你的武器会保持你的这些选择，直到你下次重新锻铸太阳武器时为止。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.UlFxEP3YrbseKA62]{效果：太阳武器}

You spend 10 minutes focusing on the composition of your solar weapon. You can change your solar weapon's damage type (typically choosing between bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing), selected traits, and weapon group. Your weapon maintains your selections until the next time you Re-Forge Solar Weapon.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.UlFxEP3YrbseKA62]{Effect: Solar Weapon}

Attune.name: 调谐 Attune
Attune.description:
频率 每轮一次

你稳住身心，使自己与所选的恒星相位调谐。你变为调谐至光子或引力子。你也可以显现你当前处于休眠状态的任意一种太阳显现，但前提是你有可用于使用它们的空闲手。

特殊 除了上述用法外，当你掷先攻时，你也可以以自由动作进行调谐。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.UlFxEP3YrbseKA62]{效果：太阳武器}

Frequency once per round

You steady your body and mind and attune yourself to the stellar aspect of your choice. You become attuned to photon or graviton. You can also manifest any of your solar manifestations if they're currently dormant and if you have the free hands to use them.

Special In addition to the above usage, you can also Attune as a free action when you roll initiative.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.UlFxEP3YrbseKA62]{Effect: Solar Weapon}

Semi-Auto Pistol.name: 半自动手枪 Semi-Auto Pistol
Semi-Auto Pistol.description:
升级： 1

这把手枪会在每次射击后自动弹出用过的弹壳，并装填新的弹药。

Upgrades: 1

This pistol automatically ejects used cartridges and loads new ammunition after every shot fired.

Comm Unit.name: 通讯单元 Comm Unit
Comm Unit.description:
个人通讯器是一种口袋大小的设备，结合了小型便携式计算机与蜂窝通信设备，能够在行星范围内以音频和文本两种格式，与其他通讯器进行即时无线通信。个人通讯器还包括计算器、手电筒（以你为中心5英尺半径内发出明亮光照，在接下来的5英尺内发出微光）、可访问任何本地信息圈的浏览器，以及若干娱乐功能（包括游戏）。

集成在护甲中的个人通讯器具备一些语音激活功能；你可以在不需要空闲手的情况下，以音频格式与其他通讯器通信并接收回应，但输入信息、浏览信息圈或使用应用程序仍至少需要使用一只手。

可在更远距离运作的通讯器则没那么便携；它们内置发电机，以提供所需的电力，并依靠活跃的漂流信标进行通信。这类通讯器的短期使用服务在大多数大型聚居地都可以购买。

A personal comm unit is a pocket-sized device that combines a minor portable computer and a cellular communications device, allowing instantaneous wireless communication with other comm units in both audio- and text-based formats at planetary range. A personal comm unit also includes a calculator, a flashlight (emits bright light in a 5-foot radius around you and dim light in the next 5 feet), a browser that accesses any local infospheres, and several entertainment options (including games).

Personal comm units integrated into armor have some voice-activated capabilities; you can communicate with other comm units in audio-based formats and receive responses without needing a free hand, but typing a message, browsing the infosphere, or using an app requires the use of at least one hand.

Comm units that function at longer ranges aren't as portable; they include built-in generators that provide the necessary amount of power and rely on active Drift beacons to communicate. Short-term use of these units can be purchased in most major settlements.

Hardlight Series.name: 硬光系列 Hardlight Series
Hardlight Series.description:
升级： 1

固定在腰带或翻领上的投影器会用这种闪烁的硬光外壳包裹穿戴者的身体。军用配发的硬光护甲遵循可预测的标准，而私人用户则可享受一系列可自定义的时尚选项。

Upgrades: 1

A projector fastened to a belt or lapel encases the wearer's body in this shimmering hardlight shell. Military-issue hardlight armor follows a predictable standard, but private users enjoy a range of customizable fashion options.

Medpatch (Commercial).name: 医疗贴片（商业级） Medpatch (Commercial)
Medpatch (Commercial).description:
激活 1 (manipulate)

医疗贴片会加速身体的自然愈合。你恢复 @Damage[(1d6)[healing]] 生命值，并在10分钟内对抗疾病和毒素的豁免检定获得+1物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{效果：医疗贴片}

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Medpatches accelerate the body's natural healing. You regain @Damage[(1d6)[healing]] Hit Points and gain a +1 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{Effect: Medpatch}

Credstick.name: 信用棒 Credstick
Credstick.description:
《星际探索者》中的大多数人都会把自己的财富存放在一种受保护的物品中，这种物品被称为信用棒。此类装置通常较为扁平，大小大致相当于一根人类手指。它们的尺寸和品质各不相同，但归根结底，它们只是用来方便携带和花费金钱的一种手段。这些装置的使用方式由持有者决定，而信用棒只需在合适的银行设备附近轻轻一碰，就能完成收款或付款这样简单的操作。在需要更严格安全措施时，它们也可以要求语音或生物识别印记才能激活。一些先进信用棒甚至还带有魔法组件，可能需要精神密码，或念诵特定法术，才能取用其中储存的资金。

信用棒并不是通向个人全部财富的入口，数额较大的信用点储备通常会被安全地存放在银行、私人金库或安全数据库中。相反，信用棒是一种安全且匿名的信用点流转方式，不易被追踪。无论是冒险者还是普通市民，常常都会随身携带一根信用棒，以便处理自己可能需要进行的各种购买；同时，他们身上通常只保留刚好够用的信用点，这样即使丢失了信用棒，也不至于因此破产。

协约世界中的个人经常携带信用棒，而其他与协约世界往来的文明，也常常会把当地资金兑换成信用点，因此也会携带信用棒来花用这些兑换后的货币。有时，一个人可能会带着好几根信用棒，将每一根分别用于不同用途；或者如果他们想进行一笔固定金额的交易，也可以干脆把整根棒直接转交出去。要是一个人身上的信用棒数量多到难以携带，也很容易将资金在不同的棒之间转移，并丢弃已经清空的信用棒以节省空间，不过信用棒的体积负担始终可以忽略不计。

Most people in Starfinder keep their wealth on a protected item known as a credstick. These devices are often flat and roughly the size of a human finger. They range in dimensions and quality, but at the end of the day, they're just a means of conveniently carrying and spending money. Usage of these devices is determined by the owner, and a credstick can accept or spend funds with as simple an action as tapping it near a suitable banking device. When more rigorous security is necessary, they can require audio or biometric imprints in order to activate. Some advanced credsticks even have a magical component that might require a mental password or the recitation of a specific spell to access stored funds.

Credsticks aren't gateways to the entirety of one's wealth, and larger stores of credits are often kept secured in banks, personal vaults, or secure databases. Instead, a credstick is a safe and anonymous means of moving credits around without being traced. Adventurers and common citizens alike often keep a credstick on their person to handle any purchases they might be called upon to make, while also only keeping just enough credits on them that losing the credstick wouldn't result in bankruptcy.

Individuals in the Pact Worlds often carry credsticks, and other civilizations that interact with the Pact often turn local funds into credits and thus carry them to spend their converted currency. Sometimes a person might carry several credsticks, dedicating each one to a different use, or simply trading the stick away if they want to make a purchase of a predefined amount. If ever the number of credsticks on a person becomes too cumbersome, it's easy enough to move the funds between individual sticks and discard emptied sticks to save on space, however a credstick always has a negligible bulk.

Stellar Rush.name: 星穹冲锋 Stellar Rush
Stellar Rush.description:
你裹挟着一股恒星能量猛冲向前，轻松切入战斗中心。疾行两次。在这些移动期间，你的速度获得 +10 英尺的情境加值。

引力协调 当你完成这些疾行后，位于你 15 英尺内的敌人必须尝试一次对抗你职业 DC 的 @Check[fortitude|against:solarian|options:area-effect,forced-movement] 豁免。若失败，它们会被直接拖拽向你，并尽可能在与你相邻的方格结束移动。你选择这些敌人移动的顺序。

光子协调 当你完成这些疾行后，你以自己为中心，在 @Template[type:burst|distance:15] 内制造一个光子场。直到你下个回合开始时，位于光子场外的生物对于位于场内的生物而言处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} 状态。

You rush forward with a blast of stellar energy, getting into the thick of combat with ease. Stride twice. You gain a +10-foot circumstance bonus to your Speed during these moves.

Graviton-Attuned When you finish your Strides, enemies within 15 feet of you must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:solarian|options:area-effect,forced-movement] save against your class DC. On a failure, they're pulled directly toward you, ending in an adjacent square if possible. You select the order these enemies are moved.

Photon-Attuned When you finish your Strides, you create a photon field in a @Template[type:burst|distance:15] centered on you. Until the start of your next turn, creatures outside the photon field are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} to creatures inside the field.

Competitive Spirit.name: 竞争精神 Competitive Spirit
Competitive Spirit.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发条件 一名盟友尝试进行一次技能检定，且该技能你的熟练等级为受训或更高。

你通过与触发该能力的盟友竞争，激励自己做到最好。直到你的下个回合结束前，你可以尝试进行相同的技能检定，以执行该盟友所执行的相同行动或活动。你在此次技能检定中获得 +2 处境加值。如果你的成功等级至少比该盟友高一级，则此次对 Competitive Spirit 的使用不计入其使用频率。如果你在此次技能检定中掷出大失败，则在接下来 1 小时内，你使用该技能进行的所有技能检定都会承受 –1 处境减值，因为你会尝试新技巧来改进自己未来的尝试。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger An ally attempts a skill check with a skill that you have trained or better proficiency rank in.

You push yourself to be the best by competing with the triggering ally. Until the end of your next turn, you can attempt the same skill check to perform the same action or activity that the triggering ally performed. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to this skill check. If you achieve at least one degree of success higher than the triggering ally, this use of Competitive Spirit doesn't count toward its frequency. If you roll a critical failure on this skill check, you take a –1 circumstance penalty to all skill checks attempted with that skill for the next hour as you try new techniques to improve your future attempts.

Stellar Resilience.name: 星界韧性 Stellar Resilience
Stellar Resilience.description:
恒星能量如同势不可挡的浪潮流遍你的全身，强化你的身心两方面。你的强韧豁免熟练等级提升为专家。当你在对抗精神或失能效果的强韧或意志豁免中获得成功时，你可以以自由动作@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.3xDhpvORBmK6AtcI]{调谐}。

Stellar energy flows throughout your entire being like an unstoppable tidal wave, strengthening both body and mind. Your proficiency rank in Fortitude saves increases to expert. When you roll a success on a Fortitude or Will save against a mental or incapacitation effect, you can @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.3xDhpvORBmK6AtcI]{Attune} as a free action.

Datapad.name: 数据板 Datapad
Datapad.description:
这些随处可见的手持式计算机整合了通信装置、麦克风、扬声器、摄像头、信息圈浏览器和数据存储功能。它们可以存储数千小时的录音、玩游戏，并执行简单的计算功能，例如时间追踪与通知、文字处理、计算、数据处理、流媒体播放，以及播送来自地方政府的紧急警报。在大多数社会中，商用数据板通常相对脆弱，设计上会很快磨损，或在最新功能和更新方面迅速落后，以促使消费者用较新的型号来替换它。相比之下，高端数据板则被设计得更加耐用，且通常还包含更坚固的机身和额外功能。

These ubiquitous handheld computers incorporate a comm unit, microphone, speaker, camera, infosphere browser, and data storage. They can store thousands of hours of recordings, play games, and perform simple computing functions, such as time tracking and notifications, word processing, calculations, data processing, streaming media, and broadcasting emergency alerts from local governments. In most societies, commercial datapads are relatively flimsy, designed to rapidly wear out or fall behind on the latest features and updates to encourage the consumer to replace it with a newer model. In contrast, higher-end datapads are made to last and often include a sturdier chassis and extra functions.

Shattering Impact.name: 粉碎冲击 Shattering Impact
Shattering Impact.description:
你倾注全部力量，用你的太阳武器发动一次单独的攻击，其威力之强甚至会击碎武器。用你的太阳武器进行一次打击。此次打击额外造成一个武器伤害骰的伤害。你的太阳武器会粉碎，且你必须再次显化它才能继续使用。

引力调谐 若命中，目标的速度在直到你下个回合开始前承受 –10 尺的状态减值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.Ll3uZdiSqaszP3fn]{效果：破碎冲击}

光子调谐 若命中，你还会额外造成等同于你等级一半的持续火焰伤害，向上取整。

You pour all your effort into making a single attack with your solar weapon that's so powerful it shatters the weapon. Strike with your solar weapon. The Strike deals one additional weapon damage die. Your solar weapon shatters and must be manifested to continue using it.

Graviton-Attuned On a hit, the target takes a –10-foot status penalty to Speed until the start of your next turn.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.Ll3uZdiSqaszP3fn]{Effect: Shattering Impact}

Photon-Attuned On a hit, you additionally deal persistent fire damage equal to half your level, rounded up.

Fleet.name: 舰队 Fleet
Fleet.description: 你的脚步变得更快。你的速度提高5尺。

Cat Fall.name: 猫落术 Cat Fall
Cat Fall.description: 模仿自猫的高空特技动作让你能够缓冲坠落的损伤。将坠落距离视为缩短10尺。若你在特技技能上的熟练度达到专家，将坠落距离视为缩短25尺，达到大师后，缩短50尺。若你在特技技能上的熟练度达到传奇，无论坠落距离多高，你始终能够以脚着地，不会受到任何伤害。

Magboots.name: 磁力靴 Magboots
Magboots.description:
磁力靴可以用一个交互动作来启动或关闭。启动后，它们会给予你攀爬金属表面的运动学检定+1物品加值，并且当你站在金属表面上时，针对试图对你使用@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.lOE4yjUnETTdaf2T]{Reposition}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip}的企图，你的强韧或反射DC获得+1物品加值。在零重力区域中，当你穿着一双磁力靴时，你可以沿着金属表面以你的速度移动，且不会获得未束缚的状态。

Magboots can be activated or deactivated with an Interact action. While active, they grant you a +1 item bonus to Athletics checks to Climb metal surfaces as well as a +1 item bonus to your Fortitude or Reflex DC against attempts to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.lOE4yjUnETTdaf2T]{Reposition}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip} you when you're standing on a metal surface. In areas of zero gravity, while wearing a pair of magboots, you can move your Speed across metal surfaces and don't gain the untethered condition.

Portable Amp.name: 便携式放大器 Portable Amp
Portable Amp.description:
这个小型装置通常会与乐器、麦克风或数据板上的音频播放功能同步。它能够放大音量，使听到该音频的察觉检定DC降低5。

This small device is typically synced up to an instrument, microphone, or the audio playback on a datapad. It amplifies the audio volume, reducing the DC of Perception checks to hear the audio by 5.

Sunshades (Commercial).name: 遮阳镜（商业级） Sunshades (Commercial)
Sunshades (Commercial).description:
太阳镜让每个人看起来都更酷。

Sunshades make everyone look cooler.

+1 Weapon Potency Crystal (Solar Flare).name: +1 武器强能水晶（太阳耀焰） +1 Weapon Potency Crystal (Solar Flare)
+1 Weapon Potency Crystal (Solar Flare).description:
这件物品将复制恒星行动所需的专注力结晶化。使用太阳武器或耀斑进行的攻击检定获得+1物品加值，且该武器或耀斑可以从一枚轨道水晶中受益。

This item crystallizes the focus needed to replicate the actions of a star. Attack rolls with the solar weapon or flare gain a +1 item bonus, and the weapon or flare can benefit from one orbital crystal.

+1 Weapon Potency Crystal (Solar Weapon).name: +1 武器效能水晶（太阳武器） +1 Weapon Potency Crystal (Solar Weapon)
+1 Weapon Potency Crystal (Solar Weapon).description:
此物品将重现恒星行为所需的专注力结晶化。使用太阳武器或耀斑进行的攻击检定获得+1物品加值，且该武器或耀斑可以从一枚轨道水晶中受益。

This item crystallizes the focus needed to replicate the actions of a star. Attack rolls with the solar weapon or flare gain a +1 item bonus, and the weapon or flare can benefit from one orbital crystal.

Solar Weapon Expertise.name: 恒星武器专精 Solar Weapon Expertise
Solar Weapon Expertise.description:
你与恒星力量的连接使你的武器更具杀伤力。你对简易武器、军用武器和徒手攻击的熟练等级提升为专家。每当你以你的太阳耀斑或太阳武器造成重击时，你获得其重击专精效果。

Your connection to stellar forces make your weapons lethal. Your proficiency ranks for simple weapons, martial weapons, and unarmed attacks increase to expert. Whenever you get a critical hit with your solar flare or solar weapon, you get its critical specialization effect.

Nimbus Ward.name: 灵云结界 Nimbus Ward
Nimbus Ward.description:
触发条件 你将因一次攻击、法术或其他效果而受到伤害。

要求 你察觉到该触发效果，且未措手不及。

你引导自己的太阳灵光来保护自己免受伤害。你获得等于你等级一半（向上取整）的抗性，直到你下个回合开始时。你在使用此动作时选择抗性的类型，具体取决于你当前的调谐状态。

只有在满足要求和触发条件时，你才能将星辉护障作为一个反应来使用；但即使未满足要求或未被触发，你仍可以将其作为一个单动作活动来使用。

引力子调谐 你的抗性可以是以下伤害类型之一：钝击、力场、穿刺或挥砍。

光子调谐 你的抗性可以是以下能量伤害类型之一：强酸、寒冷、电击、火焰或音波。

Trigger You would be damage by an attack, spell, or other effect.

Requirements You're aware of the triggering effect and not offguard.

You harness your solar nimbus to protect yourself from harm. You gain resistance equal to half your level (rounded up) until the start of your next turn. You choose the type of resistance when you use this action, depending on your current attunement.

You can use Nimbus Ward as a reaction only when the requirements and trigger are met, but you can use it as a 1-action activity without the requirements or trigger being met.

Graviton-Attuned Your resistance can be one of the following types of damage: bludgeoning, force, piercing, or slashing.

Photon-Attuned Your resistance can be one of the following types of energy damage: acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic.

Battleblessed.name: 战祝者 Battleblessed
Battleblessed.description:
你是一位技艺高超的战舞者和战士，受先知祝福，经由祖传传统磨炼，能够完成超越同侪天生能力的壮举。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.KcLVELhCUcKXxiKE]{Tailwind}，作为一个1环原始本能法术，你每天可以施放一次。

You're an accomplished battledancer and warrior, blessed by seers, honed by ancestral tradition, and capable of feats beyond the natural abilities of your peers. You gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.KcLVELhCUcKXxiKE]{Tailwind} as a 1st-rank primal innate spell that you can cast once per day.

Combat Climber.name: 战斗攀爬 Combat Climber
Combat Climber.description: 你拥有一边攀爬一边战斗的技术。你在攀爬期间不会@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}，并且能够在一只手被占用的情况下攀爬。你在攀爬时仍然必须用上另一只手和双腿。

Android.name: 仿生人 Android
Android.description:
安卓体最早出现于银河系中许多技术先进的文明所打造的合成人造生命。最初的安卓体是由类人生物依照自身形象创造出来的，但随着赋予这些活体构装体生命的技术传播开来，安卓体开始展现出惊人的形态多样性。协约世界中的安卓体最初被设计为仆役，但如今，安卓体和其他机器人生命在《协约》之下，已与有机裔族享有平等地位。一些安卓体建立了自己独立的社群，而大多数则无缝整合进协约世界的社会之中。与许多其他技术构装体不同，安卓体并不只是精密的合成器官和复杂的程序；他们每一个都拥有自己的灵魂。

Androids first emerged as synthetic beings crafted by many technologically advanced civilizations throughout the galaxy. The first androids were created by humanoid peoples in their own images, but after the technology that animated the living constructs spread, androids began displaying a fantastic diversity of forms. Androids in the Pact Worlds were originally designed as servants, but today androids and other robotic beings stand as equals to organic ancestries under the Pact. Some androids have formed their own independent communities, while most integrate seamlessly into Pact Worlds societies. Unlike many other technological constructs, androids are more than intricate synthetic organs and complex programming, and each possesses their own soul.

Constructed.name: 被创造者 Constructed
Constructed.description: 你的人造身体比单纯的生物机体更能抵抗疾病。你对疾病、毒素和辐射的豁免检定获得+1环境加值。

Mod Fanatic Android.name: 改装狂热者安卓体 Mod Fanatic Android
Mod Fanatic Android.description:
你或你先前的迭代版本已经改造了自己的身体，使其能够兼容护甲升级，让你可以亲自定制自己的身体及其能力。你的身体拥有1个护甲升级槽位，你可以用它来安装护甲升级，且该槽位不计入你的护甲可安装升级的总数。你可以使用“安装升级”活动，将护甲升级安装到或卸载出你的个人升级槽位。选择一种物品等级为1级或以下的普通护甲升级。你开始游戏时，该护甲升级已安装在你的升级槽位中（你无需支付信用点来购买这一初始升级）。

You or your previous iterations have modified your body to be compatible with armor upgrades, enabling you to personally customize your body and its capabilities. Your body has one armor upgrade slot that you can use to install armor upgrades and that doesn't count toward your armor's total number of upgrades. You can install and uninstall armor upgrades into your personal upgrade slot using the Install Upgrade activity. Choose one common armor upgrade with an item level of 1 or less. You begin with this armor upgrade already installed in your upgrade slot (you don't need to pay the credits to purchase this starting upgrade).

Hacker.name: 黑客 Hacker
Hacker.description:
你一直很擅长计算机和虚拟空间，并以自己学习技术秘密的能力为傲。被称为信息圈的开放网络是你的家，也是你能够发挥最佳水平的地方。说到破解代码或访问安全数据时，你非常在行。

选择两项属性增强。其中一项必须加给敏捷或智力，另一项为自由属性增强。

你在计算机技能和信息圈学识技能上受训。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.ifQiKhl0Gt2CM7i9]{Phreaker} 技能专长。

You've always had a knack for computers and virtual spaces and pride yourself on your ability to learn technical secrets. The open networks known as infospheres are your home and the place you can do your best work. You're highly competent when it comes to cracking code or accessing secure data.

Choose two attribute boosts. One must be to Dexterity or Intelligence, and one is a free attribute boost.

You're trained in the Computers skill and the Infosphere Lore skill. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.ifQiKhl0Gt2CM7i9]{Phreaker} skill feat.

Phreaker.name: 入侵客 Phreaker
Phreaker.description:
你学会了如何使用替代方法进行黑客操作。你可以使用任何计算机、通讯装置或终端，而非黑客工具包，来用计算机禁用装置或入侵系统。如果你在计算机方面是专家，且你所使用的装备至少为 3 级，则你在禁用装置或入侵时获得 +1 物品加值。

特殊 如果你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.abcKcLvAGE5AKig4]{战斗黑客} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.0ZNErs9RICfOw1Nf]{数字佯攻} 技能专长，你可以使用此专长在不使用黑客工具包的情况下进行战斗黑客或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{进行佯攻}。

You've learned how to hack using alternative methods. You can use Computers to Disable a Device or Hack a system using any computer, comm unit, or terminal instead of a hacking toolkit. If you're an expert in Computers and the equipment you use is at least 3rd level, you gain a +1 item bonus to Disable a Device or Hack.

Special If you have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.abcKcLvAGE5AKig4]{Combat Hack} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.0ZNErs9RICfOw1Nf]{Digital Diversion} skill feat, you can use this feat to Combat Hack or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{Create a Diversion} without a hacking toolkit.

Operative.name: 特工 Operative
Operative.description:
你是一名专注、机敏的专业人士，能在高风险的战斗中如鱼得水。你致命的瞄准与战术训练让你比竞争对手更胜一筹——对你而言，即使是最强大的敌人也不过是又一个要解决的目标。你在自己选择的专精领域中展现出令人印象深刻的造诣。

You're a focused, quick-witted professional who thrives in high-stakes combat. Your deadly aim and tactical training give you an edge over the competition—for you, even the most powerful enemy is just another mark to take out. You have impressive prowess in your chosen field of specialization.

Sharpshooter.name: 神射手 Sharpshooter
Sharpshooter.description:
你能看出目标的弱点，使你在使用大多数类型的远程武器时能够造成额外的精确伤害。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim} 动作。

You can spot a target's weak points, letting you deal additional precision damage with most types of ranged weapons. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim} action.

Operative's Specialization.name: 特工的专精 Operative's Specialization
Operative's Specialization.description:
作为一名特工，你会根据自己的战术风格掌握一组特定的技能。这些不同的专精有助于定义你的角色，以及你在大多数情况下采取的应对方式。选择一个特工专精。该专精会使你在一项技能上获得受训、获得一个该技能的技能专长，以及一个漏洞利用。到9级时，你会获得你的专精赋予的强化漏洞利用。本书中提供的专精如下。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.1bgDbGzALewzo7cy]{幽灵}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.u4hB3FGFJwGtjrZB]{渗透者}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.HSKJ1VkPdlMkcqzc]{游击者}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.OCWsQQ95P7ecp7Rn]{狙击手}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.EpxKCi6G0KnWQhHP]{打击者}

As an operative, you have a particular set of skills based on your tactical style. These different specializations help define your character and the approach you take to most situations. Choose an operative's specialization. This specialization grants you training in one skill, a skill feat for that skill, and an exploit. At 9th level, you gain the enhanced exploit granted by your specialization. The specializations presented in this book are as follows.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.1bgDbGzALewzo7cy]{Ghost}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.u4hB3FGFJwGtjrZB]{Infiltrator}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.HSKJ1VkPdlMkcqzc]{Skirmisher}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.OCWsQQ95P7ecp7Rn]{Sniper}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.EpxKCi6G0KnWQhHP]{Striker}

Aim.name: 瞄准 Aim
Aim.description:
需求 你正持用一把不具有区域（特征）的远程武器。

你仔细瞄准一个你已察觉到的单一生物，将其指定为你的标记，直到你的下一回合开始。你使用所需远程武器对你的标记进行的远程打击会额外造成 1d4 精准伤害，并使你的标记因掩护获得的 AC 情境加值降低 1。只有当你的标记位于你武器的第一个射程增量内时，这些收益才适用。你一次只能有一个标记。

随着你的特工等级提升，你瞄准的能力也会增强。在 5级、11级和17级时，精准伤害的骰子数量各增加一个。到 11级时，你使你的标记因掩护获得的 AC 情境加值降低 2，而非 1。到 17级时，你使你的标记因掩护获得的 AC 情境加值降低 4，而非 2。

Requirements You're wielding a ranged weapon that doesn't have the area trait.

You take careful aim at a single creature that you're aware of, designating it as your mark until your next turn. Your ranged Strikes against your mark using the required ranged weapon deal an additional 1d4 precision damage and reduce the circumstance bonus to AC your mark gains from cover by 1. These benefits only apply if your mark is within your weapon's first range increment. You can only have one mark at a time.

As your operative level increases, so does your ability to Aim. Increase the number of dice for the precision damage by one at 5th, 11th, and 17th levels. At 11th level, you reduce the circumstance bonus to AC your mark gains from cover by 2 rather than 1. At 17th level, you reduce the circumstance bonus to AC your mark gains from cover by 4 rather than 2.

Skirmisher.name: 散兵 Skirmisher
Skirmisher.description:
你专精于需要在拥挤或狭窄空间内行动的近距离任务，例如在建筑物或载具内部、狭窄的小巷中，或繁忙的市中心街道上。无论你是劫匪、保镖、刺客，还是城市雇佣兵，你都偏好手枪，并且能在狭小空间中高效使用它们。你受训于特技。你获得一个特技的技能专长。

Exploit：你受过训练，能使用手枪进行近身战斗。你用单手远程武器进行的远程打击不会触发由远程攻击所触发的反应。

Enhanced Exploit：你的近距离射击尤其致命。当你使用单手远程武器对相邻敌人进行一次成功的打击时，你结算伤害时，视同此次攻击中掷出的最低武器伤害骰结果为其最大值。达到17级时，最低的两个伤害骰改为取最大值。

You specialize in close-quarters missions that require you to operate in crowded or tight spaces, such as inside buildings or vehicles, down narrow alleys, or in busy downtown streets. Whether you're a mugger, bodyguard, assassin, or urban mercenary, you favor pistols and can use them efficiently in tight spaces. You're trained in Acrobatics. You gain a skill feat for Acrobatics.

Exploit: You're trained to fight in close combat using pistols. Your ranged Strikes with one-handed ranged weapons don't trigger reactions that are triggered by a ranged attack.

Enhanced Exploit: Your point-blank shots are particularly deadly. When you make a successful Strike against an adjacent enemy with a one-handed ranged weapon, you calculate the damage as if the lowest-rolled weapon damage die for the attack had the maximum result instead. At 17th level, the two lowest-rolled damage dice increase to the maximum result.

Steady Balance.name: 四平八稳 Steady Balance
Steady Balance.description: 即使在恶劣的条件下，你也能轻易保持平衡。每当你成功使用@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.M76ycLAqHoAgbcej]{Balance}行动时，改为大成功。你在狭窄平面和不稳地面尝试保持平衡时不会陷入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}。

Quickened Processor.name: 加速处理器 Quickened Processor
Quickened Processor.description:
你能迅速辨认周遭环境，并且在身处危险之中或在危险情况下驾驶载具的过程中，利用这些信息为自己取得优势。你在先攻掷骰的察觉检定上获得+1处境加值，并在先攻掷骰的驾驶检定上获得+2处境加值。

You can quickly identify your surroundings, and you can use that information to your advantage while in the midst of danger or while in the process of piloting vehicles in hazardous situations. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Perception checks for initiative rolls and a +2 circumstance bonus to Piloting checks for initiative rolls.

Mobile Aim.name: 移动瞄准 Mobile Aim
Mobile Aim.description:
你很少停下不动，而且你已经学会了即使在移动时也能稳定命中目标。你先疾行，然后用你正持握的一把枪械进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{瞄准}。

You're rarely still, and you've learned to reliably hit your targets even while moving. You Stride and then @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim} with a gun you're wielding.

Comm Unit.name: 通讯单元 Comm Unit
Comm Unit.description:
个人通讯器是一种口袋大小的设备，结合了小型便携式计算机与蜂窝通信设备的功能，使其能够在行星范围内以音频和文本两种格式与其他通讯器进行即时无线通信。个人通讯器还包含计算器、手电筒（以你为中心5英尺半径内发出明亮光照，并在接下来的5英尺内发出微光）、可访问任何本地信息圈的浏览器，以及若干娱乐选项（包括游戏）。

集成于护甲中的个人通讯器具备一些语音激活功能；你可以在不需要空闲手的情况下，以音频格式与其他通讯器通信并接收回应，但输入消息、浏览信息圈或使用应用程序仍至少需要使用一只手。

能够在更远距离运作的通讯器便没有那么便携；它们内置发电机以提供所需电力，并依靠活跃的漂流信标进行通信。这类通讯器的短期使用服务在大多数大型定居点都可以买到。

A personal comm unit is a pocket-sized device that combines a minor portable computer and a cellular communications device, allowing instantaneous wireless communication with other comm units in both audio- and text-based formats at planetary range. A personal comm unit also includes a calculator, a flashlight (emits bright light in a 5-foot radius around you and dim light in the next 5 feet), a browser that accesses any local infospheres, and several entertainment options (including games).

Personal comm units integrated into armor have some voice-activated capabilities; you can communicate with other comm units in audio-based formats and receive responses without needing a free hand, but typing a message, browsing the infosphere, or using an app requires the use of at least one hand.

Comm units that function at longer ranges aren't as portable; they include built-in generators that provide the necessary amount of power and rely on active Drift beacons to communicate. Short-term use of these units can be purchased in most major settlements.

Incendiary Grenade (Commercial).name: 燃烧手榴弹（商用） Incendiary Grenade (Commercial)
Incendiary Grenade (Commercial).description:
激活 1 区域 火焰

重击 5尺

这些手雷使用被点燃的化学物质爆炸，产生一阵强烈热浪，并造成1d8点火焰伤害，目标可进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] 豁免检定（@Template[burst|distance:5]）。如果你能够使用手雷的重击特化效果，则对燃烧手雷的豁免检定大失败的生物会被从手雷处击飞。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical 5 feet

These grenades use an ignited chemical to explode in a blast of intense heat and deal 1d8 fire damage with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save (@Template[burst|distance:5]). If you have access to the critical specialization effect of grenades, creatures who critically fail their saving throw against incendiary grenades are knocked away from the grenade.

Second Skin.name: 着甲如肤 Second Skin
Second Skin.description:
升级： 0

柔软却坚韧的织物能完美贴合穿戴者的身体，在不牺牲舒适性的前提下提供基础防护。第二层皮肤通常穿在便服下面。

Upgrades: 0

Soft but resilient fabric contours perfectly to the wearer's body, offering basic protection without sacrificing comfort. Second skin is commonly worn underneath casual clothing.

Semi-Auto Pistol.name: 半自动手枪 Semi-Auto Pistol
Semi-Auto Pistol.description:
升级： 1

这把手枪会在每次射击后自动弹出用过的弹壳，并装填新的弹药。

Upgrades: 1

This pistol automatically ejects used cartridges and loads new ammunition after every shot fired.

Projectile Ammo.name: 投射武器弹药 Projectile Ammo

Zero Knife.name: 零刀 Zero Knife
Zero Knife.description:
升级： 1

如同弹簧刀般展开，这把武器内部的超冷腔室会瞬间形成一片冰刃。

Upgrades: 1

Unfolding like a switchblade, a supercooled chamber within this weapon instantly forms a blade of ice.

Infiltrator's Toolkit (Commercial).name: 渗透者工具包（商业） Infiltrator's Toolkit (Commercial)
Infiltrator's Toolkit (Commercial).description:
你需要一套潜入者工具包，才能使用盗窃技能来@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{撬锁}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{解除装置}（某些类型）。

You need an infiltrator's toolkit to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick Locks} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Disable Devices} (of some types) using the Thievery skill.

Credstick.name: 信用点卡 Credstick
Credstick.description:
《星际探险家》中的大多数人都会把自己的财富存放在一种名为信用棒的受保护物品中。这些装置通常较为扁平，大小大致相当于一根人类手指。它们的尺寸和品质各不相同，但归根结底，它们不过是一种便于携带和花费金钱的工具。这些装置的使用方式由持有者决定，而信用棒只需在合适的银行设备附近轻触一下，就能完成接收或支付资金这样简单的操作。在需要更严格安保时，它们也可以要求语音或生物识别信息才能激活。有些先进（型）信用棒甚至带有魔法组件，可能需要精神密码，或念诵特定法术，才能取用储存的资金。

信用棒并不是通向一个人全部财富的入口，更多的信用点通常会安全地存放在银行、个人金库或安全数据库中。相反，信用棒是一种能够在不被追踪的情况下转移信用点的安全且匿名的手段。无论是冒险者还是普通市民，通常都会随身携带一根信用棒，以处理自己可能需要进行的各种购买，同时也只会在上面保留刚好够用的信用点，以免遗失信用棒就导致破产。

协约世界中的个人经常携带信用棒，而其他与协约互动的文明，也常会将本地资金兑换为信用点，并以这种形式携带，用来花费这些转换后的货币。有时，一个人可能会携带数根信用棒，分别用于不同用途，或者如果他们想进行一笔固定金额的购买，也可以直接把整根棒转交出去。要是一个人身上的信用棒数量多到太过累赘，也很容易把资金在各根棒之间转移，并丢弃已经清空的棒来节省空间，不过信用棒始终具有可忽略的体积。

Most people in Starfinder keep their wealth on a protected item known as a credstick. These devices are often flat and roughly the size of a human finger. They range in dimensions and quality, but at the end of the day, they're just a means of conveniently carrying and spending money. Usage of these devices is determined by the owner, and a credstick can accept or spend funds with as simple an action as tapping it near a suitable banking device. When more rigorous security is necessary, they can require audio or biometric imprints in order to activate. Some advanced credsticks even have a magical component that might require a mental password or the recitation of a specific spell to access stored funds.

Credsticks aren't gateways to the entirety of one's wealth, and larger stores of credits are often kept secured in banks, personal vaults, or secure databases. Instead, a credstick is a safe and anonymous means of moving credits around without being traced. Adventurers and common citizens alike often keep a credstick on their person to handle any purchases they might be called upon to make, while also only keeping just enough credits on them that losing the credstick wouldn't result in bankruptcy.

Individuals in the Pact Worlds often carry credsticks, and other civilizations that interact with the Pact often turn local funds into credits and thus carry them to spend their converted currency. Sometimes a person might carry several credsticks, dedicating each one to a different use, or simply trading the stick away if they want to make a purchase of a predefined amount. If ever the number of credsticks on a person becomes too cumbersome, it's easy enough to move the funds between individual sticks and discard emptied sticks to save on space, however a credstick always has a negligible bulk.

Focused.name: 专注 Focused
Focused.description:
你高度专注于你的目标，并能够辨明其行动。当你对你的目标进行反射或意志豁免检定获得成功时，你改为获得大成功。

You're highly focused on your target and able to discern their moves. When you roll a success on a Reflex or Will save against your mark, you get a critical success instead.

Specialized Skill Set.name: 专门化技能组合 Specialized Skill Set
Specialized Skill Set.description:
在3级、第7级和第15级时，你获得一个技能专长。这个专长必须适用于你特工专精所对应的受训技能。

At 3rd level, 7th level, and 15th level, you gain a skill feat. This feat must be for the trained skill from your operative's specialization.

Kill Steal.name: 抢头 Kill Steal
Kill Steal.description:
触发条件 一名盟友在其回合结束时，已对一个生物造成两次或更多次命中，或对一个生物造成重击。

需求 你正持握一把枪械。

你对盟友正集中攻击的敌人迅速开出一枪。你对触发此效果的盟友所命中的生物执行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{瞄准}，然后对该生物进行一次远程打击。

Trigger An ally ends their turn after hitting a creature two or more times or critically hitting a creature.

Requirements You're wielding a gun.

You fire a quick shot at a foe your ally is focusing their attacks on. You @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim} at the creature your triggering ally hit and then make a ranged Strike against that creature.

Ancestral Paragon.name: 族裔典范 Ancestral Paragon
Ancestral Paragon.description: 凭借天性、研究或魔法的帮助，你与自己族裔的关联比常人更深。你获得一个1级族裔专长。

Nightvision Adaptation.name: 夜光适应 Nightvision Adaptation
Nightvision Adaptation.description: 你的眼部处理器中的纳米机械已经适应了黑暗，增强了你在黑暗中的视力。你获得黑暗视觉。

Cat Fall.name: 猫落术 Cat Fall
Cat Fall.description: 模仿自猫的高空特技动作让你能够缓冲坠落的损伤。将坠落距离视为缩短10尺。若你在特技技能上的熟练度达到专家，将坠落距离视为缩短25尺，达到大师后，缩短50尺。若你在特技技能上的熟练度达到传奇，无论坠落距离多高，你始终能够以脚着地，不会受到任何伤害。

Hologram Skeptic.name: 全息影像怀疑论者 Hologram Skeptic
Hologram Skeptic.description:
你很容易察觉全息影像中的细微故障与瑕疵。即使你未在进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{搜索}，你也总会尝试进行一次检定，以识破全息影像，以及通常需要你对其进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{搜索}或与之互动的、具有幻觉和科技特征的效果。

You easily spot the tiny glitches and imperfections in holograms. Even if you aren't Searching, you always attempt a check to disbelieve holograms and effects with the illusion and tech traits that normally require you to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search} or Interact with them.

Master Gunner.name: 炮术长 Master Gunner
Master Gunner.description:
你是一名技艺高超的神射手，从不离身携带你的枪械。你使用简易和军用枪械的熟练等级提升为大师，使用先进枪械的熟练等级提升为专家。你获得所有你具有专家熟练的武器的重击专精效果。

You are a highly skilled sharpshooter and never go anywhere without your gun. Your proficiency rank increases to master with simple and martial guns, and increases to expert with advanced guns. You gain access to the critical specialization effect for all weapons for which you have expert proficiency.

Urban Operator.name: 都市行动专家 Urban Operator
Urban Operator.description:
你已习惯城市环境，能够在拥挤的城市景观中迅速移动。你无视城市环境中的困难地形，而城市环境中的高等困难地形对你而言仅视为困难地形。

You are accustomed to urban environments and can move swiftly through a crowded cityscape. You ignore difficult terrain in urban environments, and greater difficult terrain from urban environments is only difficult terrain for you.

Advanced Targeting System.name: 先进定位系统 Advanced Targeting System
Advanced Targeting System.description: 你的眼部处理器配备了先进的瞄准系统，可以让你更容易地定位你的敌人并读取他们的动作。你可以施展@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Gb7SeieEvd0pL2Eh]{料敌机先 Sure Strike}作为你的奥术内在法术，每日一次。

Switch Target.name: 切换目标 Switch Target
Switch Target.description:
触发 你当前已 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{瞄准} 的生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{濒死} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识} 状态。

需求 你正持握一把枪械。

当你的目标倒下时，你会立刻锁定下一个目标。你对另一个生物进行瞄准。

Trigger The creature you've currently @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aimed} at gains the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} condition.

Requirements You're wielding a gun.

As your target falls, you immediately home in on the next. You Aim at a different creature.

Phishing Expertise.name: 网络钓鱼专长 Phishing Expertise
Phishing Expertise.description:
你擅长实施数字欺诈计划。你可以使用 [[/act create-forgery skill=computers]]{计算机} 而非社群来进行伪造。数字伪造会与你的计算机 DC 进行比较。利用通过成功伪造获得的信息通常还需要额外的检定，包括欺瞒和社群，而撒网过广则有可能让潜在受害者识破你的诡计，并把你举报给当局。

You're skilled at running digital fraud schemes. You can Create a Forgery using [[/act create-forgery skill=computers]]{Computers} instead of Society. Digital forgeries are compared against your Computers DC. Using information gained from a successful forgery usually requires additional checks, including Deception and Society, and casting too wide a net runs the risk of a potential victim figuring out your ruse and turning you in to the authorities.

Reflex Mastery.name: 反射精通 Reflex Mastery
Reflex Mastery.description:
特使 你已经学会快速移动，以避开爆炸、龙息以及更糟的危险。你的反射豁免熟练等级提升为大师。当你在反射豁免中获得成功时，改为获得大成功。

特工 你已经学会快速移动，以避开爆炸、哨戒炮塔以及更糟的危险。你的反射豁免熟练等级提升为大师。当你在反射豁免中获得成功时，改为获得大成功。

Envoy You've learned to move quickly to avoid explosions, dragon's breath, and worse. Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to master. When you roll a success on a Reflex save, you get a critical success instead.

Operative You've learned to move quickly to avoid explosions, sentry turrets, and worse. Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to master. When you roll a success on a Reflex save, you get a critical success instead.

Operative's Edge.name: 特工的锋芒 Operative's Edge
Operative's Edge.description:
你培养出了敏锐的觉察力与对细节的关注。你的察觉熟练等级提升至大师。此外，你的先攻检定获得+2环境加值，使你在战斗中能更快作出反应。若你拥有“惊人的先攻”专长，则你的先攻检定环境加值改为+3。

You've developed keen awareness and attention to detail. Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to master. In addition, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to initiative rolls, making you faster to react during combat. If you take the Incredible Initiative feat, your circumstance bonus to initiative rolls becomes +3 instead.

Weapon Specialization.name: 武器专精 Weapon Specialization
Weapon Specialization.description:
特使、特工、巫战扭曲者 你已经学会如何用你最擅长的武器造成更严重的伤害。对于你拥有专家熟练等级的武器和徒手攻击，你造成的伤害额外增加2点。如果你是大师，则该伤害增加至3点；如果你是传奇，则增加至4点。

秘学者 你已经学会如何用你的武器保护自己和盟友。对于你拥有专家熟练等级的武器和徒手攻击，你造成的伤害额外增加2点。如果你是大师，则该伤害增加至3点；如果你是传奇，则增加至4点。

星辉武者 你已经学会如何用你最常练习的武器造成更严重的伤害。对于你拥有专家熟练等级的武器和徒手攻击，你造成的伤害额外增加2点。如果你是大师，则该伤害增加至3点；如果你是传奇，则增加至4点。

士兵 你能用你最擅长的武器造成更严重的伤害。对于你拥有专家熟练等级的武器和徒手攻击，你造成的伤害额外增加2点。如果你是大师，则该伤害增加至3点；如果你是传奇，则增加至4点。

Envoy, Operative, Witchwarper You've learned how to inflict greater injuries with the weapons you know best. You deal 2 additional damage with weapons and unarmed attacks in which you're an expert. This damage increases to 3 damage if you're a master, and 4 damage if you're legendary.

Mystic You've learned to protect yourself and your allies with your weapons. You deal 2 additional damage with weapons and unarmed attacks in which you're an expert. This damage increases to 3 if you're a master and 4 if you're legendary.

Solarian You've learned how to inflict greater injuries with the weapons you've practiced with most. You deal 2 additional damage with weapons and unarmed attacks in which you're an expert. This damage increases to 3 if you're a master, and 4 if you're legendary.

Soldier You inflict greater injuries with the weapons you know best. You deal 2 additional damage with weapons and unarmed attacks in which you're an expert. This damage increases to 3 if you're a master, and 4 if you're legendary.

Force Field (Tactical).name: 力场（战术型） Force Field (Tactical)
Force Field (Tactical).description:
力场会吸收伤害。力场的生命值取决于其版本。当你的力场处于激活状态时，你将要受到的任何物理或能量伤害都会先应用于力场的生命值，然后才应用于你的生命值（包括临时生命值）。如果你已举起护盾，你的力场和护盾都会承受伤害。如果一次攻击或效果造成的伤害使力场降至 0 生命值，你会承受任何超出的伤害，力场会解除激活，且 10 分钟内不能再次激活。力场在处于激活状态时，每轮都会在你的回合开始时恢复标示数量的生命值。

如果你的力场为战术型或更高版本，它还会保护你免受致命打击。每当你在力场处于激活状态时受到重击，对列出的 DC 进行一次平检。若成功，则改为普通命中。

该力场有 14 生命值，并在你的回合恢复 3 生命值，且 @Check[flat|dc:20]。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.7CtHz1DQcMXLafOS]{效果：力场 14}

激活—升起力场 1 (manipulate)

频率 每天三次

效果 你的力场变为激活状态。它会持续 1 分钟，或直到其生命值降至 0。

Force fields absorb damage. A force field's Hit Points are based on its version. While your force field is active, any physical or energy damage you would take is applied to the force field's Hit Points first before being applied to your Hit Points (including temporary Hit Points). If you have a shield raised, your force field and shield both take damage. If damage from an attack or effect reduces the force field to 0 Hit Points, you take any excess damage, the force field deactivates, and it can't be activated again for 10 minutes. Force fields replenish the indicated number of Hit Points each round at the beginning of your turn while they're active.

If your force field is tactical or better, it also protects you from deadly blows. Each time you're critically hit while your force field is active, attempt a flat check against the listed DC. On a success, it becomes a normal hit.

The force field has 14 Hit Points and replenishes 3 Hit Points on your turn, and @Check[flat|dc:20].

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.7CtHz1DQcMXLafOS]{Effect: Force Field 14}

Activate—Raise Force Field 1 (manipulate)

Frequency three times per day

Effect Your force field becomes active. It remains active for 1 minute or until it's reduced to 0 Hit Points.

Medpatch (Tactical).name: 医疗贴（战术型） Medpatch (Tactical)
Medpatch (Tactical).description:
激活 1 (manipulate)

医疗贴片会加速身体的自然愈合。你恢复 @Damage[(3d6+6)[healing]] 生命值，并在 10 分钟内获得对抗疾病和毒素的豁免检定 +1 物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{效果：医疗贴片}

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Medpatches accelerate the body's natural healing. You regain @Damage[(3d6+6)[healing]] Hit Points and gain a +1 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{Effect: Medpatch}

Hair Trigger.name: 一触即发 Hair Trigger
Hair Trigger.description:
触发 自你上个回合开始以来，你最后一次@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{瞄准}的生物进行操纵动作或移动动作、进行一次远程攻击，或在移动动作中离开一个方格。

需求 你正持用一把枪械。

你尝试对触发生物进行一次远程打击。此次打击不计入你的多重攻击减值，且你的多重攻击减值也不适用于此次打击。

Trigger The last creature you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aimed} at since the start of your last turn uses a manipulate action or a move action, makes a ranged attack, or leaves a square during a move action.

Requirements You're wielding a gun.

You attempt a ranged Strike against the triggering creature. This Strike doesn't count toward your multiple attack penalty, and your multiple attack penalty doesn't apply to this Strike.

Dive for Cover.name: 飞扑寻找掩护 Dive for Cover
Dive for Cover.description:
当受到威胁时，你可以迅速飞扑并找地方蜷身隐蔽。你@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{跳跃}，以@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧}状态落地，并立即@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{采取掩护}，从而让你蜷身隐蔽，并获得针对远程攻击的强效掩护。

When threatened, you can quickly take a dive and find somewhere to hunker down. You @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{Leap}, land @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}, and immediately @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Take Cover}, which allows you to hunker down and gain greater cover against ranged attacks.

Take the Wheel.name: 掌控方向 Take the Wheel
Take the Wheel.description:
你登上并接管一辆邻近的载具。

You Board and Take Control of an adjacent vehicle.

Human.name: 人类 Human
Human.description:
人类以其在最具挑战性的处境中适应并蓬勃发展的能力而闻名，其中也包括他们母星戈拉里昂的神秘消失。人类雄心勃勃、富有创造力且永远充满好奇心，在银河系中始终保持着强大的存在感，常常担任领导职位或活跃在探索的最前沿。几乎任何地方都能发现人类的身影，他们几乎无所不为。

Humans are known for their ability to adapt and thrive in the most challenging situations, including the mysterious loss of their home world, Golarion. Ambitious, creative, and endlessly curious, humans maintain a robust presence in the galaxy, often taking on positions of leadership or acting at the forefront of exploration. Humans can be found almost anywhere, doing almost anything.

Skilled Human (Diplomacy).name: 熟练人类（外交） Skilled Human (Diplomacy)
Skilled Human (Diplomacy).description: 你的聪明才智让你有机会擅长多种技能。你选择的一项技能获得受训熟练度。5级时，你在该所选技能上的熟练度提升至专家。

Outlaw.name: 法外之徒 Outlaw
Outlaw.description:
你是个职业罪犯，恶名昭著。也许是不公的环境迫使你走上犯罪生涯，又或者你享受成功实施抢劫或在枪战中生还所带来的刺激。不管怎样，这就是你唯一熟悉的生活，而拜你头上的赏金所赐，你会一直过这种日子，直到棺材落地，或者攒够足够的信用点去给自己买个新的身份。

选择两项属性增强。其中一项必须加在力量或魅力上，另一项为自由属性增强。

你在威吓技能和黑社会传识技能上受训。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.zdycsO9Z0wHBZ17k]{威吓射击} 技能专长。

You're a career criminal with a nasty reputation. Perhaps unfair circumstances forced you into a life of crime, or maybe you enjoy the thrill you get from pulling off a heist or living through a shoot-out. Either way, this life is the only one you know, and thanks to the bounty on your head, you're in it until the casket drops or you make enough creds to buy a new one.

Choose two attribute boosts. One must be to Strength or Charisma, and one is a free attribute boost.

You're trained in the Intimidation skill and the Underworld Lore skill. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.zdycsO9Z0wHBZ17k]{Intimidating Shot} skill feat.

Intimidating Shot.name: 威吓射击 Intimidating Shot
Intimidating Shot.description:
你尝试通过朝空中开火，用你的远程武器对一名敌人施展 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{恫吓}，消耗等同于该武器 expend 值的弹药，并使用该武器的最大射程，而非通常的 30 英尺射程。若目标与你不共享语言，此检定不会承受 –4 的境遇减值。

You attempt to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} a foe with your ranged weapon by firing it into the air, using ammo equal to the weapon's expend and the weapon's maximum range rather than the usual range of 30 feet. This check doesn't take a –4 circumstance penalty if the target doesn't share a language with you.

Envoy.name: 特使 Envoy
Envoy.description:
你是一位操纵影响力的大师。你凭借迷人的微笑、敏捷的机智，以及敏锐的自保意识，在物质宇宙中闯出自己的一片天地。你是一位能够激励队友的领导者，推动他们突破极限，并在艰难时刻帮助他们渡过难关。你擅长让别人去做你想让他们做的事，但当情况急转直下时，你也总是准备好迎难而上。你可能是骗子、外交官、表演者或军官——也可能在局势需要时承担任何角色。

You're a master influencer. You make your way in the universe with a charming smile, quick wit, and keen sense of self-preservation. You're a leader who motivates your teammates, pushes them past their limits, and helps them through tough spots. You excel at getting others to do what you want, but you're always ready to face trouble head-on when things take a turn for the worse. You might be a con artist, diplomat, performer, or military officer—or you might take on whatever role the situation demands.

Envoy Directives.name: 特使训令 Envoy Directives
Envoy Directives.description:
特使以训令鼓舞盟友。训令是一种命令，能让遵从它的盟友获得益处。特使的训令包含一种让特使通过花费更多动作来以身作则、从而增强效果的方式。训令具有听觉或视觉特征，取决于你如何激励盟友。

你起始时拥有一个特使训令。你可以通过特使职业、特使职业专长以及你的领导风格学会更多训令。你每轮可以发布一个训令。除非另有说明，特使的训令及其赋予的益处会持续到你下一回合开始时。

你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cmCtfURzpbzkxWsy]{狠狠干！} 特使训令。

Envoys encourage their allies with directives. A directive is an order that benefits allies who follow it. Envoy directives include a way for the envoy to lead by example by spending more actions for increased effects. Directives have the auditory or visual trait depending on how you inspire your allies.

You begin with one envoy directive. You can learn more directives through the envoy class, envoy class feats, and your leadership style. You can issue one directive a round. Unless otherwise stated, an envoy's directive and the benefits it grants last until the beginning of your next turn.

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cmCtfURzpbzkxWsy]{Get 'Em!} envoy directive.

Leadership Style.name: 领导风格 Leadership Style
Leadership Style.description:
无论这是你的天性，还是你经过了这方面的训练，你都已发展出一种领导他人的个人风格。在1级时，选择一种领导风格。你在所标示的领导技能上成为受训，获得所标示的领导特长，并知晓与之相关的领导训令。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.u2dy5FMDv30UH8HC]{身先士卒}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.KEoTccJlfKzMk19l]{暗中指挥}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.jaGIV3t7G07F0qda]{枪火全开}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.RIUhD5eldHzBsFIe]{聚光灯下}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.GTmdHGLcuc11Bizi]{信息圈指挥家}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.6cFaxZ4aAhuUbnwi]{共度绝境}

Whether it comes naturally, or you trained for it, you've developed a personal style of leading others. At 1st level, select a leadership style. You become trained in the indicated leadership skill, you gain the indicated leadership perk, and know the associated leadership directive.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.u2dy5FMDv30UH8HC]{From the Front}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.KEoTccJlfKzMk19l]{From the Shadows}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.jaGIV3t7G07F0qda]{Guns Blazing}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.RIUhD5eldHzBsFIe]{In the Spotlight}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.GTmdHGLcuc11Bizi]{Infosphere Director}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.6cFaxZ4aAhuUbnwi]{Through Desperate Times}

Get 'Em!.name: 狠狠干！ Get 'Em!
Get 'Em!.description:
你指定一个敌人为你和你的盟友集中攻击的目标。选择一个你能看见的、位于60尺内的敌人。直到你的下个回合开始前，你和你的盟友对该目标的攻击获得+1状态加值。

以身作则 如果你用了两个动作，则对目标进行一次打击。你的伤害掷骰获得等同于你魅力调整值的状态加值。无论这次打击是否命中，直到你的下个回合开始前，你和你的盟友随后对该敌人进行的打击在伤害上获得+1状态加值。在5级、10级、15级和20级时，此伤害加值提高1。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.ey2zSEnprAGgvrij]{效果：Get 'Em!'}

You single out an enemy for you and your allies to focus your attacks on. Select an enemy within 60 feet that you can see. You and your allies gain a +1 status bonus to attacks against that target until the beginning of your next turn.

Lead by Example If you used two actions, Strike the target. You gain a status bonus to the damage roll equal to your Charisma modifier. Regardless of whether the Strike hits, you and your allies gain a +1 status bonus to damage on subsequent Strikes made against the enemy until the start of your next turn. Increase the damage by 1 at 5th, 10th, 15th, and 20th levels.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.ey2zSEnprAGgvrij]{Effect: Get 'Em!}

Guns Blazing.name: 枪火齐发 Guns Blazing
Guns Blazing.description:
你以火力给人留下深刻印象，从而领导你的团队。你夸张张扬的个性有弹幕般的枪火作后盾，而且你总是先开枪。

领导技能 特技

领导特长 你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.2kwXTUjYYhoAGySr]{惊人先攻} 作为一个奖励专长。

领导训令 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.RNilk6Evoi0xNbWX]{准备武器！}

You lead your team by making an impression with firepower. Your bombastic personality has a barrage of gunfire to back it up, and you always shoot first.

Leadership Skill Acrobatics

Leadership Perk You gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.2kwXTUjYYhoAGySr]{Incredible Initiative} as a bonus feat.

Leadership Directive @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.RNilk6Evoi0xNbWX]{Ready Arms!}

Ready Arms!.name: 预备武器！ Ready Arms!
Ready Arms!.description:
通过迅速下达命令，你让盟友们做好装备准备。你和30尺内的所有盟友都可以以自由动作进行互动，以拔出、切换持持方式，或交换武器。

以身作则 如果你用了两个动作，你可以用你拔出或换上的武器进行打击、区域射击或自动射击（包括通过改变当前启用的持手组）。如果你的打击命中，或者某个目标在对抗你的区域射击或自动射击时豁免失败，则一名盟友可以以反应对同一目标进行一次打击。

With quick commands, you get your allies to ready their equipment. You and all allies within 30 feet can Interact to draw, Switch Hands, or swap weapons as a free action.

Lead by Example If you used two actions, you can Strike, Area Fire, or Auto-Fire with a weapon you drew or swapped to (including by changing active set of hands). If your Strike hits or if a target failed its save against your Area Fire or Auto-Fire, one ally can make a Strike against the same target as a reaction.

Incredible Initiative.name: 惊奇先攻 Incredible Initiative
Incredible Initiative.description: 你的反应比他人更迅速。你的先攻检定获得+2环境加值。

Absalom Lore.name: 阿布萨洛姆传说知识 Absalom Lore

Underworld Lore.name: 地下世界学识 Underworld Lore

Comm Unit.name: 通讯单元 Comm Unit
Comm Unit.description:
个人通讯器是一种口袋大小的设备，结合了小型便携电脑和蜂窝通信设备，可在行星范围内以音频和文本两种格式与其他通讯器进行即时无线通信。个人通讯器还包括计算器、手电筒（以你为中心5英尺半径内发出明亮光照，并在再外侧5英尺范围内发出微光）、可访问任何本地信息圈的浏览器，以及若干娱乐选项（包括游戏）。

整合进护甲的个人通讯器具备一些语音激活功能；你可以在不需要空闲手的情况下，以音频格式与其他通讯器通信并接收回复，但输入消息、浏览信息圈或使用应用程序仍至少需要一只手。

可在更远距离运作的通讯器便不那么便携；它们包含内置发电机，以提供所需的电力，并依靠活跃的漂流信标进行通信。大多数大型定居点都可以购买这些通讯器的短期使用服务。

A personal comm unit is a pocket-sized device that combines a minor portable computer and a cellular communications device, allowing instantaneous wireless communication with other comm units in both audio- and text-based formats at planetary range. A personal comm unit also includes a calculator, a flashlight (emits bright light in a 5-foot radius around you and dim light in the next 5 feet), a browser that accesses any local infospheres, and several entertainment options (including games).

Personal comm units integrated into armor have some voice-activated capabilities; you can communicate with other comm units in audio-based formats and receive responses without needing a free hand, but typing a message, browsing the infosphere, or using an app requires the use of at least one hand.

Comm units that function at longer ranges aren't as portable; they include built-in generators that provide the necessary amount of power and rely on active Drift beacons to communicate. Short-term use of these units can be purchased in most major settlements.

Knife.name: 刀 Knife
Knife.description:
升级： 1

小刀既可作武器，也可作工具，价值极高，其形制、样式和材质多种多样，从星铁到陶瓷不一而足。

Upgrades: 1

Invaluable as both a weapon and a tool, knives come in a variety of shapes, styles, and materials ranging from starmetals to ceramics.

Medkit (Commercial).name: 医疗箱（商用） Medkit (Commercial)
Medkit (Commercial).description:
其中包含止痛药、绷带、无菌纱布和缝合工具，是进行医疗检定以@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.MHLuKy4nQO2Z4Am1]{实施急救}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.TC7OcDa7JlWbqMaN]{治疗疾病}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.KjoCEEmPGTeFE4hh]{治疗毒素}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤口}所必需的。

These contain analgesics, bandages, sterile gauze, and suturing tools necessary for Medicine checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.MHLuKy4nQO2Z4Am1]{Administer First Aid}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.TC7OcDa7JlWbqMaN]{Treat Disease}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.KjoCEEmPGTeFE4hh]{Treat Poison}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds}.

Second Skin.name: 着甲如肤 Second Skin
Second Skin.description:
升级： 0

这种柔软却有韧性的织物能完美贴合穿戴者的身体，在不牺牲舒适性的前提下提供基础防护。第二层皮肤通常穿在便服里面。

Upgrades: 0

Soft but resilient fabric contours perfectly to the wearer's body, offering basic protection without sacrificing comfort. Second skin is commonly worn underneath casual clothing.

Semi-Auto Pistol.name: 半自动手枪 Semi-Auto Pistol
Semi-Auto Pistol.description:
升级： 1

这把手枪会在每次射击后自动弹出用过的弹壳并装填新的弹药。

Upgrades: 1

This pistol automatically ejects used cartridges and loads new ammunition after every shot fired.

Hacking Toolkit (Commercial).name: 黑客工具包（商用） Hacking Toolkit (Commercial)
Hacking Toolkit (Commercial).description:
进行“入侵”计算机的“计算机”检定时，需要一套黑客工具包。你可以使用黑客工具包在不借助用户界面的情况下访问计算机，但这需要与计算机进行物理接触，或通过信息圈或类似的互联网络进行连接。

A hacking toolkit is required for Computers checks to Hack computers. You can use a hacking toolkit to access a computer without using a user interface, but this requires physical contact with the computer or contact via an infosphere or a similar linked network.

Infiltrator's Toolkit (Commercial).name: 渗透者工具包（商业） Infiltrator's Toolkit (Commercial)
Infiltrator's Toolkit (Commercial).description:
你需要一套渗透者工具包，才能使用巧手技能来@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{撬锁}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{解除装置}（某些类型）。

You need an infiltrator's toolkit to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick Locks} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Disable Devices} (of some types) using the Thievery skill.

Projectile Ammo.name: 弹射武器弹药 Projectile Ammo

Natural Ambition.name: 天生野望 Natural Ambition
Natural Ambition.description: 你从小就壮志勃勃，并且为了出人头地一直在努力奋斗，这让你在你所选择的职业领域上的进步卓越。你获得你自身职业的一个1级职业专长。你必须满足该专长的先决条件，你仅能在创建角色阶段延后选取该专长，以满足所选职业专长的先决条件。

Watch Out.name: 小心！ Watch Out
Watch Out.description:
触发条件 一个生物以60英尺内的一名盟友为目标进行攻击，且你能看见攻击者和你的盟友。

你向盟友发出警告信号，使其针对该次触发攻击的 AC 获得+2环境加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.8eqdNadBEcXMvjng]{效果：当心}

Trigger A creature targets an ally within 60 feet with an attack, and you can see both the attacker and your ally.

You signal a warning to your ally, granting them a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.8eqdNadBEcXMvjng]{Effect: Watch Out}

Size Up.name: 评估体型 Size Up
Size Up.description:
频率 每小时一次

你花费 1 分钟观察一个特定个体、花费 10 分钟在信息圈上调查一个特定个体，或花费 1 小时建立人脉并收集信息。该对象成为你的目标。若你通过观察来评估你的目标，你不需要知道其身份；但若你通过调查或建立人脉来评估你的目标，你必须知道其身份，而这至少需要关于对方的两条相关信息。相关信息的例子包括其姓名、出身地、当前住处、其父母或重要伴侣的姓名、其雇主，或其所属组织。GM 会根据你所选择的目标，判定哪些内容可构成此用途下的相关信息。

你在针对或涉及你的目标进行的欺骗、交涉、威吓和察觉检定上获得 +1 处境加值；你在尝试对你的目标进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 时，也获得 +1 处境加值。

当你对一个目标使用 1 动作的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cmCtfURzpbzkxWsy]{盯上他！} 时，你获得 2 动作版本 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cmCtfURzpbzkxWsy]{盯上他！} 的收益。

你可以维持数量等同于你魅力调整值的目标。若在此之后你对其他目标使用“估量”，你的新目标会替代先前的一个目标。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.RBWwGxsrxPBKi3X7]{效果：估量}

Frequency once per hour

You spend 1 minute observing a specific individual, 10 minutes researching a specific individual on the infosphere, or 1 hour networking and gathering information. This subject is your asset. If you assess your asset via observation, you don't need to know their identity, but if you assess your asset via research or networking, you must know their identity, which requires at least two relevant pieces of information about them. Examples of relevant information could include their name, their place of origin, their current residence, the name of their parent or significant other, their employer, or their organizational affiliation. The GM determines what constitutes relevant information for this purpose, based on the asset you've selected.

You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Deception, Diplomacy, Intimidation, and Perception checks against or in relation to your asset, and a +1 circumstance bonus to attempts to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about your asset.

You gain the benefits of the 2-action @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cmCtfURzpbzkxWsy]{Get 'Em!} when using 1-action Get 'Em! on an asset.

You can maintain a number of assets equal to your Charisma modifier. If you Size Up other assets after that, your new asset replaces a previous one.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.RBWwGxsrxPBKi3X7]{Effect: Size Up}

Credstick.name: 信用棒 Credstick
Credstick.description:
《Starfinder》中的大多数人都会把自己的财富存放在一种受保护的物品上，这种物品被称为信用棒。此类装置通常较为扁平，大小大致相当于一根人类手指。它们的尺寸和品质各不相同，但归根结底，它们只是用来方便携带和花钱的一种手段。这些装置的使用方式由持有者决定，而信用棒只需在合适的银行设备附近轻轻一触，就能完成收款或支付这样简单的操作。当需要更严格的安全措施时，它们可以要求语音或生物识别印记才能激活。有些先进（型）信用棒甚至带有魔法组件，可能需要精神密码，或念出特定法术，才能取用储存的资金。

信用棒并不是通往个人全部财富的入口，数额更大的信用点通常会安全存放在银行、私人金库或安全数据库中。相反，信用棒是一种安全且匿名的信用点转移方式，不易被追踪。无论是冒险者还是普通市民，通常都会随身携带一根信用棒，以便处理自己可能需要进行的各种购买；同时，他们身上也只会保留恰好足够的信用点，这样即使丢失信用棒，也不至于破产。

协约世界中的个人常常携带信用棒，而其他与协约互动的文明，也经常会把当地资金兑换成信用点，因此也会携带信用棒来花费这些兑换后的货币。有时，一个人可能会携带数根信用棒，将每一根专门用于不同用途；或者如果他们想进行一笔预定金额的购买，也可能会直接把整根棒交易出去。如果一个人身上的信用棒数量多到过于累赘，那么在不同信用棒之间转移资金并丢弃已经清空的信用棒来节省空间就很容易了，不过信用棒始终具有可忽略不计的体积。

Most people in Starfinder keep their wealth on a protected item known as a credstick. These devices are often flat and roughly the size of a human finger. They range in dimensions and quality, but at the end of the day, they're just a means of conveniently carrying and spending money. Usage of these devices is determined by the owner, and a credstick can accept or spend funds with as simple an action as tapping it near a suitable banking device. When more rigorous security is necessary, they can require audio or biometric imprints in order to activate. Some advanced credsticks even have a magical component that might require a mental password or the recitation of a specific spell to access stored funds.

Credsticks aren't gateways to the entirety of one's wealth, and larger stores of credits are often kept secured in banks, personal vaults, or secure databases. Instead, a credstick is a safe and anonymous means of moving credits around without being traced. Adventurers and common citizens alike often keep a credstick on their person to handle any purchases they might be called upon to make, while also only keeping just enough credits on them that losing the credstick wouldn't result in bankruptcy.

Individuals in the Pact Worlds often carry credsticks, and other civilizations that interact with the Pact often turn local funds into credits and thus carry them to spend their converted currency. Sometimes a person might carry several credsticks, dedicating each one to a different use, or simply trading the stick away if they want to make a purchase of a predefined amount. If ever the number of credsticks on a person becomes too cumbersome, it's easy enough to move the funds between individual sticks and discard emptied sticks to save on space, however a credstick always has a negligible bulk.

Shirren.name: 希仑尼斯人 Shirren
Shirren.description:
昆虫般的希伦人从具有毁灭性的虫群中分离出来，舍弃了冷酷无情的蜂巢思维，以追求个人自由并终结星际暴力的循环。希伦人是一个具有心灵感应能力的物种，忠于自身的个体主义，建立自选的社群，并与其他族群和谐共处。

The insectile shirrens split from the destructive Swarm, forsaking the ruthless hive mind to pursue personal freedom and end the cycl e of interstellar violence. Shirrens are a species of telepaths devoted to their own individualism, building chosen communities, and living in harmony with other peoples.

Limited Telepathy.name: 有限心灵感应 Limited Telepathy
Limited Telepathy.description:
你可以与30英尺内的生物进行心灵交流。你只能与和你共享语言的生物交流。这不会让你接触到它们的思想，且传达的信息不会比正常言语更多。

You can communicate mentally with creatures within 30 feet. You can communicate only with creatures that share a language with you. This doesn't give you any access to their thoughts, and it communicates no more information than normal speech would.

Defiant Shirren.name: 不屈西伦尼斯人 Defiant Shirren
Defiant Shirren.description:
尽管时间流逝，你在反抗虫群以及一切形式的精神控制时依然意志坚定。若你对抗一个由具有虫族特征的生物，或你已知与虫群结盟的生物所创造的效果进行意志豁免检定并获得成功，则你改为获得大成功。对任何受法术或控制其的效果影响的生物，你也获得这些好处。此外，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.nAJeT29ZJvqeg98h]{Rebellious Defiance} 动作。

Despite the passage of time, you remain resolute in your defiance of the Swarm and all forms of mental control. If you roll a success on a Will saving throw against an effect that was created by a creature with the kucharn trait or a creature that you know is allied with the Swarm, you get a critical success instead. You gain these benefits against any creature affected by a spell or effect that controls it. Additionally, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.nAJeT29ZJvqeg98h]{Rebellious Defiance} action.

Rebellious Defiance.name: 叛逆反抗 Rebellious Defiance
Rebellious Defiance.description:
频率 每天一次

效果 你斥责100英尺内一个你看得见的敌人为暴君或恶徒，并做好准备反抗他们，哪怕至死方休。你对该敌人的攻击检定获得+1环境加值，并且对抗该敌人的攻击、法术和效果时，你的豁免检定获得+1环境加值。这些增益持续1分钟。

Frequency once per day

Effect You decry one foe within 100 feet that you can see as a tyrant or villain and prepare yourself to defy them, even until death. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus on your attack rolls against this foe, and you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against the attacks, spells, and effects of this foe. These benefits last for 1 minute.

Disciple.name: 门徒 Disciple
Disciple.description:
你是某位特定神祇的忠诚信徒。你可能成长于一种宗教文化中，或者也许在人生后来的某个阶段感受到与某位神明心意相通的召唤，但你已经磨炼了自己的技艺，并将一生奉献于作为这位神祇追随者的生活。

选择两项属性增强。其中一项必须是你神祇“神圣属性”条目中指定的属性，另一项为自由属性增强。

你在该神祇所列的神圣技能以及一项与你神祇相关的学识技能（例如阿巴达尔学识）上获得受训。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.NY2R5hNgdkSRPkTV]{宗教护符} 技能专长，即使你不满足该专长的前置条件。

You're a loyal disciple of a particular deity. You might have been raised in a religious culture or perhaps felt a kindred calling toward a god later in life, but you've honed your skills and devoted your life to living as a follower of that deity.

Choose two attribute boosts. One must be an attribute specified in your deity's Divine Attribute entry, and one is a free attribute boost.

You're trained in the deity's listed divine skill and a Lore skill related to your deity (Abadar Lore, for example). You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.NY2R5hNgdkSRPkTV]{Religious Talisman} skill feat even if you do not meet the feat's prerequisites.

Religious Talisman.name: 宗教护符 Religious Talisman
Religious Talisman.description:
你可以花 10 分钟制作并为你神祇的宗教象征物祝圣。虽然这类护符传统上是画有宗教符号的纸片，但它们也可以有多种形式，包括身体艺术、贴纸，甚至虚拟表情符号。你只能为自己以及你所崇拜的神祇制作护符。只要你持续从事符合你神祇典范的活动，你就会在先攻掷骰上获得 +1 状态加值。若你违背了你神祇的禁忌，这个护符就会被摧毁，且你在完成 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.7Fd4lxozd11MQ55N]{Atone} 仪式之前，先攻掷骰和察觉检定承受 –1 状态减值。

You can construct and bless a religious symbol of your deity in 10 minutes. While such talismans are traditionally scraps of paper with a religious symbol drawn on them, they can take many forms, including body art, a sticker, or even a virtual emoji. You can create a talisman only for yourself and for the deity you worship. As long as you continue to engage in activities that match your deity's edicts you gain a +1 status bonus to initiative rolls. If you violate your deity's anathema, the talisman is destroyed, and you take a –1 status penalty to initiative rolls and Perception checks until you complete an @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.7Fd4lxozd11MQ55N]{Atone} ritual.

Mystic.name: 秘学者 Mystic
Mystic.description:
你是一条管道，传导着连接并束缚宇宙万物的基本力量。你可以汲取这股超自然的源泉，与盟友建立深厚的精神纽带，在战斗中强化他们，并在他们受伤时恢复他们的健康。你的力量会根据你所选择的连接呈现出独特的形态，并随着你更深层次地探索自己的连接，获得全新且更强大的法术。

You're a conduit, channeling the fundamental forces that connect and bind everything in the cosmos. You can draw upon this supernatural wellspring to form deep spiritual bonds with your allies, empower them in combat, and restore their health should they become injured.
