Your powers take unique shape based on the connection you choose, granting new and more powerful spells as you explore your connection on a deeper level.

Vitality Network.name: 活力网络 Vitality Network
Vitality Network.description:
你的灵魂维系着一张能量网络，将与你建立纽带之人连接起来并为其疗愈。你的活力网络的最大容量等于 6 + 每级 4 点生命值。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.UeMHbnnaXDa3sGfG]{转移活力} 动作，你可以用它将生命值从你的网络中取出，转移给自己或盟友，作为治疗。

生死关头有助于强化你与盟友之间的纽带。每次在战斗中轮到你回合开始时，当你恢复动作时，你的活力网络恢复 4 点生命值；如果你的法术 DC 达到大师，则改为恢复 6 点生命值；如果你达到传奇，则恢复 8 点生命值。当你重新聚焦时，你的活力网络恢复全部生命值。

Your soul supports a network of energy that connects and heals those in your bond. Your vitality network has a maximum capacity equal to 6 + 4 Hit Points per level. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.UeMHbnnaXDa3sGfG]{Transfer Vitality} action that you can use to take Hit Points out of your network and into yourself or your allies as healing.

Life-and-death situations help strengthen your bonds with your allies. At the start of each turn in combat, when you regain actions, your vitality network regains 4 Hit Points; if you're master in spell DC, it regains 6 Hit Points instead; if you're legendary, it regains 8 Hit Points. When you Refocus, your vitality network regains all its Hit Points.

Connection.name: 连接 Connection
Connection.description:
所有秘学者都与某种太空力量有着超自然的连接，这种力量赋予他们魔法能力。你的连接的确切性质可能千差万别——你可能崇拜一位神祇或一个万神殿，体现某种形而上概念，成为自然之怒的传导者，或是其他什么。即使是拥有相同连接的秘学者，对其力量来源的理解也可能各不相同。在1级时，选择你的连接。你所选择的连接决定了你施放的法术类型，以及你从中选择法术的法术传承、你额外受训的技能、你所习得的顿悟，以及一种和谐；这种和谐通常会在你用生命力网络治疗生物时赋予其特殊增益。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.fM1vlupLq9Zlyt7C]{阿卡西}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.AurhNoZmNNhHktx6]{元素}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.XV8C2ASALC65G5MH]{治疗}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.jV9LIUswOPkVRC49]{节奏}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.kvmpnKMVw4wwGk8c]{暗影}

All mystics have a supernatural connection with a cosmic force that grants magical powers. The exact nature of your connection can vary widely—you might worship a god or pantheon, embody a metaphysical concept, become a conduit for nature's wrath, or something else. Even mystics who share the same connection might interpret the source of their powers differently. At 1st level, choose your connection. Your chosen connection determines the type of spells you cast and the spell tradition you choose spells from, your additional trained skill, the epiphanies you learn, and a harmony that usually grants creatures a special benefit when you heal them with your vitality network.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.fM1vlupLq9Zlyt7C]{Akashic}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.AurhNoZmNNhHktx6]{Elemental}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.XV8C2ASALC65G5MH]{Healing}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.jV9LIUswOPkVRC49]{Rhythm}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.kvmpnKMVw4wwGk8c]{Shadow}

Transfer Vitality.name: 转移活力 Transfer Vitality
Transfer Vitality.description:
你可以将至多 10 点生命值（最少 1 点）从你的活力网络转移给你自己，或一个你能感知到且位于 60 英尺内的缔约生物。此效果对具有虚能治疗的生物同样有效，视同此动作具有虚能特征。你可转移的数值会在 5 级、10 级、15 级和 20 级时各增加 10 点。

You can transfer up to 10 Hit Points (minimum 1) from your vitality network into yourself or a bonded creature you can sense within 60 feet. This works on creatures with void healing as though this action had the void trait. The amount you can transfer increases by 10 at 5th, 10th, 15th and 20th level.

Shadow.name: 暗影 Shadow
Shadow.description:
你知道每一道阴影都是通往冥界的传送门，而你如同塑造黏土的艺术家一般，随心所欲地将那个领域的阴影物质塑造成可怖而奇妙的形态。

传统 神圣

连接技能 隐匿

连接法术 戏法：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.0zU8CPejjQFnhZFI]{Figment}；1环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.k34hDOfIIMAxNL4a]{Grim Tendrils}；2环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility}；3环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.WsUwpfmhKrKwoIe3]{Slow}；4环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.zR67Rt3UMHKC5evy]{Flicker}；5环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.IqJ9URobmJ9L9UBG]{Shadow Blast}；6环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.WPXzPl7YbMEIGWfi]{Mislead}；7环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.0jadeyQIItIuRgeH]{Eclipse Burst}；8环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.wfleiawxsfhpRRwf]{Disappearance}；9环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.MJx7DmjsWYzDZ3a4]{Phantasmagoria}

顿悟法术 初始：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.uh9Br4yrKvJA6zq0]{Shadow Snap}；先进：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.rluzzX2ml4yFWnYw]{Cloying Shadows}；更高：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.pgjlPNfXCpEYyLVu]{Shadow Prison}

和谐 当你转移生命力时，目标的影子会变得更深更大，使目标周围 @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] 内的明亮光照降为微光。这是一种魔法黑暗，能够压制非魔法光源，或尝试反制魔法光照。目标在这片微光中获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}，并且可以利用隐蔽状态来 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hide}。此效果持续至你下个回合结束。

完美和谐 你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.u9NU2bULHg3S5FaP]{Umbral Stride} 动作。当你转移生命力时，目标可以在其下个回合结束前使用此动作一次。

You know every shadow is a portal to the Netherworld, and like an artist molding clay, you sculpt that realm's shadowy substance into dreadful and wondrous shapes at your whim.

Tradition divine

Connection Skill Stealth

Connection Spells cantrip: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.0zU8CPejjQFnhZFI]{Figment}; 1st: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.k34hDOfIIMAxNL4a]{Grim Tendrils}; 2nd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility}; 3rd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.WsUwpfmhKrKwoIe3]{Slow}; 4th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.zR67Rt3UMHKC5evy]{Flicker}; 5th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.IqJ9URobmJ9L9UBG]{Shadow Blast}; 6th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.WPXzPl7YbMEIGWfi]{Mislead}; 7th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.0jadeyQIItIuRgeH]{Eclipse Burst}; 8th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.wfleiawxsfhpRRwf]{Disappearance}; 9th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.MJx7DmjsWYzDZ3a4]{Phantasmagoria}

Epiphany Spells initial: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.uh9Br4yrKvJA6zq0]{Shadow Snap}; advanced: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.rluzzX2ml4yFWnYw]{Cloying Shadows}; greater: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.pgjlPNfXCpEYyLVu]{Shadow Prison}

Harmony When you Transfer Vitality, the target's shadow darkens and swells, reducing bright light within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] of the target to dim light. This is a form of magical darkness and can overcome non-magical light sources or attempt to counteract magical light. The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} while in this dim light and can use the concealed condition to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hide}. This lasts until the end of your next turn.

Perfect Harmony You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.u9NU2bULHg3S5FaP]{Umbral Stride} action. When you Transfer Vitality, the target can use this action once before the end of their next turn.

Initial Epiphany.name: 初始顿悟 Initial Epiphany
Initial Epiphany.description:
你发现了你的连接的基本真理。你习得所选连接的初始顿悟法术。顿悟法术是一种专注法术。施放一个专注法术需要消耗1点专注点，而你起始拥有一个包含1点专注点的专注池。你会在每日准备期间补满你的专注池，并且你可以通过花费10分钟进行【重聚专注】活动，与和你建立纽带的盟友共度时光，或以其他方式思索你的连接本质，从而恢复1点专注点。

专注法术会像戏法一样，自动强化至你等级的一半（向上取整）。专注法术不需要法术位，且你也不能使用法术位来施放它们。选择专长可以让你获得更多专注法术，并增加你的专注池容量，不过你的专注池最多不能持有超过3点专注点。

You discover the basic truth of your connection. You learn your chosen connection's initial epiphany spell. Epiphany spells are a type of focus spell. It costs 1 Focus Point to cast a focus spell, and you start with a focus pool of 1 Focus Point. You refill your focus pool during your daily preparations, and you can regain 1 Focus Point by spending 10 minutes using the Refocus activity to spend time with your bonded allies or otherwise ponder the nature of your connection.

Focus spells are automatically heightened to half your level rounded up, much like cantrips. Focus spells don't require spell slots, and you can't cast them using spell slots. Taking feats can give you more focus spells and increase the size of your focus pool, though your focus pool can never hold more than 3 Focus Points.

Mystic Spellcasting.name: 秘学者施法 Mystic Spellcasting
Mystic Spellcasting.description:
你是一名施法者，可以使用“施放法术”活动来施放法术。作为一名秘学者，当你施放法术时，你可能会吟诵一段祈祷词，或哼唱一首受你的顿悟启发的歌曲；你也可能会做出手势或跳出舞步，沿着你的连接网络的流动规律而行；你还可能在施法时伴随着你与缔盟盟友之间流动的缕缕能量。

每天，你最多可以施放三个1环法术。你必须知晓法术才能施放它们，而你通过法术库职业特性来习得这些法术。你每天能够施放的法术数量称为你的法术位。

随着你作为秘学者的等级提升，你每天可施放的法术数量会增加，你能够施放的最高法术环阶也会提升，如《秘学者每日法术》表所示。

你的某些法术需要你进行一次法术攻击，以确定它们的效果如何；或者让你的敌人针对你的法术DC进行掷骰（通常是尝试一次豁免检定）。由于你的关键属性是感知，你的法术攻击调整值和法术DC都使用你的感知调整值。

法术升阶

当你获得2环及更高环阶的法术位时，你可以用低环法术的更强版本来填充这些法术位。这会将该法术的环阶提升至与法术位相同。你必须在你的法术库中拥有处于你想要施放环阶的该法术，才能将其升阶至该环阶。许多法术在升阶到特定环阶时会获得特定强化。签名法术职业特性让你能够自由地升阶某些法术。

戏法

你的某些法术是戏法。戏法是一种特殊类型的法术，不会占用法术位。你可以随意施放戏法，每天次数不限。戏法会自动升阶至你等级的一半并向上取整——这通常等于你所拥有的最高秘学者法术位环阶。例如，作为1级秘学者，你的戏法是1环法术；而作为5级秘学者，你的戏法是3环法术。

You are a spellcaster and can cast spells using the Cast a Spell activity. As a mystic, when you cast spells, you might intone a prayer or hum a song inspired by your epiphanies, you might gesture or dance in patterns that follow the flow of your connection's network, and you might accompany your spellcasting with wisps of energy flowing between you and your bonded allies.

Each day, you can cast up to three 1st-rank spells. You must know spells to cast them, and you learn them via the spell repertoire class feature. The number of spells you can cast each day is called your spell slots.

As you increase in level as a mystic, your number of spells per day increases, as does the highest rank of spells you can cast, as shown on the Mystic Spells per Day table.

Some of your spells require you to attempt a spell attack to see how effective they are or have your enemies roll against your spell DC (typically by attempting a saving throw). Since your key attribute is Wisdom, your spell attack modifiers and spell DCs use your Wisdom modifier.

Heightening Spells

When you get spell slots of 2nd rank and higher, you can fill those slots with stronger versions of lower-rank spells. This increases the spell's rank to match the spell slot. You must have a spell in your spell repertoire at the rank you want to cast in order to heighten it to that rank. Many spells have specific improvements when they're heightened to certain ranks. The signature spells class feature lets you heighten certain spells freely.

Cantrips

Some of your spells are cantrips. A cantrip is a special type of spell that doesn't use spell slots. You can cast a cantrip at will, any number of times per day. A cantrip is automatically heightened to half your level rounded up—this is usually equal to the highest rank of mystic spell slot you have. For example, as a 1st-level mystic, your cantrips are 1st-rank spells, and as a 5th-level mystic, your cantrips are 3rd-rank spells.

Mystic Bond.name: 秘学者纽带 Mystic Bond
Mystic Bond.description:
你在自己与他人之间建立一种纽带，最常见的是与你最亲密的同伴。建立纽带对每位秘学者而言都各不相同，但总是涉及一项与秘学者连接相关的 10 分钟活动，并且要求你与希望建立纽带的生物相邻。你最多可以与另外 10 个自愿的生物维持纽带，该纽带会持续，直到你或建立了纽带的生物不再愿意成为纽带的一部分。你始终被视为自己纽带的一部分，且不计入 10 个生物的上限。

你始终知道其他已建立纽带生物的大致距离与方向、它们的生命值总量，以及它们是否处于清醒状态、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{濒死}，或已经死亡。此能力无法跨位面生效（包括在漂流域中穿行时），某些特殊的魔法或科技效果也可能干扰你感知盟友的能力。

You form a bond between yourself and others, most typically your closest companions. Forming bonds is different for every mystic but always involves using a 10-minute activity related to the mystic's connection that requires you to be adjacent to the creature with whom you wish to bond. You can maintain a bond with up to 10 other willing creatures, and the bond lasts until you or the bonded creature are no longer willing to be part of the bond. You are always considered part of your own bond and don't count toward the 10-creature limit.

You always know the general distance and direction toward other bonded creatures, their Hit Point totals, and if they're conscious, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying}, or dead. This ability doesn't work across planes (including when in transit in the Drift), and some special magical or technological effects might interfere with your ability to detect your allies.

Spell Repertoire.name: 法术库 Spell Repertoire
Spell Repertoire.description:
秘学者 你能够施放的法术集合称为你的法术库。1级时，你习得两个你自选的1环法术和四个你自选的戏法，以及一个来自你所选连接的额外法术和戏法。你从与你所选连接对应传统中的普通法术中选择这些法术，或从该传统中你有权限获得的其他法术中选择。你可以通过消耗一个适当法术环阶的法术位来施放你法术库中的任意法术。

随着等级提升，你会向这个法术库中加入更多法术。每次你获得一个法术位时，你就将一个同环阶的法术加入你的法术库。当你获得新的法术环阶时，你获得的第一个新法术总是由你所选连接赋予的法术，但其他法术可以由你自行选择。2级时，你再选择一个1环法术；3级时，你从所选连接获得一个新法术和另外两个2环法术，依此类推。当你加入法术时，你可以选择一个你已知法术的更高环阶版本，以便施放该法术的升阶版本。

尽管你获得它们的速度相同，你的法术位和法术库中的法术彼此独立。若某个专长或其他能力向你的法术库中加入一个法术，它不会额外给予你一个法术位，反之亦然。

替换你法术库中的法术

随着你在法术库中获得新法术，你可能会想替换掉一些先前学会的法术。每当你提升一级并学会新法术时，你都可以将一个旧法术替换为另一个同环阶的不同法术。这个法术可以是戏法，但你不能替换顿悟法术或连接法术。你也可以在停工期中通过再训练来替换法术。

巫战扭曲者 你能够施放的法术集合称为你的法术库。1级时，你习得两个你自选的1环法术和四个你自选的戏法，以及一个来自你悖论的额外法术和戏法。你从与你悖论对应传统中的普通法术中选择这些法术。你可以通过消耗一个适当法术环阶的法术位来施放你法术库中的任意法术。

随着等级提升，你会向这个法术库中加入更多法术。每次你获得一个法术位时，你就将一个同环阶的法术加入你的法术库。2级时，再选择一个1环法术；3级时，你从悖论获得一个新法术和另外两个2环法术，依此类推。当你加入法术时，你可以加入一个你已拥有法术的更高环阶版本，以便施放该法术的升阶版本。

尽管你获得它们的速度相同，你的法术位和法术库中的法术彼此独立。若某个专长或其他能力向你的法术库中加入一个法术，它不会额外给予你一个法术位，反之亦然。

替换你法术库中的法术

随着你在法术库中获得新法术，你可能会想替换掉一些先前学会的法术。每当你提升一级并学会新法术时，你都可以将一个旧法术替换为另一个同环阶的不同法术。这个法术可以是戏法，但你不能替换从你悖论获得的法术。你也可以在停工期中通过再训练来替换法术。

Mystic The collection of spells you can cast is called your spell repertoire. At 1st level, you learn two 1st-rank spells of your choice and four cantrips of your choice as well as an additional spell and cantrip from your chosen connection. You choose these from the common spells from the tradition corresponding to your chosen connection or from other spells from that tradition to which you have access. You can cast any spell in your spell repertoire by using a spell slot of an appropriate spell rank.

You add to this spell repertoire as you increase in level. Each time you get a spell slot, you add a spell of the same rank to your spell repertoire. When you gain access to a new rank of spells, your first new spell is always the spell granted by your chosen connection, but you can choose the other spells. At 2nd level, you select another 1st-rank spell; at 3rd level, you gain a new spell from your chosen connection and two other 2nd-rank spells, and so on. When you add spells, you might select a higher-rank version of a spell you already know so that you can cast a heightened version of that spell.

Though you gain them at the same rate, your spell slots and the spells in your spell repertoire are separate. If a feat or other ability adds a spell to your spell repertoire, it wouldn't give you another spell slot, and vice versa.

Swapping Spells in Your Repertoire

As you gain new spells in your spell repertoire, you might want to replace some of the spells you previously learned. Each time you gain a level and learn new spells, you can swap out one of your old spells for a different spell of the same rank. This spell can be a cantrip, but you can't swap out epiphany spells or connection spells. You can also swap out spells by retraining during downtime.

Witchwarper The collection of spells you can cast is called your spell repertoire. At 1st level, you learn two 1st-rank spells of your choice and four cantrips of your choice as well as an additional spell and cantrip from your paradox. You choose these from the common spells from the tradition corresponding to your paradox. You can cast any spell in your spell repertoire by using a spell slot of an appropriate spell rank.

You add to this spell repertoire as you increase in level. Each time you get a spell slot, you add a spell to your spell repertoire of the same rank. At 2nd level, select another 1st-rank spell; at 3rd level, you gain a new spell from your paradox and two other 2nd-rank spells, and so on. When you add spells, you might add a higher-rank version of a spell you already have, so you can cast a heightened version of that spell.

Though you gain them at the same rate, your spell slots and the spells in your spell repertoire are separate. If a feat or other ability adds a spell to your spell repertoire, it wouldn't give you another spell slot, and vice versa.

Swapping Spells in Your Repertoire

As you gain new spells in your repertoire, you might want to replace some of the spells you previously learned. Each time you gain a level and learn new spells, you can swap out one of your old spells for a different spell of the same rank. This spell can be a cantrip, but you can't swap out spells gained from your paradox. You can also swap out spells by retraining during downtime.

Zon-Shelyn.name: 宗-莎琳 Zon-Shelyn
Zon-Shelyn.description:
拥抱

宗-莎琳是永恒玫瑰莎琳与她疏远的兄长、午夜之主宗-库松重归于一的神圣结合。兄妹二者共同体现了通过艺术战胜苦难、在奇异与不寻常之处发现美，以及与失落挚爱重逢的理念。

神职 艺术、另类时尚、创造力、音乐、痛苦、奇异之美

典范 将你的痛苦倾注于艺术，在一切地方寻求美，依照你自己的审美创造性地表达自我

禁忌 默默承受痛苦，毁坏或抄袭他人的创作，迎合社群的审美标准

The Embrace

Zon-Shelyn is the divine reunion of Shelyn the Eternal Rose and her estranged brother, the Midnight Lord Zon-Kuthon. Together, the siblings represent the concepts of overcoming suffering through art, finding beauty in strange and unusual places, and reunion with lost loved ones.

Areas of Concern art, alternative fashion, creativity, music, pain, strange beauty

Edicts channel your pain into art, seek beauty in all places, express yourself creatively according to your own aesthetics

Anathema suffer in silence, destroy or copy another's creative works, conform to society's beauty standards

Arc Pistol.name: 电弧手枪 Arc Pistol
Arc Pistol.description:
升级： 1

这把笨重的手枪不使用传统弹药，而是内置一个电容器来产生电弧。它的枪托由聚碳酸酯或其他合成绝缘材料制成，通常被染成亮黄色，并刻有代表高压的通用闪电符号。

Upgrades: 1

Instead of traditional ammunition, this bulky pistol contains a capacitor that generates arcs of electricity. Its stock is crafted from polycarbon or other synthetic insulators, often tinted bright yellow and inscribed with the universal bolt symbol for high voltage.

Microcord Armor.name: 微索护甲 Microcord Armor
Microcord Armor.description:
升级： 1

这件轻甲由超轻纤维编织而成，能随着穿戴者的动作灵活弯曲，但在受到冲击时会变得如钢铁般坚硬。

Upgrades: 1

This light armor is woven from ultralight fibers that flex with a wearer's movements but turn hard as steel on impact.

Painglaive.name: 痛苦薙刀 Painglaive
Painglaive.description:
升级： 1

这柄凶悍却带着迷惑性优雅的长柄武器，凭借电机驱动的牙刃撕裂敌人。可调节的脉冲扳机使持用者能够通过这把武器传导额外的痛楚。

Upgrades: 1

This fierce but deceptively elegant polearm rips apart enemies with a motor-powered fangblade. An adjustable pulse trigger allows the wielder to channel extra pain through the weapon.

Comm Unit.name: 通讯单元 Comm Unit
Comm Unit.description:
个人通讯装置是一种口袋大小的设备，结合了小型便携式计算机与蜂窝通信设备，使其能够在行星范围内，以音频和文本两种形式与其他通讯装置进行即时无线通信。个人通讯装置还包括计算器、手电筒（以你为中心5英尺半径内发出明亮光照，并在接下来的5英尺内发出昏暗光照）、可访问任何本地信息圈的浏览器，以及若干娱乐选项（包括游戏）。

集成在护甲中的个人通讯装置具有一些语音激活功能；你可以无需空闲手便以音频形式与其他通讯装置通信并接收回复，但输入消息、浏览信息圈或使用应用程序仍至少需要使用一只手。

可在更远距离运作的通讯装置则没那么便携；它们内置发电机以提供所需电力，并依赖已激活的漂流信标进行通信。在大多数主要聚居地，都可以购买这些装置的短期使用服务。

A personal comm unit is a pocket-sized device that combines a minor portable computer and a cellular communications device, allowing instantaneous wireless communication with other comm units in both audio- and text-based formats at planetary range. A personal comm unit also includes a calculator, a flashlight (emits bright light in a 5-foot radius around you and dim light in the next 5 feet), a browser that accesses any local infospheres, and several entertainment options (including games).

Personal comm units integrated into armor have some voice-activated capabilities; you can communicate with other comm units in audio-based formats and receive responses without needing a free hand, but typing a message, browsing the infosphere, or using an app requires the use of at least one hand.

Comm units that function at longer ranges aren't as portable; they include built-in generators that provide the necessary amount of power and rely on active Drift beacons to communicate. Short-term use of these units can be purchased in most major settlements.

Repair Toolkit (Commercial).name: 修理工具包（商用） Repair Toolkit (Commercial)
Repair Toolkit (Commercial).description:
修理工具包内含各种精密工具和补给，让你在旅途中也能进行简单修理。你可以使用修理工具包，以制作技能来修理物品。你可以在使用它的动作中一并拔出并收回一套穿着中的修理工具包。

A repair toolkit contains a variety of delicate tools and supplies that allows you to perform simple repairs while traveling. You can use a repair toolkit to Repair items using the Crafting skill. You can draw and replace a worn repair toolkit as part of the action that uses it.

Credstick.name: 信用棒 Credstick
Credstick.description:
《星际探险家》中的大多数人都会把自己的财富存放在一种称为信用棒的受保护物品中。这些装置通常较为扁平，尺寸大致和一根人类手指差不多。它们的大小和品质各不相同，但归根结底，它们只是便于携带和花费金钱的一种手段。这些装置的使用方式由所有者决定，而信用棒只需在合适的银行设备附近轻轻一碰，就能以极其简单的操作接收或支付资金。在需要更严格的安全措施时，它们可以要求语音或生物识别印记才能激活。一些先进信用棒甚至带有魔法组件，可能需要精神密码或念诵特定法术才能取用其中存储的资金。

信用棒并不是通往一个人全部财富的入口，而数额较大的信用点储备通常会安全地存放在银行、私人金库或安全数据库中。相反，信用棒是一种安全且匿名的方式，用来在不被追踪的情况下转移信用点。无论是冒险者还是普通公民，通常都会随身携带一根信用棒，以处理他们可能需要进行的各种购买，同时也只会在身上保留刚好足够的信用点，以至于即使遗失信用棒也不至于破产。

协约世界中的人们经常携带信用棒，而其他与协约世界有往来的文明也常常会把当地资金兑换成信用点，因此也会携带信用棒来花费这些兑换后的货币。有时，一个人可能会带着好几根信用棒，将每一根专门用于不同用途；或者如果他们想进行一笔预定金额的购买，也可以干脆把整根棒直接交易出去。若一个人携带的信用棒数量变得过于累赘，也很容易在各根信用棒之间转移资金，并丢弃已经清空的信用棒以节省空间，不过信用棒的体积恒定为可忽略。

Most people in Starfinder keep their wealth on a protected item known as a credstick. These devices are often flat and roughly the size of a human finger. They range in dimensions and quality, but at the end of the day, they're just a means of conveniently carrying and spending money. Usage of these devices is determined by the owner, and a credstick can accept or spend funds with as simple an action as tapping it near a suitable banking device. When more rigorous security is necessary, they can require audio or biometric imprints in order to activate. Some advanced credsticks even have a magical component that might require a mental password or the recitation of a specific spell to access stored funds.

Credsticks aren't gateways to the entirety of one's wealth, and larger stores of credits are often kept secured in banks, personal vaults, or secure databases. Instead, a credstick is a safe and anonymous means of moving credits around without being traced. Adventurers and common citizens alike often keep a credstick on their person to handle any purchases they might be called upon to make, while also only keeping just enough credits on them that losing the credstick wouldn't result in bankruptcy.

Individuals in the Pact Worlds often carry credsticks, and other civilizations that interact with the Pact often turn local funds into credits and thus carry them to spend their converted currency. Sometimes a person might carry several credsticks, dedicating each one to a different use, or simply trading the stick away if they want to make a purchase of a predefined amount. If ever the number of credsticks on a person becomes too cumbersome, it's easy enough to move the funds between individual sticks and discard emptied sticks to save on space, however a credstick always has a negligible bulk.

Divine Spontaneous Spells.name: 神圣自发法术 Divine Spontaneous Spells

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一股标记魔法存在的脉冲。你不会获得魔法存在或不存在以外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你或者你盟友的魔法物品以及持续法术。仅当幻术魔法的环级低于你的侦测魔法环级时，你才能侦测幻术魔法。但是，具有幻术灵光但是没有在外表上做伪装的物品（例如一瓶隐形药水），通常能够正常侦测。

升阶（3环级） 你能知晓法术侦测出的最强魔法效果的环级或等级，具体由GM决定。

升阶（4环级） 如3环级，你也能指出最高环级魔法的来源。如同一种模糊感官，你不会了解具体的位置，但是可以将来源锁定到5尺立方（或者最近的那个五尺立方，如果来源体积比这个区域更大）。

Eldritch Lance.name: 奥术长枪 Eldritch Lance
Eldritch Lance.description:
你从群星之间的黑暗空隙中凝聚出一道侵袭心智的诡异能量光束，并将其射向一个目标。对目标的 AC 进行一次远程法术攻击检定。若你命中，则造成 2d6 点精神伤害。若为重击成功，则造成双倍伤害。

升阶（+1） 伤害提高 1d6。

You condense a beam of mind-assaulting eldritch energy from the dark spaces between the stars and fire it at a target. Make a ranged spell attack roll against the target's AC. If you hit, you deal 2d6 mental damage. On a critical success, you deal double damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Guidance.name: 神导术 Guidance
Guidance.description:
你请求超自然存在的引导，赋予目标在持续时间结束前的一次攻击骰，察觉检定，豁免骰，或者技能检定上获得+1状态加值。目标在掷骰前选择是否使用该加值。如果目标使用该加值，该法术结束。无论怎样结束，该目标接下来会暂时免疫1小时。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.3qHKBDF7lrHw8jFK]{法术效果：神导术}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.3LyOkV25p7wA181H]{效果：神导术免疫}

Void Warp.name: 虚能噬 Void Warp
Void Warp.description:
你唤来虚能伤害生命力量。该目标承受2d4虚能伤害，这有一次基础强韧豁免. 如果该生物在豁免中大失败，他也会@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 1}直到你得下个回合开始。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d4。

Figment.name: 虚构幻术 Figment
Figment.description:
你创造出简单的声音或图像的幻术。声音会为法术添加听觉特征，且不能包含能被理解的单词或复杂的音乐。图像会为法术添加视觉特征，但是它不能大于5尺边长的立方体，且在15尺的距离内观察会发现它的构造明显很粗糙且缺乏细节。当你施放或维持该法术时，你能尝试用幻术让人@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{分神 Create a Diversion}，这会为你的欺骗检定提供+2环境加值。若对某个生物进行的此尝试失败了，该生物就不会相信虚构幻术。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.2Hg3a06gZCSnUgSA]{法术效果：虚构幻术}

Grim Tendrils.name: 邪影触须 Grim Tendrils
Grim Tendrils.description:
由黑暗组成的触须从你的指尖喷涌而出。你对在射线上的活物造成2d4虚能伤害和@Damage[(@item.level)[bleed]]伤害。每个射线上的活物必须尝试一次强韧豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物承受一半虚能伤害，并且不受持续流血伤害。

失败 该生物承受完整伤害。

大失败 该生物承受双倍虚能伤害和双倍持续流血伤害。

升阶（+1） 该虚能伤害增加2d4，持续流血伤害增加1。

Heal.name: 治疗术 Heal
Heal.description:
你引导命能，以治疗活物或者伤害不死生物。如果目标是自愿活物 ，你回复这个数量的生命值。如果目标是不死生物，你对其造成1d8命能伤害，并且它可以进行基础强韧豁免。你在施放该法术时花费的动作数量决定其目标，范围，区域和其他参数。

1 该法术的射程为接触。

2 （专注） 该法术的射程为30尺。如果你在治疗一个活物，回复的生命值增加8。

3 （专注） 你在@Template[emanation|distance:30]内释放命能。这会以区域中所有活物和不死生物为目标。

升阶（+1） 治疗或者伤害的量增加1d8，两个动作版本的额外治疗增加8。

Motivating Ringtone.name: 激励铃声 Motivating Ringtone
Motivating Ringtone.description:
你使目标通讯装置播放一首由宇宙谱写、专属于其持有者的个人主题铃声。当你施放该法术时，只要该通讯装置持续播放该铃声，拥有该目标通讯装置的生物就会恢复 1d8+4 生命值，在持续时间内获得所有速度 +5 尺的状态加值，并获得对抗恐惧效果豁免检定的 +1 状态加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.NmhqKZyMgQSHbyHj]{法术效果：激励铃声}

升阶（+1） 治疗量增加 1d8+4。

You cause the target comm unit to play a cosmically composed personal theme song specific to its owner. The creature who owns the target comm unit regains 1d8+4 Hit Points when you Cast the Spell, a +5-foot status bonus to all Speeds, and a +1 status bonus to saves against fear effects for the duration as long as the comm unit continues to play the ringtone.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.NmhqKZyMgQSHbyHj]{Spell Effect: Motivating Ringtone}

Heightened (+1) The amount of healing increases by 1d8+4.

Divine Focus Spells.name: 神圣专注法术 Divine Focus Spells

Shadow Snap.name: 暗影攫取 Shadow Snap
Shadow Snap.description:
你打个响指，召唤目标的影子听命于你。当你施放此法术时，以及在后续轮次中每回合你首次维持它时，你可以选择让其影子攻击目标或跟踪目标。若你选择攻击，则对目标的AC进行一次法术攻击检定；命中时造成1d10点寒冷伤害（若重击则伤害加倍）。此次攻击会使用并计入你的多重攻击减值。

若你选择跟踪，则直到你下个回合结束前，当目标首次使用操作动作或移动动作、进行一次远程攻击，或在其所进行的移动动作中离开一个方格时，对目标的AC进行一次法术攻击检定；命中时造成1d10点寒冷伤害。若此次攻击为重击，则该影子会扰乱该动作。

每次你维持该法术时，你都可以选择攻击目标，或命令影子跟踪目标直到你下个回合结束。

强化（+1） 寒冷伤害提高1d10。

With a snap of your fingers, you beckon the target's shadow to obey you. When you Cast this Spell and the first time you Sustain it each turn on subsequent rounds, you can choose to either attack or stalk the target with its shadow. If you choose to attack, attempt a spell attack roll against the target's AC, dealing 1d10 cold damage on a hit (or double damage on a critical hit). This attack uses and contributes to your multiple attack penalty.

If you stalk, attempt a spell attack roll against the target's AC the first time the target uses a manipulate action or a move action, makes a ranged attack, or leaves a square during a move action it's using until the end of your next turn; dealing 1d10 cold damage on a hit. If the attack is a critical hit, the shadow disrupts that action.

Each time you Sustain the spell, you can choose to either attack the target or command the shadow to stalk the target until the end of your next turn.

Heightened (+1) The cold damage increases by 1d10.

Unconventional Weaponry (Painglaive).name: 非常规武器训练（苦戟） Unconventional Weaponry (Painglaive)
Unconventional Weaponry (Painglaive).description:
你已经熟悉了一件来自另一族裔或文化的武器。选择一件具有某个族裔对应特质（例如维斯克蜥人或鼠基）或在另一种文化中常见的非常见简易或军用武器。你获得该武器的使用权限，并且在判定你的熟练度时，将其视为简易武器。

如果你已受训于所有军用武器，则你可以改为选择一件具有某个族裔特质或在另一种文化中常见的非常见先进武器。你获得该武器的使用权限，并熟悉该武器。为判定熟练度之目的，你将其视为军用武器。

You've familiarized yourself with a weapon from another ancestry or culture. Choose an uncommon simple or martial weapon with a trait corresponding to an ancestry (such as vesk or ysoki) or that's common in another culture. You gain access to that weapon, and for the purpose of determining your proficiency, you treat it as a simple weapon.

If you're trained in all martial weapons, you can instead choose an uncommon advanced weapon that has an ancestry's trait or is common in another culture. You gain access to that weapon and have familiarity with that weapon. For the purpose of proficiency, you treat it as a martial weapon.

Group Chat.name: 群聊 Group Chat
Group Chat.description:
你的纽带中的生物在彼此位于120英尺内时，可以进行心灵感应交流。只要两个缔结纽带的生物位于同一存在位面且都还活着，它们就会始终知晓彼此当前的状态、彼此的大致方向和距离，以及对方是否处于清醒、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{濒死}或死亡状态。你获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.XSMTalRsPwQ0beIE]{网络法术}动作。

Creatures in your bond can communicate telepathically while within 120 feet of one another. As long as two bonded creatures are on the same plane of existence and both are alive, they remain aware of one another's present state, general direction and distance from one another, and if they're conscious, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying}, or dead. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.XSMTalRsPwQ0beIE]{Network Spell} action.

Network Spell.name: 网络法术 Network Spell
Network Spell.description:
你引导你的法术，使其不从你自己而是从你的一名盟友处显现。若你接下来使用的动作是施放一个具有区域、射程或目标的法术，则该法术将不从你自己而是从你的一名缔盟盟友处显现。使用该盟友所处的空间来决定法术的源点、射程和效果区域，但在施放法术时，你和你的盟友都必须满足视线与效应线要求。虽然这或许能骗过那些只看到你盟友的人，但除非你处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐匿} 状态，或该法术具有晦匿（特征），否则任何能够同时看见你和你盟友的生物都能轻易判断你才是法术的源头。若该法术具有晦匿（特征），你和你的盟友可以以一种让盟友看起来像是施放了一个不具有该特征的法术的方式来施放该法术。

You channel your spell to manifest from one of your allies instead of yourself. If the next action you use is to Cast a Spell with an area, range, or target, the spell manifests from one of your bonded allies instead of yourself. Use the ally's space to determine the spell's source, range, and area of effect, but line of sight and line of effect must be met from both you and your ally when the spell is cast. While this might fool someone who only sees your ally, unless you're @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} or the spell has the subtle trait, any creature able to see both you and your ally can easily determine you're the source of the spell. If the spell has the subtle trait, you and your ally can Cast the Spell in a way that makes the ally appear to have cast it without that trait.

Signature Spells.name: 标志性法术 Signature Spells
Signature Spells.description:
你已经学会了以更灵活的方式施放你的部分法术，从而让你对自己的施法拥有额外的掌控力。对于你能够使用的每个法术环阶，选择一个该环阶的法术作为招牌法术。你不需要分别学习招牌法术的升阶版本；相反，你可以自由地将这些法术升阶施放。若你学习某个招牌法术时的等级高于其最低等级，你也可以施放它所有较低环阶的版本，而无需分别学习这些版本。若你替换掉一个招牌法术，你可以在你学习先前那个法术时所处的相同法术环阶中，选择一个替代的招牌法术。你也可以专门进行重训，将一个招牌法术改为该环阶的另一个法术，而无需替换任何法术；这所需的时间与通常重训一个法术相同。

You've learned to cast some of your spells more flexibly, granting you extra control over your spellcasting. For each spell rank you have access to, choose one spell of that rank to be a signature spell. You don't need to learn heightened versions of signature spells separately; instead, you can heighten these spells freely. If you've learned a signature spell at a higher level than its minimum, you can also cast all its lower-rank versions without learning those separately. If you swap out a signature spell, you can choose a replacement signature spell of the same spell rank at which you learned the previous spell. You can also retrain specifically to change a signature spell to a different spell of that rank without swapping any spells; this takes as much time as retraining a spell normally does.

Reflex Expertise.name: 反射专家 Reflex Expertise
Reflex Expertise.description:
秘学者 你的连接以有助于你闪避危险的洞察祝福你。你的反射豁免熟练等级提升至专家。

士兵 你已经练就了闪避危险的本领。你的反射豁免熟练等级提升至专家。

巫战扭曲者 你对潜在危险的觉察，无论是通过惊人的分析能力还是对更广阔多元宇宙的理解，都增强了你的反应能力。你的反射豁免熟练等级提升至专家。

Mystic Your connection blesses you with insight that helps you dodge danger. Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to expert.

Soldier You've developed a knack for dodging danger. Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to expert.

Witchwarper Your awareness of possible dangers, through incredible analysis or an understanding of the wider multiverse, increases your reflexes. Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to expert.

Fear.name: 恐惧术 Fear
Fear.description:
你将恐惧植入目标；它必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 1}.

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 2}.

大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 3} 并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃跑 Fleeing} 1轮.

升阶（3环级） 你能以至多五个生物为目标。

Invisibility.name: 隐形 Invisibility
Invisibility.description:
扭曲光线的幻觉包复目标，令其变得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形 Invisible}。这令该生物对所有生物 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{无踪} ，但生物可以尝试寻找目标，令其改为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}。如果目标使用敌对动作，法术在敌对动作完成后结束。

升阶（4环级） 该法术持续1分钟，但目标使用敌对动作时该法术不会结束。

Soul Surge.name: 灵魂激涌 Soul Surge
Soul Surge.description:
你将自己的生命力导入一柄能量长矛中。你失去 6 点生命值；或者，如果你与一个至少有 12 点生命值的活力网络处于连结中，则你可以改为使该活力连结的生命值减少 12 点。对目标的 AC 进行一次远程法术攻击。若命中，你造成 6d6 点灵魂伤害。若重击，目标承受双倍伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{衰竭 1}。

强化（+1） 造成的伤害增加 2d6，失去的生命值增加 2 点（如果你从活力网络中消耗生命值，则增加 4 点）。

You channel your life force into a spear of energy. You lose 6 Hit Points or, if you're in a bond with a vitality network that has at least 12 Hit Points, you can reduce the vitality bond's Hit Points by 12 instead. Make a ranged spell attack against the target's AC. On a hit, you deal 6d6 spirit damage. On a critical hit, the target takes double damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}.

Heightened (+1) Increase the damage dealt by 2d6 and the Hit Points lost by 2 (or by 4 if you spend Hit Points from a vitality network).

Medkit (Commercial).name: 医疗包（商用） Medkit (Commercial)
Medkit (Commercial).description:
其中装有进行医疗检定以执行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.MHLuKy4nQO2Z4Am1]{实施急救}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.TC7OcDa7JlWbqMaN]{治疗疾病}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.KjoCEEmPGTeFE4hh]{治疗毒素} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤口} 所需的止痛药、绷带、无菌纱布和缝合工具。

These contain analgesics, bandages, sterile gauze, and suturing tools necessary for Medicine checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.MHLuKy4nQO2Z4Am1]{Administer First Aid}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.TC7OcDa7JlWbqMaN]{Treat Disease}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.KjoCEEmPGTeFE4hh]{Treat Poison}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds}.

Spot Healing.name: 斑点修复 Spot Healing
Spot Healing.description:
触发 一名相邻的已建立纽带的盟友受到伤害。

你迅速将自身活力网络中的能量输送给一名已建立纽带的盟友。对触发此反应的盟友执行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.UeMHbnnaXDa3sGfG]{转移活力}。

Trigger An adjacent bonded ally takes damage.

You quickly expend energy from your vitality network toward a bonded ally. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.UeMHbnnaXDa3sGfG]{Transfer Vitality} to the triggering ally.

Toughness.name: 健壮 Toughness
Toughness.description: 在支撑到极限前，你的身体可以经受比大多数人更沉重的损伤。你的最大生命值提高等于你的等级的数值。你的恢复检定DC降低1点。

Battle Medicine.name: 战斗医疗 Battle Medicine
Battle Medicine.description:
需求 你正手持或穿戴一个医疗包。

你可以包扎伤口，甚至可以在战斗中进行。进行一次医疗检定，DC 与 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤势} 相同，并恢复相应数量的 HP；这不会移除濒死条件。与治疗伤势一样，如果你具有最低熟练等级，你可以尝试对抗更高的 DC。随后，目标会对你的战地医疗 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.2XEYQNZTCGpdkyR6]{免疫} 1 天。这不会使其对治疗伤势免疫，也不会以其他方式被视为治疗伤势。

Requirements You're holding or wearing a medkit.

You can patch up wounds, even in combat. Attempt a Medicine check with the same DC as for @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} and restore the corresponding amount of HP; this doesn't remove the wounded condition. As with Treat Wounds, you can attempt checks against higher DCs if you have the minimum proficiency rank. The target is then @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.2XEYQNZTCGpdkyR6]{immune} to your Battle Medicine for 1 day. This does not make them immune to, or otherwise count as, Treat Wounds.

Fortitude Expertise.name: 强韧专家 Fortitude Expertise
Fortitude Expertise.description:
特使 你的体魄极其强健。你的强韧豁免熟练等级提升为专家。

秘学者 你的体魄在冒险中变得更加坚韧。你的强韧豁免熟练等级提升为专家。

Envoy Your physique is incredibly hardy. Your proficiency rank for Fortitude saves increases to expert.

Mystic Your physique has grown hardier from your adventures. Your proficiency rank for Fortitude saves increases to expert.

Communalism.name: 公社主义 Communalism
Communalism.description:
频率 每日一次

触发条件 10尺内的一名盟友在一次需要3个动作或更少的技能检定中失败。

你将有帮助的鼓励或相关信息传入盟友的心灵。你的盟友重掷触发该效果的技能检定，并取较好的结果。

Frequency once per day

Trigger An ally within 10 feet fails a skill check requiring 3 actions or fewer.

You broadcast helpful encouragement or pertinent information to your ally's mind. Your ally rerolls the triggering skill check and takes the better result.

Waste Not.name: 物尽其用 Waste Not
Waste Not.description:
通过谨慎地集中精神，你确保目标流失的生命能量会被你的活力网络捕获。若你接下来使用的动作是施放一个对活体生物造成虚空伤害的法术，你的活力网络获得等同于该法术环阶两倍的生命值。

特殊 你可以在不具有塑法特征的情况下使用“绝不浪费”。若你如此做，且你的下一个动作是以造成虚空伤害的武器进行一次打击，则你的活力网络每有一个武器伤害骰便获得 2 点生命值。

With careful focus, you guarantee vital energy lost from a target is caught by your vitality network. If the next action you use is to Cast a Spell that deals void damage to a living creature, your vitality network gains Hit Points equal to twice the spell's rank.

Special You can Waste Not without the spellshape trait. If you do and your next action is to Strike with a weapon that deals void damage, your vitality network gains 2 Hit Points per weapon damage die.

Feign Death.name: 佯死 Feign Death
Feign Death.description:
触发条件 你受到伤害。

你卧倒为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}，并伪装成一具尸体。只要你不采取任何需要心智以外能力的动作，你看起来就是死的。要看穿你的伎俩，生物必须通过侦查或回忆知识，成功进行一次对抗你欺骗DC的检定。如果你在欺骗上达到大师熟练度，你可以在不结束此效果的情况下准备一个动作。

Trigger You take damage.

You lie @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} and Impersonate a corpse. As long as you don't take any actions requiring anything other than your mind, you appear dead. To see through your ruse, a creature must succeed at a check against your Deception DC, either by Seeking or Recalling Knowledge. You can Ready an Action without ending this effect if you're a master in Deception.

Share Pain.name: 分担痛苦 Share Pain
Share Pain.description:
你以心灵感应与一个生物分享剧烈痛苦的感觉。目标受到 3d12 点精神伤害，并进行一次意志豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}，持续 1 分钟。

大失败 该生物受到全部伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2}，持续 1 分钟。

升阶（6环） 该法术的目标改为至多四个生物，且造成 6d12 点精神伤害。

You telepathically share the sensation of agonizing pain with a creature. The target takes 3d12 mental damage and attempts a Will save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} for 1 minute.

Heightened (6th) The spell targets up to four creatures and deals 6d12 mental damage.

Slow.name: 缓慢术 Slow
Slow.description:
你令目标周围的时间膨胀，令其行动缓慢。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 1} ，持续1轮。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 1}，持续1分钟。

大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 2}，持续1分钟。

升阶（6环级） 你能以至多10个生物为目标。

Ultralight Wings (Commercial).name: 轻量化翅膀（商用） Ultralight Wings (Commercial)
Ultralight Wings (Commercial).description:
可折叠的翅膀连接在你的肩胛骨上，或你身体上其他能让它们承载你的体重并辅助你飞行移动的位置。你可以用一个交互动作展开翅膀，但当你穿着超过轻甲的护甲时，无法展开或使用它们。当翅膀已展开且你未超载时，你获得 20 尺的飞行速度，并在进行空中机动的特技检定上获得 +1 物品加值。

Foldable wings are attached to your shoulder blades or a similar location on your body that allows them to lift your weight and assist your flying movements. You can deploy the wings with an Interact action, but you can't deploy or use them while you're wearing more than light armor. While the wings are deployed and you're not encumbered, you gain a fly Speed of 20 feet and a +1 item bonus to Acrobatics checks to Maneuver in Flight.

Vesk.name: 维斯克蜥人 Vesk
Vesk.description:
维斯克蜥人是一个好战的爬行动物族群；他们在发展出太空航行技术后不久便征服了其恒星系中的八个世界，建立了维斯卡里姆帝国。维斯克蜥人往往崇尚冲突，并尊重力量与军事武力。

Vesk are a warmongering, reptilian people who conquered the eight worlds in their solar system shortly after they developed spaceflight, forming the Veskarium empire. Vesk tend to embrace conflict and respect strength and military might.

Briskwander Vesk.name: 疾行流浪者维斯克蜥人 Briskwander Vesk
Briskwander Vesk.description:
你出身于一个不断迁徙的维斯克蜥人家系。你的速度提高 5 尺。

You come from a line of vesk who were constantly on the move. Your Speed increases by 5 feet.

Trooper.name: 士兵 Trooper
Trooper.description:
你曾作为职业士兵应征加入军队，或被准军事组织招募。只要你有足够的枪械，并有合适的小队为你提供支援，你几乎能应付任何情况。

选择两项属性增强。其中一项必须加给力量或体质，另一项为自由属性增强。

你受训于运动技能和战争学识技能。你获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.9S5mBcJujWOYCE6j]{路障}专长。

You enlisted in a military or were recruited by a paramilitary group as a career trooper. As long as you've got enough guns and the right squad to back you up, you can handle just about anything.

Choose two attribute boosts. One must be to Strength or Constitution, and one is a free attribute boost.

You're trained in the Athletics skill and the Warfare Lore skill. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.9S5mBcJujWOYCE6j]{Barricade} feat.

Barricade.name: 路障 Barricade
Barricade.description:
你迅速利用附近的物品、废料或碎片搭起一道路障。该路障为你和另一名盟友提供次等掩护，不过你可以 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{采取掩护} 来将此增益提升为标准掩护。该路障很脆弱，并会在你下个回合结束时散架。

You hastily create a barricade using nearby items, junk, or debris. The barricade provides lesser cover for you and one other ally, though you can @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Take Cover} to increase this benefit to standard cover. The barricade is flimsy and falls apart at the end of your next turn.

Soldier.name: 士兵 Soldier
Soldier.description:
你是区域武器、重甲，以及承受伤害方面的大师。你在激烈的战斗中冲锋陷阵，对敌人倾泻毁灭性的齐射，同时承受回击而来的猛烈火力。你用强力武器布下压制火力的弹幕，为盟友创造条件，让他们各自发挥自己的职责，同时诱使敌人将注意力集中在你身上。

You're a master of area weapons, heavy armor, and soaking damage. You fight in the thick of the battle and unleash devastating salvos against your foes as you take withering fire in return. By laying down a barrage of suppressing fire with powerful weapons, you set your allies up to fulfill their respective roles while encouraging enemies to focus on you.

Soldier Fighting Style.name: 士兵战斗风格 Soldier Fighting Style
Soldier Fighting Style.description:
作为一名士兵，你会接受运用特定战斗风格的训练。你的风格决定了你如何应对战斗，并且常常会改变你如何利用自己压制目标的能力。选择一种士兵战斗风格。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.ajzZpzc8uMtgU6N8]{动作英雄}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.T78VQC8oaD1Odz1k]{装甲风暴}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.VDEYb7aAwAjBp8Av]{轰炸}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.5mOTKBsn8OsEvFaA]{近距离作战}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.FSAqTE67445EvyX8]{博学战士}

As a soldier, you train using a specific style of fighting. Your style determines how you approach combat and often changes how you take advantage of your ability to suppress targets. Choose a soldier fighting style.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.ajzZpzc8uMtgU6N8]{Action Hero}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.T78VQC8oaD1Odz1k]{Armor Storm}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.VDEYb7aAwAjBp8Av]{Bombard}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.5mOTKBsn8OsEvFaA]{Close Quarters}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.FSAqTE67445EvyX8]{Erudite Warrior}

Bombard.name: 轰炸 Bombard
Bombard.description:
没有什么比一把大枪（或者好几把）更能帮你熬过艰难时刻了。你已经接受了这样一个事实：你齐射中的流弹有时可能会击中盟友，但你会尽量减少这种“友军误伤”的情况。你受过训练，能够在齐射时避免伤害盟友，并学会了娴熟地围绕他们调整你的攻击位置。

当你使用区域武器进行攻击时，你可以选择区域内数量等于你体质调整值一半的盟友。被选中的盟友不受此次攻击影响。此外，对你发动的区域攻击进行豁免时成功（但并非大成功）的敌人，直到你下个回合开始前仍会处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{受压制}状态。

There's nothing like a big gun (or maybe several) to get you through tough times. You've come to terms with the fact that a stray bullet from one of your barrages might sometimes hit an ally, but you try to minimize such instances of "friendly fire." You've trained to avoid harming allies with your barrages and learned to expertly position your attacks around them.

When you attack with an area weapon, you can select a number of allies within the area equal to half your Constitution modifier. The selected allies are unaffected by the attack. In addition, enemies who succeed (but not critically succeed) on their save against an area attack you make are still @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} until the start of your next turn.

Walking Armory.name: 步行军械库 Walking Armory
Walking Armory.description:
你的耐力训练使你能够负载沉重的装备。在判定你为使用护甲所需的力量时，你可以改为选择使用你的体质调整值。如果你已经满足所穿护甲的力量要求，则将该护甲的体积值减少 1（最低减至 1）。

此外，你在变为负重前所能携带的体积值提高你体质调整值的一半（向上取整）。你的最大携带体积值提高你的体质调整值。

Your endurance training empowers you to carry a load of heavy equipment. When determining your Strength for using armor, you can instead choose to use your Constitution modifier. If you already meet the Strength requirement for the armor you're wearing, reduce that armor's Bulk by 1 (to a minimum of 1).

In addition, increase the amount of Bulk you can carry before becoming encumbered by half your Constitution modifier rounded up. Increase your maximum carried Bulk by your Constitution modifier.

Suppressing Fire.name: 压制射击 Suppressing Fire
Suppressing Fire.description:
你擅长使用强力武器袭扰敌人并阻碍他们的移动，使其无法发挥最佳状态。当你以具有区域（特征）的攻击进行攻击时（例如 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oc0ZKnk5zD0GXqZi]{Area Fire} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6ctkxUnVwqooSvgg]{Auto-Fire}），你会以压制目标的方式来使用它。受影响区域内未能通过你此次攻击豁免的敌人，会直到你下个回合开始前处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{受压制} 状态。受压制的目标在攻击检定上承受 –1 处境减值，且其各项速度承受 –10 尺状态减值。某些士兵能力和职业专长会与受压制状态产生进一步互动。

You have a knack for using powerful weapons to harry your foes and hinder their movement, preventing them from operating at their peak. When you make an attack with the area trait (such as @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oc0ZKnk5zD0GXqZi]{Area Fire} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6ctkxUnVwqooSvgg]{Auto-Fire}), you use it in a manner that suppresses your targets. Enemies in the affected area who fail their save against your attack become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} until the start of your next turn. A suppressed target takes a –1 circumstance penalty on attack rolls and takes a –10-foot status penalty to its Speeds. Some soldier abilities and class feats interact further with the suppressed condition.

Primary Target.name: 主要目标 Primary Target
Primary Target.description:
当你释放强力区域武器的全部毁灭性威力时，你可以将火力集中于单一目标。在你以武器进行一次区域攻击之前（例如通过“区域射击”或“自动射击”动作），你可以以同一把武器对区域内的一名生物进行一次远程打击作为自由动作，该生物被选为你的主要目标。如果你的攻击是爆发，你必须选择最靠近攻击中心的生物。如果你的攻击是锥形或线形，你必须选择离你最近的生物。如果有两名或更多生物距离相同，你可以选择其中之一作为你的主要目标。若命中，若你的主要目标在对抗你的“区域射击”或“自动射击”动作时掷出了成功，则其改为失败。此次打击不计入你的多重攻击减值。

You can focus fire on a single target when unleashing the full devastation of your powerful area weaponry. Before you make an area attack with a weapon (such as from the Area Fire or Auto-Fire actions), you can make a ranged Strike as a free action with the same weapon against a single creature in the area, who's selected as your primary target. If your attack is a burst, you must select the creature closest to the center of the attack. If your attack is a cone or line, you must select the creature closest to you. If two or more creatures are equidistant, you can choose which one is your primary target. On a hit, if your primary target rolls a success against your Area Fire or Auto-Fire action, they get a failure instead. This Strike doesn't count toward your multiple attack penalty.

Fearless.name: 无畏 Fearless
Fearless.description:
无论是出于责任感还是对成功的渴望，当你面对可怕的敌人时，你很少会退缩。如果你在对抗恐惧效果的豁免检定中获得成功，则改为获得大成功。

Whether it comes from a sense of duty or a desire to succeed, you rarely flinch when confronted by fearsome foes. If you roll a success on a saving throw against a fear effect, you get a critical success instead.

Quick Swap.name: 快速切换 Quick Swap
Quick Swap.description:
触发条件 你正持握一把双手武器，且一个敌方生物移动至与你相邻的位置。

你能在紧张局势下切换武器，从而迅速做好准备惩罚逼近的敌人。你收起当前武器并拔出另一把双手武器。若你有多组手臂，则你可以改为切换持握手。

Trigger You're wielding a two-handed weapon, and an enemy creature moves adjacent to you.

You can switch weapons in stressful situations so that you quickly set yourself up to punish incoming foes. You stow your current weapon and draw another two-handed weapon. If you have multiple sets of arms, you can instead Switch Hands.

Comm Unit.name: 通讯单元 Comm Unit
Comm Unit.description:
个人通讯器是一种口袋大小的设备，结合了小型便携式计算机与蜂窝通信设备，使其能够在行星范围内以音频和文本两种形式，与其他通讯器进行即时无线通信。个人通讯器还包含计算器、手电筒（以你为中心5英尺半径内发出明亮光照，并在接下来的5英尺内发出微光）、可访问任何本地信息圈的浏览器，以及若干娱乐功能（包括游戏）。

集成于护甲中的个人通讯器具有一些语音激活能力；你可以无需空闲手，就以音频形式与其他通讯器通信并接收回复，但输入信息、浏览信息圈或使用应用程序时，仍至少需要使用一只手。

可在更远距离运作的通讯器便携性较差；它们包含内置发电机，以提供所需的电力，并依赖处于激活状态的漂流信标进行通信。在大多数主要定居点，都可以购买这些通讯器的短期使用服务。

A personal comm unit is a pocket-sized device that combines a minor portable computer and a cellular communications device, allowing instantaneous wireless communication with other comm units in both audio- and text-based formats at planetary range. A personal comm unit also includes a calculator, a flashlight (emits bright light in a 5-foot radius around you and dim light in the next 5 feet), a browser that accesses any local infospheres, and several entertainment options (including games).

Personal comm units integrated into armor have some voice-activated capabilities; you can communicate with other comm units in audio-based formats and receive responses without needing a free hand, but typing a message, browsing the infosphere, or using an app requires the use of at least one hand.

Comm units that function at longer ranges aren't as portable; they include built-in generators that provide the necessary amount of power and rely on active Drift beacons to communicate. Short-term use of these units can be purchased in most major settlements.

Doshko.name: 多什科 Doshko
Doshko.description:
升级： 1

这种动力长柄战斧是维斯卡里姆的传统武器，配有一到三片三角形斧刃，专为大范围的过顶挥砍与战术格挡而打造。

Upgrades: 1

The traditional weapon of the Veskarium, this powered poleaxe features one to three triangular blades forged for both wide overhead swings and tactical parrying.

Machine Gun.name: 机枪 Machine Gun
Machine Gun.description:
升级： 1

这些久经考验且可靠的自动武器能够进行短点射，或直接打空整个弹匣来扫清战场。

Upgrades: 1

These proven and reliable automatic weapons are capable of firing in short bursts or completely emptying their magazines to clear a battlefield.

Projectile Ammo.name: 投射武器弹药 Projectile Ammo

Credstick.name: 信用棒 Credstick
Credstick.description:
《Starfinder》中的大多数人都会把自己的财富存放在一种称为信用棒的受保护物品上。这些装置通常是扁平的，大小大致与人类的手指相当。它们的尺寸和品质各不相同，但归根结底，它们只是用于便捷携带和花费金钱的一种方式。这些装置的使用方式由所有者决定，而信用棒只需在合适的银行设备附近轻轻一碰，就能完成接收或支付资金这样简单的操作。在需要更严格的安全防护时，它们还可以要求语音或生物识别印记才能激活。一些先进信用棒甚至带有魔法组件，可能需要精神密码，或念诵特定法术，才能访问其中储存的资金。

信用棒并不是通往一个人全部财富的入口，而数额较大的信用点通常会安全地存放在银行、私人金库或安全数据库中。相反，信用棒是一种安全且匿名的信用点流转方式，不易被追踪。无论是冒险者还是普通市民，都会经常随身携带一根信用棒，以应对他们可能需要进行的各种购买，同时也只会在身上保留刚好足够的信用点，这样即使丢失了信用棒，也不至于破产。

协约世界中的个人常常携带信用棒，而其他与协约有往来的文明也常会将本地资金兑换为信用点，并以这种形式携带，以便花费其换算后的货币。有时，一个人可能会携带几根信用棒，将每一根用于不同用途，或者如果他们想进行一笔预定金额的购买，也可以直接把整根棒转交出去。即使一个人身上的信用棒数量多到显得累赘，也很容易在各根棒之间转移资金，并丢弃已经清空的信用棒以节省空间，不过信用棒始终具有可忽略的体积。

Most people in Starfinder keep their wealth on a protected item known as a credstick. These devices are often flat and roughly the size of a human finger. They range in dimensions and quality, but at the end of the day, they're just a means of conveniently carrying and spending money. Usage of these devices is determined by the owner, and a credstick can accept or spend funds with as simple an action as tapping it near a suitable banking device. When more rigorous security is necessary, they can require audio or biometric imprints in order to activate. Some advanced credsticks even have a magical component that might require a mental password or the recitation of a specific spell to access stored funds.

Credsticks aren't gateways to the entirety of one's wealth, and larger stores of credits are often kept secured in banks, personal vaults, or secure databases. Instead, a credstick is a safe and anonymous means of moving credits around without being traced. Adventurers and common citizens alike often keep a credstick on their person to handle any purchases they might be called upon to make, while also only keeping just enough credits on them that losing the credstick wouldn't result in bankruptcy.

Individuals in the Pact Worlds often carry credsticks, and other civilizations that interact with the Pact often turn local funds into credits and thus carry them to spend their converted currency. Sometimes a person might carry several credsticks, dedicating each one to a different use, or simply trading the stick away if they want to make a purchase of a predefined amount. If ever the number of credsticks on a person becomes too cumbersome, it's easy enough to move the funds between individual sticks and discard emptied sticks to save on space, however a credstick always has a negligible bulk.

Fearsome Bulwark.name: 骇人壁垒 Fearsome Bulwark
Fearsome Bulwark.description:
你庞大的体型会震慑敌人，在战场上为你开辟道路。你进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.tHCqgwjtQtzNqVvd]{胁迫} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{威吓} 的威吓检定时，可以用你的体质调整值替代魅力调整值；进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.lOE4yjUnETTdaf2T]{重新定位} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{推撞} 的运动检定时，可以用你的体质调整值替代力量调整值。

Your sheer bulk terrifies foes, clearing a path for you on the battlefield. You can use your Constitution modifier instead of your Charisma modifier on Intimidation checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.tHCqgwjtQtzNqVvd]{Coerce} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} and instead of your Strength modifier on Athletics checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.lOE4yjUnETTdaf2T]{Reposition} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove}.

Reflex Expertise.name: 反射专家 Reflex Expertise
Reflex Expertise.description:
秘学者 你的连接赐予你洞察力，帮助你避开危险。你的反射豁免熟练等级提升为专家。

士兵 你已练就了躲避危险的本领。你的反射豁免熟练等级提升为专家。

巫战扭曲者 你对潜在危险的觉察——无论是通过惊人的分析能力，还是对更广阔多元宇宙的理解——提升了你的反应能力。你的反射豁免熟练等级提升为专家。

Mystic Your connection blesses you with insight that helps you dodge danger. Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to expert.

Soldier You've developed a knack for dodging danger. Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to expert.

Witchwarper Your awareness of possible dangers, through incredible analysis or an understanding of the wider multiverse, increases your reflexes. Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to expert.

Hidden Soldier Armor.name: 隐藏式士兵护甲 Hidden Soldier Armor
Hidden Soldier Armor.description:
升级： 1

这套重甲配有一顶带狭缝的头盔，只露出穿戴者的双眼。这套高科技陶瓷护甲由胸甲、肩甲、臂甲和胫甲组成，并会随着身体动作而灵活弯曲。

Upgrades: 1

This suit of heavy armor features a slitted helmet that reveals only the wearer's eyes. This high-tech ceramic suit consists of breastplate, shoulder guards, bracers, and greaves that flex with the body's movements.

Menacing Laughter.name: 狰狞狂笑 Menacing Laughter
Menacing Laughter.description:
你的笑声（或其他发声）在你的武器开火的喧嚣中依然清晰可闻。对30英尺内每个@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{受压制}的生物各进行一次威吓检定，以@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{挫败其胆气}。

Your laughter (or other vocalization) remains audible over the din of your weapons fire. Attempt an Intimidation check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} each creature within 30 feet who's @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed}.

Deadlift.name: 硬拉 Deadlift
Deadlift.description:
要求 你未处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏} 状态。

在 1 分钟内，你在变为负重前可比平常多携带 4 Bulk。该可携带量在专家时提升至 6，大师时提升至 8，传奇时提升至 10。当此专长的增益结束时，你会变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏} 状态，持续 10 分钟。

Requirements You aren't @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}.

For 1 minute, you can carry 4 more Bulk than normal before becoming encumbered. The amount you can carry increases to 6 at expert, 8 at master, and 10 at legendary. When the benefits of this feat end, you become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} for 10 minutes.

Toughness.name: 健壮 Toughness
Toughness.description: 在支撑到极限前，你的身体可以经受比大多数人更沉重的损伤。你的最大生命值提高等于你的等级的数值。你的恢复检定DC降低1点。

Vesk.name: 维斯克蜥人 Vesk
Vesk.description:
维斯克蜥人是一个好战的爬行动物族群；在他们发展出太空航行技术后不久，便征服了其恒星系中的八个世界，建立了维斯卡里姆帝国。维斯克蜥人往往乐于拥抱冲突，并尊重力量与军事武力。

Vesk are a warmongering, reptilian people who conquered the eight worlds in their solar system shortly after they developed spaceflight, forming the Veskarium empire. Vesk tend to embrace conflict and respect strength and military might.

Briskwander Vesk.name: 疾行流浪者 维斯克蜥人 Briskwander Vesk
Briskwander Vesk.description:
你出身于一支不断迁徙的维斯克蜥人家系。你的速度增加 5 尺。

You come from a line of vesk who were constantly on the move. Your Speed increases by 5 feet.

Trooper.name: 士兵 Trooper
Trooper.description:
你在军队中入伍，或被某个准军事团体招募，成为一名职业士兵。只要你有足够的枪械，并有合适的小队为你提供支援，你几乎什么情况都能应付。

选择两项属性增强。其中一项必须加在力量或体质上，另一项为自由属性增强。

你受训于运动技能和战争学识技能。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.9S5mBcJujWOYCE6j]{Barricade} 专长。

You enlisted in a military or were recruited by a paramilitary group as a career trooper. As long as you've got enough guns and the right squad to back you up, you can handle just about anything.

Choose two attribute boosts. One must be to Strength or Constitution, and one is a free attribute boost.

You're trained in the Athletics skill and the Warfare Lore skill. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.9S5mBcJujWOYCE6j]{Barricade} feat.

Barricade.name: 路障 Barricade
Barricade.description:
你利用附近的物品、废料或残骸仓促搭起一道路障。该路障为你和另一名盟友提供次等掩护，不过你可以 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Take Cover} 以将此收益提升为标准掩护。该路障很脆弱，并会在你的下一回合结束时散架。

You hastily create a barricade using nearby items, junk, or debris. The barricade provides lesser cover for you and one other ally, though you can @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Take Cover} to increase this benefit to standard cover. The barricade is flimsy and falls apart at the end of your next turn.

Soldier.name: 士兵 Soldier
Soldier.description:
你精通范围武器、重甲，以及承受伤害。你在战斗最激烈的前线作战，对敌人倾泻毁灭性的齐射，同时承受回击而来的猛烈火力。通过用强力武器进行一阵压制射击，你为盟友创造条件，使其能够各司其职，同时诱使敌人将注意力集中在你身上。

You're a master of area weapons, heavy armor, and soaking damage. You fight in the thick of the battle and unleash devastating salvos against your foes as you take withering fire in return. By laying down a barrage of suppressing fire with powerful weapons, you set your allies up to fulfill their respective roles while encouraging enemies to focus on you.

Soldier Fighting Style.name: 士兵战斗风格 Soldier Fighting Style
Soldier Fighting Style.description:
作为士兵，你会接受一种特定战斗风格的训练。你的风格决定了你如何进行战斗，而且通常会改变你如何利用自己压制目标的能力。选择一种士兵战斗风格。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.ajzZpzc8uMtgU6N8]{动作英雄}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.T78VQC8oaD1Odz1k]{装甲风暴}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.VDEYb7aAwAjBp8Av]{轰击}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.5mOTKBsn8OsEvFaA]{近距离作战}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.FSAqTE67445EvyX8]{博学战士}

As a soldier, you train using a specific style of fighting. Your style determines how you approach combat and often changes how you take advantage of your ability to suppress targets. Choose a soldier fighting style.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.ajzZpzc8uMtgU6N8]{Action Hero}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.T78VQC8oaD1Odz1k]{Armor Storm}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.VDEYb7aAwAjBp8Av]{Bombard}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.5mOTKBsn8OsEvFaA]{Close Quarters}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.FSAqTE67445EvyX8]{Erudite Warrior}

Bombard.name: 轰击 Bombard
Bombard.description:
没有什么能像一把大枪（或者好几把）那样帮你度过艰难时刻。你已经接受了这样一个事实：你齐射中的流弹有时可能会击中盟友，但你会尽量将这种“误伤”降到最低。你经过训练，能够在齐射时避免伤害盟友，并学会了熟练地调整你的攻击位置以绕开他们。

当你使用区域武器进行攻击时，你可以选择区域内数量等于你体质调整值一半的盟友。被选中的盟友不受此次攻击影响。此外，对你进行的区域攻击豁免成功（但非重成功）的敌人，直到你下个回合开始前仍处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{受压制}状态。

There's nothing like a big gun (or maybe several) to get you through tough times. You've come to terms with the fact that a stray bullet from one of your barrages might sometimes hit an ally, but you try to minimize such instances of "friendly fire." You've trained to avoid harming allies with your barrages and learned to expertly position your attacks around them.

When you attack with an area weapon, you can select a number of allies within the area equal to half your Constitution modifier. The selected allies are unaffected by the attack. In addition, enemies who succeed (but not critically succeed) on their save against an area attack you make are still @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} until the start of your next turn.

Walking Armory.name: 行走军械库 Walking Armory
Walking Armory.description:
你的耐力训练使你能够携带大量沉重的装备。为穿用护甲判定你的力量时，你可以改为选择使用你的体质调整值。如果你已经满足所穿护甲的力量要求，则该护甲的体积值减少 1（最低为 1）。

此外，你在变为负重前可携带的体积值提高你的体质调整值的一半（向上取整）。你的最大可携带体积值提高等同于你的体质调整值的数值。

Your endurance training empowers you to carry a load of heavy equipment. When determining your Strength for using armor, you can instead choose to use your Constitution modifier. If you already meet the Strength requirement for the armor you're wearing, reduce that armor's Bulk by 1 (to a minimum of 1).

In addition, increase the amount of Bulk you can carry before becoming encumbered by half your Constitution modifier rounded up. Increase your maximum carried Bulk by your Constitution modifier.

Suppressing Fire.name: 压制射击 Suppressing Fire
Suppressing Fire.description:
你擅长使用强力武器骚扰敌人并阻碍其移动，防止他们以最佳状态行动。当你进行一次具有区域（特征）的攻击时（例如 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oc0ZKnk5zD0GXqZi]{区域射击} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6ctkxUnVwqooSvgg]{自动射击}），你会以一种压制目标的方式来使用它。处于受影响区域内、且在对抗你攻击的豁免中失败的敌人，会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{受压制} 状态，直到你下个回合开始。受压制的目标在攻击检定上承受 –1 处境减值，且其速度承受 –10 尺状态减值。某些士兵能力和职业专长还会与受压制状态进一步互动。

You have a knack for using powerful weapons to harry your foes and hinder their movement, preventing them from operating at their peak. When you make an attack with the area trait (such as @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oc0ZKnk5zD0GXqZi]{Area Fire} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6ctkxUnVwqooSvgg]{Auto-Fire}), you use it in a manner that suppresses your targets. Enemies in the affected area who fail their save against your attack become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} until the start of your next turn. A suppressed target takes a –1 circumstance penalty on attack rolls and takes a –10-foot status penalty to its Speeds. Some soldier abilities and class feats interact further with the suppressed condition.

Primary Target.name: 主要目标 Primary Target
Primary Target.description:
当你释放强力区域武器的全部毁灭性威力时，你可以将火力集中在单一目标上。在你用武器进行一次区域攻击之前（例如通过 Area Fire 或 Auto-Fire 动作），你可以用同一把武器对该区域内的一名生物进行一次远程 Strike，作为一个自由动作，该生物被选为你的主要目标。如果你的攻击是爆发，你必须选择最接近攻击中心的生物。如果你的攻击是锥形或线形，你必须选择离你最近的生物。如果有两名或更多生物距离相同，你可以选择其中之一作为你的主要目标。若命中，若你的主要目标在对你的 Area Fire 或 Auto-Fire 动作进行检定时获得成功，则其改为失败。此次 Strike 不计入你的多重攻击减值。

You can focus fire on a single target when unleashing the full devastation of your powerful area weaponry. Before you make an area attack with a weapon (such as from the Area Fire or Auto-Fire actions), you can make a ranged Strike as a free action with the same weapon against a single creature in the area, who's selected as your primary target. If your attack is a burst, you must select the creature closest to the center of the attack. If your attack is a cone or line, you must select the creature closest to you. If two or more creatures are equidistant, you can choose which one is your primary target. On a hit, if your primary target rolls a success against your Area Fire or Auto-Fire action, they get a failure instead. This Strike doesn't count toward your multiple attack penalty.

Fearless.name: 无畏 Fearless
Fearless.description:
无论这是出于责任感还是想要成功的渴望，当面对可怕的敌人时，你很少会退缩。如果你对一个恐惧效果进行豁免检定并获得成功，则改为获得大成功。

Whether it comes from a sense of duty or a desire to succeed, you rarely flinch when confronted by fearsome foes. If you roll a success on a saving throw against a fear effect, you get a critical success instead.

Quick Swap.name: 快速切换 Quick Swap
Quick Swap.description:
触发条件 你正持用一把双手武器，且一个敌方生物移动到与你相邻的位置。

你可以在紧张局势中切换武器，让自己迅速做好准备，惩罚来袭的敌人。你收起当前武器并拔出另一把双手武器。若你有多组手臂，则你可以改为切换持握手。

Trigger You're wielding a two-handed weapon, and an enemy creature moves adjacent to you.

You can switch weapons in stressful situations so that you quickly set yourself up to punish incoming foes. You stow your current weapon and draw another two-handed weapon. If you have multiple sets of arms, you can instead Switch Hands.

Comm Unit.name: 通讯单元 Comm Unit
Comm Unit.description:
个人通讯器是一种口袋大小的设备，结合了小型便携计算机和蜂窝通信设备，可让你与其他通讯器在行星范围内以音频和文本两种格式进行即时无线通信。个人通讯器还包括计算器、手电筒（以你为中心5英尺半径内发出明亮光照，并在接下来的5英尺内发出微光）、可访问任何本地信息圈的浏览器，以及若干娱乐选项（包括游戏）。

集成在护甲中的个人通讯器具有一些语音激活功能；你可以在不需要空闲手的情况下，以音频形式与其他通讯器通信并接收回复，但输入信息、浏览信息圈或使用应用程序则至少需要使用一只手。

能在更远距离运作的通讯器没有那么便携；它们内置发电机以提供所需电力，并依赖活跃的漂流信标进行通信。大多数大型定居点都可以购买这些通讯器的短期使用服务。

A personal comm unit is a pocket-sized device that combines a minor portable computer and a cellular communications device, allowing instantaneous wireless communication with other comm units in both audio- and text-based formats at planetary range. A personal comm unit also includes a calculator, a flashlight (emits bright light in a 5-foot radius around you and dim light in the next 5 feet), a browser that accesses any local infospheres, and several entertainment options (including games).

Personal comm units integrated into armor have some voice-activated capabilities; you can communicate with other comm units in audio-based formats and receive responses without needing a free hand, but typing a message, browsing the infosphere, or using an app requires the use of at least one hand.

Comm units that function at longer ranges aren't as portable; they include built-in generators that provide the necessary amount of power and rely on active Drift beacons to communicate. Short-term use of these units can be purchased in most major settlements.

Doshko.name: 多什科 Doshko
Doshko.description:
升级： 1

这种动力长柄战斧是维斯卡里姆的传统武器，配有一到三片三角形斧刃，经过锻造，既适合大开大合的过顶挥砍，也适合战术格挡。

Upgrades: 1

The traditional weapon of the Veskarium, this powered poleaxe features one to three triangular blades forged for both wide overhead swings and tactical parrying.

Machine Gun.name: 机枪 Machine Gun
Machine Gun.description:
升级： 1

这些久经考验且可靠的自动武器能够进行短点射，或直接打空整个弹匣来清扫战场。

Upgrades: 1

These proven and reliable automatic weapons are capable of firing in short bursts or completely emptying their magazines to clear a battlefield.

Credstick.name: 信用芯片 Credstick
Credstick.description:
《星际探险家》中，大多数人都会把自己的财富存放在一种称为信用棒的受保护物品上。这些装置通常是扁平的，大小大致相当于一根人类手指。它们的尺寸和品质各不相同，但归根结底，它们只是用来方便携带和花钱的一种手段。这些装置的使用方式由所有者决定，而信用棒只需在合适的银行设备附近轻轻一碰，就能完成收款或付款这样简单的操作。当需要更严格的安全措施时，它们可以要求语音或生物识别印记才能激活。一些先进信用棒甚至还带有魔法组件，可能需要精神密码或念诵特定法术才能取用其中储存的资金。

信用棒并不是通向一个人全部财富的入口，数额更大的信用点通常会安全地存放在银行、私人金库或安全数据库中。相反，信用棒是一种安全且匿名的方式，可以在不被追踪的情况下转移信用点。无论是冒险者还是普通市民，通常都会随身携带一根信用棒，以便处理他们可能需要进行的各种购买；同时他们身上也只会保留刚好足够的信用点，这样即使丢失信用棒，也不至于导致破产。

协约世界中的个人经常会携带信用棒，而其他与协约世界往来的文明，也常常会将本地资金兑换成信用点，因此携带信用棒来花用这些兑换后的货币。有时，一个人可能会带着好几根信用棒，将每一根专门用于不同用途，或者如果他们想进行一笔预定金额的购买，就干脆直接把整根棒交易出去。如果一个人携带的信用棒数量变得过于累赘，也很容易把资金在不同信用棒之间转移，并丢弃已经清空的信用棒以节省空间，不过信用棒的体积恒为可忽略。

Most people in Starfinder keep their wealth on a protected item known as a credstick. These devices are often flat and roughly the size of a human finger. They range in dimensions and quality, but at the end of the day, they're just a means of conveniently carrying and spending money. Usage of these devices is determined by the owner, and a credstick can accept or spend funds with as simple an action as tapping it near a suitable banking device. When more rigorous security is necessary, they can require audio or biometric imprints in order to activate. Some advanced credsticks even have a magical component that might require a mental password or the recitation of a specific spell to access stored funds.

Credsticks aren't gateways to the entirety of one's wealth, and larger stores of credits are often kept secured in banks, personal vaults, or secure databases. Instead, a credstick is a safe and anonymous means of moving credits around without being traced. Adventurers and common citizens alike often keep a credstick on their person to handle any purchases they might be called upon to make, while also only keeping just enough credits on them that losing the credstick wouldn't result in bankruptcy.

Individuals in the Pact Worlds often carry credsticks, and other civilizations that interact with the Pact often turn local funds into credits and thus carry them to spend their converted currency. Sometimes a person might carry several credsticks, dedicating each one to a different use, or simply trading the stick away if they want to make a purchase of a predefined amount. If ever the number of credsticks on a person becomes too cumbersome, it's easy enough to move the funds between individual sticks and discard emptied sticks to save on space, however a credstick always has a negligible bulk.

Fearsome Bulwark.name: 可怖壁垒 Fearsome Bulwark
Fearsome Bulwark.description:
你庞大的体型令敌人胆寒，在战场上为你开辟出一条道路。你在进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.tHCqgwjtQtzNqVvd]{胁迫} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{威吓} 的威吓检定时，可以用你的体质调整值代替魅力调整值；在进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.lOE4yjUnETTdaf2T]{重新定位} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{推撞} 的运动检定时，可以用你的体质调整值代替力量调整值。

Your sheer bulk terrifies foes, clearing a path for you on the battlefield. You can use your Constitution modifier instead of your Charisma modifier on Intimidation checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.tHCqgwjtQtzNqVvd]{Coerce} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} and instead of your Strength modifier on Athletics checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.lOE4yjUnETTdaf2T]{Reposition} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove}.

Reflex Expertise.name: 反射专家 Reflex Expertise
Reflex Expertise.description:
秘学者 你的连接以洞见祝福你，帮助你避开危险。你的反射豁免熟练等级提升为专家。

士兵 你已培养出一种躲避危险的本领。你的反射豁免熟练等级提升为专家。

巫战扭曲者 你对潜在危险的感知——无论是通过惊人的分析能力，还是对更广阔多元宇宙的理解——都会增强你的反应能力。你的反射豁免熟练等级提升为专家。

Mystic Your connection blesses you with insight that helps you dodge danger. Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to expert.

Soldier You've developed a knack for dodging danger. Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to expert.

Witchwarper Your awareness of possible dangers, through incredible analysis or an understanding of the wider multiverse, increases your reflexes. Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to expert.

Soldier Weapon Expert.name: 士兵武器专家 Soldier Weapon Expert
Soldier Weapon Expert.description:
通过实践经验，你学会了如何以一种既能粉碎敌人、又能最大限度发挥你范围攻击优势的方式来使用你的武器。你对简易武器、军用武器和徒手攻击的熟练等级提升至专家。你获得具有范围或全自动特征的武器的重击专精效果。

Through practical experience, you've learned how to use your weapons in a way that both pulverizes your foes and best takes advantage of your area attacks. Your proficiency ranks for simple weapons, martial weapons, and unarmed attacks increases to expert. You gain access to the critical specialization effects of weapons with the area or automatic traits.

Perception Expertise.name: 察觉专家 Perception Expertise
Perception Expertise.description:
特使 你对细节有敏锐的洞察力，并且总能对周围的威胁保持警觉。你的察觉熟练等级提升为专家。

秘学者，士兵 你对周围的威胁保持警觉。你的察觉熟练等级提升为专家。

巫战扭曲者 你对威胁保持警觉。你的察觉熟练等级提升为专家。

Envoy You have a keen eye for details and always manage to remain alert to threats around you. Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to expert.

Mystic, Soldier You remain alert to threats around you. Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to expert.

Witchwarper You remain alert to threats. Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to expert.

Toughness.name: 健壮 Toughness
Toughness.description: 在支撑到极限前，你的身体可以经受比大多数人更沉重的损伤。你的最大生命值提高等于你的等级的数值。你的恢复检定DC降低1点。

Menacing Laughter.name: 狞笑 Menacing Laughter
Menacing Laughter.description:
你的笑声（或其他发声）在你的武器开火的喧嚣中依然清晰可闻。对 30 英尺内每个处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{受压制}状态的生物各进行一次威吓检定，以@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{挫败其士气}。

Your laughter (or other vocalization) remains audible over the din of your weapons fire. Attempt an Intimidation check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} each creature within 30 feet who's @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed}.

Deadlift.name: 硬拉 Deadlift
Deadlift.description:
要求 你未处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏} 状态。

持续 1 分钟，在变为负重前，你可以比平常多携带 4 Bulk。你可携带的数量在专家时提升至 6，大师时提升至 8，传奇时提升至 10。当此专长的增益效果结束时，你会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏} 状态，持续 10 分钟。

Requirements You aren't @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}.

For 1 minute, you can carry 4 more Bulk than normal before becoming encumbered. The amount you can carry increases to 6 at expert, 8 at master, and 10 at legendary. When the benefits of this feat end, you become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} for 10 minutes.

Terrifying Bravado.name: 骇人胆魄 Terrifying Bravado
Terrifying Bravado.description:
触发条件 你对抗一个来源为生物的恐惧效果的豁免检定获得重度成功，或者一个生物对你进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{挫败士气} 的威吓检定失败或重度失败。

你嘲笑敌人试图霸凌你的失败尝试，并以一番骇人的虚张声势反将对手一军。你尝试进行一次威吓检定，对触发该反应的生物进行挫败士气。

Trigger You critically succeed on a save against a fear effect whose source was a creature, or a creature fails or critically fails an Intimidation check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} you.

You laugh at your enemy's failed attempts to bully you, turning the tables on your foe with a display of terrifying bravado. You attempt an Intimidation check to Demoralize the triggering creature.

Widen Area.name: 扩大区域 Widen Area
Widen Area.description:
需求 你正持用一把区域或自动武器。

你调整你的区域武器，以影响更多目标。如果你的下一动作是在爆发、锥形或直线区域内进行区域射击或自动射击，或者你使用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.xND8wnEdnGSq84kn]{回旋猛击}，你会增加那次攻击的区域。对于通常半径至少为10英尺的爆发，半径增加5英尺（半径更小的爆发不受影响）。对于通常长度为15英尺或更短的锥形或直线区域，长度增加5英尺；对于更大的锥形或直线区域，长度增加10英尺。

Requirements You're wielding an area or automatic weapon.

You set up your area weapon to affect more targets. If the next action you use is to Area Fire or Auto-Fire in a burst, cone, or line, or if you use @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.xND8wnEdnGSq84kn]{Whirling Swipe}, you increase the area of that attack. Add 5 feet to the radius of a burst that normally has a radius of at least 10 feet (a burst with a smaller radius isn't affected). Add 5 feet to the length of a cone or line that's normally 15 feet or smaller, and add 10 feet to the length of a larger cone or line.

Powerful Leap.name: 强力跳跃 Powerful Leap
Powerful Leap.description: 未采取@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{跳高 High Jump}行动时，你的垂直@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2HJ4yuEFY1Cast4h]{跳跃 Leap}可达5尺高度。你还会在跳跃时增加5尺水平距离，包括跳高和@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{跳远 Long Jump}。

Frag Grenade (Commercial).name: 破片手榴弹（商用） Frag Grenade (Commercial)
Frag Grenade (Commercial).description:
激活 1 区域火焰

重击 @Damage[1[bleed]]

这些破片手雷会爆炸成一团弹片云，在一个 @Template[burst|distance:5] 内造成 1d8 点穿刺伤害，并允许进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] 豁免。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @Damage[1[bleed]]

These fragmentary grenades explode in a cloud of shrapnel and deal 1d8 piercing damage in a @Template[burst|distance:5] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save.

Incendiary Grenade (Commercial).name: 燃烧手雷（商业级） Incendiary Grenade (Commercial)
Incendiary Grenade (Commercial).description:
激活 1 区域 火焰

重击 5尺

这些手雷利用被点燃的化学物质爆炸，释放出一阵强烈热浪，并造成1d8点火焰伤害，可进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] 豁免检定（@Template[burst|distance:5]）。如果你能使用手雷的重击专精效果，则对燃烧手雷的豁免检定大失败的生物会被从手雷处击退。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical 5 feet

These grenades use an ignited chemical to explode in a blast of intense heat and deal 1d8 fire damage with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save (@Template[burst|distance:5]). If you have access to the critical specialization effect of grenades, creatures who critically fail their saving throw against incendiary grenades are knocked away from the grenade.

Grenade Launcher (Commercial).name: 榴弹发射器（商业型） Grenade Launcher (Commercial)
Grenade Launcher (Commercial).description:
激活 2 区域射击

这种自动后膛装填发射器的旋转弹巢最多可容纳六枚具备智能装填技术的任意种类手榴弹，使其持用者每次开火时都能选择不同的手榴弹。榴弹发射器是一种军用远程武器，装填值为 2，射程为 280 英尺。

Activate 2 Area Fire

The rotating barrel of this automatic breechloading launcher holds up to six grenades of any variety with smart loading technology, allowing its wielder to choose a different grenade each time they fire. A grenade launcher is a martial ranged weapon, has a reload of 2, and a range 280 feet.

Hidden Soldier Armor.name: 隐蔽式士兵护甲 Hidden Soldier Armor
Hidden Soldier Armor.description:
升级： 1

这套重甲配有一顶带狭缝的头盔，只露出穿戴者的双眼。这套高科技陶瓷护甲由胸甲、肩甲、臂甲和胫甲组成，并会随着身体的动作灵活弯曲。

Upgrades: 1

This suit of heavy armor features a slitted helmet that reveals only the wearer's eyes. This high-tech ceramic suit consists of breastplate, shoulder guards, bracers, and greaves that flex with the body's movements.

Pahtra.name: 帕赫特拉 Pahtra
Pahtra.description:
帕赫特拉是来自邻近恒星系的一种类人生猫科物种。他们极具竞争心，并以在魔法、音乐和战争方面的成就而闻名。他们的母星最近从维斯卡里姆的占领下获得解放，并已加入协约世界。

Pahtras are a humanoid feline species from a nearby star system. They're highly competitive and known for their achievements in magic, music, and war. Their home world was recently freed from the Veskarium's occupation, and they've joined the Pact Worlds.

Meyel's Chosen Pahtra.name: 梅耶尔所选的帕卓尼斯人 Meyel's Chosen Pahtra
Meyel's Chosen Pahtra.description:
你有一股无可否认的好运，而你相信这是你的祖神梅耶尔赐予的祝福。你可能出身于一个绵延已久的秘学者世家。也许你出生在普洛尼斯的一处圣洁地点，或者你曾在危急时刻怀着炽热的祈祷向外求援。梅耶尔的大多数天选者都能指出至少一件过去发生的事，说明她们的女神或许曾出手干预，将他们从死亡或其他可怕的命运中拯救出来。无论是比喻意义上还是字面意义上，你似乎总能化险为夷。每天第一次你在一次豁免检定中重度失败时，你立即以一个自由动作重骰这次豁免检定；这是一种幸运效果。

You have an undeniable streak of luck that you believe is a blessing from your ancestral god Meyel. You might come from a long line of mystics. Perhaps you were born at a holy site on Pulonis, or you reached out in fervent prayer at a time of crisis. Most of Meyel's chosen can point to at least one past event when their goddess might have intervened to save them from death or some other awful fate. Whether metaphorically or literally, you always seem to land on your feet. The first time each day that you critically fail a saving throw, you immediately reroll the saving throw as a free action; this is a fortune effect.

Icon.name: 图标 Icon
Icon.description:
每个人都想拥有自己成名的15分钟，但对你来说，这不知为何已经成了一种生活方式。无论是凭借运气还是投入奉献，你都是一名耀眼的表演者、名人，或广受欢迎的网红。你的面容、声音和风格在已知宇宙中都是有价值的商品，但每有一位狂热粉丝，就会有一个黑子散播流言，或有狗仔队伺机捕捉你的缺点。

选择两项属性增强。其中一项必须加给体质或魅力，另一项为自由属性增强。

你受训于表演技能和媒体学识技能。你获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.xqAdXRd2gSQcqp5E]{令人印象深刻的表演}技能专长。

Everybody wants their 15 minutes of fame, but for you, it's somehow become a lifestyle. Whether by luck or dedication, you're a star performer, celebrity, or popular influencer. Your face, voice, and style are commodities across known space, but for every adoring fan, there's a hater spreading gossip or paparazzi looking to capture your flaws.

Choose two attribute boosts. One must be to Constitution or Charisma, and one is a free attribute boost.

You're trained in the Performance skill and the Media Lore skill. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.xqAdXRd2gSQcqp5E]{Impressive Performance} skill feat.

Impressive Performance.name: 出色表演 Impressive Performance
Impressive Performance.description: 你的表演广受追捧，为你赢得拥趸。你可以用表演技能替代交涉技能@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{建立印象 Make an Impression}。若你在观众面前表演至少10分钟，就能够以至多10个观看了整段表演的观众为建立印象的目标，无需承受通常情况的减值。若表演1小时，目标数量提高到20个；若表演2小时，提高到50个。

Solarian.name: 星辉武者 Solarian
Solarian.description:
