你是宇宙群星之力的引导者——一名太阳骑士。重力与光代表了这些力量的两端，而你能够在它们之间调谐自身。作为这一循环的代理者，你能够显化出各式太阳装备，并利用你自身与群星之力的连接来强化它们。无论你偏好恒星光谱的哪一端，你都可以在它们之间改变自己的调谐状态，以运用通过冥想与练习获得的太阳力量。

You're a conduit for the stellar forces of the cosmos—a solar knight. The powers of gravity and light represent the extremes of these forces, and you can attune yourself between them. As an agent of this cycle, you manifest an array of solar equipment and use your own connection to stellar forces to empower them. Regardless of which extreme of the stellar spectrum you prefer, you can change your attunement between them to take advantage of solar powers earned through meditation and practice.

Solar Manifestations.name: 太阳显现 Solar Manifestations
Solar Manifestations.description:
你对物质宇宙恒星之力的深刻理解，会以多种有形方式显现出来。你可以创造并维持三种不同的显现：日焰、日冕辉光和太阳武器。如果你变为失谐，这些显现会暂时消失。

日焰

一小团太阳之力悬浮在你身旁，或嵌附在你身体的某个部位上，例如你的手掌中或脸上。这团光点可以在短距离内释放一道定向的能量冲击。你的日焰是一把属于搏击武器组、具有调谐与恒星武士特征的军用远程武器。它不占用手，也无需持握即可使用。除非你变为失谐，否则你的日焰不能被其他生物选为目标，也无法从你身上移除。你的调谐决定了日焰的伤害类型与距离增量。你用日焰进行伤害掷骰时，将你的力量调整值加入其中。你可以用恒星武士水晶提升日焰的伤害。

引力子调谐 1d8 钝击，距离增量15尺。若你获得重击成功，你可以尝试以一个自由动作对目标执行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{绊摔}，无视射程与多重攻击减值，即使你没有空闲手也可以。

光子调谐 1d6 火焰，距离增量30尺。若你获得重击成功，目标还会额外受到1d6持续性火焰伤害。

日冕辉光

一层恒星能量环绕着你，覆盖你的身体或所穿戴的护甲。根据你当前的调谐状态，它会呈现为一层发光的光辉或凝实的黑暗。辉光的整体外观与形状由你自行决定；它可以表现为环绕你的能量格架，或覆盖在现有装备之上的尖刺能量护甲。此设计不会影响其功能，也不会提供任何额外加值。

你获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.q7UDeO9Ko1EbPRWm]{辉光激涌}反应。

太阳武器

凭借纯粹的意志，你唤出一把由群星精华锻成的有形武器。这把武器是你自身的延伸，而你可以通过冥想改变它的形态。显现你的武器时，它会出现在你所选择的一只空闲手中。若它具有不占手特征，则可以显现在任意一只手中。你的太阳武器是一把军用近战武器。它造成1d8点由你选择的钝击、穿刺或挥砍伤害，并具有调谐与恒星武士特征。

在1级时，为你的武器从下列特征中至多选择两项。或者，你可以为武器选择“触及”或“双手 1d10”特征，以此替代从下列特征中选择两项。

  • 缴械
  • 不占手
  • 擒抱
  • 非致命
  • 招架
  • 推撞
  • 横扫
  • 绊摔
  • 多用（仅B/P/S）
  • 触及（视为两项特征）
  • 双手 1d10（视为两项特征）

你可以为你的武器选择下列任一武器组。

  • 斧
  • 搏击
  • 棍棒
  • 连枷
  • 锤
  • 小刀
  • 镐
  • 长柄武器
  • 矛
  • 剑

你的太阳武器会根据你当前的调谐获得额外益处。

引力子调谐 当你使用太阳武器成功对一个生物进行打击时，直到其下个回合结束前，该生物所在空间及其所有相邻方格对该生物而言都属于困难地形。

光子调谐 当你使用太阳武器成功对一个生物进行打击时，你会造成等同于你等级一半（向上取整）的额外火焰伤害。你的太阳武器会在5尺半径内投射明亮光照（并在接下来的5尺内提供微光）。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.UlFxEP3YrbseKA62]{效果：太阳武器}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.uvtdqSfKD6oXNA29]{重铸太阳武器}

Your deep understanding of the stellar forces of the universe manifests in a variety of tangible ways. You can create and maintain three different manifestations: a solar flare, solar nimbus, and solar weapon. Your manifestations temporarily vanish if you become unattuned.

Solar Flare

A small mote of solar power hovers nearby or appears embedded on some part of your body, such as the palm of your hand or on your face. This mote can unleash a directed blast of energy at short range. Your solar flare is a martial ranged weapon in the brawling weapon group with the attuned and solarian traits. It doesn't take up a hand and doesn't need to be held to be wielded. Your solar flare can't be targeted by other creatures or removed from your person, except for when you become unattuned. Your attunement determines the damage type and range increment of your solar flare. You add your Strength modifier to damage rolls with your solar flare. You can improve the damage of your solar flare with solarian crystals.

Graviton-Attuned 1d8 bludgeoning, range increment 15 feet. On a critical success, you can attempt to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip} the target as a free action, ignoring range and multiple attack penalty, even if you don't have a free hand.

Photon-Attuned 1d6 fire, range increment 30 feet. On a critical success, the target additionally takes 1d6 persistent fire damage.

Solar Nimbus

A layer of stellar energy surrounds you, overlaying your body or worn armor. It appears as a layer of glowing light or solid darkness, depending on your current state of attunement. The general appearance and shape of the nimbus is your choice and could appear as a lattice of energy surrounding you or imposing spiked energy armor layered atop your existing equipment. This design has no impact on its function and doesn't provide any additional bonuses.

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.q7UDeO9Ko1EbPRWm]{Nimbus Surge} reaction.

Solar Weapon

Through sheer will, you call forth a tangible weapon forged from the essence of stars. This weapon is an extension of yourself, and you can change its form with meditation. When manifesting your weapon, it appears in a free hand of your choice. If it has the free-hand trait, it can manifest in any hand. Your solar weapon is a martial melee weapon. It deals 1d8 of your choice of bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage with the attuned and solarian traits.

At first level, choose up to two of the following traits for your weapon. Alternatively, you can select the reach or two-hand 1d10 trait for your weapon instead of selecting two of the following traits.

  • Disarm
  • Free-Hand
  • Grapple
  • Nonlethal
  • Parry
  • Shove
  • Sweep
  • Trip
  • Versatile (B/P/S only)
  • Reach (counts as two traits)
  • Two-Hand 1d10 (counts as two traits)

You can select one of the following weapon groups for your weapon to be a part of.

  • Axe
  • Brawling
  • Club
  • Flail
  • Hammer
  • Knife
  • Pick
  • Polearm
  • Spear
  • Sword

Your solar weapon gains additional benefits based on your current attunement.

Graviton-Attuned When you successfully Strike a creature using your solar weapon, that creature's space and all squares adjacent to it are difficult terrain for that creature until the end of its next turn.

Photon-Attuned When you successfully Strike a creature with your solar weapon, you deal an additional amount of fire damage equal to half your level (rounded up). Your solar weapon casts bright light in a 5-foot radius (and dim light for the next 5 feet).

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.UlFxEP3YrbseKA62]{Effect: Solar Weapon}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.uvtdqSfKD6oXNA29]{Re-Forge Solar Weapon}

Stellar Attunement.name: 星体调谐 Stellar Attunement
Stellar Attunement.description:
作为一名星辉武者，你的存在会在恒星的不同面向之间循环。你起始拥有两种面向：光子（恒星释放热、光与等离子体的力量）和引力子（恒星通过引力吸引并禁锢物体的力量）。在任何时候，你都被视为与引力子调谐、与光子调谐，或未调谐。你的许多能力都会根据你当前的调谐状态产生额外效果，而有些能力会将你当前的调谐状态切换为另一种状态。

你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.3xDhpvORBmK6AtcI]{调谐} 动作。

As a solarian, your existence cycles between the aspects of stars. You begin with two aspects: photon (the power of stars to emit heat, light, and plasma) and graviton (the power of stars to attract and imprison objects through gravity). At any time, you're considered graviton-attuned, photon-attuned, or unattuned. Many of your abilities have additional effects based on your current attunement, and some abilities swap your current state of attunement to another state.

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.3xDhpvORBmK6AtcI]{Attune} action.

Nimbus Surge.name: 灵云涌动 Nimbus Surge
Nimbus Surge.description:
触发条件 你触及范围内的一个生物使用了一个操纵动作或一个移动动作，进行一次远程攻击，或在其正在使用的移动动作期间离开一个方格。

你的灵光迸发出能量，迫使敌人的防御出现破绽。对触发该效果的生物进行一次近战打击。此次打击不计入你的多重攻击减值，且你的多重攻击减值也不适用于此次打击。

引力调谐 若此次打击为重击成功，则目标必须以你的职业 DC 进行一次对抗 @Check[fortitude|against:solarian] 的豁免，失败则直到其回合结束前变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱 1}。

光子调谐 若此次打击为重击成功，则目标必须以你的职业 DC 进行一次对抗 @Check[fortitude|against:solarian] 的豁免，失败则直到其回合开始前变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}。

Trigger A creature within your reach uses a manipulate action or a move action, makes a ranged attack, or leaves a square during a move action it's using.

Your nimbus surges with energy, forcing an opening in your foe's defenses. Make a melee Strike against the triggering creature. This Strike doesn't count toward your multiple attack penalty, and your multiple attack penalty doesn't apply to this Strike.

Graviton-Attuned If the Strike is a critical success, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|against:solarian] save against your class DC or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} until the end of its turn.

Photon-Attuned If the Strike is a critical success, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|against:solarian] save against your class DC or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} until the start of its turn.

Re-Forge Solar Weapon.name: 重铸太阳武器 Re-Forge Solar Weapon
Re-Forge Solar Weapon.description:
你花费 10 分钟专注于你太阳武器的构成。你可以更改你太阳武器的伤害类型（通常可在钝击、穿刺或挥砍之间选择）、所选特性和武器组。你的武器会保持你的这些选择，直到你下一次重铸太阳武器为止。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.UlFxEP3YrbseKA62]{效果：太阳武器}

You spend 10 minutes focusing on the composition of your solar weapon. You can change your solar weapon's damage type (typically choosing between bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing), selected traits, and weapon group. Your weapon maintains your selections until the next time you Re-Forge Solar Weapon.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.UlFxEP3YrbseKA62]{Effect: Solar Weapon}

Attune.name: 调谐 Attune
Attune.description:
频率 每轮一次

你稳住身心，并使自己与所选的恒星面向调谐。你会调谐至光子或引力子。你也可以显现你的任意一种太阳显现，只要它们当前处于休眠状态，且你有可用于使用它们的空闲手。

特殊 除了上述用法外，当你掷先攻时，你也可以以一个自由动作进行调谐。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.UlFxEP3YrbseKA62]{效果：太阳武器}

Frequency once per round

You steady your body and mind and attune yourself to the stellar aspect of your choice. You become attuned to photon or graviton. You can also manifest any of your solar manifestations if they're currently dormant and if you have the free hands to use them.

Special In addition to the above usage, you can also Attune as a free action when you roll initiative.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.UlFxEP3YrbseKA62]{Effect: Solar Weapon}

Semi-Auto Pistol.name: 半自动手枪 Semi-Auto Pistol
Semi-Auto Pistol.description:
升级： 1

这把手枪会在每次射击后自动弹出用过的弹壳并装填新的弹药。

Upgrades: 1

This pistol automatically ejects used cartridges and loads new ammunition after every shot fired.

Comm Unit.name: 通讯单元 Comm Unit
Comm Unit.description:
个人通讯器是一种口袋大小的设备，结合了小型便携式计算机和蜂窝通信设备的功能，能够与其他通讯器在行星范围内以音频和文本两种格式进行即时无线通信。个人通讯器还包括计算器、手电筒（以你为中心5英尺半径内发出明亮光照，在接下来的5英尺内发出微光）、可访问任何本地信息圈的浏览器，以及若干娱乐选项（包括游戏）。

集成在护甲中的个人通讯器具备一定的语音激活功能；你可以无需空闲手就以音频格式与其他通讯器通信并接收回应，但输入消息、浏览信息圈或使用应用程序都需要至少腾出一只手。

能在更远距离运作的通讯器就没那么便携了；它们内置发电机以提供所需电力，并依靠活跃的漂流信标进行通信。在大多数主要聚居地，都可以购买这些通讯器的短期使用服务。

A personal comm unit is a pocket-sized device that combines a minor portable computer and a cellular communications device, allowing instantaneous wireless communication with other comm units in both audio- and text-based formats at planetary range. A personal comm unit also includes a calculator, a flashlight (emits bright light in a 5-foot radius around you and dim light in the next 5 feet), a browser that accesses any local infospheres, and several entertainment options (including games).

Personal comm units integrated into armor have some voice-activated capabilities; you can communicate with other comm units in audio-based formats and receive responses without needing a free hand, but typing a message, browsing the infosphere, or using an app requires the use of at least one hand.

Comm units that function at longer ranges aren't as portable; they include built-in generators that provide the necessary amount of power and rely on active Drift beacons to communicate. Short-term use of these units can be purchased in most major settlements.

Hardlight Series.name: 硬光系列 Hardlight Series
Hardlight Series.description:
升级： 1

固定在腰带或翻领上的投影器会将穿戴者的身体包裹在这层闪烁的硬光外壳中。军用配发的硬光护甲遵循可预测的标准样式，而私人用户则享有一系列可定制的时尚选项。

Upgrades: 1

A projector fastened to a belt or lapel encases the wearer's body in this shimmering hardlight shell. Military-issue hardlight armor follows a predictable standard, but private users enjoy a range of customizable fashion options.

Medpatch (Commercial).name: 医疗贴片（商业） Medpatch (Commercial)
Medpatch (Commercial).description:
激活 1 (manipulate)

医疗贴片会加速身体的自然愈合。你恢复 @Damage[(1d6)[healing]] 生命值，并在 10 分钟内对抗疾病和毒药的豁免检定获得 +1 物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{效果：医疗贴片}

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Medpatches accelerate the body's natural healing. You regain @Damage[(1d6)[healing]] Hit Points and gain a +1 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{Effect: Medpatch}

Credstick.name: 信用筹 Credstick
Credstick.description:
《星际探险家》中的大多数人都会把自己的财富存放在一种称为信用棒的受保护物品上。这些装置通常是扁平的，大小大致相当于一根人类手指。它们的尺寸和质量各不相同，但归根结底，它们只是用于方便携带和花费金钱的一种手段。这些装置的使用方式由持有者决定，而信用棒只需在合适的银行设备附近轻触一下，就能完成收款或支付资金这样简单的操作。当需要更严格的安全措施时，它们也可以要求语音或生物特征印记才能激活。有些先进（型）信用棒甚至还带有魔法组件，可能需要精神密码，或诵读特定法术，才能存取其中储存的资金。

信用棒并不是通往一个人全部财富的入口，数额更大的信用点通常会安全存放在银行、个人金库或安全数据库中。相反，信用棒是一种安全且匿名的方式，用于在不被追踪的情况下转移信用点。无论是冒险者还是普通公民，通常都会随身携带一根信用棒，以便处理他们可能需要进行的各种购买，同时身上也只保留恰好足够的信用点，这样即使丢失信用棒，也不至于因此破产。

协约世界中的个人常常会携带信用棒，而其他与协约进行往来的文明，也常会把当地资金兑换成信用点，并因此携带信用棒来花用这些兑换后的货币。有时一个人可能会携带好几根信用棒，将每一根用于不同用途；或者如果他们想进行一笔预设金额的购买，也可以直接把整根棒转交出去。要是一个人身上的信用棒数量多到太过累赘，也很容易在不同信用棒之间转移资金，并丢弃已经清空的信用棒以节省空间，不过信用棒始终具有可忽略不计的体积。

Most people in Starfinder keep their wealth on a protected item known as a credstick. These devices are often flat and roughly the size of a human finger. They range in dimensions and quality, but at the end of the day, they're just a means of conveniently carrying and spending money. Usage of these devices is determined by the owner, and a credstick can accept or spend funds with as simple an action as tapping it near a suitable banking device. When more rigorous security is necessary, they can require audio or biometric imprints in order to activate. Some advanced credsticks even have a magical component that might require a mental password or the recitation of a specific spell to access stored funds.

Credsticks aren't gateways to the entirety of one's wealth, and larger stores of credits are often kept secured in banks, personal vaults, or secure databases. Instead, a credstick is a safe and anonymous means of moving credits around without being traced. Adventurers and common citizens alike often keep a credstick on their person to handle any purchases they might be called upon to make, while also only keeping just enough credits on them that losing the credstick wouldn't result in bankruptcy.

Individuals in the Pact Worlds often carry credsticks, and other civilizations that interact with the Pact often turn local funds into credits and thus carry them to spend their converted currency. Sometimes a person might carry several credsticks, dedicating each one to a different use, or simply trading the stick away if they want to make a purchase of a predefined amount. If ever the number of credsticks on a person becomes too cumbersome, it's easy enough to move the funds between individual sticks and discard emptied sticks to save on space, however a credstick always has a negligible bulk.

Stellar Rush.name: 星辰突袭 Stellar Rush
Stellar Rush.description:
你伴随着一阵恒星能量的爆发向前猛冲，轻松切入战斗核心。疾行两次。在这些移动期间，你的速度获得 +10 英尺的境遇加值。

引力调谐 当你完成疾行后，15 英尺内的敌人必须尝试一次对抗你职业 DC 的 @Check[fortitude|against:solarian|options:area-effect,forced-movement] 豁免。若失败，它们会被直接拖拽向你，并尽可能在与你相邻的方格结束移动。你选择这些敌人移动的顺序。

光子调谐 当你完成疾行后，你以自己为中心，在 @Template[type:burst|distance:15] 内创造一个光子场。直到你下个回合开始时，位于光子场外的生物对于位于场内的生物而言处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 状态。

You rush forward with a blast of stellar energy, getting into the thick of combat with ease. Stride twice. You gain a +10-foot circumstance bonus to your Speed during these moves.

Graviton-Attuned When you finish your Strides, enemies within 15 feet of you must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:solarian|options:area-effect,forced-movement] save against your class DC. On a failure, they're pulled directly toward you, ending in an adjacent square if possible. You select the order these enemies are moved.

Photon-Attuned When you finish your Strides, you create a photon field in a @Template[type:burst|distance:15] centered on you. Until the start of your next turn, creatures outside the photon field are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} to creatures inside the field.

Competitive Spirit.name: 竞争精神 Competitive Spirit
Competitive Spirit.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发条件 一名盟友尝试进行一次技能检定，且该技能你的熟练等级为受训或更高。

你通过与触发此效果的盟友竞争来激励自己做到最好。直到你的下个回合结束前，你可以尝试进行相同的技能检定，以执行该盟友所执行的相同行动或活动。你在此次技能检定上获得 +2 环境加值。若你的成功等级至少比该盟友高 1 级，则此次使用 Competitive Spirit 不计入其频率。若你在此次技能检定中掷出大失败，则在接下来 1 小时内，你以该技能进行的所有技能检定都承受 –1 环境减值，因为你会尝试新的技巧来改进自己今后的尝试。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger An ally attempts a skill check with a skill that you have trained or better proficiency rank in.

You push yourself to be the best by competing with the triggering ally. Until the end of your next turn, you can attempt the same skill check to perform the same action or activity that the triggering ally performed. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to this skill check. If you achieve at least one degree of success higher than the triggering ally, this use of Competitive Spirit doesn't count toward its frequency. If you roll a critical failure on this skill check, you take a –1 circumstance penalty to all skill checks attempted with that skill for the next hour as you try new techniques to improve your future attempts.

Stellar Resilience.name: 星辰韧性 Stellar Resilience
Stellar Resilience.description:
星辰能量如同势不可挡的浪潮流经你的全身，强化你的身心。你在强韧豁免上的熟练等级提升为专家。当你对抗一个精神或失能效果进行强韧或意志豁免并获得成功时，你可以以自由动作进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.3xDhpvORBmK6AtcI]{调谐}。

Stellar energy flows throughout your entire being like an unstoppable tidal wave, strengthening both body and mind. Your proficiency rank in Fortitude saves increases to expert. When you roll a success on a Fortitude or Will save against a mental or incapacitation effect, you can @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.3xDhpvORBmK6AtcI]{Attune} as a free action.

Datapad.name: 数据板 Datapad
Datapad.description:
这些无处不在的手持式计算机集成了通讯装置、麦克风、扬声器、摄像头、信息圈浏览器和数据存储功能。它们可以存储数千小时的录音、玩游戏，并执行简单的计算功能，例如时间追踪与通知、文字处理、计算、数据处理、流媒体播放，以及转播地方政府发布的紧急警报。在大多数社会中，商用数据板都比较脆弱，设计上就是为了迅速磨损，或在最新功能与更新方面很快落后，以促使消费者将其更换为更新的型号。相比之下，高端数据板则被设计得更加耐用，且通常配有更坚固的机身和额外功能。

These ubiquitous handheld computers incorporate a comm unit, microphone, speaker, camera, infosphere browser, and data storage. They can store thousands of hours of recordings, play games, and perform simple computing functions, such as time tracking and notifications, word processing, calculations, data processing, streaming media, and broadcasting emergency alerts from local governments. In most societies, commercial datapads are relatively flimsy, designed to rapidly wear out or fall behind on the latest features and updates to encourage the consumer to replace it with a newer model. In contrast, higher-end datapads are made to last and often include a sturdier chassis and extra functions.

Shattering Impact.name: 粉碎冲击 Shattering Impact
Shattering Impact.description:
你倾尽全力，用你的太阳武器发动一次强力到足以粉碎武器的单次攻击。用你的太阳武器进行一次打击。此次打击额外造成一个武器伤害骰。你的太阳武器会粉碎，且你必须再次显现它才能继续使用。

引力调谐 命中时，目标的速度在你的下个回合开始前承受 –10 尺的状态减值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.Ll3uZdiSqaszP3fn]{效果：粉碎冲击}

光子调谐 命中时，你还会额外造成等于你等级一半的持续火焰伤害，向上取整。

You pour all your effort into making a single attack with your solar weapon that's so powerful it shatters the weapon. Strike with your solar weapon. The Strike deals one additional weapon damage die. Your solar weapon shatters and must be manifested to continue using it.

Graviton-Attuned On a hit, the target takes a –10-foot status penalty to Speed until the start of your next turn.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.Ll3uZdiSqaszP3fn]{Effect: Shattering Impact}

Photon-Attuned On a hit, you additionally deal persistent fire damage equal to half your level, rounded up.

Fleet.name: 舰队 Fleet
Fleet.description: 你的脚步变得更快。你的速度提高5尺。

Cat Fall.name: 猫落术 Cat Fall
Cat Fall.description: 模仿自猫的高空特技动作让你能够缓冲坠落的损伤。将坠落距离视为缩短10尺。若你在特技技能上的熟练度达到专家，将坠落距离视为缩短25尺，达到大师后，缩短50尺。若你在特技技能上的熟练度达到传奇，无论坠落距离多高，你始终能够以脚着地，不会受到任何伤害。

Human.name: 人类 Human
Human.description:
人类以其适应能力以及在最具挑战性的处境中茁壮发展的本领而闻名，其中包括他们母星戈拉里昂的神秘消失。人类雄心勃勃、富有创造力且有着无穷的好奇心，在银河中始终保持着强大的存在感，常常担任领导职位或活跃在探索的最前沿。几乎任何地方都能找到人类，他们几乎什么事情都会做。

Humans are known for their ability to adapt and thrive in the most challenging situations, including the mysterious loss of their home world, Golarion. Ambitious, creative, and endlessly curious, humans maintain a robust presence in the galaxy, often taking on positions of leadership or acting at the forefront of exploration. Humans can be found almost anywhere, doing almost anything.

Skilled Human (Diplomacy).name: 熟练人类（外交） Skilled Human (Diplomacy)
Skilled Human (Diplomacy).description: 你的聪明才智让你有机会擅长多种技能。你选择的一项技能获得受训熟练度。5级时，你在该所选技能上的熟练度提升至专家。

Outlaw.name: 法外之徒 Outlaw
Outlaw.description:
你是个职业罪犯，背负着恶名。也许是不公的处境逼你走上了犯罪生涯，又或者你享受成功干下一票或在枪战中死里逃生时带来的刺激感。不管怎样，这是你唯一熟悉的生活，而由于你头上的悬赏，在棺材落地之前，或在你赚到足够的信用点买个新身份之前，你都得继续过这种日子。

选择两项属性增强。其中一项必须加在力量或魅力上，另一项为自由属性增强。

你在威吓技能和黑社会知识技能上受过训练。你获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.zdycsO9Z0wHBZ17k]{威吓射击}技能专长。

You're a career criminal with a nasty reputation. Perhaps unfair circumstances forced you into a life of crime, or maybe you enjoy the thrill you get from pulling off a heist or living through a shoot-out. Either way, this life is the only one you know, and thanks to the bounty on your head, you're in it until the casket drops or you make enough creds to buy a new one.

Choose two attribute boosts. One must be to Strength or Charisma, and one is a free attribute boost.

You're trained in the Intimidation skill and the Underworld Lore skill. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.zdycsO9Z0wHBZ17k]{Intimidating Shot} skill feat.

Intimidating Shot.name: 威吓射击 Intimidating Shot
Intimidating Shot.description:
你尝试用你的远程武器向空中开火，以此对敌人施展@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{威吓}，消耗等同于该武器 expend 的弹药，并使用该武器的最大射程，而非通常的 30 尺射程。若目标与你不共享语言，此次检定不会承受 –4 的情境减值。

You attempt to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} a foe with your ranged weapon by firing it into the air, using ammo equal to the weapon's expend and the weapon's maximum range rather than the usual range of 30 feet. This check doesn't take a –4 circumstance penalty if the target doesn't share a language with you.

Envoy.name: 特使 Envoy
Envoy.description:
你是一位影响力大师。你凭借迷人的微笑、机敏的才思，以及敏锐的自保意识，在物质宇宙中闯出自己的一片天地。你是一名领导者，能够激励队友，推动他们突破极限，并在艰难时刻助他们渡过难关。你擅长让别人按你的意愿行事，但当情况急转直下时，你也总是准备好直面麻烦。你可能是个骗子、外交官、表演者或军官——也可能视局势需要，承担任何角色。

You're a master influencer. You make your way in the universe with a charming smile, quick wit, and keen sense of self-preservation. You're a leader who motivates your teammates, pushes them past their limits, and helps them through tough spots. You excel at getting others to do what you want, but you're always ready to face trouble head-on when things take a turn for the worse. You might be a con artist, diplomat, performer, or military officer—or you might take on whatever role the situation demands.

Envoy Directives.name: 特使训令 Envoy Directives
Envoy Directives.description:
特使通过训令来鼓舞盟友。训令是一种命令，能让遵从它的盟友获得增益。特使训令包含一种让特使通过花费更多动作来以身作则、从而增强效果的方式。训令具有听觉或视觉（特征），取决于你如何激励你的盟友。

你起始获得一项特使训令。你可以通过特使职业、特使职业专长以及你的领导风格学会更多训令。你每轮可以发布一项训令。除非另有说明，特使的训令及其赋予的增益持续到你下个回合开始时。

你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cmCtfURzpbzkxWsy]{狠狠干他们！} 特使训令。

Envoys encourage their allies with directives. A directive is an order that benefits allies who follow it. Envoy directives include a way for the envoy to lead by example by spending more actions for increased effects. Directives have the auditory or visual trait depending on how you inspire your allies.

You begin with one envoy directive. You can learn more directives through the envoy class, envoy class feats, and your leadership style. You can issue one directive a round. Unless otherwise stated, an envoy's directive and the benefits it grants last until the beginning of your next turn.

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cmCtfURzpbzkxWsy]{Get 'Em!} envoy directive.

Leadership Style.name: 领导风格 Leadership Style
Leadership Style.description:
无论这是与生俱来的，还是经过训练所得，你都已发展出一种领导他人的个人风格。在1级时，选择一种领导风格。你在所示的领导技能上变为受训，获得所示的领导特长，并知晓对应的领导训令。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.u2dy5FMDv30UH8HC]{身先士卒}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.KEoTccJlfKzMk19l]{暗中指挥}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.jaGIV3t7G07F0qda]{枪火全开}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.RIUhD5eldHzBsFIe]{聚光灯下}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.GTmdHGLcuc11Bizi]{信息圈指挥官}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.6cFaxZ4aAhuUbnwi]{共渡绝境}

Whether it comes naturally, or you trained for it, you've developed a personal style of leading others. At 1st level, select a leadership style. You become trained in the indicated leadership skill, you gain the indicated leadership perk, and know the associated leadership directive.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.u2dy5FMDv30UH8HC]{From the Front}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.KEoTccJlfKzMk19l]{From the Shadows}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.jaGIV3t7G07F0qda]{Guns Blazing}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.RIUhD5eldHzBsFIe]{In the Spotlight}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.GTmdHGLcuc11Bizi]{Infosphere Director}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.6cFaxZ4aAhuUbnwi]{Through Desperate Times}

Get 'Em!.name: 狠狠干！ Get 'Em!
Get 'Em!.description:
你将一名敌人挑出来，供你和你的盟友集中攻击。选择一个你看得见且位于60尺内的敌人。直到你下个回合开始前，你和你的盟友对该目标的攻击获得+1状态加值。

以身作则 如果你使用了两个动作，则对该目标进行一次打击。你的伤害掷骰获得等同于你的魅力调整值的状态加值。无论此次打击是否命中，直到你下个回合开始前，你和你的盟友对此敌人后续进行的打击的伤害都获得+1状态加值。在5级、10级、15级和20级时，该伤害加值提高1。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.ey2zSEnprAGgvrij]{效果：Get 'Em!}

You single out an enemy for you and your allies to focus your attacks on. Select an enemy within 60 feet that you can see. You and your allies gain a +1 status bonus to attacks against that target until the beginning of your next turn.

Lead by Example If you used two actions, Strike the target. You gain a status bonus to the damage roll equal to your Charisma modifier. Regardless of whether the Strike hits, you and your allies gain a +1 status bonus to damage on subsequent Strikes made against the enemy until the start of your next turn. Increase the damage by 1 at 5th, 10th, 15th, and 20th levels.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.ey2zSEnprAGgvrij]{Effect: Get 'Em!}

Guns Blazing.name: 枪火齐发 Guns Blazing
Guns Blazing.description:
你以火力给人留下深刻印象来领导你的团队。你夸张张扬的个性背后有密集枪火作为支撑，而且你总是先开枪。

领导技能 特技

领导特长 你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.2kwXTUjYYhoAGySr]{惊人先攻} 作为一个额外专长。

领导训令 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.RNilk6Evoi0xNbWX]{准备武器！}

You lead your team by making an impression with firepower. Your bombastic personality has a barrage of gunfire to back it up, and you always shoot first.

Leadership Skill Acrobatics

Leadership Perk You gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.2kwXTUjYYhoAGySr]{Incredible Initiative} as a bonus feat.

Leadership Directive @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.RNilk6Evoi0xNbWX]{Ready Arms!}

Ready Arms!.name: 准备武器！ Ready Arms!
Ready Arms!.description:
通过迅速下达命令，你让盟友们做好准备他们的装备。你和30英尺内的所有盟友都可以以自由动作进行一次交互，用于拔出、切换持握手，或交换武器。

以身作则 如果你用了两个动作，你可以使用你拔出或换上的一件武器进行一次打击、区域射击或自动射击（包括通过改变当前启用的持握手来做到这一点）。如果你的打击命中，或者某个目标在对抗你的区域射击或自动射击时豁免失败，则一名盟友可以以反应对同一目标进行一次打击。

With quick commands, you get your allies to ready their equipment. You and all allies within 30 feet can Interact to draw, Switch Hands, or swap weapons as a free action.

Lead by Example If you used two actions, you can Strike, Area Fire, or Auto-Fire with a weapon you drew or swapped to (including by changing active set of hands). If your Strike hits or if a target failed its save against your Area Fire or Auto-Fire, one ally can make a Strike against the same target as a reaction.

Incredible Initiative.name: 惊奇先攻 Incredible Initiative
Incredible Initiative.description: 你的反应比他人更迅速。你的先攻检定获得+2环境加值。

Absalom Lore.name: 阿布萨洛姆学识 Absalom Lore

Underworld Lore.name: 地下世界学识 Underworld Lore

Comm Unit.name: 通讯单元 Comm Unit
Comm Unit.description:
个人通讯器是一种口袋大小的设备，结合了小型便携式计算机和蜂窝通信设备的功能，能够在行星范围内以音频和文本两种格式与其他通讯器进行即时无线通信。个人通讯器还包括计算器、手电筒（以你为中心5英尺半径内发出明亮光照，在接下来的5英尺内发出微光）、可访问任何本地信息圈的浏览器，以及若干娱乐功能（包括游戏）。

集成在护甲中的个人通讯器具备一些语音激活功能；你可以在无需空闲手的情况下，以音频形式与其他通讯器通信并接收回复，但输入信息、浏览信息圈或使用应用程序则至少需要腾出一只手。

能够在更远距离运作的通讯器便携性较差；它们内置发电机以提供所需电力，并依赖活跃的漂流信标进行通信。在大多数主要定居点，都可以购买这些通讯器的短期使用服务。

A personal comm unit is a pocket-sized device that combines a minor portable computer and a cellular communications device, allowing instantaneous wireless communication with other comm units in both audio- and text-based formats at planetary range. A personal comm unit also includes a calculator, a flashlight (emits bright light in a 5-foot radius around you and dim light in the next 5 feet), a browser that accesses any local infospheres, and several entertainment options (including games).

Personal comm units integrated into armor have some voice-activated capabilities; you can communicate with other comm units in audio-based formats and receive responses without needing a free hand, but typing a message, browsing the infosphere, or using an app requires the use of at least one hand.

Comm units that function at longer ranges aren't as portable; they include built-in generators that provide the necessary amount of power and rely on active Drift beacons to communicate. Short-term use of these units can be purchased in most major settlements.

Knife.name: 刀 Knife
Knife.description:
升级： 1

刀具作为武器和工具都极其宝贵，其形状、样式和材质多种多样，从星铁到陶瓷，不一而足。

Upgrades: 1

Invaluable as both a weapon and a tool, knives come in a variety of shapes, styles, and materials ranging from starmetals to ceramics.

Medkit (Commercial).name: 医疗包（商用） Medkit (Commercial)
Medkit (Commercial).description:
其中包含进行医疗检定以@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.MHLuKy4nQO2Z4Am1]{实施急救}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.TC7OcDa7JlWbqMaN]{治疗疾病}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.KjoCEEmPGTeFE4hh]{治疗中毒}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤口}所需的止痛药、绷带、无菌纱布和缝合工具。

These contain analgesics, bandages, sterile gauze, and suturing tools necessary for Medicine checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.MHLuKy4nQO2Z4Am1]{Administer First Aid}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.TC7OcDa7JlWbqMaN]{Treat Disease}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.KjoCEEmPGTeFE4hh]{Treat Poison}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds}.

Second Skin.name: 着甲如肤 Second Skin
Second Skin.description:
升级： 0

这种柔软却坚韧的织物能完美贴合穿戴者的身体，在不牺牲舒适性的前提下提供基础防护。第二层皮肤通常穿在便服里面。

Upgrades: 0

Soft but resilient fabric contours perfectly to the wearer's body, offering basic protection without sacrificing comfort. Second skin is commonly worn underneath casual clothing.

Semi-Auto Pistol.name: 半自动手枪 Semi-Auto Pistol
Semi-Auto Pistol.description:
升级： 1

这把手枪会在每次射击后自动退壳并装填新的弹药。

Upgrades: 1

This pistol automatically ejects used cartridges and loads new ammunition after every shot fired.

Hacking Toolkit (Commercial).name: 黑客工具包（商用） Hacking Toolkit (Commercial)
Hacking Toolkit (Commercial).description:
进行“入侵”计算机的计算机检定时，需要使用一套黑客工具包。你可以使用黑客工具包在不借助用户界面的情况下访问计算机，但这需要与该计算机进行物理接触，或通过信息圈或类似的连接网络进行接触。

A hacking toolkit is required for Computers checks to Hack computers. You can use a hacking toolkit to access a computer without using a user interface, but this requires physical contact with the computer or contact via an infosphere or a similar linked network.

Infiltrator's Toolkit (Commercial).name: 渗透者工具包（商用） Infiltrator's Toolkit (Commercial)
Infiltrator's Toolkit (Commercial).description:
你需要一套渗透者工具包，才能使用偷窃技能来@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{撬锁}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{解除装置}（某些类型）。

You need an infiltrator's toolkit to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick Locks} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Disable Devices} (of some types) using the Thievery skill.

Projectile Ammo.name: 投射武器弹药 Projectile Ammo

Natural Ambition.name: 天生野望 Natural Ambition
Natural Ambition.description: 你从小就壮志勃勃，并且为了出人头地一直在努力奋斗，这让你在你所选择的职业领域上的进步卓越。你获得你自身职业的一个1级职业专长。你必须满足该专长的先决条件，你仅能在创建角色阶段延后选取该专长，以满足所选职业专长的先决条件。

Watch Out.name: 当心 Watch Out
Watch Out.description:
触发条件 一个生物以一次攻击将60英尺内的一名盟友作为目标，且你能看见攻击者和你的盟友。

你向盟友发出警告信号，使其在对抗此次触发攻击时的AC获得+2环境加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.8eqdNadBEcXMvjng]{效果：小心}

Trigger A creature targets an ally within 60 feet with an attack, and you can see both the attacker and your ally.

You signal a warning to your ally, granting them a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.8eqdNadBEcXMvjng]{Effect: Watch Out}

Size Up.name: 估量一下 Size Up
Size Up.description:
频率 每小时一次

你花费1分钟观察某个特定个体、10分钟在信息圈上研究某个特定个体，或1小时建立人脉并收集信息。该对象就是你的目标人物。若你通过观察来评估目标人物，则无需知道其身份；但若你通过研究或人脉打探来评估目标人物，则必须知道其身份，而这至少需要关于他们的两条相关信息。相关信息的例子包括其姓名、出身地、当前住处、其父母或重要伴侣的姓名、其雇主，或其所属组织。GM会根据你所选择的目标人物，裁定就此用途而言哪些信息构成相关信息。

你在针对你的目标人物或与其相关的欺瞒、交涉、威吓和察觉检定上获得+1环境加值，并且在尝试对你的目标人物进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}时获得+1环境加值。

当你对目标人物使用单动作的@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cmCtfURzpbzkxWsy]{盯上他！}时，你获得双动作@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cmCtfURzpbzkxWsy]{盯上他！}的收益。

你可以维持数量等同于你魅力调整值的目标人物。若在那之后你对其他目标人物使用“评头论足”，你的新目标人物会替换掉之前的一个。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.RBWwGxsrxPBKi3X7]{效果：评头论足}

Frequency once per hour

You spend 1 minute observing a specific individual, 10 minutes researching a specific individual on the infosphere, or 1 hour networking and gathering information. This subject is your asset. If you assess your asset via observation, you don't need to know their identity, but if you assess your asset via research or networking, you must know their identity, which requires at least two relevant pieces of information about them. Examples of relevant information could include their name, their place of origin, their current residence, the name of their parent or significant other, their employer, or their organizational affiliation. The GM determines what constitutes relevant information for this purpose, based on the asset you've selected.

You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Deception, Diplomacy, Intimidation, and Perception checks against or in relation to your asset, and a +1 circumstance bonus to attempts to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about your asset.

You gain the benefits of the 2-action @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cmCtfURzpbzkxWsy]{Get 'Em!} when using 1-action Get 'Em! on an asset.

You can maintain a number of assets equal to your Charisma modifier. If you Size Up other assets after that, your new asset replaces a previous one.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.RBWwGxsrxPBKi3X7]{Effect: Size Up}

Adaptive Talent.name: 适应性天赋 Adaptive Talent
Adaptive Talent.description:
你思维敏捷且适应力强，几乎无需练习或训练就能掌握新的技能与才能。在你进行每日准备时，选择一个你满足先决条件的技能专长。你获得该技能专长，直到你再次进行准备为止。由于你只是暂时拥有此专长，因此不能将其作为永久角色选项的先决条件。你可以将此能力用于那些暂时让你获得其他能力的效果，例如选择 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.P9HCz0uR6xPHuw72]{Multilingual} 来暂时学会一种新语言。

随着你的特使等级提升，你适应新情况的能力也会增强。在9级和15级时，你以这种方式获得的技能专长数量各增加1。你可以将通过适应才能暂时获得的专长，作为通过适应才能暂时获得的其他专长的先决条件，但你仍然不能将它们作为永久角色选项的先决条件。

You're quick thinking and adaptable, capable of picking up new skills and talents with little practice or training. During your daily preparations, select one skill feat that you meet the prerequisites for. You gain this skill feat until you prepare again. Since you have this feat temporarily, you can't use it as a prerequisite for a permanent character option. You can use this for effects that temporarily give you access to other abilities, such as taking @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.P9HCz0uR6xPHuw72]{Multilingual} to temporarily learn a new language.

As your envoy level increases, so does your ability to adapt to new situations. At 9th level and 15th level, increase the number of skill feats you gain this way by 1. You can use feats that you temporarily gain through adaptive talent as a prerequisite for other feats that you temporarily gain through adaptive talent, but you still can't use them as prerequisites for permanent character options.

Wise to the Game.name: 精通游戏之道 Wise to the Game
Wise to the Game.description:
运用言语影响他人正是你的强项，而当别人试图对你使用同样的手段时，你也很容易察觉。你对针对你进行的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.QNAVeNKtHA0EUw4X]{佯攻} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ewwCglB7XOPLUz72]{说谎} 的尝试，以及用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{声东击西} 来转移你注意力的尝试，其察觉DC获得+1状态加值；你对情绪效果的意志DC也获得+1状态加值。

Using your words to influence others is what you do, and you easily recognize when others attempt to use the same tactics against you. You gain a +1 status bonus to your Perception DC against attempts to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.QNAVeNKtHA0EUw4X]{Feint} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ewwCglB7XOPLUz72]{Lie} to you and attempts to divert your attention with @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{Create a Diversion}, and a +1 status bonus to your Will DC against emotion effects.

Laser Pistol.name: 激光手枪 Laser Pistol
Laser Pistol.description:
升级： 1

这把袖珍手枪凭借其可靠性、耐用性和价格低廉，成为协约世界最受欢迎的随身武器。大多数常见的激光手枪都有轻质聚碳机身，末端是细长的枪管。

Upgrades: 1

This compact pistol is the most popular sidearm in the Pact Worlds thanks to its reliability, durability, and affordability. Most common laser pistols have a lightweight polycarbon body ending in a long, slim barrel.

Get in There!.name: 冲进去！ Get in There!
Get in There!.description:
你敦促盟友们赶紧投入战斗，或是赶紧让开。直到你下个回合开始时，你以及100尺内所有能够感知到你的盟友，获得+5尺的速度状态加值。随着你的特使等级提高，在7级、12级和17级时，这个加值额外再增加5尺。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.dAcHJiPDtqxxrR4Z]{效果：快进去！}

以身作则 如果你使用了两个动作，则进行Step或Stride。你100尺内每个能够感知到你的盟友都可以立刻以反应进行Step或Stride，移动距离至多为其一半速度（向下取整到最接近的5尺）。

You urge your allies to hustle into the fight or to get out of the way. Until the beginning of your next turn, you and your allies within 100 feet who can sense you gain a +5-foot status bonus to Speed. As your envoy level increases, increase the bonus by an additional 5 feet at 7th level, 12th level, and 17th level.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.dAcHJiPDtqxxrR4Z]{Effect: Get in There!}

Lead by Example If you used two actions, Step or Stride. Each of your allies within 100 feet who can sense you can immediately Step or Stride up to half their Speed (rounded down to the nearest 5 feet) as a reaction.

Battle Medicine.name: 战场医疗 Battle Medicine
Battle Medicine.description:
需求 你正持有或穿戴一个医疗包。

你可以包扎伤口，即使在战斗中也是如此。进行一次医药检定，DC 与 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤势} 相同，并恢复相应数量的 HP；这不会移除濒死值状态。与治疗伤势一样，如果你拥有最低熟练等级，你可以尝试对抗更高的 DC。随后，目标会在 1 天内对你的战地医疗 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.2XEYQNZTCGpdkyR6]{免疫}。这不会使其对治疗伤势免疫，也不会以其他方式被视为治疗伤势。

Requirements You're holding or wearing a medkit.

You can patch up wounds, even in combat. Attempt a Medicine check with the same DC as for @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} and restore the corresponding amount of HP; this doesn't remove the wounded condition. As with Treat Wounds, you can attempt checks against higher DCs if you have the minimum proficiency rank. The target is then @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.2XEYQNZTCGpdkyR6]{immune} to your Battle Medicine for 1 day. This does not make them immune to, or otherwise count as, Treat Wounds.

Fleet.name: 舰队 Fleet
Fleet.description: 你的脚步变得更快。你的速度提高5尺。

Lie to Me.name: 将计就计 Lie to Me
Lie to Me.description: 你可以用欺骗技能设下圈套，让试图欺骗你的人露出破绽。若你能和某个尝试对你@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ewwCglB7XOPLUz72]{说谎 Lie}的人交流，在判断对方是否说谎成功时，使用你的欺骗DC和察觉DC中较高者。若你没有与对方互动对话，比如某人在长篇演讲期间尝试说谎，本专长便无法生效。

Improvised Mastery.name: 即兴精通 Improvised Mastery
Improvised Mastery.description:
频率 每天一次

触发条件 你将要使用一项你尚未达到大师熟练度的技能进行一次技能检定，且你还没有掷骰。

你相信自己的直觉会助你渡过难关。你在此次技能检定中，以触发该效果的技能获得大师熟练度。

Frequency once per day

Trigger You're about to attempt a skill check using a skill that you don't have master proficiency in, and you haven't rolled yet.

You trust your instincts to see you through. You gain master proficiency with the triggering skill for the skill check.

Perception Expertise.name: 察觉专家 Perception Expertise
Perception Expertise.description:
特使 你对细节有敏锐的洞察力，并且总能对周围的威胁保持警觉。你的察觉熟练等级提升为专家。

秘学者, 士兵 你始终对周围的威胁保持警觉。你的察觉熟练等级提升为专家。

巫战扭曲者 你始终对威胁保持警觉。你的察觉熟练等级提升为专家。

Envoy You have a keen eye for details and always manage to remain alert to threats around you. Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to expert.

Mystic, Soldier You remain alert to threats around you. Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to expert.

Witchwarper You remain alert to threats. Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to expert.

Weapon Expertise.name: 武器专家 Weapon Expertise
Weapon Expertise.description:
特使 你已经学会了几招运用武器的技巧。你对简易武器、军用武器和徒手攻击的熟练等级提升为专家。每当你攻击你的 Get 'Em! 的目标时，你都可以获得你所有专家熟练武器的重击专精效果。

秘学者 你用基础武器赢得战斗。你对简易武器和徒手攻击的熟练等级提升为专家。

巫战扭曲者 你对常规武器有了更广泛的理解，以强化你非常规的施法。你对简易武器和徒手攻击的熟练等级提升为专家。

Envoy You've learned a few tricks with your weapons. Your proficiency ranks for simple weapons, martial weapons, and unarmed attacks increase to expert. Whenever you attack the target of your Get 'Em!, you gain access to the critical specialization effects of all weapons for which you have expert proficiency.

Mystic You win battles with basic weapons. Your proficiency rank for simple weapons and unarmed attacks increases to expert.

Witchwarper You've gained a broader understanding of conventional weaponry to augment your unconventional spellcasting. Your proficiency rank for simple weapons and unarmed attacks increases to expert.

Medpatch (Tactical).name: 医疗贴片（战术型） Medpatch (Tactical)
Medpatch (Tactical).description:
激活 1 (manipulate)

医疗贴片会加速身体的自然愈合。你恢复 @Damage[(3d6+6)[healing]] 生命值，并在10分钟内对抗疾病和毒素的豁免检定获得+1物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{效果：医疗贴片}

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Medpatches accelerate the body's natural healing. You regain @Damage[(3d6+6)[healing]] Hit Points and gain a +1 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{Effect: Medpatch}

Credstick.name: 信用芯片 Credstick
Credstick.description:
《星际探险家》中的大多数人都会将自己的财富存放在一种称为信用棒的受保护物品上。这些装置通常较为扁平，大小大致相当于一根人类手指。它们在尺寸和品质上各不相同，但说到底，它们只是用于方便携带和花钱的一种手段。这些装置的使用方式由所有者决定，而信用棒只需在合适的银行设备附近轻轻一触，就能完成资金的存入或支付这样简单的操作。在需要更严格安保时，它们还可以要求语音或生物识别印记来激活。有些先进信用棒甚至带有魔法组件，可能需要精神密码或念出特定法术，才能取用存储的资金。

信用棒并不是通往个人全部财富的入口，数额更大的信用点通常会安全地存放在银行、私人金库或安全数据库中。相反，信用棒是一种安全且匿名的方式，可以在不被追踪的情况下转移信用点。无论是冒险者还是普通市民，通常都会随身携带一根信用棒，以便处理他们可能需要进行的各种购买；与此同时，他们身上也只会保留刚好足够的信用点，这样即便丢失了信用棒，也不至于破产。

协约世界中的人们经常携带信用棒，而其他与协约有往来的文明也常会将本地资金兑换为信用点，因此也会携带信用棒来花用这些转换后的货币。有时，一个人可能会携带几根信用棒，将每一根专门用于不同用途；或者，如果他们想进行一笔预设金额的购买，也可以直接把整根棒交出去作为交易。如果一个人身上的信用棒数量多到过于累赘，那么在单根信用棒之间转移资金、再丢弃已经清空的信用棒以节省空间也很容易，不过信用棒始终具有可忽略的体积。

Most people in Starfinder keep their wealth on a protected item known as a credstick. These devices are often flat and roughly the size of a human finger. They range in dimensions and quality, but at the end of the day, they're just a means of conveniently carrying and spending money. Usage of these devices is determined by the owner, and a credstick can accept or spend funds with as simple an action as tapping it near a suitable banking device. When more rigorous security is necessary, they can require audio or biometric imprints in order to activate. Some advanced credsticks even have a magical component that might require a mental password or the recitation of a specific spell to access stored funds.

Credsticks aren't gateways to the entirety of one's wealth, and larger stores of credits are often kept secured in banks, personal vaults, or secure databases. Instead, a credstick is a safe and anonymous means of moving credits around without being traced. Adventurers and common citizens alike often keep a credstick on their person to handle any purchases they might be called upon to make, while also only keeping just enough credits on them that losing the credstick wouldn't result in bankruptcy.

Individuals in the Pact Worlds often carry credsticks, and other civilizations that interact with the Pact often turn local funds into credits and thus carry them to spend their converted currency. Sometimes a person might carry several credsticks, dedicating each one to a different use, or simply trading the stick away if they want to make a purchase of a predefined amount. If ever the number of credsticks on a person becomes too cumbersome, it's easy enough to move the funds between individual sticks and discard emptied sticks to save on space, however a credstick always has a negligible bulk.

Leader's Confidence.name: 领袖的自信 Leader's Confidence
Leader's Confidence.description:
无论你是冷静沉着，还是咬紧牙关强装自信，你都不会让队友看到你失去冷静。你获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.gZr207z8Q7AuH2RT]{振作起来！}特使训令。

Whether you're calm and collected or projecting confidence through gritted teeth, you don't let your team see you lose your cool. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.gZr207z8Q7AuH2RT]{Steel Yourselves!} envoy directive.

Steel Yourselves!.name: 钢铁你们自己！ Steel Yourselves!
Steel Yourselves!.description:
频率 每小时一次

你鼓舞盟友们做好承受冲击的准备，或以其他方式为即将到来的伤害做好防备。60英尺内能够感知到你的盟友，可以在其回合中花费1个动作来“准备承受冲击”。这个动作具有专注特征。进行“准备承受冲击”的生物获得等同于你的魅力调整值 + 你一半等级的临时生命值，持续1分钟。

以身作则 如果你花费两个动作，则你也会“准备承受冲击”。你以及任何在你下个回合开始前进行“准备承受冲击”的盟友，还会获得对抗造成伤害的效果的豁免检定+1状态加值，持续1分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.RhmWzzEbiykniDHQ]{效果：振作起来！}

Frequency once per hour

You encourage your allies to brace for impact or otherwise prepare for incoming damage. Allies within 60 feet who can sense you can spend 1 action on their turn to Brace For Impact. This action has the concentrate trait. Creatures that Brace for Impact gain temporary Hit Points equal to your Charisma modifier + your half your level for 1 minute.

Lead by Example If you spends two actions, you Brace For Impact. You and any ally who Braces for Impact before the start of your next turn also gain a +1 status bonus to saving throws against effects that deal damage for 1 minute.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.RhmWzzEbiykniDHQ]{Effect: Steel Yourselves!}

Weapon Specialization.name: 武器专精 Weapon Specialization
Weapon Specialization.description:
特使、特工、巫战扭曲者你已学会如何用自己最擅长的武器造成更严重的伤势。对于你达到专家熟练的武器与徒手攻击，你造成额外2点伤害。若你为大师，则该伤害提高至3点；若你为传奇，则提高至4点。

秘学者你已学会用自己的武器保护自己与盟友。对于你达到专家熟练的武器与徒手攻击，你造成额外2点伤害。若你为大师，则该伤害提高至3点；若你为传奇，则提高至4点。

星辉武者你已学会如何用自己练习最多的武器造成更严重的伤势。对于你达到专家熟练的武器与徒手攻击，你造成额外2点伤害。若你为大师，则该伤害提高至3点；若你为传奇，则提高至4点。

士兵你用自己最擅长的武器造成更严重的伤势。对于你达到专家熟练的武器与徒手攻击，你造成额外2点伤害。若你为大师，则该伤害提高至3点；若你为传奇，则提高至4点。

Envoy, Operative, Witchwarper You've learned how to inflict greater injuries with the weapons you know best. You deal 2 additional damage with weapons and unarmed attacks in which you're an expert. This damage increases to 3 damage if you're a master, and 4 damage if you're legendary.

Mystic You've learned to protect yourself and your allies with your weapons. You deal 2 additional damage with weapons and unarmed attacks in which you're an expert. This damage increases to 3 if you're a master and 4 if you're legendary.

Solarian You've learned how to inflict greater injuries with the weapons you've practiced with most. You deal 2 additional damage with weapons and unarmed attacks in which you're an expert. This damage increases to 3 if you're a master, and 4 if you're legendary.

Soldier You inflict greater injuries with the weapons you know best. You deal 2 additional damage with weapons and unarmed attacks in which you're an expert. This damage increases to 3 if you're a master, and 4 if you're legendary.

Fortitude Expertise.name: 强韧专家 Fortitude Expertise
Fortitude Expertise.description:
特使 你的体格异常强健。你在强韧豁免上的熟练等级提升为专家。

秘学者 你的体格因冒险而变得更加强健。你在强韧豁免上的熟练等级提升为专家。

Envoy Your physique is incredibly hardy. Your proficiency rank for Fortitude saves increases to expert.

Mystic Your physique has grown hardier from your adventures. Your proficiency rank for Fortitude saves increases to expert.

Holoskin (Commercial).name: 全息皮肤（商用） Holoskin (Commercial)
Holoskin (Commercial).description:
安装在腰带或肢体束带上的全息投影器可以作为一个交互动作启动。它可以被设定为投射出另一名与你体型类别相同的生物的外观，从而隐藏你的真实外貌。全息皮肤不会改变你的声音、气味或举止。手持和穿戴物品的外观不受影响。你通常需要一件全息皮肤来布置伪装，以便使用欺瞒技能来@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{冒充}某人。

A holographic projector mounted to a belt or limb strap can be activated as an Interact action. It can be programmed to project the appearance of another creature of the same size category as yourself, hiding your true appearance. A holoskin doesn't change your voice, scent, or mannerisms. The appearance of held and worn items aren't affected. You usually need a holoskin to set up a disguise in order to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} someone using the Deception skill.

Invisibility Spell Amp.name: 隐形法术增幅 Invisibility Spell Amp
Invisibility Spell Amp.description:
在大多数世界中被称为“法术安瓿”，法术安瓿是可立即使用的魔法注射剂，能赋予特定环阶法术的益处。

激活—注射 1 (manipulate)

效果 2环 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{隐形术} 法术

Known on most worlds as "spell amps," spell ampoules are ready-to-use magic injections that confer the benefits of a spell of the specified rank.

Activate—Inject 1 (manipulate)

Effect 2nd-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility} spell

Null Space Chamber (Commercial).name: 零空间舱（商用） Null Space Chamber (Commercial)
Null Space Chamber (Commercial).description:
这个光滑的黑色装置可附着在背包、手提包或钥匙环上。当你按下装置侧面的按钮时，它会创造出一个通往异次元袋空间的圆形传送门。该空间的容量取决于装置的类型。

你可以对虚空空间舱执行交互，将物品存放其中或从中取出。虚空空间舱只能从外部开启和关闭。当虚空空间舱在有空气的大气环境中开启时，其剩余容量中的每 1 Bulk 都会填充可供呼吸 10 分钟的空气。放在虚空空间舱内的物品不会提供任何好处，除非先将其取出。将虚空空间舱连接到计算机时，会显示其中存放的所有物品的读数。

容量 25 Bulk

This sleek black device attaches to a backpack, purse, or key ring. When you press a button on the side of the device, it creates a circular portal to an extradimensional pocket space. The space's capacity depends on the device's type.

You can Interact with the null space chamber to stow items in it or remove them. The null space chamber can be opened and closed only from the outside. When a null space chamber is opened in an atmosphere with air, it fills with 10 minutes' worth of air for every Bulk left in its capacity. An item inside the null space chamber provides no benefits unless it's retrieved first. Connecting the null space chamber to a computer causes it to display a readout of all items stored within it.

Capacity 25 Bulk

Confident Actualization.name: 自信实现 Confident Actualization
Confident Actualization.description:
频率 每天一次

触发器 你即将进行一次豁免检定或技能检定。

你对自身能力的绝对自信帮助你逼迫自己达成想要的目标。将触发的检定或豁免掷两次，并采用较好的结果。

Frequency once per day

Trigger You're about to attempt a saving throw or skill check.

Your utter confidence in your own abilities helps you push yourself to reach your desired goals. Roll the triggering check or save twice and use the better result.

Diverse Schemes.name: 多元计划 Diverse Schemes
Diverse Schemes.description:
你是一名高效的多任务处理者，而且你心中总是同时怀有不止一个目标，或有不止一个计划在进行。你能够维持数量为你魅力调整值两倍的资产。

You're an efficient multitasker, and you always have more than one goal in mind or scheme on the go. You can maintain twice your Charisma modifier of assets.

Hang in There.name: 坚持住 Hang in There
Hang in There.description:
你鼓励自己或一名盟友，为即将到来的挑战给他们打气，并给予其临时生命值。选择你自己或 30 尺内的一名盟友，然后进行一次 @Check[diplomacy|dc:20|showDC:all] 检定。如果你的外交熟练等级达到大师，你可以改为进行一次 @Check[diplomacy|dc:30|showDC:all] 检定，使成功检定时获得的临时生命值增加 5。如果你的熟练等级达到传奇，你可以改为进行一次 @Check[diplomacy|dc:40|showDC:all] 检定，使成功检定时获得的临时生命值增加 10。这些临时生命值持续 1 分钟。随后，目标在 1 天内暂时免疫你的 Hang in There。

大成功 目标获得等于其等级两倍加上你的魅力调整值的临时生命值。

成功 目标获得等于其等级加上你的魅力调整值的临时生命值。

失败 目标不受影响，且你在 1 分钟内不能再次使用 Hang in There。

大失败 目标不受影响，且你在 1 小时内不能再次使用 Hang in There。

You encourage yourself or an ally, psyching them up for a coming challenge and granting them temporary Hit Points. Choose yourself or an ally within 30 feet, then attempt a @Check[diplomacy|dc:20|showDC:all] check. If you have master proficiency in Diplomacy, you can instead attempt a @Check[diplomacy|dc:30|showDC:all] check to increase the temporary Hit Points gained on a successful check by 5. If you have legendary proficiency, you can instead attempt a @Check[diplomacy|dc:40|showDC:all] check to increase the temporary Hit Points gained on a successful check by 10. These temporary Hit Points last for 1 minute. The target is then temporarily immune to your Hang in There for 1 day.

Critical Success The target gains temporary Hit Points equal to double their level plus your Charisma modifier.

Success The target gains temporary Hit Points equal to their level plus your Charisma modifier.

Failure The target is unaffected, and you can't use Hang in There again for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The target is unaffected, and you can't use Hang in There again for 1 hour.

Kiss it Better.name: 治愈之吻 Kiss it Better
Kiss it Better.description:
需求 你空出一只手，且邻接一名生命值未满的盟友。

你做出象征性的医疗努力，让一名盟友相信他们已从伤势中恢复。尝试进行一次欺瞒检定，DC 与 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤势} 相同。若成功，目标获得等同于治疗伤势所对应生命值数量一半的临时生命值。该临时生命值持续 1 轮。Kiss It Better 不会移除濒死条件。目标会在 24 小时内暂时免疫 Kiss It Better。

Requirements You have a hand free and are adjacent to an ally who isn't at full Hit Points.

You perform a token medical effort to convince an ally they've recovered from an injury. Attempt a Deception check with the same DC as for @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds}. On a success, the target gains temporary Hit Points equal to half the corresponding amount of Hit Points from Treat Wounds. These temporary Hit Points last 1 round. Kiss It Better doesn't remove the wounded condition. The target is temporarily immune to Kiss It Better for 24 hours.

Take the Wheel.name: 掌控方向 Take the Wheel
Take the Wheel.description:
你登上并接管一辆相邻的载具。

You Board and Take Control of an adjacent vehicle.

Power Slide.name: 强行转向 Power Slide
Power Slide.description:
你让载具进入一种勉强可控的侧滑状态，猛然转向以躲避追击。你进行驾驶时，驾驶检定承受 –2 减值，并获得与你用于动力侧滑所花费的动作数相同的驾驶动作效果。在移动结束时，若你成功，你可以将载具转向至多 90 度。若你的驾驶检定大成功，则你改为可以将载具转向至多 180 度。

You throw the vehicle into a barely controlled skid, turning sharply to evade pursuit. You Drive with a –2 penalty to your Piloting check, gaining the effects of the Drive action for the same number of actions you spent to Power Slide. At the end of the movement, if you succeed, you can turn the vehicle up to 90 degrees. If you critically succeed at your Piloting check, you can instead turn the vehicle up to 180 degrees.

Human.name: 人类 Human
Human.description:
人类以其在最具挑战性的处境中适应并蓬勃发展的能力而闻名，这甚至包括他们母星戈拉里昂的神秘消失。人类雄心勃勃、富有创造力且有着无尽的好奇心，在银河中始终保持着强大的存在感，常常担任领导职位或站在探索的最前沿。几乎在任何地方都能发现人类的身影，他们几乎无事不做。

Humans are known for their ability to adapt and thrive in the most challenging situations, including the mysterious loss of their home world, Golarion. Ambitious, creative, and endlessly curious, humans maintain a robust presence in the galaxy, often taking on positions of leadership or acting at the forefront of exploration. Humans can be found almost anywhere, doing almost anything.

Versatile Human.name: 多才人类 Versatile Human
Versatile Human.description:
在人类的故乡戈拉里昂消失之前，人类曾是那里最常见的族裔，而后他们凭借自身的多才多艺扩散到了群星之间。选择一个你满足先决条件的通用专长（和你的族裔专长一样，你可以在角色创建过程中的任何阶段选择这个通用专长）。

Humans were the most common ancestry on Golarion before that world disappeared, and they've since spread to the stars thanks to their versatility. Select a general feat of your choice for which you meet the prerequisites (as with your ancestry feat, you can select this general feat at any point during character creation).

Feather Step.name: 轻羽步 Feather Step
Feather Step.description: 你的步伐谨慎而迅捷。你可以用快步进入困难地形。

Grifter.name: 骗子 Grifter
Grifter.description:
你是个骗子和诡计大师，诈骗毫无防备的傻瓜，并勒索容易上当的蠢货，但这没什么私人恩怨——你只是为了信用点。你可能会私下经营一门勾当，或者你也可能在职业生涯中辗转于一个又一个定居点，直到当场被抓。

选择两项属性增强。其中一项必须加在智力或魅力上，另一项为自由属性增强。

你在欺瞒技能，以及一项与你冒充专长的职业或主题相关的知识技能上受训。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.B6HbYsLBWb1RR6Fx]{花言巧语的骗子} 技能专长。

You're a con artist and trickster who swindles unsuspecting dupes and blackmails rubes, but it's nothing personal—you're just in it for the credits. You might run an operation on the side, or you might spend your career moving from settlement to settlement until you get caught in the act.

Choose two attribute boosts. One must be to Intelligence or Charisma, and one is a free attribute boost.

You're trained in the Deception skill and a Lore skill related to a profession or subject you fake expertise in. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.B6HbYsLBWb1RR6Fx]{Charming Liar} skill feat.

Charming Liar.name: 蛊惑人心 Charming Liar
Charming Liar.description: 凭借魅力，你能够将欺骗对象笼络为你的支持者。当你用@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ewwCglB7XOPLUz72]{说谎 Lie}行动取得大成功时，目标对你的态度改善一级，如同你用交涉技能@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{建立印象 Make an Impression}成功。每次交流，这个效果只会生效一次，如果你用相同结果对多个目标取得大成功，则选择一个生物的态度得到改善。你的谎言必须要透露看似重要的信息、鼓吹自己的地位、或巴结奉承对方，无关紧要的谎言无法起到作用。

Witchwarper.name: 巫战扭曲者 Witchwarper
Witchwarper.description:
一场奇异的悖论事件永久改变了你的存在，如今你能够操纵现实。你探索多元宇宙的无限可能，也许会将不同的时间线或平行世界具象化。你创造出颠覆空间与时间的场域，使你能够施展强大的魔法。你已经学会专注于某段锚定的记忆、概念或物体，以帮助你辨识现实。

A strange paradoxical event forever altered your existence, and now you can manipulate reality. You explore the infinite possibilities of the multiverse, possibly visualizing variant timelines or parallel worlds. You create fields that subvert space and time, allowing you to cast powerful magic. You've learned to focus on an anchoring memory, concept, or object to help you identify reality.

Paradox.name: 悖论 Paradox
Paradox.description:
你的存在违背了物质宇宙的现状，因而引发量子涟漪，赋予你施法天赋，并打开通往其他世界的门户。也许你来自某个平行现实或不同的时间线；也许你曾经历过一种改变了你人生轨迹的非自然现象，发现了一台发生时间故障的外星装置，或撰写过一篇关于量子魔法理论的论文。无论你的故事为何，你都已成为一个活生生的悖论。

在1级时，选择你的悖论。你所选择的悖论决定你的法术传统、额外受训的技能、你额外学会的法术，以及你的量子场的效果。你还会获得专注点数，以及基于你的悖论而获得的特殊专注法术，称为扭曲法术。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.42tQJXhySw9QKcn6]{分析者}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.hFIB6wlYGK93zl4g]{异象}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.1E12XmyqzIK1jXrY]{受裂隙影响者}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.cxBVbSITniNRwfMi]{预知者}

Your existence is contrary to the status quo of the universe, causing quantum ripples that empower your spellcasting talent and open doorways to other worlds. Perhaps you're from an alternate reality or a different timeline, or perhaps you experienced an unnatural phenomenon that altered your path, discovered a time-glitching alien device, or wrote a treatise on quantum magical theory. Whatever your story, you've become a living paradox.

At 1st level, choose your paradox. Your chosen paradox determines the tradition of your spells, additional trained skills, additional spells you learn, and the effects of your quantum field. You also gain Focus Points and special focus spells called warp spells based on your paradox.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.42tQJXhySw9QKcn6]{Analyst}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.hFIB6wlYGK93zl4g]{Anomaly}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.1E12XmyqzIK1jXrY]{Gap Influenced}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.cxBVbSITniNRwfMi]{Precog}

Quantum Field.name: 量子场 Quantum Field
Quantum Field.description:
你可以借用悖论性的力量来创造一个扭曲现实的量子场。它可能表现为空气中的一片薄雾，显现出其他现实的微光掠影；也可能呈现为由发光的魔法方程式构成的墙壁，或你所选择的任何其他景象。你的量子场的效果由你的悖论决定。你还可以通过你选择的巫战扭曲者专长，以及施放扭曲法术，进一步强化并操控你的量子场。你可以通过使用扭曲现实的魔法来激活你的量子场，或延长其持续时间。

你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ZoMpqQgDdlT13Jp0]{Warp Reality} 动作，它使你能够激活你的量子场。此动作会根据你所选悖论的传统获得奥术或异能特征。你还拥有 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.30Nw5q4vWKCQIBIZ]{Quantum Pulse}，它使你能够在战斗开始时迅速建立你的量子场。

You can draw on paradoxical forces to create a reality-warping quantum field. It might manifest as a haze in the air that shows shimmers of alternate realities, appear as walls of glowing magical equations, or any other display you choose. The effects of your quantum field are determined by your paradox. You can further enhance and manipulate your quantum field through your witchwarper feat selections and by casting warp spells. You can activate or extend the duration of your quantum field by using reality-warping magic.

You have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ZoMpqQgDdlT13Jp0]{Warp Reality} action, which lets you activate your quantum field. This action gains the arcane or occult trait based on the tradition of your selected paradox. You also have @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.30Nw5q4vWKCQIBIZ]{Quantum Pulse}, which lets you establish your quantum field quickly at the start of combat.

Anchor.name: 深扎 Anchor
Anchor.description:
无论是哪一种悖论改变了你存在的轨迹，总有某种事物帮助你将自己锚定于现实之中。它可能是你随身携带的一件实体物品、关于家园的记忆，或是你所爱之人。在1级时，选择一种锚点。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.ENxkQJEIkz35yuMT]{核心记忆}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.idjill6Zh7b3SLqE]{焦点}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.Z1sThY5XgXiXQBIy]{有形物体}

Whatever paradox altered the course of your existence, something helps keep you anchored to reality. This might be a physical object you carry, memories of your home, or loved ones. At 1st level, select an anchor.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.ENxkQJEIkz35yuMT]{Core Memories}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.idjill6Zh7b3SLqE]{Focal Point}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.Z1sThY5XgXiXQBIy]{Tangible Object}

Anomaly.name: 异常 Anomaly
Anomaly.description:
你的存在是一种异常，违背了你当前现实的正常参数。你可能遭遇了某种扰乱你核心存在之物，或者你跨越帷幕，来自某个平行现实或扭曲的时间线。

传统 奥术

悖论技能 欺瞒

悖论法术 戏法：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.jgN33YSYXB8iIHTw]{Stumble}；1环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.7P4eBdqWcgQJAFCa]{Shifting Surge}；2环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic}；3环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.qkehzRdn7JeGrR6E]{Void Whispers}；4环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.jyrxfWeeCsrkhNit]{Eldritch Wrath}；5环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.kOa055FIrO9Smnya]{Wall of Stone}；6环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.a02hsymtiVRQvh3i]{Slice Reality}；7环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.zdzeVZlKHkMAt2Rf]{Death Sentence}；8环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.sTpdXXaaKhoGOIxh]{Void Vessel}；9环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.J3zMwmhIVgI2yzxm]{Call Cosmos}

扭曲法术 初始：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.TN2pHF9l3k4ZJ7di]{Warp Terrain}；先进：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9w90nlUdV5HBRWFm]{Warp World}；高阶：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XoYUZP9OYdDMz4I0]{Parallel Forms}

量子场 动作变得模糊不清，你敌人的平行迭代体影像在其周围闪烁。当你量子场中的敌人尝试执行带有专注特征的动作时，除非其在一次 @Check[flat|dc:5|showDC:all] 中成功，否则该动作会被扰乱。生物第一次在此检定中失败时，会在24小时内获得对此效果的暂时免疫。

Your existence is an anomaly that defies the normal parameters of your current reality. You might have encountered something that disrupted your core existence, or you crossed the veil from an alternate reality or twisted timeline.

Tradition arcane

Paradox Skill Deception

Paradox Spells cantrip: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.jgN33YSYXB8iIHTw]{Stumble}; 1st: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.7P4eBdqWcgQJAFCa]{Shifting Surge}; 2nd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic}; 3rd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.qkehzRdn7JeGrR6E]{Void Whispers}; 4th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.jyrxfWeeCsrkhNit]{Eldritch Wrath}; 5th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.kOa055FIrO9Smnya]{Wall of Stone}; 6th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.a02hsymtiVRQvh3i]{Slice Reality}; 7th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.zdzeVZlKHkMAt2Rf]{Death Sentence}; 8th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.sTpdXXaaKhoGOIxh]{Void Vessel}; 9th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.J3zMwmhIVgI2yzxm]{Call Cosmos}

Warp Spells initial: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.TN2pHF9l3k4ZJ7di]{Warp Terrain}; advanced: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9w90nlUdV5HBRWFm]{Warp World}; greater: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XoYUZP9OYdDMz4I0]{Parallel Forms}

Quantum Field Movements blur as images of alternate iterations of your enemies flicker around them. When an enemy in your quantum field attempts an action with the concentrate trait, the action is disrupted unless they succeed at a @Check[flat|dc:5|showDC:all]. The first time a creature fails this check, it becomes temporarily immune for 24 hours.

Warp Reality.name: 扭曲现实 Warp Reality
Warp Reality.description:
需求 你的量子场未激活。

你的量子场被激活，并会持续存在，直到你持续维持它（最多10分钟）或直到你的下个回合结束。你的量子场是一个以你在100英尺内选择的一点为中心的 @Template[type:burst|distance:20]。当你的量子场处于激活状态时，你可以使用具有锚定特征的动作。你的量子场的其他具体效果由你的悖论决定。每当你扭曲现实时、每次你持续维持它时，以及当一个生物进入你的量子场时，由你选择区域内哪些生物会受到你的量子场影响。每次你以持续维持动作维持一个量子场时（而非锚定动作），你都可以将其移动到100英尺内的一个新位置。

如果你陷入昏迷、如果你将其解散，或者如果你移动到距它超过100英尺之外，你的量子场会自动解除激活。

Requirements Your quantum field isn't active.

Your quantum field activates and lasts as long as you Sustain it (up to 10 minutes) or until the end of your next turn. Your quantum field is a @Template[type:burst|distance:20] centered on a point you choose within 100 feet. While your quantum field is active, you can use actions that have the anchoring trait. Your quantum field's other specific effects are determined by your paradox. Choose whether any given creature in the area is affected by your quantum field when you Warp Reality, each time you Sustain it, and when a creature enters your quantum field. Each time you Sustain a quantum field with the Sustain action (instead of an anchoring action), you can move it to a new position within 100 feet.

Your quantum field automatically deactivates if you're knocked out, if you Dismiss it, or if you move more than 100 feet away from it.

Quantum Pulse.name: 量子脉冲 Quantum Pulse
Quantum Pulse.description:
触发条件 你掷先攻。

你总是准备好释放你悖论般的能力，而当身陷险境时，你会本能地释放出一阵量子能量脉冲。战斗开始时，你 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ZoMpqQgDdlT13Jp0]{扭曲现实}。

Trigger You roll initiative.

You're always ready to let loose with your paradoxical abilities, and when imperiled, you instinctively release a pulse of quantum energy. As combat begins, you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ZoMpqQgDdlT13Jp0]{Warp Reality}.

Tangible Object.name: 有形物体 Tangible Object
Tangible Object.description:
一个小物件，通常是你佩戴在身上或能用一只附肢拿住的东西，会给你带来安慰。它可能是一件有纪念价值的小饰品或衣物、一个可以拿来把玩的装置，或者也许只是有着你觉得令人愉悦的触感。

锚定增益 你所选物件的存在或重量帮助你扎根于这一现实。你在对抗幻觉和全息影像时的察觉检定与意志豁免都获得 +1 情境加值。

锚定效果 将你的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened} 状况减少 1。如果你没有恐慌，则你改为在对抗恐惧效果的意志豁免上获得 +1 情境加值，并且直到你下个回合开始前，你针对他人试图对你进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} 的意志 DC 获得 +2 情境加值。你每轮只能从此受益一次。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.nvB1852vEPVqjxhR]{效果：有形物件（锚定效果）}

A small object, usually something you wear or can hold with one appendage, gives you comfort. It might be a trinket or article of clothing with sentimental value, a gadget to fidget with, or perhaps it just has a texture you find pleasing.

Anchor Benefit The presence or weight of your chosen object helps ground you in this reality. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to both Perception checks and Will saves against illusions and holograms.

Anchoring Effect Reduce your @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened} condition by 1. If you aren't frightened, you instead gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Will saves against fear effects and a +2 circumstance bonus to your Will DC against attempts to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} you until the start of your next turn. You can only benefit from this once per round.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.nvB1852vEPVqjxhR]{Effect: Tangible Object (Anchoring Effect)}

Spell Repertoire.name: 法术库 Spell Repertoire
Spell Repertoire.description:
秘学者 你能够施放的法术集合称为你的法术 repertoire。1级时，你学习两个自选的1环法术和四个自选的戏法，此外还会从你所选的连接中额外获得一个法术和一个戏法。你从与你所选连接对应传统的普通法术中选择这些法术，或者从该传统中你有权限接触的其他法术中选择。你可以通过消耗一个适当法术环阶的法术位来施放你法术 repertoire 中的任意法术。

随着等级提升，你会将更多法术加入这个法术 repertoire。每当你获得一个法术位时，你就将一个相同环阶的法术加入你的法术 repertoire。当你获得新法术环阶的使用权限时，你获得的第一个新法术总是由你所选的连接授予的法术，但其他法术可以由你选择。2级时，你再选择一个1环法术；3级时，你从所选连接获得一个新法术以及另外两个2环法术，依此类推。当你加入法术时，你可以选择一个你已知法术的更高环阶版本，以便施放该法术的升阶版本。

虽然你获得它们的速度相同，但你的法术位与你法术 repertoire 中的法术是彼此独立的。如果一个专长或其他能力将一个法术加入你的法术 repertoire，它不会给予你额外的法术位，反之亦然。

替换你法术 repertoire 中的法术

当你的法术 repertoire 获得新法术时，你可能想替换掉一些先前学会的法术。每当你提升1个等级并学习新法术时，你都可以将一个旧法术替换为另一个相同环阶的法术。这个法术可以是戏法，但你不能替换顿悟法术或连接法术。你也可以在停工期中通过再训练来替换法术。

巫战扭曲者 你能够施放的法术集合称为你的法术 repertoire。1级时，你学习两个自选的1环法术和四个自选的戏法，此外还会从你的悖论中额外获得一个法术和一个戏法。你从与你的悖论对应传统的普通法术中选择这些法术。你可以通过消耗一个适当法术环阶的法术位来施放你法术 repertoire 中的任意法术。

随着等级提升，你会将更多法术加入这个法术 repertoire。每当你获得一个法术位时，你就将一个相同环阶的法术加入你的法术 repertoire。2级时，选择另一个1环法术；3级时，你从你的悖论中获得一个新法术以及另外两个2环法术，依此类推。当你加入法术时，你可以加入一个你已拥有法术的更高环阶版本，这样你就能施放该法术的升阶版本。

虽然你获得它们的速度相同，但你的法术位与你法术 repertoire 中的法术是彼此独立的。如果一个专长或其他能力将一个法术加入你的法术 repertoire，它不会给予你额外的法术位，反之亦然。

替换你法术 repertoire 中的法术

当你的法术 repertoire 获得新法术时，你可能想替换掉一些先前学会的法术。每当你提升1个等级并学习新法术时，你都可以将一个旧法术替换为另一个相同环阶的法术。这个法术可以是戏法，但你不能替换从你的悖论中获得的法术。你也可以在停工期中通过再训练来替换法术。

Mystic The collection of spells you can cast is called your spell repertoire. At 1st level, you learn two 1st-rank spells of your choice and four cantrips of your choice as well as an additional spell and cantrip from your chosen connection. You choose these from the common spells from the tradition corresponding to your chosen connection or from other spells from that tradition to which you have access. You can cast any spell in your spell repertoire by using a spell slot of an appropriate spell rank.

You add to this spell repertoire as you increase in level. Each time you get a spell slot, you add a spell of the same rank to your spell repertoire. When you gain access to a new rank of spells, your first new spell is always the spell granted by your chosen connection, but you can choose the other spells. At 2nd level, you select another 1st-rank spell; at 3rd level, you gain a new spell from your chosen connection and two other 2nd-rank spells, and so on. When you add spells, you might select a higher-rank version of a spell you already know so that you can cast a heightened version of that spell.

Though you gain them at the same rate, your spell slots and the spells in your spell repertoire are separate. If a feat or other ability adds a spell to your spell repertoire, it wouldn't give you another spell slot, and vice versa.

Swapping Spells in Your Repertoire

As you gain new spells in your spell repertoire, you might want to replace some of the spells you previously learned. Each time you gain a level and learn new spells, you can swap out one of your old spells for a different spell of the same rank. This spell can be a cantrip, but you can't swap out epiphany spells or connection spells. You can also swap out spells by retraining during downtime.

Witchwarper The collection of spells you can cast is called your spell repertoire. At 1st level, you learn two 1st-rank spells of your choice and four cantrips of your choice as well as an additional spell and cantrip from your paradox. You choose these from the common spells from the tradition corresponding to your paradox. You can cast any spell in your spell repertoire by using a spell slot of an appropriate spell rank.

You add to this spell repertoire as you increase in level. Each time you get a spell slot, you add a spell to your spell repertoire of the same rank. At 2nd level, select another 1st-rank spell; at 3rd level, you gain a new spell from your paradox and two other 2nd-rank spells, and so on. When you add spells, you might add a higher-rank version of a spell you already have, so you can cast a heightened version of that spell.

Though you gain them at the same rate, your spell slots and the spells in your spell repertoire are separate. If a feat or other ability adds a spell to your spell repertoire, it wouldn't give you another spell slot, and vice versa.

Swapping Spells in Your Repertoire

As you gain new spells in your repertoire, you might want to replace some of the spells you previously learned. Each time you gain a level and learn new spells, you can swap out one of your old spells for a different spell of the same rank. This spell can be a cantrip, but you can't swap out spells gained from your paradox. You can also swap out spells by retraining during downtime.

Witchwarper Spellcasting.name: 巫战扭曲者施法 Witchwarper Spellcasting
Witchwarper Spellcasting.description:
你的悖论赋予你魔法力量。你可以使用“施放法术”活动来施放法术。作为巫战扭曲者，当你施放法术时，你也许会高声描述自己对其他现实的启示，同时伴随着优雅的手势，奥术方程或神秘符号在你周围炽燃闪耀。

每天，你最多可以施放三个1环法术。你必须知晓法术才能施放它们，而你通过法术库职业特性来习得这些法术。你每天能够施放的法术数量称为你的法术位。

随着你作为巫战扭曲者的等级提升，你每天可施放的法术数量会增加，你能够施放的最高法术环阶也会提高。

你的某些法术需要你进行一次法术攻击，以判断它们有多有效；或者让你的敌人针对你的法术DC进行掷骰（通常是尝试一次豁免检定）。你的法术攻击调整值和法术DC使用你的魅力或智力调整值，取决于你为关键属性所作的选择。

法术升阶

当你获得2环及更高环阶的法术位时，你可以用较低环阶法术的更强版本来填充这些法术位。这会提高该法术的环阶，使其升阶至与法术位相匹配。你必须在你的法术库中拥有你想以该环阶施放的法术，才能将其升阶到那个环阶。许多法术在升阶到特定环阶时都会获得特定强化。

戏法

你的部分法术是戏法。戏法是一种特殊类型的法术，不使用法术位。你可以随意施放戏法，每天施放任意次数。戏法总是自动升阶至你等级的一半并向上取整——这通常等于你所拥有的最高巫战扭曲者法术位环阶。例如，作为1级巫战扭曲者，你的戏法是1环法术；而作为5级巫战扭曲者，你的戏法则是3环法术。

扭曲法术

你可以创造被称为扭曲法术的强大魔法现象。扭曲法术是一种专注法术。施放一个扭曲法术需要消耗1点专注点，而你起始拥有一个包含1点专注点的专注池。你会在每日准备期间补满你的专注池，并且你可以通过花费10分钟使用“重新专注”活动，沉思无限世界或进行量子魔法研究，来恢复1点专注点。

专注法术和戏法类似，会自动升阶至你等级的一半并向上取整。专注法术不需要法术位，而且你不能使用法术位来施放它们。选取专长可以让你获得更多专注法术并增大你的专注池规模，不过你的专注池永远不能容纳超过3点专注点。

与其他专注法术不同，扭曲法术具有锚定特征。这个特征意味着你只能在你的量子场处于激活状态时使用扭曲法术，并且当你施放扭曲法术时，你会自动维持你的量子场。

你根据你的悖论习得扭曲法术。

Your paradox grants you magical power. You can cast spells using the Cast a Spell activity. As a witchwarper, when you cast spells, you might describe your revelations about other realities aloud, accompanied by elegant gestures while arcane equations or occult symbols blaze around you.

Each day, you can cast up to three 1st-rank spells. You must know spells to cast them, and you learn them via the spell repertoire class feature. The number of spells you can cast each day is called your spell slots.

As you increase in level as a witchwarper, your number of spells per day increases, as does the highest rank of spells you can cast.

Some of your spells require you to attempt a spell attack to see how effective they are or have your enemies roll against your spell DC (typically by attempting a saving throw). Your spell attack modifiers and spell DCs use your Charisma or Intelligence modifier, depending on which you chose for your key attribute.

Heightening Spells

When you get spell slots of 2nd rank and higher, you can fill those slots with stronger versions of lower-rank spells. This increases the spell's rank, heightening it to match the spell slot. You must have a spell in your spell repertoire at the rank you want to cast in order to heighten it to that rank. Many spells have specific improvements when they're heightened to certain ranks.

Cantrips

Some of your spells are cantrips. A cantrip is a special type of spell that doesn't use spell slots. You can cast a cantrip at will, any number of times per day. A cantrip is always automatically heightened to half your level rounded up—this is usually equal to the highest rank of witchwarper spell slot you have. For example, as a 1st-level witchwarper, your cantrips are 1st-rank spells, and as a 5th-level witchwarper, your cantrips are 3rd-rank spells.

Warp Spells

You can create powerful magical phenomena known as warp spells. Warp spells are a type of focus spell. It costs 1 Focus Point to cast a warp spell, and you start with a focus pool of 1 Focus Point. You refill your focus pool during your daily preparations, and you can regain 1 Focus Point by spending 10 minutes using the Refocus activity to contemplate infinite worlds or conduct quantum magical research.

Focus spells are automatically heightened to half your level rounded up, much like cantrips. Focus spells don't require spell slots, and you can't cast them using spell slots. Taking feats can give you more focus spells and increase the size of your focus pool, though your focus pool can never hold more than 3 Focus Points.

Warp spells have the anchoring trait, unlike other focus spells. This trait means you can only use warp spells while your quantum field is active, and you automatically Sustain your quantum field when you cast warp spells.

You learn warp spells based on your paradox.

Battleglove.name: 战斗手套 Battleglove
Battleglove.description:
升级： 1

这些耐用的手套套在持用者的双手（或其他附肢）上，指关节处装有配重板或尖刺。

Upgrades: 1

These durable gloves fit over a wielder's hands (or other appendages) and feature weighted plates or spikes over the knuckles.

Comm Unit.name: 通讯单元 Comm Unit
Comm Unit.description:
个人通讯器是一种口袋大小的设备，结合了小型便携式计算机与蜂窝通信装置，使其能够在行星范围内，以音频和文本两种格式与其他通讯器进行即时无线通信。个人通讯器还内置计算器、手电筒（以你为中心5英尺半径内发出明亮光照，并在接下来的5英尺内发出微光）、可访问任何本地信息圈的浏览器，以及若干娱乐选项（包括游戏）。

集成于护甲中的个人通讯器具备一些语音激活功能；你可以在不需要空闲手的情况下，以音频格式与其他通讯器通信并接收回复，但输入消息、浏览信息圈或使用应用程序仍至少需要使用一只手。

能够在更远距离上运作的通讯器就没那么便携了；它们内置发电机以提供所需的电力，并依赖启用中的漂流信标进行通信。这类通讯器的短期使用服务在大多数大型聚居地都可以买到。

A personal comm unit is a pocket-sized device that combines a minor portable computer and a cellular communications device, allowing instantaneous wireless communication with other comm units in both audio- and text-based formats at planetary range. A personal comm unit also includes a calculator, a flashlight (emits bright light in a 5-foot radius around you and dim light in the next 5 feet), a browser that accesses any local infospheres, and several entertainment options (including games).

Personal comm units integrated into armor have some voice-activated capabilities; you can communicate with other comm units in audio-based formats and receive responses without needing a free hand, but typing a message, browsing the infosphere, or using an app requires the use of at least one hand.

Comm units that function at longer ranges aren't as portable; they include built-in generators that provide the necessary amount of power and rely on active Drift beacons to communicate. Short-term use of these units can be purchased in most major settlements.

Hypopen (Commercial).name: 低氧笔（商用） Hypopen (Commercial)
Hypopen (Commercial).description:
这个小型圆柱体内含有专门化的纳米机器人，它们可以：

  • 移除 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏} 状况
  • 使 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心} 状况的值降低 1。

This tiny cylinder contains specialized nanites that either

  • Remove the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} condition
  • Decrease the value of the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened} condition by 1.

Medpatch (Commercial).name: 医疗贴片（商用） Medpatch (Commercial)
Medpatch (Commercial).description:
激活 1 (manipulate)

医疗贴片会加速身体的自然愈合。你恢复 @Damage[(1d6)[healing]] 生命值，并在 10 分钟内对抗疾病和毒药的豁免检定获得 +1 物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{效果：医疗贴片}

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Medpatches accelerate the body's natural healing. You regain @Damage[(1d6)[healing]] Hit Points and gain a +1 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{Effect: Medpatch}

Container (Ordinary).name: 容器（普通） Container (Ordinary)
Container (Ordinary).description:
容器包括背包、公文包、旅行袋和手提包。容器最多可容纳 4 Bulk，其中前 2 Bulk 的物品不计入你的 Bulk 上限。如果你是在携带或收纳该容器，而不是将其佩戴在身上，则其 Bulk 为轻型而非可忽略。

Containers include backpacks, briefcases, duffel bags, and handbags. A container holds up to 4 Bulk and the first 2 Bulk of those items don't count against your Bulk limits. If you're carrying or stowing the container rather than wearing it on your person, its Bulk is light instead of negligible.

Semi-Auto Pistol.name: 半自动手枪 Semi-Auto Pistol
Semi-Auto Pistol.description:
升级： 1

这把手枪会在每次射击后自动弹出用过的弹壳并装填新的弹药。

Upgrades: 1

This pistol automatically ejects used cartridges and loads new ammunition after every shot fired.

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一股标记魔法存在的脉冲。你不会获得魔法存在或不存在以外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你或者你盟友的魔法物品以及持续法术。仅当幻术魔法的环级低于你的侦测魔法环级时，你才能侦测幻术魔法。但是，具有幻术灵光但是没有在外表上做伪装的物品（例如一瓶隐形药水），通常能够正常侦测。

升阶（3环级） 你能知晓法术侦测出的最强魔法效果的环级或等级，具体由GM决定。

升阶（4环级） 如3环级，你也能指出最高环级魔法的来源。如同一种模糊感官，你不会了解具体的位置，但是可以将来源锁定到5尺立方（或者最近的那个五尺立方，如果来源体积比这个区域更大）。

Figment.name: 虚构幻术 Figment
Figment.description:
你创造出简单的声音或图像的幻术。声音会为法术添加听觉特征，且不能包含能被理解的单词或复杂的音乐。图像会为法术添加视觉特征，但是它不能大于5尺边长的立方体，且在15尺的距离内观察会发现它的构造明显很粗糙且缺乏细节。当你施放或维持该法术时，你能尝试用幻术让人@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{分神 Create a Diversion}，这会为你的欺骗检定提供+2环境加值。若对某个生物进行的此尝试失败了，该生物就不会相信虚构幻术。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.2Hg3a06gZCSnUgSA]{法术效果：虚构幻术}

Injury Echo.name: 伤害回响 Injury Echo
Injury Echo.description:
你将来自未来或过去的一处伤势显现出来，以在当下伤害一个生物。选择钝击、穿刺或挥砍伤害。目标受到所选类型的1d8伤害，并进行一次基础意志豁免。如果目标豁免失败，并且在你的下个回合结束前再次受到相同类型的伤害，则它还会受到额外的 @Damage[ceil((@item.level)/2)d4[persistent,bleed]] 伤害。

强化（+2） 初始伤害增加1d8，且失败时的持续伤害增加1d4。

You manifest an injury from the future or past to harm a creature in the present. Choose bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage. The target takes 1d8 of the selected damage type with a basic Will save.
